1Chronicles1:12 Patrusim, Kasluhim sibawa Kréta. Mennang iyanaritu toriyolona tau Filistingngé." 
1Chronicles1:13 Ana'-ana' worowanéna Kanaan iyanaritu Sidon, iya macowaé sibawa Hét. Mennang iyanaritu toriyolona bangsa-bangsa iya riteppué situru asenna mennang." 
1Chronicles1:14 Kanaan iyanaritu toriyolona towi tau Yébusié, Amorié, Girgasié," 
1Chronicles1:15 Héwi, Arki, Sini," 
1Chronicles1:16 Arwadi, Semari sibawa Hamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Ana'-ana' worowanéna Sém iyanaritu Elam, Asyur, Arpakhsad, Lud, Aram, Us, Hul, Géter sibawa Mésékh. Mennang iyanaritu toriyolona bangsa-bangsa iya riteppué situru asenna mennang." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpakhsad iyanaritu ambo'na Sélah, na Sélah ambo'na Eber." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eber mappunnai duwa ana' worowané; iya mammulangngé riyasengngi Pélég nasaba ri wettunnai natabbagé-bagé bangsa-bangsaé ri linoé; iya maduwaé riyasengngi Yoktan. 
1Chronicles1:20 Wija-wijanna Yoktan iyanaritu tau Almodad, Séléf, Hazar-Mawét, Yérah," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoram, Uzal, Dikla," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebal, Abimaél, Syéba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofir, Hawila sibawa Yobab." 
1Chronicles1:24 Assossorenna toriyolona bangsa Israélié polé ri Sém lettu ri Abraham matturu-turuseng iyanaritu mangoloéwé: Sém Arpakhsad Sélah Eber Pélég Réhu Sérug Nahor Térah Abram (riisseng towi selaku Abraham). 
1Chronicles1:25  
1Chronicles1:26  
1Chronicles1:27  
1Chronicles1:28 Abraham mappunnai duwa ana' worowané, iyanaritu Ishak sibawa Ismaél." 
1Chronicles1:29 Iyanaé ana'-ana'na Ismaél: Nébayot, iya macowaé, nainappa Kédar, Adbeel, Mibsam," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misma, Duma, Masa, Hadad, Téma," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yétur, Nafis sibawa Kédma." 
1Chronicles1:32 Abraham mappunnai gundi asenna Ketura. Polé ri gundi'naro lolongengngi ana'-ana' worowané iya riyasengngé Zimran, Yoksan, Médan, Midian, Isybak sibawa Suah. Yoksan mappunnai ana'-ana' worowané iya riyasengngé: Syéba sibawa Dédan." 
1Chronicles1:33 Midian mappunnai ana'-ana' worowané iya riyasengngé: Efa, Efer, Hanokh, Abida sibawa Eldaa." 
1Chronicles1:34 Ishak ana' Abraham mappunnai duwa ana' worowané, iyanaritu Esau sibawa Yakub (iya riissengngétto selaku Israél)." 
1Chronicles1:35 Ana'-ana' worowanéna Esau iyanaritu Elifas, Réhuél, Yéus, Yaélam sibawa Korah." 
1Chronicles1:36 Elifas iyanaritu toriyolona suku Téman, Omar, Zéfi, Gaétam, Kénas, Timna sibawa Amalék." 
1Chronicles1:37 Réhuél iyanaritu toriyolona suku Nahat, Zérah, Syama sibawa Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Pabbanuwa tulénna tana Edom iyanaritu wija-wijanna ana'-ana'na Séir, iyanaritu Lotan, Syobal, Zibéon, Ana, Disyon, Ezer sibawa Disyan. Ana'-ana' worowanéna Lotan iyanaritu Hori sibawa Homam. Lotan mappunnaiwi séddi silessurenna makkunrai asenna Timna. Ana'-ana' worowanéna Syobal iyanaritu Alyan, Manahat, Ebal, Syéfi sibawa Onam. Ana'-ana' worowanéna Zibéon iyanaritu Aya sibawa Ana. Ana'na Ana iyanaritu Disyon, na ana'na Disyon iyanaritu Hamran, Esyban, Yitran sibawa Kéran. Ana'-ana' worowanéna Ezer iyanaritu Bilhan, Zaawan sibawa Yaakan. Ana'-ana' worowanéna Disyon iyanaritu Us sibawa Aran." 
1Chronicles1:39  
1Chronicles1:40  
1Chronicles1:41  
1Chronicles1:42  
1Chronicles1:43 Ri wettu dé'napa arung mapparénta ri Israél, tana Edom riparéntai matturu-turuseng ri arung-ngarung iya mangoloéwé: Béla ana' Béor polé ri Dinhaba Yobab ana' Zérah polé ri Bozra Husyam polé ri daérana tau Témangngé Hadad ana' Bédad polé ri Awit (aléna ritu caui tau Midiangngé ri laleng musué ri daéra Moab) Samla polé ri Masyréka Saul polé ri Réhobot ri wiring saloé Baal Hanan ana' Akhbor Hadad polé ri Pahi (bainéna riyaseng Méhétabeel, ana' Matréd sibawa eppona Mézahab)" 
1Chronicles1:44  
1Chronicles1:45  
1Chronicles1:46

1Chronicles1:49  
1Chronicles1:50  
1Chronicles1:51 Bangsa Edongngé poléi ri suku Timna, Alya, Yétét," 
1Chronicles1:52 Ohalibama, Ela, Pinon," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kénas, Téman, Mibzar," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magdiél sibawa Iram, tungke'-tungke' situru aseng kapala sukunna." 
1Chronicles2:1 Ana' worowanéna Yakub engka seppulo duwa tau: Rubén, Siméon, Léwi, Yéhuda, Isakhar, Zébulon," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, Yusuf, Bényamin, Naftali, Gad, Asyer." 
1Chronicles2:3 Ana' worowanéna Yéhuda engka lima tau. Polé ri bainéna iya riyasengngé Batsyua, makkunrai Kanaangngé, jajiwi Er, Onan sibawa Séla; polé ri bainéna iya riyasengngé Tamar, iyanaritu ménéttunna muto, jajiwi Pérés sibawa Zérah. Iyaro Er ana' macowana Yéhuda maja senna, angkanna riyuno ri Puwangnge." 
1Chronicles2:4  
1Chronicles2:5 Pérés mappunnai duwa ana' worowané, iyanaritu Hézron sibawa Hamul." 
1Chronicles2:6 Zérah mappunnai lima ana' worowané: Zimri, Etan, Héman, Kalkol sibawa Dara." 
1Chronicles2:7 Akhan ana' Karmi wija-wijanna Zérah, papoléi abala ri umma Israélié nasaba malai barang rappa ammusureng iya ripallaingngé untu' Allataala." 
1Chronicles2:8 Ana' worowanéna Etan iyanaritu Azarya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Hézron mappunnai tellu ana' worowané: Yérahmeel, Ram sibawa Kaléb." 
1Chronicles2:10 Jori assossorenna polé ri Ram lettu ri Isai iyanaritu makkuwaiyé: Ram Aminadab Nahason (séddiwi tau ponggawana suku Yéhuda) 
1Chronicles2:11 Salmon Boas 
1Chronicles2:12 Obéd Isai. 
1Chronicles2:13 Ana' worowanéna Isai engka pitu. Iyanaé aseng-ngasenna mennang situru rappi umuru'na: Eliab, Abinadab, Siméa," 
1Chronicles2:14 Nétaneel, Radai," 
1Chronicles2:15 Ozem, Daud." 
1Chronicles2:16 Mappunnai towi Isai duwa ana' makkunrai: Zéruya sibawa Abigail. Zéruya mappunnai tellu tau ana': Abisai, Yoab sibawa Asaél." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigail kawingngi sibawa Yéter wijanna Ismaél. Mappunnai mennang séddi ana' worowané riyaseng Amasa. 
1Chronicles2:18 Kaléb ana' Hézron kawingngi sibawa Azuba nanalolongeng séddi ana' makkunrai riyaseng Yériot. Iyaé Yériot mappunnaiwi tellu ana' worowané: Yézer, Sobab, sibawa Ardon." 
1Chronicles2:19 Maténana Azuba, kawingngi Kaléb sibawa Efrat nanalolongeng séddi ana' worowané riyaseng Hur." 
1Chronicles2:20 Ana' worowanéna Hur riysengngi Uri sibawa eppona riyasengngi Bézaleel. 
1Chronicles2:21 Wettunna Hézron makkéumuru 60 taung kawingngi sibawa ana'daranna Giléad, ana' Makhir. Lolongengngi mennang séddi ana' worowané riyaseng Ségub," 
1Chronicles2:22 na Ségub lolongengngi séddi ana' worowané riyaseng Yair, iya mappunnaiyé 23 désa ri daérana Giléad." 
1Chronicles2:23 Iyakiya akkarungeng Gésur sibawa Aram caui 60 désa ri daéraéro muttama'ni désa-désana tau Yair-é, désa Kénat, enrengngé désa-désa baiccu'é ri seddéna. Sininna tau iya monroé kuwaro iyanaritu wija-wijanna Makhir ambo'na Giléad." 
1Chronicles2:24 Maténana Hézron, Kaléb ana'na kawingngi sibawa Efrat jandana ambo'na. Ana'na mennang iya worowané riyasengngi Asyur; aléna ritu patettongngi kota Tékoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Yérahmeel ana' macowana Hézron mappunnai lima ana' worowané: Ram iya macowaé, nainappa Buna, Oren, Ozem sibawa Ahia." 
1Chronicles2:26 Ram mappunnai tellu ana' worowané: Maas, Yamin sibawa Eker. Yérahmeel mappunnaiwi bainé laingngé riyaseng Atara; nanalolongengngi mennang ana' worowané riyaseng Onam." 
1Chronicles2:27  
1Chronicles2:28 Ana' worowanéna Onam engka duwa tau: Samai sibawa Yada. Samai mappunnai towi duwa ana' worowané, iyanaritu Nadab sibawa Abisur." 
1Chronicles2:29 Abisur kawingngi sibawa Abihail nalolongeng mennang duwa ana' worowané: Ahban sibawa Molid. 
1Chronicles2:30 Nadab kakana Abisur mappunnai towi duwa ana' worowané iya riyasengngé Séléd sibawa Apaim, iyakiya matéi Séléd temmappunnai ana' worowané." 
1Chronicles2:31 Apaim iyanaritu ambo'na Yiséi, Yiséi ambo'na Sésan, na Sésan ambo'na Ahlai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Yada padaorowanéna Samai mappunnai duwa ana' worowané riyaseng Yéter sibawa Yonatan. Iyakiya Yéter matéi temmappunnai ana' worowané. 
1Chronicles2:33 Yonatan mappunnai duwa ana' worowané, iyanaritu Pélét sibawa Zaza. Iya maneng mennang iyanaritu wijanna Yérahmeel." 
1Chronicles2:34 Sésan dé' nappunnai ana' worowané, banna ana' makkunrai. Atanna, séddiwi tau Maséré riyaseng Yarha," 
1Chronicles2:35 napasiyalai sibawa sala séddinna ana'na. Lolongengngi mennang ana' worowané iya riyasengngé Atai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Jori wija-wijanna polé ri Atai lettu ri Elisama matturu-turuseng iyanaritu mangoloéwé: Atai Natan Zabad Eflal Obéd Yéhu Azarya Hélés Elasa Sismai Salum Yékamya Elisama 
1Chronicles2:37  
1Chronicles2:38  
1Chronicles2:39  
1Chronicles2:40  
1Chronicles2:41  
1Chronicles2:42 Kaléb padaorowanéna Yérahmeel mappunnai séddi ana' worowané riyaseng Mésa. Ana' macowai. Mésa iyanaritu ambo'na Zif, Zif ambo'na Marésa. Marésa ambo'na Hébron." 
1Chronicles2:43 Hébron mappunnai eppa ana' worowané: Korah, Tapuah, Rékém sibawa Séma." 
1Chronicles2:44 Séma iyanaritu ambo'na Raham. Eppona Séma riyasengngi Yorkéam. Rékém kakana Séma iyanaritu ambo'na Samai; 
1Chronicles2:45 Samai ambo'na Maon, na Maon ambo'na Bét-Zur." 
1Chronicles2:46 Kaléb mappunnaiwi gundi riyaseng Efa. Lolongengngi mennang tellu ana' worowané riyaseng Haran, Moza aibawa Gazes. Mappunnai towi Haran ana' iya riyasengngé Gazes. (" 
1Chronicles2:47 Séddi tau riyaseng Yohdai iya mappunnaiyé enneng ana' worowané: Régém, Yotam, Gésan, Pélét, Efa sibawa Saaf.)" 
1Chronicles2:48 Kaléb mappunnai gundi laing riyaseng Maakha. Nasibawang aléna lolongengngi Kaléb duwa ana' worowané riyaseng: Séber sibawa Tirhana; 
1Chronicles2:49 nainappa lolongeng mennang duwa ana' worowanési riyaseng: Saaf sibawa Séwa. Saaf iyanaritu patettongngi kota Madmana, sibawa Séwa patettongngi kota Makhbéna sibawa Gibéa. Mappunnai towi Kaléb séddi ana' makkunrai riyaseng Akhsa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Iyaé mangoloé iyanaritu wijannato Kaléb: Hur iyanaritu ana' macowana polé ri Kaléb sibawa bainéna iya riyasengngé Efrat. Syobal ana' Hur iyanaritu patettongngi kota Kiryat-Yéarim. 
1Chronicles2:51 Salma ana'na iya maduwaé iyanaritu patettongngi kota Bétléhém; sibawa Haréf ana'na iya matellué patettongngi kota Bét-Gader. 
1Chronicles2:52 Syobal patettongngi kota Kiryat-Yéarim iyanaritu toriyolona tau Haroé, toriyolona sitengnga pabbanuwana Ménuhot," 
1Chronicles2:53 sibawa toriyolona appang-ngappang iya monroé ri Kiryat-Yéarim, iyanaritu appang Yétri, Puti, Sumati sibawa Misrai. (Pabbanuwana kota Zora sibawa Esytaol iyanaritu sining tau iya assalennaé polé ri appang-ngappangngéro.)" 
1Chronicles2:54 Salma pappatettonna kota Bétléhém iyanaritu toriyolona tau Nétofaé, tau Atarot-Bét-Yoab-é, sibawa tau Zorié, iyanaritu sala séddinna polé ri iya duwa appang iya monroé ri Manahti." 
1Chronicles2:55 Polé ri appanna Tirati, Simati sibawa Sukati iya monroé ri kota Yabés engka sining tau iya maccaé ri laleng passaleng marokié sibawa mallémbaé sure'-sure' penting. Mennang iyanaritu tau Kéni iya kawingngé sibawa tau Rékab." 
1Chronicles3:1 Ana'-ana' worowanéna Daud iya jajiyé ri Hébron, situru atturu-turuseng umuru'na iyanaritu: Amnon – indo'na riyasengngi Ahinoam tau Yizreel Daniél – indo'na riyasengngi Abigail tau Karmél Absalom – indo'na riyasengngi Maakha ana' makkunrainna Talmai arung Gésur Adonia – indo'na riyasengngi Hagit Séfaca – indo'na riyasengngi Abital Yitréam – indo'na riyasengngi Egla" 
1Chronicles3:2  
1Chronicles3:3  
1Chronicles3:4 Iya enneng ana' worowanéna Daudro jajiwi ri Hébron onronna Daud mapparénta pituttaung sitengnga ittana. Ri Yérusalém, mapparéntai Daud 33 taung ittana," 
1Chronicles3:5 na maéga ana' worowanéna jaji kuwaro. Nasibawang bainéna iya riyasengngé Batsyéba ana' Amiél, lolongengngi Daud eppa ana' worowané iya jajiyé ri Yérusalém: Siméa, Sobab, Natan sibawa Salomo." 
1Chronicles3:6 Engkato aséra ana' worowanéna iya laingngé: Yibhar, Elisua, Elifélét," 
1Chronicles3:7 Nogah, Néfég, Yafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisama, Elyada sibawa Elifélét." 
1Chronicles3:9 Ri lainnaé mennanro engka mupa ana'-ana' worowanéna Daud polé ri gundi-gundi'na. Mappunnai towi séddi ana' makkunrai iya riyasengngé Tamar. 
1Chronicles3:10 Assossorenna arung-ngarung Israélié polé ri Arung Salomo lettu ri Yosia iyanaritu: Salomo, Réhabéam, Abiam, Asa, Yosafat, Yéhoram, Ahazia, Yoas, Amazia, Uzia, Yotam, Ahas, Hizkia, Manasyé, Amon sibawa Yosia." 
1Chronicles3:11  
1Chronicles3:12  
1Chronicles3:13  
1Chronicles3:14  
1Chronicles3:15 Yosia mappunnai eppa ana' worowané: Yohanan, Yoyakim, Zédékia sibawa Yoahas." 
1Chronicles3:16 Yoyakim mappunnai duwa ana' worowané iya riyasengngé Yoyakhin sibawa Zédékia. 
1Chronicles3:17 Iyanaé wija-wijanna Yoyakhin, arung iya natawangngé tau Babél-é. Ana' worowanéna engka 7 tau: Séaltiél," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malkhiram, Pédaya, Syénazar, Yékamya, Hosama sibawa Nédabya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Pédaya mappunnai duwa ana' worowané: Zérubabél sibawa Siméi. Zérubabél mappunnai duwa ana' worowané riyaseng Mésulam sibawa Hananya, sibawa séddi ana' makkunrai riyaseng Sélomit." 
1Chronicles3:20 Engka topa lima ana' worowanéna, iyanaritu Hasuba, Ohél, Bérékhya, Hasaja sibawa Yusab-Héséd." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hananya mappunnai duwa ana' worowané: Pélaca sibawa Yésaya. Yésaya iyanaritu ambo'na Réfaya, Réfaya ambo'na Arnan, Arnan ambo'na Obaja, na Obaja ambo'na Sékanya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Sékanya mappunnai séddi ana' worowané riyaseng Sémaya, na Sémaya mappunnai lima ana' worowané riyaseng Hatus, Yigal, Bariah, Néarya sibawa Safat." 
1Chronicles3:23 Ana' worowanéna Néarya engka tellu tau: Elyoénai, Hizkia sibawa Azrikam." 
1Chronicles3:24 Elyoénai mappunnai pitu ana' worowané: Hodawya, Elyasib, Pélaya, Akub, Yohanan, Délaya sibawa Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Mangoloéwé iyanaritu sibagiyang wija-wijanna Yéhuda: Pérés, Hézron, Karmi, Hur sibawa Syobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 Syobal iyanaritu ambo'na Réaya, Réaya ambo'na Yahat. Yahat mappunnai duwa ana' worowané: Ahumai sibawa Lahad. Mennang ritu toriyolona pabbanuwana kota Zora." 
1Chronicles4:3 Ana' worowané macowana polé ri Kaléb sibawa bainéna iya riyasengngé Efrat iyanaritu Hur. Wija-wijanna Hur iyanaritu pappatettonna kota Bétléhém. Etam, Pnuél sibawa Ezer iyanaritu ana'-ana'na Hur. Etam mappunnai tellu ana' worowané riyaseng Yizreel, Isma sibawa Idbas, sibawa séddi ana' makkunrainna riyaseng Hazélélponi. Pnuél patettongngi kota Gedor sibawa Ezer patettongngi kota Husa." 
1Chronicles4:4  
1Chronicles4:5 Asyhur pappatettonna kota Tékoa mappunnai duwa bainé, iyanaritu Héla sibawa Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Nasibawang Naara lolongengngi eppa ana' worowané: Ahuzam, Héfer, Teméni sibawa Ahastari." 
1Chronicles4:7 Nasibawang Héla, lolongengngi Asyhur tellu ana' worowané, iyanaritu, Zérét, Yézohar sibawa Etnan." 
1Chronicles4:8 Anub sibawa Hazobéba iyanaritu ana'-ana' worowanéna Kos toriyolona appang wija-wijanna Aharhél ana' Harum. 
1Chronicles4:9 Engka séddi worowané riyaseng Yabés lebbi ripakalebbii naiya silessu-silessurenna. Riwéréngngi aseng Yabés ri indo'na, nasaba manrasa-rasa senna'i indo'na wettunna najajiyang." 
1Chronicles4:10 Iyakiya massempajangngi Yabés lao ri Allataala iya nasompaé tau Israélié, adanna, “Oh Allataala, barakkakika, sibawa tennapodo lowangiwi daéraku. Linrungika sibawa pabélaiwi abalaé kuwammengngi dé' umanrasa-rasa.” Nanatarimai Allataala paréllaunna." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelub silessurenna Suha mappunnai ana' worowané riyaseng Méhir. Ana'na Méhir iyanaritu Eston," 
1Chronicles4:12 na Eston mappunnai tellu ana' worowané, iyanaritu Bét-Rafa, Paséah sibawa Tehina, iya patettongngéngngi kota Nahas. Wija-wijanna iyaro sining tauwé monroi ri kota Réka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Kénas mappunnai duwa ana' worowané riyaseng Otniél sibawa Séraya. Otniél mappunnai towi duwa ana' worowané, iyanaritu Hatat sibawa Méonotai." 
1Chronicles4:14 Ana'na Méonotai iyanaritu Ofra. Ana'na Zéraya iyanaritu Yoab pappatettonna Lompo Pattukangngé. Sininna pabbanuwaé ri lompo'éro iyanaritu maccai mébbu ébbu-ébbu lima. 
1Chronicles4:15 Kaléb ana' Yéfune mappunnai tellu ana' worowané: Iru, Ela sibawa Naam. Ana' Ela iyanaritu Kénas." 
1Chronicles4:16 Yéhaléleel mappunnai eppa ana' worowané: Zif, Zifa, Tiréya sibawa Asareel." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ana' worowanéna Ezra engka eppa tau: Yéter, Méréd, Efer sibawa Yalon. Méréd kawingngi sibawa Bica ana' makkunrainna arung Maséré. Lolongengngi mennang séddi ana' makkunrai riyaseng Miryam, sibawa duwa ana' worowané riyaseng Samai sibawa Yisba. Yisba iyanaritu pappatettonna kota Estemoa. Méréd kawing towi sibawa séddi makkunrai polé ri suku Yéhuda; ana'na mennang iya worowané engka tellu tau: Yéréd pappatettonna kota Gedor, Héber pappatettonna kota Sokho, sibawa Yékutiél pappatettonna kota Zanoah." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ana' worowanéna Ezra engka eppa tau: Yéter, Méréd, Efer sibawa Yalon. Méréd kawingngi sibawa Bica ana' makkunrainna arung Maséré. Lolongengngi mennang séddi ana' makkunrai riyaseng Miryam, sibawa duwa ana' worowané riyaseng Samai sibawa Yisba. Yisba iyanaritu pappatettonna kota Estemoa. Méréd kawing towi sibawa séddi makkunrai polé ri suku Yéhuda; ana'na mennang iya worowané engka tellu tau: Yéréd pappatettonna kota Gedor, Héber pappatettonna kota Sokho, sibawa Yékutiél pappatettonna kota Zanoah." 
1Chronicles4:18  
1Chronicles4:19 Hodia kawingngi sibawa ana'daranna Naham. Wija-wijanna mennang iyanaritu toriyolona appang Garmi sibawa appang Maakha. Appang Garmi monroi ri kota Kéhila, na appang Maakha monroi ri kota Estemoa." 
1Chronicles4:20 Simon mappunnai eppa ana' worowané: Amnon, Rina, Bénhanan sibawa Tilon. Yiséi mappunnai duwa ana' worowané: Zohét sibawa Bén-Zohét." 
1Chronicles4:21 Sala séddinna ana'na Yéhuda riyaseng Séla. Wija-wijanna iyanaritu: Er pappatettonna kota Lékha Lada pappatettonna kota Marésa Appang pattennung kaing lénangngé ri kota Bét-Asybéa Yokim Pabbanuwana kota Kozéba Yoas Saraf kawingngi sining makkunrai Moab-é nainappa lisu ri Bétléhém. Iyaro daftar-é riyalai polé ri catatang riyoloé. 
1Chronicles4:22  
1Chronicles4:23 Iya manenna mennang pakkébbu kendi sibawa bémpa untu' arungngé enrengngé monroi ri kota Nétaim sibawa Gedéra. 
1Chronicles4:24 Siméon mappunnai lima ana' worowané: Némuél, Yamin, Yarib, Zérah sibawa Saul." 
1Chronicles4:25 Wija-wijanna Saul iyanaritu mangoloéwé: Salum Mibsam Misma Hamuél Zakur Siméi. 
1Chronicles4:26  
1Chronicles4:27 Siméi mappunnai 22 ana': 16 worowané sibawa 6 makkunrai. Iyakiya sumpulolona Siméi céddé bawang ana'na. Wija-wijanna Siméon dé' nasingngéga wija-wijanna Yéhuda. 
1Chronicles4:28 Lettu ri wettunna Arung Daud, wija-wijanna Siméon monroi ri kota-kota mangoloéwé: Bérsyéba, Molada, Hazar-Sual," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bilha, Ezem, Tolad," 
1Chronicles4:30 Bétuél, Horma, Ziklag," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bét-Markabot, Hazar-Susim, Bét-Biri sibawa Saaraim." 
1Chronicles4:32 Monro towi mennang ri lima onrong iya laingngé, iyanaritu Etam, Ain, Rimon, Tokhen, Asan," 
1Chronicles4:33 sibawa ri kampong-kampong seddéna onrong-ngonrongngéro lettu sibbéla kota Baal ri bagiyang yajangmanorang. Makkuwaniro catatang iya engkaé ri wija-wijanna Siméon passalenna Assossorenna sibawa onrong-ngonrong naonroiyé mennang. 
1Chronicles4:34 Mangoloéwé iyanaritu aseng-ngasenna kapala appangngé ri laleng suku Siméon: Mésobab Yamlékh Yosa ana' Amazia Yoél Yéhu ana' Yosibya (Yosibya iyanaritu ana' Séraya, eppona Asiél), Elyoénai Yaakoba Yésohaya Asaya Adiél Yésimiél Bénaya Ziza ana' Siféi (jori assossorenna polé ri Siféi liyasé iyanaritu: Alon, Yédaya, Simri, Sémaya). Nasaba kaluwarga-kaluwargana mennang matterui tattamba," 
1Chronicles4:35  
1Chronicles4:36  
1Chronicles4:37  
1Chronicles4:38  
1Chronicles4:39 nallebba'na mennang liyajang lettu ri seddéna kota Gedor iya monroé ri seddéna lompo'é. Ri seddé alauna lompo'éro runtu'ni mennang padang iya macommo'é namalowang enrengngé tennang untu' olokolo'na mennang. Riyolo iyaro daéraé naonroiwi sining tau Ham iya tuwoé sibawa damé. 
1Chronicles4:40  
1Chronicles4:41 Wettunna Hizkia arung Yéhuda wijanna Siméonro nagasai Gedor. Naancuru'i mennang kéma-kémana pabbanuwana kotaéro sibawa tau Méuningngé, nainappa narukka pabbanuwana. Nainappa mennang mattette kuwaro nasaba maéga padanna untu' olokolo'na." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ri yawa pappimpinna ana'-ana' Yiséi, iyanaritu Pélaca, Néarya, Réfaya sibawa Uziél, 500 anggota iya laingngé polé ri suku Siméon létté ri Edom ri alau." 
1Chronicles4:43 Naunoi mennang sésa-sésana tau Amalé'é, nainappa mattette kuwaro mappammulai wettuéro." 
1Chronicles5:1 Rubén iyanaritu ana' macowana Yakub. Iyakiya nasaba purai Rubén nakédo salai sala séddinna gundi'na ambo'na, ha'na selaku ana' macowa ribébbui nariyabbéréyang lao ri Yusuf. Namuni makkuwaro iya kaminang mawatangngé polé ri yelle'na wija-wijanna Yakub tenniya suku Yusuf sangadinna suku Yéhuda. Mala iya bunge'-bunge'é mancaji arunna sininna umma Israélié iyanaritu polé ri suku Yéhudaro." 
1Chronicles5:2  
1Chronicles5:3 Rubén ana' macowana Yakub, mappunnai eppa ana' worowané: Hénokh, Palu, Hézron sibawa Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Iyanaé atturu-turusenna wija-wijanna Yoél: Sémaya, Gog, Siméi, Mikha, Réaya, Baal sibawa Bééra. Bééra iyanaritu pamimpinna suku Rubén wettunna ritikkeng ri Tiglat-Piléser arung Asyur, sibawa ritiwi ri appalirengngé." 
1Chronicles5:5  
1Chronicles5:6  
1Chronicles5:7 Ri laleng assossorengngé taroki towi kapala-kapala appang iya mangoloéwé ri laleng suku Rubén: Yéiél, Zakharia," 
1Chronicles5:8 sibawa Béla ana' Azas, eppona Séma polé ri appang Yoél. Suku Rubén monroi ri Aroér sibawa ri daéra iya mappammulaé polé ri Aroér lao ri manorang lettu ri Nébo sibawa Baal-Méon." 
1Chronicles5:9 Mappunnaiwi mennang maéga senna olokolo ri daéra Giléad. Rimakkuwannanaro, naonroiwi mennang daéra seddé alauna lettu ri padang kessi iya mallebba'é sibbéla Salo Efrat." 
1Chronicles5:10 Wettunna Arung Saul, nagasai suku Rubén sibawa nacaui tau Hagrié ri seddé alauna Giléad, nainappa natudangi wanuwaéro." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ri seddé manoranna daérana suku Rubén monroi suku Gad ri tana Basan lettu sibbéla Salkha ri seddé alau. 
1Chronicles5:12 Polé ri suku Gad-éro Yoél iyanaritu toriyolona appang iya mariyoloé, na Safam iyanaritu toriyolona appang nomoro duwaé. Yaénai sibawa Safat iyanaritu toriyolona appang-ngappang laingngé ri Basan." 
1Chronicles5:13 Sining tau laingngé ri laleng suku Gad muttama'i ri laleng pitu appang iya mangoloéwé: Mikhaél, Mésulam, Syéba, Yorai, Yakan, Ziya sibawa Eber." 
1Chronicles5:14 Mennang wija-wijanna Abihail ana' Huri. Atturuseng assossorenna mennang polé ri yawa liyasé iyanaritu makkuwaiyé: Abihail, Huri, Yaroah, Giléad, Mikhaél, Yésisai, Yahdo, Bus." 
1Chronicles5:15 Kapalana iyaro appang-ngappangngé iyanaritu Ahi ana' Abdiél, eppona Guni." 
1Chronicles5:16 Monroi mennang ri daéra Basan sibawa Giléad, sibawa kota-kota ri daéraéro enrengngé ri sininna padangngé ri Saron." 
1Chronicles5:17 Iyaé assossorengngé riyébbui ri wettunna Yotam arung Yéhuda, sibawa Yérobéam arung Israélié." 
1Chronicles5:18 Ri laleng suku Rubén, Gad sibawa suku Manasyé ri seddé alauna Yordan engka 44.760 prajuri'na iya tallatié sibawa mappangalamangngé ri laleng makkégunang kaliyawo, peddang sibawa pana." 
1Chronicles5:19 Mammusui mennang méwai suku Yétur, Nafis sibawa Nodab, iyanaritu suku-suku ri laleng bangsa Hagri." 
1Chronicles5:20 Iyaro prajuri-prajuri'é mateppe'i ri Allataala sibawa méllau tulung ri Aléna, naritarimana paréllaunna mennang ri Allataala sibawa mpéréngngi mennang apakalang lao risining tau Hagriéro sibawa naéwaé sikongkolo mennang." 
1Chronicles5:21 Nasaba iyaro musué kajajiyangngi nasaba élona Allataala, namaéga bali iya naunoé mennang. Natawang towi mennang 100.000 tau, sibawa rampasa 50.000 unta, 250.000 bimbala sibawa 2.000 kaleddé. Purairo mattette'ni mennang ri daéraéro lettu ri wettunna bangsa Israélié ri tawang sibawa ritiwi ri appalirengngé." 
1Chronicles5:22  
1Chronicles5:23 Sibagiyang suku Manasyé monroi ri daéra Basan lettu ri manorang sibbéla Baal-Hérmon, Senir sibawa Bulu Hérmon. Pédé maitta mennang pédé maéga." 
1Chronicles5:24 Iyanaé kapala-kapala appanna mennang: Héfer, Yiséi, Eliél, Azriél, Yérémia, Hodawya sibawa Yahdiél. Iya manenna mennang iyanaritu prajuri-prajuri iya poré." 
1Chronicles5:25 Dé' namatinulu tau Israélié lao ri Allataala iya nasompaé toriyolona. Nasalaiwi mennang nanassompa lao ri déwata-déwatana bangsa iya puraé napaddésu Allataala polé ri wanuwa Kanaan. 
1Chronicles5:26 Rimakkuwannanaro Allataala pakédoi atinna Pul arung Asyur, nanalaona gasai wanuwaéro. Riisseng towi Pul selaku Tiglat-Piléser. Nainappa suku Rubén, Gad sibawa suku Manasyé ri seddé alauna Yordan natiwii selaku tawangeng sibawa ripali lao ri Halah, Habor, Hara sibawa séddié onrong iya macawé'é ri Salo Gozan. Kuwaniro mennang monro sibawa mattette lettu essoéwé." 
1Chronicles6:1 Léwi mappunnai tellu ana' worowané: Gérson, Kéhat sibawa Mérari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Kéhat mappunnai eppa ana' worowané: Amram, Yizhar, Hébron sibawa Uziél." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amram mappunnai duwa ana' worowané, iyanaritu Harun sibawa Musa, nenniya séddi ana' makkunrai, iyanaritu Miryam. Harun mappunnai eppa ana' worowané: Nadab, Abihu, Eléazar sibawa Itamar." 
1Chronicles6:4 Atturu-turusenna assossorenna Eléazar iyanaritu makkuwaiyé: Pinéhas, Abisua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Buki, Uzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 Zérahya, Mérayot," 
1Chronicles6:7 Amarya, Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:8 Zadok, Ahimaas," 
1Chronicles6:9 Azarya, Yohanan," 
1Chronicles6:10 Azarya (mattumaniwi ri Bolana Puwangnge iya napatettongngé Arung Salomo ri Yérusalém)," 
1Chronicles6:11 Amarya, Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:12 Zadok, Salum," 
1Chronicles6:13 Hilkia, Azarya," 
1Chronicles6:14 Séraya, Yozadak." 
1Chronicles6:15 Iyaé Yozadak maccowéi ritiwi silaong tau Yéhudaé sibawa pabbanuwana Yérusalém laingngé wettunna Puwangnge palii mennang ri wanuwa laingngé naolai Nébukadnézar. 
1Chronicles6:16 Léwi mappunnai tellu ana' worowané, iyanaritu Gérson, Kéhat sibawa Mérari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Tungke'-tungke' mennang mappunnai ana'. Libni sibawa Siméi iyanaritu ana'-ana'na Gérson; 
1Chronicles6:18 Amram, Yizhar, Hébron sibawa Uziél iyanaritu ana'-ana'na Kéhat." 
1Chronicles6:19 Mahli sibawa Musi iyanaritu ana'-ana'na Mérari. 
1Chronicles6:20 Jori wija-wijanna Gérson iyanaritu: Libni, Yahat, Zima," 
1Chronicles6:21 Yoah, Ido, Zérah, Yéatrai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Jori wija-wijanna Kéhat iyanaritu: Aminadab, Korah, Asir," 
1Chronicles6:23 Elkana, Ebyasaf, Asir," 
1Chronicles6:24 Tahat, Uriél, Uzia, Saul." 
1Chronicles6:25 Elkana mappunnai duwa ana' worowané: Amasai sibawa Ahimot. 
1Chronicles6:26 Jori wija-wijanna Ahimot iyanaritu: Elkana, Zofai, Nahat," 
1Chronicles6:27 Eliab, Yéroham, Elkana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Samuél mappunnai duwa ana' worowané: Yoél iya macowaé, na Abia iya maloloé." 
1Chronicles6:29 Jori wija-wijanna Mérari iyanaritu: Mahli, Libni, Siméi, Uza," 
1Chronicles6:30 Siméa, Hagia, Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Sipongenna ripalétté Petti Assijancingngé ri onrong assompangngé ri Yérusalém, piléi Arung Daud sining tau iya mattanggung jawa'é ri élong poji-pojiyangngé ri Bolana Puwangnge." 
1Chronicles6:32 Tugasna mennang secara makkaléléngngi ri Kémana Puwangnge sangadi dé'napa napatettongngi Arung Salomo Bolana Puwangnge. 
1Chronicles6:33 Jori assossorenna sining tau iya riwéréngngé jamanro iyanaritu makkuwaiyé: Polé ri appang Kéhat: Héman ana' Yoél. Pamimping kalompo'nai pakkélong mammulangngé. Jori assossorenna polé ri yawa liyasé lettu ri Yakub iyanaritu: Héman, Yoél, Samuél," 
1Chronicles6:34 Elkana, Yéroham, Eliél, Toah," 
1Chronicles6:35 Zuf, Elkana, Mahat, Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 Elkana, Yoél, Azarya, Zéfanya," 
1Chronicles6:37 Tahat, Asir, Ebyasaf, Korah," 
1Chronicles6:38 Yizhar, Kéhat, Léwi, Yakub." 
1Chronicles6:39 Asaf iyanaritu pamimping kalompo pakkélong iya maduwaé. Jori assossorenna polé ri yawa liyasé lettu ri Léwi iyanaritu: Asaf, Bérékhya, Siméa," 
1Chronicles6:40 Mikhaél, Baaséya, Malkia," 
1Chronicles6:41 Etai, Zérah, Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 Etan, Zima, Siméi," 
1Chronicles6:43 Yahat, Gérson, Léwi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Etan iyanaritu pamimping kalompo pakkélong iya matellué; poléi ri appang Mérari. Jori assossorenna polé ri yawa liyasé lettu ri Léwi iyanaritu: Etan, Kisi, Abdi, Malukh," 
1Chronicles6:45 Hasabya, Amazia, Hilkia," 
1Chronicles6:46 Amzi, Bani, Semér," 
1Chronicles6:47 Mahli, Musi, Mérari, Léwi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Jama-jamang laingngé ri bola assompangngé riyabbéréyangngi lao ri sellao-sellaona mennang tau Léwiétto. 
1Chronicles6:49 Harun sibawa wija-wijanna jamanna mattunu dupai, makkasuwiyangengngi akkarobangeng ritunu ri yasé'na mézbaé, pogau'i sininna rupanna upacaraé ri Bili' Pommapaccingngé, sibawa makkasuwiyangengngi akkarobangeng pappaledda dosana umma Israélié. Iya manennaro napogau'i mennang situru panunju-panunju iya nabbéréyangngé Musa atanna Allataala." 
1Chronicles6:50 Iyanaé jori wija-wijanna Harun: Eléazar, Pinéhas, Abisua," 
1Chronicles6:51 Buki, Uzi, Zérahya," 
1Chronicles6:52 Mérayot, Amarya, Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:53 Zadok, Ahimaas." 
1Chronicles6:54 Iyanaé daéra onrong naonroiyé iya riwéréngngéngngi appang Kéhat wija-wijanna Harun. Natarimai mennang bagiyang mammulangngé polé ri tana iya ripattentué untu' tau Léwié. 
1Chronicles6:55 Tanana mennang nassanraiwi Hébron ri daéra Yéhuda, sibawa sining padangngé ri seddéna." 
1Chronicles6:56 Iyakiya sining dare' sibawa désa-désaé ri daéra seddéna kotaéro riwéréngngi Kaléb ana' Yéfune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Wija-wijanna Harun lolongengngi Hébron kota allinrungengngé, Yatir sibawa désa-désa mangoloéwé silaong sining padanna: désa Libna, Estemoa, Hilen, Débir, Asan, Bét-Sémes." 
1Chronicles6:58  
1Chronicles6:59  
1Chronicles6:60 Ri daéra suku Bényamin lolongengngi mennang désa-désa mangoloéwé silaong sining padanna: Géba, Alémét sibawa Anatot. Iya manenna engka 13 désa untu' onrong naonroiyé kaluwarga-kaluwargana mennang." 
1Chronicles6:61 Seppulo désa suku Manasyé ri seddé yajanna Salo Yordan riwéréngngi naolai loteréi lao ri kaluwarga-kaluwargaé ri laleng appang Kéhat iya dé'éppa nalolongeng tana. 
1Chronicles6:62 Kaluwarga-kaluwargaé ri laleng appanna Gérson lolongengngi 13 désa ri daérana suku Isakhar, Asyer, Naftali sibawa Manasyé iya engkaé ri Basan seddé alauna Salo Yordan." 
1Chronicles6:63 Naola towi loteréi, kaluwarga-kaluwargaé ri laleng appang Mérari lolongengngi 12 désa ri daéra suku Rubén, Gad sibawa Zébulon." 
1Chronicles6:64 Makkuwaniro carana bangsa Israélié bagéi lao ri suku Léwié désa-désaé silaong sining padanna untu' onrong naonroiyé mennang. 
1Chronicles6:65 Désa-désaé ri daérana suku Yéhuda, Siméon sibawa Bényamin iya puraé riteppuro, ribagé towi naolai loteréi." 
1Chronicles6:66 Ri daérana suku Efraim, sibagiyang polé ri kaluwarga-kaluwarga appang Kéhat tarimai désa-désa mangoloéwé silaong padanna ri seddéna:" 
1Chronicles6:67 Sikhem, kota allinrungeng ri buluna daéraéro, Gézer," 
1Chronicles6:68 Yokméam, Bét-Horon," 
1Chronicles6:69 Ayalon sibawa Gat-Rimon. 
1Chronicles6:70 Ri daérana suku Manasyé iya ri seddé yajanna Salo Yordan natarimai mennang désa Anér sibawa Biléam silaong padanna ri seddéna. 
1Chronicles6:71 Kaluwarga-kaluwarga appanna Gérson lolongengngi désa-désa mangoloéwé sibawa sining padangngé ri seddéna: Ri daérana suku Manasyé, seddé alauna Salo Yordan: Golan ri Basan sibawa Asytarot." 
1Chronicles6:72 Ri daérana suku Isakhar: Kédes, Dabérat," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramot sibawa Anem. 
1Chronicles6:74 Ri daérana suku Asyer: Masal, Abdon," 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukok sibawa Réhob. 
1Chronicles6:76 Ri daérana suku Naftali: Kédes ri Galiléa, Hamon sibawa Kiryataim." 
1Chronicles6:77 Wija-wijanna Mérari iya dé'éppa nalolongeng tana, lolongengngi désa-désa mangoloéwé silaong sining padangngé ri seddéna: Ri daérana suku Zébulon: Rimono sibawa Tabor." 
1Chronicles6:78 Ri daérana suku Rubén, seddé alauna Salo Yordan ri seddéna Yérikho: Bézer ri tanété tanré, Yahas," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kédemot sibawa Méfaat. 
1Chronicles6:80 Ri daérana suku Gad: Ramot ri Giléad, Mahanaim," 
1Chronicles6:81 Hésybon sibawa Yaézer. 
1Chronicles7:1 Isakhar mappunnai 4 ana' worowané: Tola, Pua, Yasub sibawa Simron." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tola mappunnai 6 ana' worowané: Uzi, Réfaya, Yériél, Yahmai, Yibsam sibawa Samuél. Mennang iyanaritu kapala kaluwarga ri laleng appanna Tola sibawa tarompoi selaku prajuri-prajuri poré. Wettunna Arung Daud, wija-wijanna mennang jumellana 22.600 tau." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzi mappunnai séddi ana' worowané riyaseng Yizrahya. Yizrahya sibawa iya eppa ana'na iya worowané, iyanaritu Mikhaél, Obaja, Yoél sibawa Yisia iyanaritu kapala appang." 
1Chronicles7:4 Sining bainéna sibawa ana'-ana'na makkuwamani égana angkanna wija-wijanna naulléi passadiya 36.000 tau worowané untu' mancaji tentara. 
1Chronicles7:5 Manuru' daftar résmié, polé risininna kaluwargaé ri laleng suku Isakhar engka 87.000 tau worowané iya pennoiyéngngi sara'-sara'é untu' mancaji tentara." 
1Chronicles7:6 Bényamin mappunnai tellu ana' worowané: Béla, Békher sibawa Yédiaél." 
1Chronicles7:7 Béla mappunnai lima ana' worowané: Ezbon, Uzi, Uziél, Yérimot sibawa Iri. Mennang iyanaritu kapala kaluwarga ri laleng appanna sibawa tassebbo'i selaku prajuri-prajuri poré. Ri laleng daftar wija-wijanna mennang tarokii 22.034 tau worowané iya pennoiyéngngi sara'-sara'é untu' mancaji tentara." 
1Chronicles7:8 Békher mappunnai 9 ana' worowané: Zemira, Yoas, Eliézer, Elyoénai, Omri, Yérémot, Abia, Anatot sibawa Alémét." 
1Chronicles7:9 Mennang iyanaritu kapala kaluwarga ri laleng appanna. Manuru daftar résmié, polé ri sininna kaluwargaé ri laleng wija-wijanna mennang engka 20.200 tau worowané iya pennoiyéngngi sara'-sara'é untu' mancaji tentara." 
1Chronicles7:10 Yédiaél mappunnai séddi ana' worowané riyaseng Bilhan. Bilhan mappunnai 7 ana' worowané: Yéus, Bényamin, Ehud, Kénaana, Zétan, Tarsis sibawa Ahisahar." 
1Chronicles7:11 Mennang iyanaritu kapala kaluwarga ri laleng appanna sibawa tarompoi selaku prajuri-prajuri baranié. Ri laleng daftar wija-wijanna mennang tarokii 17.200 tau worowané iya pennoiyéngngi sara'-sara'é untu' mancaji tentara. 
1Chronicles7:12 Supim sibawa Hupim iyanaritu wija-wijanna Ir. Husim iyanaritu ana'na Dan. 
1Chronicles7:13 Naftali mappunnai 4 ana' worowané: Yahziél, Guni, Yézer sibawa Salum. Mennang iyanaritu eppona Bilha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Manasyé silaong gundi'na, séddiwi makkunrai Aram, mappunnai duwa ana' worowané: Asriél sibawa Makhir. Ana'na Makhir iyanaritu Giléad." 
1Chronicles7:15 Makhir sapparengngi bainé Hupim sibawa Supim. Asenna bainéna Makhir iyanaritu Maakha. Ana'na Makhir iya maduwaé iyanaritu Zélaféad. Zélaféad dé' nappunnai ana' worowané, banna ana' makkunrai." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maakha bainéna Makhir jajiyangngi duwa ana' worowané iya riyasengngé Pérés sibawa Sérés; Pérés mappunnai duwa ana' worowané riyaseng Ulam sibawa Rékem. 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulam mappunnai séddi ana' worowané riyaseng Bédan. Iyanaro wija-wijanna Giléad ana' Makhir, eppona Manasyé." 
1Chronicles7:18 Ana'daranna Giléad iya riyasengngé Molékhét mappunnai tellu ana' worowané: Isyhod, Abiézer sibawa Mahla." 
1Chronicles7:19 Sémida mappunnai 4 ana' worowané: Ahyan, Sékhem, Likhi sibawa Aniam." 
1Chronicles7:20 Efraim mappunnai tellu ana': Sutélah, Ezer sibawa Elad. Jori wija-wijanna Efraim naolai Sutélah iyanaritu Béréd, Tahat, Elada, Tahat, Zabad, Sutélah. Ezer sibawa Elad riyunoi wettunna maélo ménnauwi olokolo'na pabbanuwa tulénna wanuwa Gad." 
1Chronicles7:21  
1Chronicles7:22 Mabbaratai ambo'na siyagangngaré esso itana angkanna poléi silessu-silessurenna untu' saléworiwi. 
1Chronicles7:23 Nainappa siatinrossi Efraim sibawa bainéna, namattampu'na iyaro makkunraié sibawa jajiyang séddi ana' worowané. Nasenni Efraim ana'naro Béria, nasaba abala iya puraé napéneddingiro mennang." 
1Chronicles7:24 Efraim mappunnai ana' makkunrai iya riyasengngé Seera. Aléna ritu patettongngi kota-kota Bét-Horon Toddang sibawa Bét-Horon Yasé', enrengngé kota Uza sibawa Seera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Engkatopa séddi ana' worowanéna Efraim, asenna Réfah. Iyanaé jori wija-wijanna Réfah: Réséf, Télah, Tahan," 
1Chronicles7:26 Ladan, Amihud, Elisama," 
1Chronicles7:27 Nun sibawa Yosua. 
1Chronicles7:28 Daéra iya riyabbéréyangngé untu' mancaji onrong naonroiyé mennang iyanaritu polé ri Bétel lettu sibbéla Naaran ri seddé alau, sibawa Gézer ri seddé yajang enrengngé désa-désaé ri seddéna kota-kotaéro. Ri laleng daéraéro muttama toni kota Sikhem sibawa Aya, enrengngé désa-désaé ri mattulilinna." 
1Chronicles7:29 Wija-wijanna Manasyé makuwasaiwi kota Bét-Séan, Taanakh, Megido, Dor sibawa désa-désaé ri mattulilinna. Iyanaro sininna daéra onrong naonroiyé wija-wijanna Yusuf ana' Yakub." 
1Chronicles7:30 Mangoloéwé iyanaritu wija-wijanna Asyer. Mappunnai 4 ana' worowané: Yimna, Yiswa, Yiswi, Béria sibawa séddi ana' makkunrai, riyaseng Sérah." 
1Chronicles7:31 Béria mappunnai duwa ana' worowané, iyanaritu Héber sibawa Malkiél pappatettonna kota Birzait." 
1Chronicles7:32 Héber mappunnai tellu ana' worowané: Yaflét, Somer, Hotam sibawa séddi ana' makkunrai, riyaseng Sua." 
1Chronicles7:33 Yaflét mappunnai towi tellu ana' worowané: Pasakh, Bimhab sibawa Asywat." 
1Chronicles7:34 Somer silessurenna Yaflét mappunnai eppa ana' worowané: Ahi, Rohga, Yéhuba sibawa Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 Hotam, silessurenna Yaflét iya séddiéssi, mappunnai 4 ana' worowané: Zofah, Yimna, Séles sibawa Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 Wija-wijanna Sofah iyanaritu Suah, Harnéfer, Syual, Béri, Yimra," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bézer, Hod, Sama, Silsa, Yitran sibawa Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Wija-wijanna Yéter iyanaritu Yéfune, Pispa sibawa Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Wija-wijanna Ula iyanaritu Arah, Haniél sibawa Rizya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Iyanaro wija-wijanna Asyer. Kapala kaluwarga maneng mennang sibawa tarompo selaku pahlawang-pahlawang iya poré sibawa pamimping-pamimping iya battowaé. Ri laleng daftar wija-wijanna Asyer tarokii 26.000 tau worowané iya pennoiyéngngi sara'-sara'é untu' mancaji tentara. 
1Chronicles8:1 Bényamin mappunnai lima ana' worowané. Situru atturu-turuseng umuru'na, mennang iyanaritu: Béla, Asybel, Ahrah," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha sibawa Rafa. 
1Chronicles8:3 Wija-wijanna Béla iyanaritu Adar, Géra, Abihud," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abisua, Naaman, Ahoah," 
1Chronicles8:5 Géra, Séfufan sibawa Huram." 
1Chronicles8:6 Wija-wijanna Ehud iyanaritu Naaman, Ahia sibawa Géra. Mennang iyanaritu kapala kaluwarga iya monroé riyolo ri Géba. Iyakiya rirukkai mennang polé kuwaro, nainappa ri yawa pappimpinna Géra létté'i mennang ri Manahat sibawa monro kuwaro. Géra mappunnai duwa ana': Uza sibawa Ahihud." 
1Chronicles8:7  
1Chronicles8:8 Saharaim telle'i iya duwa bainéna iya riyasengngé Husim sibawa Baara. Nainappa wettunna monro ri daéra Moab, kawingngi sibawa Hodési nanalolongeng 7 ana' worowané: Yobab, Zibya, Mésa, Malkam," 
1Chronicles8:9  
1Chronicles8:10 Yéus, Sakhya sibawa Mirma. Iya manenna kapala kaluwarga." 
1Chronicles8:11 Nasibawang bainéna iya riyasengngé Husim mappunnai towi duwa ana' worowané: Abitub sibawa Elpaal. 
1Chronicles8:12 Ana' worowanéna Elpaal engka tellu tau: Eber, Misam sibawa Séméd. Séméd iyanaé iya patettongngéngngi kota Ono sibawa Lod enrengngé désa-désaé ri seddéna." 
1Chronicles8:13 Béria sibawa Séma iyanaritu kapala kaluwarga iya monroé ri kota Ayalon sibawa rukkai pabbanuwana kota Gat. 
1Chronicles8:14 Wija-wijanna Béria iyanaritu Ahyo, Sasak, Yérémot, Zébaja, Arad, Eder, Mikhaél, Yispa sibawa Yoha." 
1Chronicles8:15  
1Chronicles8:16  
1Chronicles8:17 Wija-wijanna Elpaal iyanaritu Zébaja, Mésulam, Hizki, Héber," 
1Chronicles8:18 Yismérai, Yizia sibawa Yobab." 
1Chronicles8:19 Wija-wijanna Siméi iyanaritu Yakim, Zikhri, Zabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elyoénai, Ziletai, Eliél," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaya, Béraya sibawa Simrat." 
1Chronicles8:22 Wija-wijanna Sasak iyanaritu Yispan, Eber, Eliél," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abdon, Zikhri, Hanan," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hananya, Elam, Antotia," 
1Chronicles8:25 Yifdéya sibawa Pnuél. 
1Chronicles8:26 Wija-wijanna Yéhoram iyanaritu Samsérai, Séharya, Atalya," 
1Chronicles8:27 Yaarésya, Elia sibawa Zikhri." 
1Chronicles8:28 Iyanaro kapala-kapala kaluwargaé sibawa pamimping-pamimping iya tarokié ri laleng assossorenna. Monroi mennang ri Yérusalém. 
1Chronicles8:29 Yéiél patettongngi kota Gibéon, nainappa monro kuwaro. Bainéna riyasengngi Maakha," 
1Chronicles8:30 namappunnaiwi mennang 10 ana' worowané: Abdon, iya macowaé, nainappa Zur, Kis, Baal, Nér, Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedor, Ahyo, Zakharia," 
1Chronicles8:32 sibawa Miklot, ambo'na Siméa. Wija-wijanna mennang monroi ri Yérusalém silaong kaluwarga-kaluwarga laing iya siappangngé mennang." 
1Chronicles8:33 Ambo'na Arung Saul riyasengngi Kish sibawa nénéna worowané riyasengngi Nér. Saul mappunnai 4 ana' worowané: Yonatan, Malkisua, Abinadab sibawa Esybaal." 
1Chronicles8:34 Yonatan mappunnai ana' worowané riyaseng Méribaal, ambo'na Mikha." 
1Chronicles8:35 Mikha mappunnai 4 ana' worowané: Piton, Mélékh, Tahréa sibawa Ahas." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ana'na Ahas riyasengngi Yoada iya mappunnaiyé 3 ana' worowané: Alémét, Azmawét sibawa Zimri. Jori assossorenna Zimri iyanaritu Moza," 
1Chronicles8:37 Bina, Rafa, Elasa sibawa Azel." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azel mappunnai 6 ana' worowané: Azrikam, Bokhru, Ismaél, Séarya, Obaja sibawa Hanan." 
1Chronicles8:39 Esek, padaorowanéna Azel, mappunnai 3 ana' worowané: Ulam iya macowaé, nainappa Yéus sibawa Elifélét." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ana'-ana'na Ulam iya manenna prajuri-prajuri poré sibawa pappana iya maccaé. Ana' eppona iya worowané iya manenna engka 150 tau. Iya manenna mennang iyanaritu anggota suku Bényamin. 
1Chronicles9:1 Sininna tau Israélié ridaftar-i situru kaluwargana tungke'-tungke'. Iyaro daftar-é tarokii ri laleng kitta Arung-ngarunna Israélié. Selaku pahukkungenna dosa-dosana mennang, ritiwii ra'ya' Yéhudaé ri appalirengngé." 
1Chronicles9:2 Polé ri yelle'na mennang iya bunge'-bunge'é lisu ri tana appunnangenna ri kota-kotaé iyanaritu tau biyasaé, imangngé, tau Léwié sibawa pajjama-jamana Bolana Puwangnge." 
1Chronicles9:3 Si bagiyang polé ri suku Yéhuda, Bényamin, Efraim sibawa Manasyé lisuni sibawa monro ri Yérusalém." 
1Chronicles9:4 Engka 690 kaluwarga polé ri suku Yéhuda iya monroé ri Yérusalém, muttama'ni wija-wijanna ana'-ana'na Yéhuda iya riyasengngé Pérés, Syéla sibawa Zérah. Wija-wijanna Pérés ripimpingngi ri Utai. Jori wija-wijanna Utai polé ri yawa liyasé iyanaritu Utai, Amihud, Omri, Imri sibawa Bani. Wija-wijanna Syéla ripimpingngi ri Asaya. Aléna ritu kapala kaluwarga. Wija-wijanna Zérah ripimpingngi ri Yéuél." 
1Chronicles9:5  
1Chronicles9:6  
1Chronicles9:7 Sining tau suku Bényamingngé iya monroé ri Yérusalém engka 956 kaluwarga. Kapala-kapala kaluwargana mennang iyanaritu: Salu ana' Mésulam, eppona Hodawya, néné-nénéna Hasénua. Yibnia ana' Yéroham Ela ana' Uzi, eppona Mikhri Mésulam ana' Séfaca, eppona Réhuél, néné-nénéna Yibnia." 
1Chronicles9:8  
1Chronicles9:9  
1Chronicles9:10 Imang-ngimang mangoloéwé monroi ri Yérusalém: Yédaya, Yoyarib sibawa Yakhin Azarya ana' Hilkia, toriyolona iyanaritu Mésulam, Zadok, Mérayot sibawa Ahitub. (Azarya iyanaritu kapala pegawénna Bolana Puwangnge.) Adaya ana' Yéroham; toriyolona iyanaritu Pasyhur sibawa Malkia. Masai ana' Adiél; toriyolona iyanaritu Yahzéra, Mésulam, Mésilémit, sibawa Imer." 
1Chronicles9:11  
1Chronicles9:12  
1Chronicles9:13 Sining imang iya mancajiyé kapala kaluwarga, iya manenna engka 1.760 tau. Maccai mennang pogau'i sininna rupanna jama-jamangngé ri Bolana Puwangnge." 
1Chronicles9:14 Sining tau Léwi mangoloéwé monroi ri Yérusalém: Sémaya ana' Hasub; toriyolona iyanaritu Azrikam sibawa Hasabya polé ri appang Mérari Bakbakar, Hérés sibawa Galal. Matanya ana' Mikha; toriyolona iyanaritu Zikhri sibawa Asaf Obaja ana' Sémaya; toriyolona iyanaritu Galal sibawa Yédutun Bérékhya ana' Asa, eppona Elkana, monroi ri daérana kota Nétofa." 
1Chronicles9:15  
1Chronicles9:16  
1Chronicles9:17 Pengawal-pengawalna Bolana Puwangnge iya monroé ri Yérusalém silaong kaluwargana iyanaritu: Akub, Talmon, Ahiman, sibawa Salum kapala pengawal." 
1Chronicles9:18 Lettu essoéwé sining tau polé ri appanna mennang risuroi monrowangngi Pintu Gerbang Arungngé ri alau. Riyolo sining tau polé ri appanna risuroi monrowangngi pintu-pintu gerbang mattujué ri akkémanna tau Léwié. 
1Chronicles9:19 Iya risuroé monrowangngi sumpang muttama'é ri Kémana Puwangnge iyanaritu Salum silaong sining tau iya siappangngé sibawa aléna, iyanaritu appang Korah. (Salum iyanaritu ana' Koré eppona Ebyasaf.) Riyolo toriyolona pogau' towi jamangngéro wettunna mennang mattumani ri akkémanna Puwangnge." 
1Chronicles9:20 Pinéhas ana'na Eléazar – tennapodo Puwangnge linrungiwi! – engka naengka nakapalaiwi mennang. 
1Chronicles9:21 Zakharia ana' Mésélémya iyanaritu pengawalna towi pintu gerbang Kémana Puwangnge. 
1Chronicles9:22 Sininna iya napilé untu' monrowangngi pintu-pintu gerbangngé engka 212 tau. Ridaftar i mennang situru désa-désa onrong naonroiyé mennang. Toriyolona mennang riwéréngngi jabatang-jabatangngéro ri Arung Daud sibawa Nabi Samuél. 
1Chronicles9:23 Sipongennaro mennang sibawa wija-wijanna tette'i mancaji panganrowanna pintu gerbanna Bolana Puwangnge. 
1Chronicles9:24 Engka 4 sumpang: séddi ri manorang, séddi ri yattang, séddi ri alau sibawa séddi ri yajang. Ri tungke' sumpangngéro, ritaroi séddi tau Léwi iya mancajiyé kapala panganrowang." 
1Chronicles9:25 Sumpulolona mennang iya monroé ri désa-désaé, bantui mennang secara makkaléléng – sises-siseng siminggu ittana." 
1Chronicles9:26 Iyakiya iya eppa kapala panganrowangngéro majjamai secara tette. Mattanggung jawa'i mennang ri bili'-bili'é ri Bolana Puwangnge sibawa barab-barang iya ritaroé kuwaro. 
1Chronicles9:27 Monroi mennang ri seddéna Bolana Puwangnge, saba' harusu'i monrowangngi iyaro bolaé sibawa timpa'i pintu-pintu gerbangngé élé-élé." 
1Chronicles9:28 Sibagiyang tau Léwi iya laingngé mattanggung jawa'i lao risining pakkakkasa untu' assompangngé. Mennang ritu bilangngi wettunna ripassu sibawa wettunna ripalisu. 
1Chronicles9:29 Sibagiyassi mattanggung jawa'i lao ri paréwa-paréwa assompangngé sibawa lao ri labbu'é, anggoro'é, minnya zaitungngé, kamennyangngé sibawa rampa-rampaé." 
1Chronicles9:30 Iyakiya iya mattanggung jawa'é campuru'i rampa-rampaéro iyanaritu imang-ngimangngé. 
1Chronicles9:31 Iya mattanggung jawa'é mébbu pakkasuwiyang iya ripanggangngé iyanaritu séddi tau Léwi riyaseng Matica, ana' macowana Salum polé ri appang Korah." 
1Chronicles9:32 Sining tau polé ri appang Kéhat mattanggung jawa'i untu' passadiyai patala rotié untu' Puwangnge tungke' esso Saba'. 
1Chronicles9:33 Sibagiyang tau Léwi iya laingngé mancaji pakkélongngi ri Bolana Puwangnge. Kapala-kapala kaluwargana mennang iya monroé risiyagangngaré bili' ri Bolana Puwangnge. Dé' nariwéréng mennang jamang laing, nasaba majjamai esso wenni." 
1Chronicles9:34 Sining tau iya riteppué onna iyanaritu kapala-kapala kaluwarga Léwi situru jori assossorenna. Mennang iyanaritu sining pamimping iya monroé ri Yérusalém. 
1Chronicles9:35 Yéiél patettongngi kota Gibéon, nainappa monro kuwaro. Bainéna riyasengngi Maakha," 
1Chronicles9:36 sibawa ana'na worowané, iya macowaé riyasengngi Abdon; iya laingngé riyasengngi Zur, Kish, Baal, Nér, Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedor, Ahyo, Zakharia sibawa Miklot," 
1Chronicles9:38 ambo'na Siméa. Wija-wijanna mennang monroi ri Yérusalém silaong kaluwarga-kaluwarga laingngé iya siappangngé sibawa mennang. 
1Chronicles9:39 Ambo'na Arung Saul riyasengngi Kish sibawa nénéna riyasengngi Nér. Saul mappunnai 4 ana' worowané: Yonatan, Malkisua, Abinadab sibawa Esybaal." 
1Chronicles9:40 Yonatan mappunnai ana' worowané riyaseng Méribaal, ambo'na Mikha." 
1Chronicles9:41 Mikha mappunnai 4 ana' worowané: Piton, Mélékh, Tahréa sibawa Ahas." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ana'na Ahas riyasengngi Yoada mappunnai 3 ana' worowané: Alémét, Asmawét sibawa Zimri. Jori assossorenna Zimri iyanaritu Moza," 
1Chronicles9:43 Bina, Rafa, Elasa sibawa Azel." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azel mappunnai 6 ana' worowané; Azrikan, Bokhru, Ismaél, Séarya, Obaja sibawa Hanan." 
1Chronicles10:1 Mammusuni tau Filistingngé sibawa tau Israélié. Mammusui mennang ri Bulu Gilboa. Maéga tau Israél maté kuwaro, na lebbinna muttamani Arung Saul sibawa ana'-ana' worowanéna larini." 
1Chronicles10:2 Iyakiya riyaccinrolaiwi mennang ri tau Filistingngé sibawa tellu tau polé ri yelle'na ana'-ana' worowanéna Saul riyunoni, iyanaritu Yonatan, Abinadab sibawa Malkisua." 
1Chronicles10:3 Masero senna'ni ammusurengngé ri seddéna Saul, na aléna paimeng nakennani pana-panana balié angkanna malo." 
1Chronicles10:4 Nakkeda Saul lao ri kallolo iya tiwiéngngi senjatana, “Rampui peddammu namugajakka kuwammengngi aja' nacculé-culéika tau Filistin dé'é naissengngi Puwang -ngéro.” Iyakiya iyaro kalloloé dé' namaélo gajangngi Saul nasaba métau senna'i. Rimakkuwannanaro nalani Saul peddanna nanaparebbai aléna ri peddangngéro." 
1Chronicles10:5 Wettunna naita iyaro kalloloé makkedaé maténi Saul, naparebba toni aléna ri peddanna, namaté." 
1Chronicles10:6 Namaténa Saul silaong iya tellu ana' worowanéna, nanallalengiwi naccappa tona assossorenna." 
1Chronicles10:7 Wettunna naéngkalinga sininna tau Israél iya monroé ri lompo Yizreel makkedaé larini tentara Israélié, sibawa Saul nenniya ana'-ana' worowanéna maténi, larini mennang salaiwi kota-kotana. Nanatudangini tau Filistingngé kota-kotanaro." 
1Chronicles10:8 Bajana wettunna tau Filistingngé polé untu' rampo'i sining ujué, naruntu'ni mennang Saul sibawa iya tellu ana' worowanéna maté ri Bulu Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Naludunni waju musuna Saul, natéppe'i ulunna, nanatiwii lao. Nainappa kiring mennang suro ri sininna wanuwa Filistingngé untu' palettu'i karéba madécéngngéro lao ri bangsana sibawa déwatana mennang." 
1Chronicles10:10 Iyaro waju musuna Saul nataroi ri laleng séddié bola déwatana, na ulunna nagattungngi ri laleng bolana Dagon, déwatana." 
1Chronicles10:11 Wettunna pabbanuwana Yabés ri Giléad méngkalingai aga pura napogau' tau Filistingngé lao ri Saul," 
1Chronicles10:12 laoni sining tau iya kaminang baranié polé ri yelle'na mennang malai ujuna Saul sibawa ana'-ana' worowanéna, nanatiwii lao ri Yabés. Nakuburu'ni mennang ri yawana séddié pong battowa, nainappa mappuwasa pitungngesso ittana." 
1Chronicles10:13 Matéi Saul nasaba dé' namatinulu lao ri Puwangnge, sibawa dé' naturusiwi parénta-parénta-Na. Dé' naéllau panunju polé ri Puwangnge, sangadinna polé ri roh-rohna tau maté. Rimakkuwannanaro Puwangnge hukkungngi sibawa mabbéréyangngi akkarungenna lao ri Daud ana' Isai." 
1Chronicles10:14  
1Chronicles11:1 Laoni sininna pamimping bangsa Israélié ri Daud ri Hébron sibawa makkeda, “Idi'é sellaonaki Datu." 
1Chronicles11:2 Riyolopa nariyolo, mala wettunna mupa Saul paréntaki, Datu ritu pimpingngi tentara Israélié sises-siseng mennang maju mammusu. Nainappa Puwang Allataalana Datu pura majjanci makkedaé Datu ritu iya maéloé pimpingngi umma'-Na sibawa mancaji arunna mennang.”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Nanaébbuna Daud assijancing sibawa sining pamimping Israéliéro. Nainappa nalanti mancaji arunna Israélié pada-pada iya puraé najjanciyang Puwangnge naolai Samuél. 
1Chronicles11:4 Séuwa wettu Arung Daud sibawa sininna tentara Israélié laowi musui kota Yérusalém. Iyaro wettué, iyaro kotaé riyasengngi Yébus, sibawa naonroiwi tau Yébus-é, pabbanuwa tulénna kotaéro." 
1Chronicles11:5 Purai makkeda sining tau Yébus-é lao ri Daud, makkedaé dé' namakkullé muttamakiwi kotana mennanro. Iyakiya naulléi Daud sittaiwi bénténna mennang iya riyasengngé Sion. Iyaro wettué purai nappallebbangeng Daud ri ana' buwana makkedaé tau bunge' mpunoéngngi séddié tau Yébus mancajiwi matu pallima. Nasaba Yoab ritu bunge'-bunge' gasai tau Yébus-é, riyakkani mancaji pallima. (Indo'na Yoab riyasengngi Zéruya.) Puranana nasittai bénténg Sion, monroni Daud kuwaro. Iyanaro saba'na mappammulai wettuéro iyaro bénténgngé riteppui “Kota Daud”." 
1Chronicles11:6  
1Chronicles11:7  
1Chronicles11:8 Napatettonni Daud paimeng kotaéro mappammulai ri onrong iya ripakatanré sibawa tana ri seddé alauna bulu-bulué; nainappa iyaro appatettongengngé napatterui Yoab gangka tépu. 
1Chronicles11:9 Pédé maitta pédé mawatang Daud, nasaba Puwangnge Pommakuwasa tulungngi." 
1Chronicles11:10 Iyanaé aseng-ngasenna sining parawirana Daud iya tarompoé. Silaong sininna ra'ya' Israélié, purani mennang méwa kuwammengngi Daud namancaji arung pada-pada iya puraé najjanciyang Puwangnge. Sibawa matterui mennang sokongngi apparéntanna." 
1Chronicles11:11 Parawira mammulangngé iyanaritu Yasobam tau Hakhmoni, pamimpinnai “Triwira”. Engka naengka na ri laleng séuwaé ammusureng naéwai 300 tau nanauno manengngi mennang sibawa bessinna." 
1Chronicles11:12 Tau maduwaé ri laleng Kalompo Telluéro iyanaritu Eléazar ana' Dodo polé ri appanna Ahohi. 
1Chronicles11:13 Ri laleng musué ri Pas-Damim mammusui silaong Daud méwai tau Filistingngé. Wettunna tentara Israélié mammula lari, mattahangngi silaong ana' buwana ri tengnga-tengngana séddié dare gandong sibawa mammusu méwai sining tau Filistingngéro. Nariwérénna apakalang battowa ri Puwangnge." 
1Chronicles11:14  
1Chronicles11:15 Ri séuwaé esso 3 tau polé ri 30 parawirana Daud iya mariyoloé, lao méwai sita Daud riséuwaé onrong iya mabbénténgngé riséddié bulu batu seddéna Gowa Adulam. Iyaro wettué makkémai tau Filistingngé ri Lompo Réfaim, sibawa sipasukang polé ri mennang tudangiwi Bétléhém." 
1Chronicles11:16  
1Chronicles11:17 Muddanini Daud ri kampong assalennaro sibawa makkeda, “Ah, ébara'na ripainukka uwai polé ri bujung seddéna pintu gerbangngé ri Bétléhém.”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Naéngkalinganaro, iya tellu parawiraéro bettui akkémanna tau Filistingngé nanaséro uwai polé ri bujungngéro, nainappa natiwi lao ri Daud. Iyakiya dé' namaélo Daud ménungngi, mala natiri'i selaku pakkasuwiyang lao ri Puwangnge." 
1Chronicles11:19 Makkedai, “Nasabbing Allataala, dé' nawedding uwénung iyaé uwaié! Rékko uwénungngi, samanna uwénungngi darana tau iya puraé mappésonangngi nyawana!” Jaji dé' sises-siseng Daud namaélo ménungngi uwaiéro. Iyanaro jasa-jasana iya tellu pajuwang iya poréro." 
1Chronicles11:20 Iya telluppulo parawira iya tarompoéro riyaseng towi “Telluppulo Parawira”. Ripimpingngi mennang ri Abisai anrinna Yoab. Engka naengka naunoi 300 tau sibawa bessinna, narimakkuwannanaro namancaji tarompo. Iyakiya dé' napada-pada héba'na Kalompo Telluéro." 
1Chronicles11:21  
1Chronicles11:22 Séddi parawira laing iya tarompoé iyanaritu Bénaya ana' Yoyada, tau Kabzeel. Barani senna'i. Duwa pahlawang battowa polé ri Moab pura nauno. Engka séuwa esso massaljué muttama'i ri laleng séddié kalebbong sibawa mpunoi séddi singa kuwaro." 
1Chronicles11:23 Engkato naengka naunoi séddié tau Maséré iya battowaé watakkaléna; tanréna lebbi duwa météré. Iyaro tauwé massenjatai bessi iya battowa senna'é, iyakiya Bénaya moloiwi banna sibawa tarasulu. Bessi iya engkaé ri limanna tau Maséré'éro nasittaiwi nainappa napaké untu' mpunoi tauwéro." 
1Chronicles11:24 Iyanaro jasa-jasana Bénaya, séddiwi polé ri Kalompo Telluppuloé." 
1Chronicles11:25 Ri laleng kalompo'éro, Bénaya kaminang mariyolo, iyakiya dé' napada-pada héba'na Kalompo Tellué. Daud makkai mancaji kapala pengawal paribadinna." 
1Chronicles12:1 Wettunna Daud lari polé ri Arung Saul, massalai ri Ziklag. Maéga pajuwang iya matinulué sibawa mappangalamangngé polé masséddi sibawa Daud." 
1Chronicles12:2 Poléi mennang ri suku Bényamin pada-pada Saul. Maccai mennang mappana sibawa mallobang – muwi lima ataunna iyaréga lima abéyona. 
1Chronicles12:3 Pamimpinna mennang iyanaritu Ahiézer sibawa Yoas ana'-ana'na Sémaa polé ri Gibéa. Iyanaé sining pajuwangngéro: Yéziél sibawa Pélét ana'-ana' Azmawét Bérakha sibawa Yéhu tau Anatot Yismaya tau Gibéon, pajuwang tarompoé iya mancajiyé sala séddinna tau pamimping kalompo “Kalompo Telluppuloé Parawira”. Yérémia, Yéhaziél, Yohanan sibawa Yozabad tau Gedéra Eluzai, Yérimot, Béalya, Sémarya sibawa Séfaca tau Harufi Elkana, Yisia, Azareel, Yoézer sibawa Yasobam polé ri appang Korah Yoéla sibawa Zébaja ana'-ana' Yéroham tau Gedor." 
1Chronicles12:4  
1Chronicles12:5  
1Chronicles12:6  
1Chronicles12:7  
1Chronicles12:8 Wettunna Daud engka ri onrong mabbénténgngé ri padang kessi'é, maéga pajuwang tassebbo sibawa mappangalamang polé ri suku Gad lao masséddi sibawa aléna. Mennang iyanaritu sining pajuwang iya macca senna'é paké kaliyawo sibawa bessi; paitai mennang barani-barani pada-pada singaé sibawa kédona mennang mapecci pada-pada jongaé." 
1Chronicles12:9 Iyanaé aseng-ngasenna mennang iya risusungngé situru pangka'na: Ezer, Obaja, Eliab, Mismana, Yérémia, Atai, Eliél, Yohanan, Elzabad, Yérémia, Makhbanai." 
1Chronicles12:10  
1Chronicles12:11  
1Chronicles12:12  
1Chronicles12:13  
1Chronicles12:14 Sibagiyang polé risining tau Gad-éro iyanaritu sining parawira tanré iya kapalaiyéngngi 1.000 tau; sibagiyassi iyanaritu parawira-parawira iya kapalaiyéngngi 100 tau. 
1Chronicles12:15 Engka naengka nakajajiyang ri uleng séddinna, wettunna Salo Yordan mattengngang lémpe iyaro parawira-parawiraé nalléttoiwi iyaro saloé sibawa rukkai pabbanuwana lompo-lompo'é muwi ri seddé alau iyaré'ga ri seddé yajanna saloéro." 
1Chronicles12:16 Engka séuwa wettu sikalompo tau polé ri suku Bényamin sibawa Yéhuda lao ri bénténg naonroiyé Daud. 
1Chronicles12:17 Daud méwai mennang sita sibawa makkeda, “Rékko poléko selaku sellao untu' tulukka, asséddino sibawa idi. Ritarimako sibawa masennang ati. Iyakiya rékko makkattako bali'bellarika lao ri balié, namuni dé' upogau'i majaé lao ri iko, Allataala iya nasompaé toriyolota missengngi, nahukkukko matu.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Sala séddinna polé ri mennang, iyanaritu Amasai, iya rimunri mancaji pamimping kalompo iya riteppué “Kalompo Telluppuloé”, rikuwasaiwi ri Rohna Allataala nainappa makkeda, “Daud, ana' Isai! Idi sokokko! Tennapodo iko sibawa mennang iya duwangngékko mallolongengngi. Engkai Allataala rangengekko!” Nanatarimani Daud mennang sibawa nakkai mennang mancaji parawira ri laleng tentarana." 
1Chronicles12:19 Wettunna Daud silaong tau Filistingngé musui Arung Saul, sibagiyang polé ri prajuri suku Manasyé mallétto ri Daud. Sitongenna Daud dé' nabantui sining tau Filistingngéro. Sining pamimping Filistingngé suroi lisu ri Ziklag nasaba métaui mennang malléttoi matu ri Arung Saul sibawa bali'bellariwi mennang." 
1Chronicles12:20 Iyanaé aseng-ngasenna sining pajuwang polé ri suku Manasyé iya malléttoé ri Daud wettunna ri laleng allalengengngé lao ri Ziklag: Adnah, Yozabad, Yédiaél, Mikhaél, Yozabad, Elihu sibawa Ziletai. Tungke'-tungke' kapalaiwi 1.000 prajuri." 
1Chronicles12:21 Mennang pajuwang iya poré sibawa bantui Daud méwai garembolangngé. Rimunri mancajiwi mennang parawira-parawira ri laleng tentarana Israélié. 
1Chronicles12:22 Mawé' esso-esso engka tau baru iya masséddié sibawa Daud, angkanna dé' namaitta rimunrinna battowa senna'ni pasukanna Daud." 
1Chronicles12:23 Wettunna Daud ri Hébron maéga pajuwang iya tallatié masséddi sibawa aléna. Ribantuni Daud ri mennang kuwammengngi weddingngi mancaji arung sulléiwi Saul, situru sibawa jancinna Puwangnge. Jumellana mennang iyanaritu: Polé ri suku Yéhuda: 6.800 tau, sukku sibawa kaliyawo enrengngé bessi. Polé ri suku Siméon: 7.100 tau tallati. Polé ri suku Léwi: 4.600 tau. Ana' buwana Yoyada pamimping wija-wijanna Harun: 3.700 tau. Sumpulolona Zadok, séddiwi pajuwang kallolo iya baranié: 22 tau – iya manenna kepala kaluwarga. Polé ri suku Bényamin (sukunna Arung Saul): 3.000 tau; maégangngéngngi polé ri suku Bényamin tette'i matinulu ri Saul. Polé ri suku Efraim: 20.800 tau tassebbo'é ri laleng appanna tungke'-tungke'. Polé ri suku Manasyé ri seddé yajanna Salo Yordan: 18.000 tau iya rijello'é untu' lanti'i Daud mancaji arung. Polé ri suku Isakhar: 200 pamimping silaong ana' buwana mennang; iyaé sining pamimpingngé maccai pattentui aga iya harusu'é napogau' ra'ya' Israélié ri wettu iya teppa'é Polé ri suku Zébulon: 50.000 tau iya maccaé pakéi sininna rupanna senjataé, sibawa sadiya untu' mammusu; mennang iyanaritu sining tau iya matinulué sibawa riyatepperi. Polé ri suku Naftali: 1.000 pamimping silaong 37.000 prajuri iya sukkué sibawa kaliyawo enrengngé bessi. Polé ri suku Dan: 28.600 tau iya tallatié. Polé ri suku Asyer: 40.000 tau iya sadiyaé untu' mammusu. Polé ri suku-suku ri seddé alauna Yordan, iyanaritu Rubén, Gad sibawa sibagiyang suku Manasyé: 120.000 tau iya maccaé pakéi sininna rupanna senjataé." 
1Chronicles12:24 Iya manenna pajuwangngéro laowi ri Hébron ri laleng keadaang sadiya mammusu sibawa sadiya untu' makkai Daud mancaji arunna sininna Israélié. Sibawa sininna tau Israél laingngé massiati toni untu' pogau'i gau'éro. 
1Chronicles12:25 Tellungngesso ittana iyaro sining pajuwangngé monro kuwaro sibawa Daud namappéstato sibawa péneddingiwi inanré sibawa énungeng iya ripassadiyaé untu' mennang risining tau Israél laingngé. 
1Chronicles12:26 Polé ri suku-suku manorang iya mabélaétto iyanaritu polé ri suku Isakhar, Zébulon sibawa Naftali, makkapoléngngi tauwé sibawa kaleddé, unta, bagal, sibawa saping iya pennoé sibawa tiwi bokong inanré: labbu, buwa ara, kismis, anggoro sibawa minnya zaitun. Tiwi towi mennang saping sibawa bimbala untu' rigéré sibawa naanré. Iya manennaro mappaitangngi pékkugi sennanna ra'ya'é ri sininna Israélié." 
1Chronicles13:1 Barundinni Arung Daud sibawa sininna parawirana iya pimpingngéngngi sining passéddiyang 1.000 tau sibawa sining passéddiyang 100 tau. 
1Chronicles13:2 Nainappa makkeda lao ri sininna tauwéro, “Rékko nasitujuiwi saudara-saudara, sibawa napuwéloi Puwangnge, Allataalata, madécéngengngi kirikki suro lao risining imangngé sibawa sining tau Léwié ri désa-désana mennang, enrengngé sininna bangsata iya laingngé untu' suroi mennang polé maddeppungeng sibawa idi kuwaé." 
1Chronicles13:3 Nainappaki lao malai Petti Assijancinna Allataala, iya puraé naleppessang kariya-riya ri wettu apparéntanna Arung Saul.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Sininna tau Israél iya maddeppungengngéro masennanni sibawa tangngaéro enrengngé situjuiwi. 
1Chronicles13:5 Nanapaddeppungenni Daud ra'ya' Israélié ri sininna wanuwaé, polé ri pakkasésénna Maséré ri yattang lettu ri Laleng Hamat ri manorang, untu' malai Petti Assijancingngéro polé ri Kiryat-Yéarim sibawa tiwii lao ri Yérusalém." 
1Chronicles13:6 Nanalaona Daud silaong mennang ri kota Baala, iyanaritu Kiryat-Yéarim, ri daérana suku Yéhuda untu' malai Petti Assijancinna Allataala. Iyaro Pettié riyasengngi “ Puwang iya makkarungngé ri yasé'na kérub-é.”" 
1Chronicles13:7 Lettu'nana ri Baala, nalani mennang iyaro Petti Assijancingngé polé ri bolana Abinadab, nanapaénré'i ri yasé'na séddié padati iya barué. Uza sibawa Ahyo tinrosiwi iyaro padatié," 
1Chronicles13:8 na Daud sibawa sininna bangsa Israélié séré-séréni enrengngé makkélong sibawa masumangé, untu' pakalebbii Allataala naccowéri kacapi, rebana, simbal sibawa tarompé." 
1Chronicles13:9 Wettunna mennang lettu ri onrong addésekeng gandong appunnangenna Kidon, iyaro sining saping iya gettengngéngngi iyaro padatié tabbuttui, nanaloro'ni limanna Uza sibawa makkatenningngi Petti Assijancingngéro kuwammengngi aja' namabuwang." 
1Chronicles13:10 Iyatoro wettué namacai Puwangnge lao ri Uza nasaba iyaro pangkaukenna sinrupai séuwa pappakatuna lao ri Puwangnge. Nanaunoi Uza kuwaro. Nappammula wettuéro iyaro onrongngé riyasenni “Pérés-Uza”. Macaini Daud nasaba Puwangnge pabbinasai Uza. 
1Chronicles13:11  
1Chronicles13:12 Iyakiya métau towi Daud ri Allataala sibawa makkeda, “Makkekkuwangngé pékkugini iyaro Petti Assijancingngé weddingngi utiwi?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Rimakkuwannanaro dé'na najaji Daud tiwii iyaro Pettié ri Yérusalém, sangadinna nataroi ri bolana Obéd-Edom, tau Gat-é." 
1Chronicles13:14 Iyaro Pettié monroi kuwaro tellu uleng ittana nanabarakkakini Puwangnge kaluwargana Obéd-Edom nenniya sininna iya nappunnangiyé. 
1Chronicles14:1 Nakirinni Arung Hiram polé ri wanuwa Tirus duta-dutana lao ri Daud, sibawato aju camara Libanon enrengngé panré-panré aju sibawa tukang batu untu' patettong saoraja." 
1Chronicles14:2 Rimakkuwannanaro mateppe'ni Daud, Puwangnge pura pakkasse'i aléna selaku arunna Israélié sibawa péwatangiwi akkarungenna untu' apentingenna umma'na Puwangnge." 
1Chronicles14:3 Ri Yérusalém malasi Daud siyagangngaré bainé sibawa lolongeng ana'-ana'si. 
1Chronicles14:4 Ana'-ana' worowanéna iya jajiyé ri Yérusalém iyanaritu: Syamua, Sobab, Natan, Salomo," 
1Chronicles14:5 Yibhar, Elisua, Elpélét," 
1Chronicles14:6 Nogah, Néfég, Yafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elisama, Beelyada sibawa Elifélét." 
1Chronicles14:8 Wettunna naéngkalinga tau Filistingngé makkedaé riyakkani Daud mancaji arunna sininna Israélié, poléni mennang maélo tikkengngi. Rimakkuwannanaro massuni Daud untu' mammusu méwai mennang." 
1Chronicles14:9 Na iyaro wettué lettu'ni tau Filistingngé ri Lompo Réfaim sibawa rampo'i lompo'éro. 
1Chronicles14:10 Naéngkalingana iyaro makkutanani Daud lao ri Allataala, “ Puwang, harusu'ka'ga gasai tau Filistingngéro? Maéloki'ga Puwang mpérékka apakalang?” Nappébali Puwangnge, “Ya, gasani! Maélo-Ka mpérékko apakalang!”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Nanagasani Daud silaong sining pasukanna iyaro sining tau Filistingngé ri Baal-Pérasim sibawa caui mennang. Makkedani Daud, “Allataala pura pakéka untu' leppoi attahangenna balié pada-pada lémpe'é ruttungngi sini-sininnaé ri laleng sikédé.” Iyanaro saba'na iyaro onrongngé nariyaseng Baal-Pérasim." 
1Chronicles14:12 Wettunna lari tau Filistingngé, dé'na narapii tiwii dato-dato barahalana. Napparéntanni Daud kuwammengngi naritunu iyaro dato-dato'é." 
1Chronicles14:13 Dé' namaitta rimunrinna poléni tau Filistingngé sibawa rampokisi Lompo Réfaim. 
1Chronicles14:14 Siseppi Daud méllau panunju polé ri Allataala, namappébali Allataala, “Aja' muluruiwi mennang polé kuwaé, iyakiya joppano malléko sibawa gasai polé ri liweng, seddéna aju-kajung murbéié." 
1Chronicles14:15 Rékko muwéngkalingani oni pada-padaé akka ajé tau mabbarisi ri coppo'na aju-kajungngéro, majuno, saba' maélo-Ka joppa ri yolomu untu' caui tentara Filistingngé.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Napogau'ni Daud aga napparéntang Allataala lao ri aléna. Aléna sibawa pasukanna napasoroni tentara Filistingngé mappammulai polé ri Gibéon lettu ri Gézer. 
1Chronicles14:17 Nakalabbana asenna Daud kégi-kégi, sibawa Puwangnge mébbui sininna bangsaé métau lao ri Daud." 
1Chronicles15:1 Patettonni Daud bola-bola untu' aléna ri Kota Daud, sibawa passadiya onrong untu' Petti Assijancinna Allataala nainappa pasang kéma untu' Pettiéro." 
1Chronicles15:2 Makkedai Daud, “Banna tau Léwié wedding makkai Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge, saba' mennang ritu napilé Puwangnge untu' mpuléi iyaro Pettié sibawa mattumani ri Aléna untu' mannennungeng.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Nanaobbini Daud sininna tau Israélié lao ri Yérusalém untu' palétté'i Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge lao ri onrong iya puraé napassadiya. 
1Chronicles15:4 Nainappa nasuro Daud wija-wijanna Harun sibawa tau Léwié maddeppungeng. 
1Chronicles15:5 Napolé ri appang Kéhat, suku Léwi, malluruni Uriél iya pimpingngéngngi 120 anggota appanna." 
1Chronicles15:6 Polé ri appang Mérari malluruni Asaya iya pimpingngéngngi 220 tau. 
1Chronicles15:7 Polé ri appang Gérson mallurini Yoél iya pimpingngéngngi 130 tau. 
1Chronicles15:8 Polé ri appang Elsafan malluruni Sémaya iya pimpingngéngngi 200 tau. 
1Chronicles15:9 Polé ri appang Hébron malluruni Eliél iya pimpingngéngngi 80 tau. 
1Chronicles15:10 Sibawa polé ri appang Uziél malluruni Aminadab iya pimpingngéngngi 112 tau. 
1Chronicles15:11 Nainappa naobbi Daud Imang Zadok sibawa Imang Abyatar enrengngé iya enneng tau Léwiéro, iyanaritu: Uriél, Asaya, Yoél, Sémaya, Eliél sibawa Aminadab." 
1Chronicles15:12 Adanna Daud lao ri mennang, “Ikonaritu pamimping appang ri laleng suku Léwi. Rimakkuwannanaro, sitinajako sibawa sining tau suku Léwi laingngé mappépaccing alé kuwammengngi mulléi palétté'i Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge, Allataalana Israélié, ri onrong iya puraé upassadiya." 
1Chronicles15:13 Wettunna iyaro Pettié untu' bunge'-bunge'na ripalétté, dé'ko gaga kuwaro untu' tiwii. Rimakkuwannanaro Puwangnge, Allataalata, hukkukki saba' tasompai dé' nasituru élo-Na.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Jaji sining imangngé sibawa tau Léwié mappépaccing aléni kuwammengngi weddingngi napalétté Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge, Allataalana Israélié." 
1Chronicles15:15 Na wettunna iyaro Pettié ripalétté, nauléni mennang sibawa aju pabbulé, situru atoreng iya nabbéréyangngé Puwangnge naolai Musa." 
1Chronicles15:16 Nasuro towi Daud iyaro sining pamimping tau Léwié kuwammengngi nasuroi siyagangngaré tau polé ri sukunna mennang untu' makkélong sibawa macculéyangngi élokkélong mariyo-riyoé ri kacapié sibawa simbal-é. 
1Chronicles15:17 Polé ri yelle'na kaluwarga-kaluwarga pakkélongngé, napiléni mennang sining tau mangoloéwé untu' macculéyangngi simbal gessaé: Héman ana' Yoél silaong sumpulolona iya riyasengngé Asaf ana' Bérékhya, sibawa Etan ana' Kusaya polé ri appang Mérari. Untu' maccowériwi mennang enrengngé macculéyang kacapi iya matanré oninna napiléi sining tau Léwi mangoloéwé: Zakharia, Yaaziél, Semiramot, Yéhiél, Uni, Eliab, Maaséya sibawa Bénaya. Untu' macculéyang kacapi iya mariyawaé oninna napiléi sining tau Léwi mangoloéwé: Matica, Elifélé, Miknéya, Azazya sibawa duwa pengawalna Bolana Puwangnge, iyanaritu Obéd-Edom sibawa Yéiél." 
1Chronicles15:18  
1Chronicles15:19  
1Chronicles15:20  
1Chronicles15:21  
1Chronicles15:22 Kénanya ripilé untu' kapalaiwi pacculé-culé musi' polé ri suku Léwiéro, saba' ahli musi'i." 
1Chronicles15:23 Bérékhya sibawa Elkana silaong Obéd-Edom sibawa Yéhia ripilé mancaji pengawalna Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge. Sining imang mangoloéwé: Sébanya, Yosafat, Nétaneel, Amasai, Zakharia, Bénaya sibawa Eliézer ripilé untu' paoniwi tarompé'é ri yolona Pettiéro." 
1Chronicles15:24  
1Chronicles15:25 Nanalaona Arung Daud silaong sining pamimpinna Israélié sibawa sining parawiraé ri bolana Obéd-Edom untu' malai Petti Assijancingngéro sibawa ramé-ramé battowa. 
1Chronicles15:26 Pitu saping lai sibawa pitu bimbala riyakkasuwiyangeng lao ri Allataala nasaba purai Natulung tau Léwié iya makkaéngngi Petti Assijancingngéro. 
1Chronicles15:27 Iyaro wettué Daud mappaké jumba polé ri kaing lénang alusu'é, makkuwatoro sining pacculé musi'é na Kénanya pimpingngi mennang enrengngé sining tau Léwi iya makkaéngngi Petti Assijancingngéro. Paké towi Daud waju Efod." 
1Chronicles15:28 Sininna umma Israélié laowi tinrosiwi Petti Assijancingngé lettu ri Yérusalém sibawa gora-gora marennu, oni tarompé, napiri, simbal sibawa kacapi." 
1Chronicles15:29 Wettunna iyaro Pettié mattengngang ritiwi muttama ri laleng kota, Mikhal ana' makkunrainna Saul célléng polé ri tellongengngé sibawa mitai Arung Daud séré enrengngé mariyo-riyo. Namajana pappéneddinna Mikhal mitai Daud." 
1Chronicles16:1 Iyaro Petti Assijancingngé napalénne'i ri laleng kéma iya puraé napassadiya Daud untu' Pettiéro. Nainappa makkasuwiyang mennang lao ri Allataala akkarobangeng ritunu sibawa akkarobangeng pappasidamé. 
1Chronicles16:2 Puranana nakkasuwiyangeng Daud iyaro sining akkarobangengngé, nabarakkakini ra'ya'é ri laleng asenna Puwangnge," 
1Chronicles16:3 nainappa nabagé-bagé inanré lao ri mennang maneng. Tungke' tau iya engkaé kuwaro muwi worowané iyaré'ga makkunrai lolongeng sikare' juku panggang, roti sibawa béppa kismis." 
1Chronicles16:4 Makkani Daud siyagangngaré tau Léwi untu' pimpingngi upacara assompangngé lao ri Puwangnge, Allataalana Israélié, ri yolona Petti Assijancingngéro, nasibawang élong nenniya pappoji-pojiyang." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asaf ripilé selaku pamimping utama sibawa Zakharia wakkélé'na. Yéiél, Semiramot, Yéhiél, Matica, Eliab, Bénaya, Obéd-Edom sibawa Yéiél risuro untu' macculéyang kacapi. Asaf risuro macculéyang simbal," 
1Chronicles16:6 sibawa duwa tau imang, iyanaritu Bénaya sibawa Yahaziél, risuro untu' tette masseppung tarompé ri yolona Petti Assijancingngéro." 
1Chronicles16:7 Iyanaro bunge'-bunge'na Daud suroi Asaf sibawa sellao-sellaona untu' makkélong pappoji-pojiyang lao ri Puwangnge. 
1Chronicles16:8 Sukkuru'no lao ri Puwangnge, abbirittangngi arajan-Na, curitai pangkauken-Na ri yelle'na bangsa-bangsaé." 
1Chronicles16:9 Puwélonni pappojiyangngé untu' Puwangnge, abbirittanni sininna winru-Na iya mappabengngaé." 
1Chronicles16:10 Aléna ritu Puwang Iya Séuwaé; ariyo-riyono, saba' appunnangennaki; sininna iya sompaéngngi Aléna sitinajai marennu." 
1Chronicles16:11 Ellauno awatangeng polé ri Aléna, tuli sompani." 
1Chronicles16:12 Eh wija-wijanna Yakub, atanna Allataala! Eh wija-wijanna Israélié, umma iya Napilé! Engngerangngi sininna anu makalallaing iya Napogau'é, aja' muwallupaiwi apettung-apettun-Na." 
1Chronicles16:13  
1Chronicles16:14 Puwangnge iyanaritu Allataalata, apettun-Na takkennai ri sininna linoé." 
1Chronicles16:15 Tuli naéngngerangngi assijancin-Na matu, jancin-Na takkennai mannennungeng." 
1Chronicles16:16 Iyaro assijancingngé Naébbui sibawa Abraham, nainappa sibawa Ishak," 
1Chronicles16:17 nainappa napakkasse sibawa Yakub mancaji assijancing iya mannennungengngé lao ri umma Israélié. 
1Chronicles16:18 Adan-Na, “Uwabbéréyangngi matu Tana Kanaan lao ri iko mancaji appunnangeng manamu.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Riyolo umma'na Puwangnge tuwoi selaku tau laing kuwaro jumellana mennang céddé bawang. 
1Chronicles16:20 Solléi mennang polé ri bangsaé lao ri bangsaé, létté polé riséddié wanuwa lao ri wanuwa laingngé." 
1Chronicles16:21 Iyakiya dé' naleppessangngi muwi niga tenre'i mennang; nasaba mennang, Naparéngngerangiwi arung-ngarungngé," 
1Chronicles16:22 “Aja' muganggui sining tau tappilé-Ku, aja' mupogau'i majaé lao ri nabi-nabik-Ku.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Akkélonno untu' Puwangnge, éh sininna linoé, patassiyani esso-esso karéba marennué makkedaé purani Napassalama'ki." 
1Chronicles16:24 Curitai arajan-Na lao ri bangsa-bangsaé, sibawa sining pangkaukenna iya baranié lao ri rupatauwé." 
1Chronicles16:25 Saba' battowai Puwangnge sibawa maseroi ripoji; harusu'i riyétauri lebbi nasininna déwataé. 
1Chronicles16:26 Déwata-déwatana bangsa laingngé banna dato-dato bawang iyakiya Puwangnge iyanaritu pancajiwi bitara marajaé. 
1Chronicles16:27 Risalipuriwi arajang sibawa alebbireng, bola-Na pennoi akuwasang sibawa ariyo-riyong." 
1Chronicles16:28 Pojiwi Puwangnge, éh rupatauwé! Pojiwi araja-awatangenna." 
1Chronicles16:29 Pojiwi asen-Na iya malebbié, sibawa tiwino akkarobangeng ri lalempola-Na. Sompani Puwangnge sibawa mappakéyang assompang!" 
1Chronicles16:30 Ténréno ri yolo-Na, éh sininna linoé! Masse linoé dé' nagoyang." 
1Chronicles16:31 Eh langi sibawa linoé arennuno! Abbirittangngi lao ri bangsa-bangsaé makkedaé iyaro Puwangnge Arung! 
1Chronicles16:32 Memmu'no éh tasi' sibawa sininna lise'na! Ariyo-riyono éh padang sibawa sininna tanet-tanenna! 
1Chronicles16:33 Ajukajung ri ale'é gora-gorai matu saba' poléni Puwangnge untu' mapparénta ri linoé. 
1Chronicles16:34 Sukkuru'no ri Puwangnge, saba' makessingngi; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na." 
1Chronicles16:35 Powadani, “Oh Allataala, Pappassalama'ta, passalama'ni polé ri akuwasanna bangsa-bangsaé sibawa paddeppungenni paimeng, kuwammengngi weddikki sukkuru sibawa pojiwi asenna iya mapaccingngé!”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Pojini Puwangnge, Allataalana Israélié, makkekkuwangngé sibawa mannennungeng! Nainappa makkeda umma Israélié, “Aming”, nanapojiwi mennang Puwangnge." 
1Chronicles16:37 Nainappa Arung Daud suroi Asaf sibawa sining tau Léwi laingngé untu' tette murusu'i gau'-gau' iya engkaé assisumpungenna sibawa assompangngé ri onrong kégi Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge ritaro. Esso-esso harusu majjama kuwaro," 
1Chronicles16:38 ribantu ri Obéd-Edom ana' Yédutun, enrengngé 68 tau laing iya siappangngé sibawa aléna. Obéd-Edom sibawa Hosa iyanaritu pengawalna pintu-pintu gerbangngé." 
1Chronicles16:39 Iyakiya Zadok sibawa imang-ngimang laingngé risuroi untu' tette murusu'i assompangngé ri onrong assompangngé ri Gibéon. 
1Chronicles16:40 Tungke' élé sibawa arawéng harusu'i mennang makkasuwiyang akkarobangeng ritunu ri yasé'na mézbaé situru sibawa hukkung-hukkung nabbéréyangngé Puwangnge lao ri tau Israélié. 
1Chronicles16:41 Imang Zadok sibawa imang-ngimangngéro ribantui ri Héman sibawa Yédutun nenniya sining tau laing iya bannaé ripilé untu' makkélong pappojiyang lao ri Puwangnge nasaba pammasé-Na iya mannennungengngé. 
1Chronicles16:42 Héman sibawa Yédutun tugas towi ri tarompé'é, simbal-é sibawa paréwa musi' laing iya riyacculéyangngé untu' maccowériwi élok-kélong pappojiyangngé. Sining anggotana appang Yédutun risuroi untu' jagaiwi pintu-pintu gerbangngé." 
1Chronicles16:43 Nainappa lisuni sininna tauwé ri bolana tungke'-tungke'. Makkuwatoro Daud lisuni untu' mitai kaluwargana. 
1Chronicles17:1 Mattette'nana Daud ri saorajana, riséuwaé esso naobbini Nabi Natan namakkeda, “Itai, iyya'é monroka ri saoraja iya riyébbué polé ri aju camara Libanongngé, na Petti Assijancinna Puwangnge banna ri laleng kémaé!”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Nappébali Natan, “Pogau'ni sininna niya'na Datu saba' Allataala tulungngi Datu.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Iyakiya iyaro wennié makkedai Allataala lao ri Natan," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Laono sibawa palettukengngi atak-Ku Daud pasengngéwé, ‘Tenniya iko patettongek-Ka matu bolaé." 
1Chronicles17:5 Sipongenna Upaleppe bangsa Israélié polé ri Maséré lettu makkekkuwangngé, dé'pa naengka Uwonro ri laleng séddié bola. Tuli sollé-Ka sibawa monro riséddié kéma." 
1Chronicles17:6 Sipongek-Ku sollé silaong bangsa Israélié dé'pa naengka Umakkutana ri pamimping-pamimping iya puraé Upilé, aga saba'na nadé' mennang napatettongek-Ka séddi bola polé ri aju camara Libanongngé.’" 
1Chronicles17:7 Rimakkuwannanaro, Natan, powadanni atak-Ku Daud makkedaé Iyya, Puwang Iya Pommakuwasaé, makkeda lao ri aléna, ‘Purano uwala polé ri jama-jamammu makkampi bimbala'é ri padangngé, sibawa Upancaji arung ri umma'-Ku Israélié." 
1Chronicles17:8 Purano utulung kégi-kégiko lao, sibawa sininna balimmu Upaccappui wettummu mammusu. Uwébbuko matu tarompo pada-pada sining pamimping iya kaminang battowaé ri linoé." 
1Chronicles17:9 Untu' umma'-Ku Israélié purani Upassadiyangeng onrong untu' mancaji wanuwanna kuwammengngi naulléi tuwo tennang tenrigangguna. Sipongeng apolénna mennang ri tanaéwé riyolo, sibawa dé'napa mennang nappunnai arung, rigasai mennang risining tau iya pojiyéngngi ateddekengngé. Iyakiya iyaro gau'é dé'na nakajajiyanna matu. Majjanci-Ka maélo caui sininna balimmu, sibawa maélo-Ka mpérékko wija-wija." 
1Chronicles17:10  
1Chronicles17:11 Matti, rékko narapini ajjalemmu sibawa rikuburu'ko ri tampunna toriloyomu, séddi polé ri ana' worowanému Uwakka matu mancaji arung. Aléna ritu matu patettongek-Ka bola. Upakkasse'i matu akkarungenna, sibawa untu' mannennungeng séddi polé ri wija-wijanna mapparéntai matu selaku arung." 
1Chronicles17:12  
1Chronicles17:13 Maélo-Ka mancaji ambo'na na aléna mancajiwi matu ana' worowané-Ku. Maélo-Ka tette pogau'i makessingngé lao ri aléna situru sibawa jancik-Ku. Jancik-Ku ri aléna tette'i Uwakkatenning, dé' napada iya Upogau'é lao ri Saul iya puraé Upaésa polé ri tudangenna kuwammengngi weddikko mancaji arung." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ana' worowanému iya Upiléro upancajiwi matu arung ri umma'-Ku sibawa akkarungek-Ku untu' mannennungeng, sibawa ana' eppona massossoreng mapparéntai matu selaku arung.’ ”" 
1Chronicles17:15 Natan paissengiwi Daud sininna iya puraé napannessa Allataala ri aléna. 
1Chronicles17:16 Nanauttama'na Arung Daud ri Kémana Puwangnge. Tudanni sibawa massempajang, “Oh Puwang Allataala, iyya sibawa kaluwargaku, dé' nasitinaja tarimai sininna akessingeng iya Muwajjellokengngé ri iyya iya labe'éwé." 
1Chronicles17:17 Mala Mupogau'i lebbi naiyaro; purano mébbu janci passalenna wija-wijakku untu' wettu mangoloé. Mala Mugaukekka selaku séddi tau maraja. 
1Chronicles17:18 Agapi wedding upowada lao ri iko, oh Puwang Allataala? Muwisseng manengngi passalenna atam-Mué, namuni mabbéréko pappakalebbi lao ri iyya." 
1Chronicles17:19 Nasaba élo-Mu muto sibawa untu' apentingekku Mupogau'i sininna pangkaukeng battowaéwé sibawa mannessa-nessa. 
1Chronicles17:20 Banna Iko bawang Allataala, dé' gaga iya padaé sibawa Iko. Riissengngi gau'éro saba' pura riyappaissengengngi riyolopa nariyolo." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ri sininna linoé dé' gaga bangsa pada-pada Israél. Israél iyanaritu alé-aléna bangsa iya Mupaleppe'é polé ri angatangengngé untu' mancaji umma'-Mu muto. Sininna pangkaukeng battowaé namakalallaing iya Mupogau'é lao ri mennang mébbui asem-Mu tarompo ri sininna linoé. Mupaleppe'i umma'-Mu polé ri Maséré, sibawa panyingkiri'i bangsa-bangsa laingngé wettunna maju umma'-Mu mammusu." 
1Chronicles17:22 Purani Mupancaji bangsa Israélié umma muto untu' mannennungeng. Na Iko, oh Puwang, mancaji Allataalana mennang."
