Psalms18:44 Mupaleppe'ka polé ri appang iya madorakaé, Namupancajika panguwasana bangsa-bangsaé; bangsa iya dé'é uwissengngi mancajiwi atakku." 
Psalms18:45 Sining tau laingngé tunru'i lao ri iyya sibawa mapato rékko naéngkalingai paréntaku. 
Psalms18:46 Teddénni abaraningenna mennang; ténréi mennang sibawa massu polé ri bénténna. 
Psalms18:47 Tuwoi Puwangnge! Ripojiwi pangéwaingekku! Pakarajai aloppongenna Allataala pappassalama'ku! 
Psalms18:48 Nawérékka apakalang lao ri balikku; Napatunru'i bangsa-bangsaé ri yoloku," 
Psalms18:49 Napassalama'ka polé risining balikku. Puwang, Muwérékka apakalang lao ri balikku, Mulinrungika polé risining tau mabecco'é." 
Psalms18:50 Naupakaraja-Ko ri yelle'na bangsa-bangsaé, sibawa upuwélongek-Ko pappoji-pojiyang." 
Psalms18:51 Allataala mpéréngngi apakalang battowa lao ri arun-Na, tette'i namaséi tau napilé-Na, iyanaritu Daud sibawa wija-wijanna untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms19:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmurna Daud. 
Psalms19:2 Langié pannessai arajanna Allataala, sibawa bitaraé mabbirittangngi winru-Na." 
Psalms19:3 Esso séddié palettu'i lao ri esso rappina; wenni séddié curitai lao ri wenni ri munrinna. 
Psalms19:4 Dé'gaga mabbicara iyaré'ga makkeda-ada, dé'gaga sadda riyéngkalinga." 
Psalms19:5 Iyakiya pangobbina massammengngi ri sininna linoé, iyaro pasengngé lettu'i ri cappa-cappa linoé. Mébbui Puwangnge bola ri langié untu' mata essoé," 
Psalms19:6 maéléi masiya' pada-pada botting mpurané massu polé ri bili'na, pada-pada pabbarani iya marennué pammulaiwi allalengenna." 
Psalms19:7 Natuttungngi langié polé ri cappa'na lao ri cappa'na; dé'gaga leppe polé ri pellana. 
Psalms19:8 Iyaro Hukkunna Puwangnge sukkui, napétakkari nyawaé. Wedding riyatepperi paréntana Puwangnge, nawéréngngi pangissengeng tau biyasaé." 
Psalms19:9 Coco'i peraturanna Puwangnge, napésennangiwi atié. Tuléngngi iyaro attettekenna Puwangnge, naébbui tauwé pahangngi." 
Psalms19:10 Massompa lao ri Puwangnge makessing iyaro, matteru mannennungeng. Iyaro Hukkunna Puwangnge tongengngi sibawa adélé maneng." 
Psalms19:11 Lebbi mangke'i Hukkunna Puwangnge naiya ulaweng tuléngngé, lebbi macenningngi naiya cani aslié." 
Psalms19:12 Riparéngngerangiwi atam-Mu ri sininnaro; tassadiyai saro battowaé lao ri tau iya turusiyéngngi. 
Psalms19:13 Dé'gaga mulléi maingekiwi apusanna; Puwang, paleppe'ka polé ri asalang tassubbué." 
Psalms19:14 Pabélaika polé ri dosa iya riyattungkaiyé, aja' taleppessakka rikuwasai ri aléna. Naumancaji dé' cellana, sibawa leppe polé ri pelanggarang matane'é." 
Psalms19:15 Tennapodo ada-ada sibawa pikkirakku Muéloriwi, oh Puwang, pallinrung sibawa pappassalama'ku!" 
Psalms20:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmurna Daud. 
Psalms20:2 Tennapodo nabaliko Puwangnge ri wettu aperisengngé, tennapodo akuwasanna Allataalana Yakub linrungiko!" 
Psalms20:3 Tennapodo kiringngi bantuwang polé ri Bola-Na, sibawa mabbéréi pattulung polé ri Bulu Sion." 
Psalms20:4 Tennapodo Aléna méngngerangngi sininna pakkasuwiyammu, nenniya masennang sibawa sininna akkarobangeng ritunummu." 
Psalms20:5 Tennapodo Aléna mabbéréyangngi sininna iya muwacinnaiyé, sibawa mébbui sininna rancanamu papolé wassélé." 
Psalms20:6 Natagora-gora marennu nasaba apakalammu, sibawa makkai bandéraé untu' pojiwi Allataalata. Tennapodo natarimai Puwangnge sininna paréllaummu." 
Psalms20:7 Uwissenni makkekkuwangngé makkedaé Puwangnge mabbéré apakalang lao ri arung napilé-Na. Puwangnge baliwi polé ri suruga-Na iya mapaccingngé; nasaba akuwasanna Puwangnge lolongengngi apakalang battowa. 
Psalms20:8 Engka tau mattuwangngi karéta musuna, engkato mattuwangngi anyaranna. Iyakiya idi mattuwangngi akuwasanna Puwangnge, Allataalata." 
Psalms20:9 Tabbuttui matu mennang sibawa mabuwang, iyakiya tokkokki matu sibawa tettong masse." 
Psalms20:10 Oh Puwang, wéréngngi apakalang arungngé, baliki wettutta mangobbi." 
Psalms21:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmurna Daud. 
Psalms21:2 Oh Puwang, marennui arungngé nasaba purai Mupéwatangi; mariyo-riyoi nasaba apakalang iya Muwéréngngéngngi!" 
Psalms21:3 Purani Mupennoi cinnana atinna, sibawa mpéréngngi aga iya naéllauwé." 
Psalms21:4 Lao-Ko ri aléna sibawa barakka maona, sibawa pasang passigera ulaweng ri tompo ulunna." 
Psalms21:5 Méllauwi atuwong, namuwéréngngi, mala umuru malampé untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms21:6 Nasaba pattulum-Mu mancajiwi malebbi senna, Mupancajiwi tarompo sibawa mattappa." 
Psalms21:7 Mubarakkakiwi untu' matteru; ahadérékem-Mu mébbui penno ariyo-riyong. 
Psalms21:8 Mamménasai arungngé lao ri Puwang Iya Pommatanré, tuli amangngi saba' tette'i riyamaséi ri Puwangnge." 
Psalms21:9 Natawangngi matu sininna balinna, sibawa tikkengngi sininna tau iya céccééngngi Aléna." 
Psalms21:10 Poléi pada-pada api iya malluwa'-luwa'é untu' paccappui mennang. Ripaccappui matu mennang ri caina Puwangnge, sibawa api iya paangurengngé." 
Psalms21:11 Polé ri wija-wijanna mennang dé'na gaga nasésa, ripaccappu manengngi matu mennang ri arungngé." 
Psalms21:12 Rékko mébbui mennang rancana méwai arungngé, belléna mennang dé' nawwassélé matu." 
Psalms21:13 Nannémbakengngi matu pana-Na, angkanna mennang balé sibawa lari." 
Psalms21:14 Idi poji-Ko Puwang, saba' battowai akuwasam-Mu, makkélokki pojiwi aporéngem-Mu." 
Psalms22:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Situru lagunna: Jonga ri éléé. Mazmurna Daud. 
Psalms22:2 Allataalaku, oh Allataalaku, magi Musalaika? Mangobbika, iyakiya tette'-Ko mabéla sibawa dé' natulukka." 
Psalms22:3 Oh Allataalaku, mangobbika ri lakessoé, iyakiya tette'-Ko mammekko. Massempajakka ri wennié, dé'to natennang atikku." 
Psalms22:4 Iyakiya Iko Arung Iya Pommapaccingngé, iya napoji-pojiyé Israélié." 
Psalms22:5 Mamménasai néné-nénéta ri Iko, mamménasai mennang, sibawa Mupassalama'i mennang." 
Psalms22:6 Mangobbii mennang ri Iko sibawa ripaleppe; mamménasai mennang sibawa dé' naripakacélé. 
Psalms22:7 Iyakiya iyya'é lati, tenniya tolino, ricella-cella sibawa ripakatuna ri tau maégaé." 
Psalms22:8 Sininna iya mitaékka méllékéllé'ka, mabbuwé sibawa paccilic-cilingngi ulunna." 
Psalms22:9 Adanna mennang, “Leppessangngi mattuwangngi Puwangnge, kuwammengngi Puwangnge passalama'i, rékko masennangngi Puwangnge lao ri aléna!”" 
Psalms22:10 Iko ritu passuka polé ri parémmanangngé, sibawa mébbuka amang ri wakkanna indo'ku." 
Psalms22:11 Sipongekku jaji, engkai totoku ri laleng limam-Mu, sipongenna ri laleng parémmanang, Iko ritu Allataalaku." 
Psalms22:12 Aja' Mumabéla, saba' macawé'ni bahayaé, na dé'gaga mattulung." 
Psalms22:13 Pada-pada banténg makkonrongngé, nakatulukka balié, pada-pada banténg liya polé ri Basan nakeppukka mennang." 
Psalms22:14 Naoloika sibawa bawa mangnganga, pada-pada singa iya mangngaungngé sibawa palupperi." 
Psalms22:15 Cappui awatangekku pada-pada uwai tuppa'é, leppe' manengngi buku-bukukku polé ri padduppanna, maccolo'i atikku pada-pada lilingngé." 
Psalms22:16 Marakko tigero'ku pada-pada reppa pincengngé, maddeppé lilaku ri ellak-kellakku. Puwang, Musalaika ri tompo'na awué pada-pada tau iya matéénna." 
Psalms22:17 Nakeppukka garembolanna tau majaé; pada-pada asu makkonrongngé katulukka mennang, toddo'i limakku sibawa ajéku." 
Psalms22:18 Sininna bukukku uwullé bilangngi, naitaka balié selaku akkaita-itang." 
Psalms22:19 Nabagé-bagéi mennang pakéyakku, sibawa mundiwi jumbaku." 
Psalms22:20 Iyakiya Iko, aja' tamabéla, oh Puwang, poléni masitta tulukka, saba Iko ritu awatangekku." 
Psalms22:21 Paleppe'i nyawaku polé ri peddangngé, passalama'ka polé ri pakkokkona asué." 
Psalms22:22 Dé' pakkullékku, paleppe'ka polé ri tanru'na banténgngé sibawa polé ri pannyoro'na singaé." 
Psalms22:23 Ucuritai matu pangkaukem-Mu lao ri silessu-silessurekku; ri laleng assiruntukenna umma'-Mu upoji-poji-Ko. 
Psalms22:24 Pojiwi Aléna, éh sining tau mateppe'é! Pakarajai Aléna, sininna wija-wijanna Yakub! Suju'no ri Aléna, sininna wija-wijanna Israélié!" 
Psalms22:25 Saba' dé' Naita matunai tau ritenre'é, sibawa dé' naangga énténgngi anrasa-rasanna. Dé' Nagiling polé ri tauwéro, iyakiya maréngkalingai rékko méllau tulungngi ri Aléna." 
Psalms22:26 Ri tengngana addeppungenna umma'é upoji-Ko, nasaba sininna iya puraé Mupogau'. Ri yolona umma iya mateppe'é uwakkasuwiyangengngi akkarobangeng iya uwajjanciyangngé." 
Psalms22:27 Manréi matu tau kasiyasié gangka messo; tau iya laowé ri Puwangnge pojiwi matu. Tennapodo saléwangekko mannennungeng! 
Psalms22:28 Sininna bangsaé naéngngerangngi matu Puwangnge sibawa lisui ri Aléna, sininna suku bangsaé suju'i matu sompai Aléna." 
Psalms22:29 Saba' Puwangnge ritu makuwasa, Naparéntai bangsa-bangsaé." 
Psalms22:30 Sininna tau battowaé suju'i matu ri yolo-Na, sininna tolinoé suju'i matu sompai Aléna." 
Psalms22:31 Abbatireng-abbatireng rappina massompai matu ri Puwangnge, riyabbirittangngi matu massossoreng." 
Psalms22:32 Lao ri bangsa iya jajiyé ri munrinna ribirittaiyangngi matu makkedaé purani napassalama Puwangnge umma'-Na. 
Psalms23:1 Mazmurna Daud. Padai séddié pakkampi Puwangnge lao ri aléku, dé' uwakurangeng." 
Psalms23:2 Napaléwuka ri padang wella iya manyilaé. Napimpikka mattuju ri uwai iya tennangngé. 
Psalms23:3 Nawérékka awatangeng mabaru, sibawa nadulukka ri laleng iya tongengngé, situru sibawa jancin-Na." 
Psalms23:4 Namuni uwolai lompo iya mapettangngé, dé' umétau ri bahayaé, saba' Musilaongekka. Mulinrungika pada-pada séddié pakkampi linrungiwi bimbala'na sibawa tekkeng nenniya tarasulu." 
Psalms23:5 Mupassadiyangekka pésta ri yolona matanna balikku. Muduppaika selaku topolé malebbié. Mupatalangekka énungeng makessing maona. 
Psalms23:6 Uwisseng makessik-Ko lao ri iyya, sibawa tuli mamaséika. Na weddikka monro ri Bola-Mu, gangka tuwoku." 
Psalms24:1 Mazmurna Daud. Appunnangenna Puwangnge linoé lollong lise'na, linoé sibawa sininna iya monroiyéngngi." 
Psalms24:2 Napalénne'i pabborina ri tompo'na tasi'é, sibawa patettongngi ri tompo'na uwai maliyungngé." 
Psalms24:3 Nigana wedding ménré ri Bulu-buluna Puwangnge, sibawa muttama ri laleng Bola-Na?" 
Psalms24:4 Tau iya dé'é namakkécella pikkiranna sibawa pangkaukenna, iya dé'é nattanro bellé-bellé sibawa dé' nassompa barahala." 
Psalms24:5 Aléna ritu ribarakkaki matu sibawa ripassalama ri Puwangnge, sibawa ripannessa dé' napasala ri Allataala." 
Psalms24:6 Makkuwaniro tau iya polé mangolo ri Allataala, iya polé sompai Allataalana Yakub." 
Psalms24:7 Timpa'i malowang gerbang cowaé, kuwammengngi nauttama Arung iya malebbié." 
Psalms24:8 Niga Arung iya malebbié? Aléna ritu Puwang iya baranié; Puwang pennoé akuwasang, iya tassebbo'é ri laleng ammusurengngé." 
Psalms24:9 Timpa'i malowang gerbang cowaé, kuwammengngi nauttama Arung malebbié." 
Psalms24:10 Niga Arung iya malebbié? Puwang Iya Pommakuwasaé, Aléna ritu Arung iya malebbié!" 
Psalms25:1 Mazmurna Daud. Ri Iko oh Puwang, upaénré sempajakku," 
Psalms25:2 oh Allataalaku, mateppe'ka lao ri Iko! Aja' taleppessakka ripakasiri, sibawa rigora-gorai risining balikku." 
Psalms25:3 Tau iya bali'bellaé ri Iko ripakasirii matu, iyakiya iya mateppe'é ri Iko dé' naripakacélé." 
Psalms25:4 Ajjellokenni élo-Mu lao ri iyya, oh Puwang, pannessani aga harusu upogau'." 
Psalms25:5 Pagguruka sibawa pimpikka untu' tuwo situru élo-Mu, saba' Iko ritu Allataala iya passalama'ékku, tuli mamménasaka lao ri Iko." 
Psalms25:6 Engngerangngi sininna akessingemmu sibawa pammasé-Mu, oh Puwang, iya Muwajjellokengngé ri pammulanna mupa." 
Psalms25:7 Addampengenni dosa sibawa asalang wettu kalloloku, éngngerakka situru sibawa pammasé-Mu nenniya akessingem-Mu." 
Psalms25:8 Saba' makessingngi Puwangnge sibawa adélé'i, Najjellokengngi lalengngé lao ri tau iya pusaé." 
Psalms25:9 Puwangnge pimpingngi tau iya mariyawa atié, sibawa paggurui mennang élo-Na." 
Psalms25:10 Tau iya mapatoé ri assijancin-Na sibawa hukkun-Na, Nagaukengngi sibawa mamasé nenniya matinulu." 
Psalms25:11 Puwang, addampengekka situru jancim-Mu, saba' battowai asalakku." 
Psalms25:12 Puwangnge mappagguruwangngi lao ri tau mateppe'é laleng iya harusu'é naola mennang. 
Psalms25:13 Tette'i matu mennang tuwo madécéng, ana' eppona mennang manai matu tana manana." 
Psalms25:14 Puwangnge iyanaritu sellaona tau mateppe'é, napannessai akkatta-Na lao ri mennang." 
Psalms25:15 Tette'i matakku mattuju lao ri Puwangnge, saba' Napassalama'ka polé ri bahayaé." 
Psalms25:16 Itaka, sibawa amaséika, saba' napassalama'ka polé ri bahayaé." 
Psalms25:17 Pédé tattambai asussanna atikku paleppe'ka polé ri aperisekku. 
Psalms25:18 Pénessaini anrasa-rasakku sibawa asukkarakekku, sibawa addampengenni sininna dosaku." 
Psalms25:19 Itani pékkugi égana balikku; nacéccé senna'ka mennang. 
Psalms25:20 Jagaika sibawa passalama'ka, kuwammengngi dé' umasiri, saba' mallinrukka ri alé-Mu." 
Psalms25:21 Tennapodo akessingengngé sibawa alempurengngé silaongekka, saba' mamménasaka ri Iko." 
Psalms25:22 Oh Allataala, paleppe'ni umma'-Mu polé risininna aperisenna." 
Psalms26:1 Wérékka adélékeng, oh Puwang, saba' tuwoka sibawa malempu ati. Mamménasaka lao ri Puwangnge, sibawa tebbata-bata muwi céddé." 
Psalms26:2 Salidikika, oh Puwang, sibawa ojika, paréssai cinnaku sibawa pikkirakku." 
Psalms26:3 Tuli uwéngngerangngi matu pammasé-Mu, sibawa tette matinulu lao ri Iko." 
Psalms26:4 Dé' umaélo maddeppungeng silaong pabbelléngngé, iyaré'ga siwollompollong sibawa tau munapé'é." 
Psalms26:5 Ucéccé addeppungenna tau iya pogau'éngngi majaé, uniniriwi bangsa majaé." 
Psalms26:6 Ubissaiwi limakku tanrang teppasala, sibawa joppa mattulilingiwi mézba-Mu, oh Puwang," 
Psalms26:7 napuwélong towi élong sukkuru'é, sibawa mabbirittangngi pangkaukem-Mu iya mappabengngaé." 
Psalms26:8 Upojiwi Bola-Mu, oh Puwang, onrom-Mu monro sibawa penno arajang." 
Psalms26:9 Aja' taunoka silaong tau madosaé, iyaré'ga reddu'i nyawaku silaong tau pappassu daraé." 
Psalms26:10 Matteru-terui mennang pogau'i majaé, sibawa tuli sadiyai tarima pasoso." 
Psalms26:11 Iyakiya tuwoka sibawa ati matinulu, amaséika sibawa paleppe'ka." 
Psalms26:12 Na amakka polé ri sininna bahayaé, upojiwi matu Puwangnge ri laleng addeppungenna umma'-Na." 
Psalms27:1 Mazmurna Daud. Puwangnge iyanaritu cahayaku sibawa asalamakekku, dé'gaga iya uwétauriyé. Puwangnge iyanaritu bénténg allinrungekku, dé' matu umétau." 
Psalms27:2 Rékko nagasaka tomajaé iya maéloé mpunoka, mennang ritu tabbuttu sibawa mabuwang." 
Psalms27:3 Namuni rikeppukka ri pasukang iya battowaé, dé' umétau matu. Namuni poléi musué méwaka, tette'ka mamménasa." 
Psalms27:4 Banna séddi uwéllau ri Puwangnge, banna iyaé uwacinnai: monro ri Bolana Puwangnge sillampé atuwokku, untu' péneddingiwi akessingenna Puwangnge sibawa méllauwi pappimpin-Na." 
Psalms27:5 Nalinrungika Puwangnge ri wettu aperisengngé; Nasubbuka ri laleng Bola-Na, sibawa naakkaka ri tompo'na bulu batué." 
Psalms27:6 Makkekkuwangngé pakalana lao ri balié ri mattulilikku; nasibawang gora-gora marennu uwakkasuwiyangengngi akkarobangeng sukkuru'é ri Bola-Mu; maéloka makkélong sibawa pojiwi Puwangnge. 
Psalms27:7 Oh Puwang, éngkalingai rékko mangobbika ri Iko, amaséika sibawa balika!" 
Psalms27:8 Makkeda-Ko, “Poléno sompa-Ka.” Ubaliwi, “Masitta'ka polé, oh Puwang;" 
Psalms27:9 aja' tamassubbu polé ri aléku.” Aja' tamacai sibawa sampéyangngi atam-Mu, saba' Iko ritu pura tulukka. Aja' tabuwakka iyaré'ga salaika, oh Allataala, pappassalama'ku." 
Psalms27:10 Namuni nasalaika ambo' sibawa indo', Allataala piyaraka matu." 
Psalms27:11 Jellokekka élo-Mu, oh Puwang, pimpikka ri laleng iya malempué, saba' maéga senna balikku." 
Psalms27:12 Aja' tabbéréyakka lao ri napessunna balikku, iya gasaékka sibawa bellé nenniya pangancang." 
Psalms27:13 Mateppe'ka upéneddingiwi matu akessingenna Puwangnge ri laleng atuwokku ri linoéwé. 
Psalms27:14 Amménasano lao ri Puwangnge, péwatangini sibawa pakkasse'ni atimmu; ya, amménasano lao ri Puwangnge!" 
Psalms28:1 Mazmurna Daud. Oh Puwang, ri alé-Mu mangobbika, Iko pangéwaingekku, éngkalingai pangobbiku. Rékko mammekko-Ko lao ri iyya, pada-padaka tau iya nonnoé ri kalebbong kuburu'é." 
Psalms28:2 Engkalingai paréllaukku rékko goraka méllau tulung, sibawa makkai limakku mattuju ri Bola-Mu iya mapaccingngé." 
Psalms28:3 Aja' mupaccappuka silaong tau madorakaé, silaong tau iya pogau'é ja. Mabbicarai mennang sibawa mabessa, iyakiya atinna mennang pennoi akebbongeng." 
Psalms28:4 Hukkungngi mennang nasaba pangkaukenna, nasaba ja iya napogau'é mennang. Hukkungngi mennang situru sibawa pangkaukenna; wéréngngi mennang pahukkungeng iya sicoco'é." 
Psalms28:5 Dé' mennang nabati-batiwi pangkaukenna Puwangnge, iyaré'ga aga iya Najamaé. Narihukkung matu mennang, sibawa paccappui mennang untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms28:6 Ripojiwi Puwangnge, saba' purani Naéngkalinga paréllaukku." 
Psalms28:7 Puwangnge pallinrukku sibawa pangéwaingekku, mateppe'ka ri Aléna. Mattulungngi sibawa pérennuiwi atikku, upojiwi Aléna sibawa élong sukkuru." 
Psalms28:8 Puwangnge mabbéré awatangeng lao ri umma'-Na, Naéwaiwi sibawa Napassalama'i arung napilé-Na." 
Psalms28:9 Passalama'i umma'-Mu, oh Puwang, barakkakiwi sining tau appunnangem-Mu. Ancajino pada-pada séddié tau pakkampi untu' mennang, sibawa onrowangngi mennang untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms29:1 Mazmurna Daud. Pojiwi Puwangnge, éh mahlu'-mahlu' surugaé, pojiwi arajanna sibawa akuwasan-Na." 
Psalms29:2 Pojiwi asenna Puwang iya malebbié sompai Aléna sibawa paké pakéyang assompang. 
Psalms29:3 Allataala iya marajaé magguttui ri tompo'na tasi'é, maddaremmengngi saddan-Na ri tompo'na dolangengngé." 
Psalms29:4 Riyéngkalingai saddanna Puwangnge, pennoi akuwasang sibawa agaggang." 
Psalms29:5 Naléttung aju-kajungngé saddanna Puwangnge, napolo aju camara Libanongngé." 
Psalms29:6 Napaluppe'i Bulu Libanon pada-pada ana' sapingngé. Luppe'-luppu'i Bulu Siryon pada-pada ana' banténgngé. 
Psalms29:7 Saddanna Puwangnge naébbui billa'é siyanré-anré. 
Psalms29:8 Saddanna Puwangnge gottangngi padang kessi'é, Puwangnge gottangngi padang kessi Kadés." 
Psalms29:9 Nagottangngi aju-kajung berangangngé saddanna Puwangnge, sibawa padduttungngi daud-daungngé ri ale'é; na umma'é ri Bolana Puwangnge mangobbii, “Pojiwi Puwangnge!”" 
Psalms29:10 Makuwasai Puwangnge ri lémpe rajaé, makuwasai selaku Arung untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms29:11 Tennapodo Puwangnge mabbéré awatangeng lao ri umma'-Na, sibawa mébbui mennang saléwangeng." 
Psalms30:1 Mazmurna Daud. Elong untu' résmikangngi Bolana Allataala. 
Psalms30:2 Upoji-Ki, Oh Puwang, saba' puraka Mupassalama sibawa dé' Muleppessangngi balikku gora-goraika." 
Psalms30:3 Puwang Allataalaku, mangobbika ri iko méllau tulung, sibawa Mupajjappaka." 
Psalms30:4 Mupaleppe'ka polé ri linona amaténgngé, sibawa patuwoka polé ri yelle'na sining tau maté." 
Psalms30:5 Puwélonni pappoji-pojiyangngé untu' Puwangnge, éh umma'-Na iya matinulué, sibawa sukkuru'no lao ri Iya Pommapaccingngé." 
Psalms30:6 Saba' cinampe'mi macai Puwangnge, akessingen-Na matterui sillampé atuwongngé. Terika ri wennié, iyakiya éléé tiwii arennung." 
Psalms30:7 Wettunna marasa amang, makkedaka, “Dé' naricauka matu!”" 
Psalms30:8 Saba' mekessing ati-Ko lao ri iyya, oh Puwang, Mupancajika pada-pada bulu masse'é. Iyakiya rimunri massubbu-Ko polé ri iyya, naumancaji métau." 
Psalms30:9 Ri Iko, oh Puwang, mangobbika, lao ri Puwangnge maréllauka," 
Psalms30:10 “Aga akkégunana ri alé-Mu rékko matéka sibawa nonno ri kalebbong kuburu'é? Weddigga tau maté poji-Ko sibawa mabbirittangngi atinulurem-Mu? 
Psalms30:11 Engkalingai, oh Puwang, sibawa amaséika. Puwang tulukka!”" 
Psalms30:12 Purani upinra mpatikku mancai séré-séré marennu, Muwalai amessékku na-Mupennoika sibawa ariyo-riyong." 
Psalms30:13 Na dé' umaélo pammekkorengngi alé; upuwélongengngi pappojiyang alé-Mu, oh Puwang Allataalaku, sibawa sukkuru lao ri Iko untu' mannennungeng!" 
Psalms31:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmurna Daud. 
Psalms31:2 Ri alé-Muka mallinrung oh Puwang, aja' taleppessakka ripakacélé. Passalama'ka nasaba adélékem-Mu" 
Psalms31:3 éngkalingaka sibawa paleppe'ka masitta. Ancajini lao ri iyya pada-pada bulu batué onrokku mallinrung, pada-pada bénténg iya mawatangngé, kégaka salama." 
Psalms31:4 Ya, pada-pada-Ko bulu batué sibawa bénténg iya masse'é untu' aléku! Pimpikka situru sibawa jancim-Mu." 
Psalms31:5 Leppessakka polé ri siyo iya ripasangengngékka, saba' Iko ritu onrokku mallinrung." 
Psalms31:6 Ri laleng limam-Mu uwabbéréyang aléku; Iko paleppe'ka, oh Puwang, Allataala iya matinulué." 
Psalms31:7 Mucéccéi tau iya massompaé barahala; iyakiya mateppe'ka lao ri Puwangnge. 
Psalms31:8 Marennuka matu sibawa mariyo-riyo saba' tette'-Ko mamaséika. Muwitai anrasa-rasakku sibawa mujampangiwi asussakku. 
Psalms31:9 Dé' muleppessakka ritawang ri balié, iyakiya pakkulléka joppa sibawa laluwasa." 
Psalms31:10 Amaséika, oh Puwang, saba' ri laleng asussakka; mapessé matakku nasaba teri, tubu nyawaku maddoko-roko." 
Psalms31:11 Cappui atuwokku ri laleng anrasa-rasang, labe'i taut-taukku ri laleng addarékéng. Koddoi awatangekku nasaba jaku, mala buku-bukukku mancaji marapo." 
Psalms31:12 Mancajika tawangeng untu' sininna balikku, mala untu' sining balibolaku. Tasséleng maneng sissekku rékko naitaka, lariwi mennang rékko siruntu'ka ri lalengngé." 
Psalms31:13 Riyallupaika pada-pada tau maté, sibawa mancaji pada-pada barang riyabbéyangngé." 
Psalms31:14 Kégi-kégi engka mappakatau-taué; uwéngkalingai karéba-karébanna balikku. Sikongkolo'i mennang méwaka, sibawa mébbu rancana untu' mpunoka." 
Psalms31:15 Iyakiya maddennuwakka ri Iko, oh Puwang, saba' Iko ritu Allataalaku." 
Psalms31:16 Tuli Mupiyaraka; passalama'ka polé risining balikku, sibawa polé risining tau iya lellungngékka." 
Psalms31:17 Tennapodo Muwéloriwi atam-Mu; passalama'ka nasaba pammasé-Mu. 
Psalms31:18 Aja' taleppessakka masiri, oh Puwang, saba' mangobbika lao ri Iko. Leppessanni tau majaé ripakasiri, sibawa mammekko-mekko nonno ri linona tau maté." 
Psalms31:19 Sessangngi bawana sining pabbellé iya nasibawangngé atempong méllé'-kéllé'i tau malempué. 
Psalms31:20 Temmaka onana akessingem-Mu iya Mupassadiyaé untu' tau mateppe'é! Tungke tau mitaéngngi akessingeng iya Mupogau'é, untu' mennang iya mallinrungngé ri alé-Mu." 
Psalms31:21 Musubbui mennang ri laleng accinaungem-Mu polé ri siyasa'na tau majaé; Muwonrowangngi mennang ri laleng allinrungem-Mu polé ri pattenre'na balié. 
Psalms31:22 Ripojiwi Puwangnge! Mappabengnga senna pammasé-Na ri aléku, wettukku rikeppung sibawa rigasa." 
Psalms31:23 Ri laleng alippukku uwasengngi purana nabbéyang Puwangnge polé ri yolo-Na. Iyakiya purani Naéngkalinga paréllaukku wettukku mangobbi ri Aléna. 
Psalms31:24 Eloriwi Puwangnge, éh sininna umma'-Na, nalinrungiwi Puwangnge tau iya matinulué. Iyakiya Nahukkungngi tau matempoé sibawa dé' nacarinnaiwi." 
Psalms31:25 Péwatangiwi sibawa pakkasse'i atimmu, iko maneng iya mamménasaé ri Puwangnge!" 
Psalms32:1 Mazmurna Daud. Elong pappagguruwang. Masennangngi tau iya riyaddampengengngé dosana, sibawa riyaddampengengngé asalanna." 
Psalms32:2 Masennangngi tau iya dé'é naribilang jana ri Puwangnge, sibawa iya dé'é napojiwi mabbellé." 
Psalms32:3 Sipongeng dé'napa uwangakuiwi dosaku, maddoko-rokoka nasaba maddaréké puppu esso." 
Psalms32:4 Esso wenni Iko natenre'ka, Puwang, cappu awatangekku pada-pada nattemmekiyé tire mata esso." 
Psalms32:5 Nainappa uwangakui dosaku lao ri Iko, dé'gaga usubbu asalakku. Upettuini untu' mangakuiwi lao ri Iko, sibawa Muwaddampengengngi sininna dosaku." 
Psalms32:6 Rimakkuwannanaro tungke tau matinulué sitinajai massempajang wettunna péneddingi aperiseng, angkanna rékko poléi lémpe asussangngé, dé' nappo'i." 
Psalms32:7 Iko ritu onrong assubbungekku, Mupaleppe'ka polé ri asukkarakengngé. Naugora-gora marennu, saba' puraka Mupassalama." 
Psalms32:8 Adanna Puwangnge, “Ujellokekko matu laleng iya harusu'é uwola, Upimpikko matu sibawa Upangajari." 
Psalms32:9 Aja' mupada anyarang iya dé'é akkalenna, iya harusu'é ripaturu sibawa galang nenniya tulu kuwammengngi naturu.”" 
Psalms32:10 Tau madosaé nakennai maéga anrasa-rasang; iyakiya tau iya mamménasaé lao ri Puwangnge tette'i rilinrungi ri pammasé-Na. 
Psalms32:11 Eh sining tau malempué, arennuno sibawa mariyo-riyo nasaba aga iya puraé napogau' Puwangnge. Gorano marennu, éh sininna tau iya malempu atié!" 
Psalms33:1 Eh sining tau malempué, gorano marennu nasaba aga iya puraé napogau' Puwangnge; sipato'i tau malempué mappoji-poji." 
Psalms33:2 Sukkuru'no lao ri Puwangnge sibawa kacapi, akkélongenni Aléna sibawa naccowéri musi'." 
Psalms33:3 Akkélongenni élong baru untu' Puwangnge, acculéyangngi kacapié makessik-kessing nenniya gorano sibawa marennu!" 
Psalms33:4 Sininna ada-adanna Puwangnge wedding riyatepperi; matinului ri laleng sininna pangkauken-Na. 
Psalms33:5 Naéloriwi alempurengngé sibawa adélékengngé; sininna linoé pennoi sibawa pammasé-Na. 
Psalms33:6 Mabbéréi parénta Puwangnge, nancaji langié; mata essoé, kétengngé sibawa wéttowingngé ripancajiwi ri ada-adan-Na." 
Psalms33:7 Napaddeppungengngi sininna uwaina tasi'é riséddié onrong, dolangeng malowangngé Natahangngi ri laleng téppo'é." 
Psalms33:8 Leppessanni sininna linoé métau lao ri Puwangnge sibawa pabbanuwana linoé pakalebbii Aléna. 
Psalms33:9 Saba' makkeda-adai, Naripancaji maneng; Namabbéréi parénta, naengka maneng." 
Psalms33:10 Puwangnge teppasipoléngengngi rancanana bangsa-bangsaé, Napaddéi niya'na mennang." 
Psalms33:11 Iyakiya rancanana Puwangnge tette'i mattahang, masse'i rancangan-Na sillampé wettué." 
Psalms33:12 Masennangngi bangsa iya mangakuiyéngngi Puwangnge selaku Allataalana, masennangngi umma iya Napilé mancaji appunnangen-Na!" 
Psalms33:13 Polé ri surugaé makkitai Puwangnge liyawa, nanaitai sininna rupatauwé." 
Psalms33:14 Polé ri kadéra arajanna natangngai Puwangnge sininna iya monroiyéngngi linoé. 
Psalms33:15 Aléna ritu mébbui atinna mennang, sibawa missengngi sininna pangkaukenna mennang." 
Psalms33:16 Dé' napakala arungngé nasaba battowana tentarana, dé' nasalama prajuri'é nasaba awatangenna." 
Psalms33:17 Dé' nawedding riyattuwang anyarangngé untu' pakala, awatangenna iya battowaé dé' naulléi mappassalama." 
Psalms33:18 Puwangnge jagaiwi sining tau iya mateppe'é iya maddennuwangngéngngi pammaséna. 
Psalms33:19 Napassalama'i mennang polé ri amaténgngé, sibawa patuwoi mennang ri wettu akkadérengngé." 
Psalms33:20 Natamaddennuwang lao ri Puwangnge, aléna ritu pattulung sibawa pangéwaingetta." 
Psalms33:21 Mariyo-riyoki nasaba Aléna sibawa mateppe lao ri asenna iya mapaccingngé. 
Psalms33:22 Tennapodo tette'ki muwamaséi, oh Puwang, saba' mamménasaki lao ri iko." 
Psalms34:1 Mazmurna Daud, wettunna najjai maoja'-oja' ri yolona Ahimélékh, angkanna ripaddésu nalao." 
Psalms34:2 Maéloka sukkuru lao ri Puwangnge tungke wettu, sibawa mallanréseng pojiwi." 
Psalms34:3 Maéloka sukkuru nasaba pangkaukenna Puwangnge; tennapodo tau ritenre'é naéngkalingai sibawa marennu. 
Psalms34:4 Sibawakka pakarajai Puwangnge, laono mai tasibawa pakalebbii asen-Na." 
Psalms34:5 Massempajakka lao ri Puwangnge, Namappébali, sibawa paleppe'ka polé ri sininna tauwé." 
Psalms34:6 Tau ritenre'é maddennuwangngi ri Aléna sibawa marennu, dé' mennang nappunnai alasang untu' mancaji masiri." 
Psalms34:7 Mangobbii tau macilakaé naribali ri Puwangnge, ripaleppe'i polé ri sininna aperisengngé." 
Psalms34:8 Malaéka'na Puwangnge jagaiwi tau iya mateppe'é, sibawa paleppe'i mennang polé ri bahayaé." 
Psalms34:9 Pérasai kalému pékkugi kessinna Puwangnge, masennangngi tau iya mallinrungngé ri Aléna." 
Psalms34:10 Pakalebbii Puwangnge, éh iko umma'-Na, saba' tau mateppe'é dé' naakurangeng matu." 
Psalms34:11 Muwi sining singaé maluputo nasaba makurangngi anréna; iyakiya tau iya sompaéngngi Puwangnge dé' naakurangeng. 
Psalms34:12 Engkalingai, éh ana'-ana', upagguruko pakalebbii Puwangnge." 
Psalms34:13 Macinnakoga malampé sunge sibawa péneddingiwi iya makessingngé? 
Psalms34:14 Aja' mupassu ada-ada maja, sibawa aja' mupojiwi bellé." 
Psalms34:15 Abélaiwi majaé, pogau'i iya makessingngé, usahakangngi assidaméngengngé sibawa maggangka ullé." 
Psalms34:16 Najampangiwi Puwangnge tau malempué, maréngkalingai rékko kelli'i mennang méllau tulung." 
Psalms34:17 Iyakiya tau iya pogau'éngngi majaé Naéwai; rékko matéi mennang, masitta'i mennang riyallupai." 
Psalms34:18 Rékko mangobbii tau malempué, naéngkalingai Puwangnge, sibawa passalama'i mennang polé ri sininna aperisengngé." 
Psalms34:19 Macawé Puwangnge ri tau iya marenni atié; Napassalama'i tau iya teddéngngé sumange'na. 
Psalms34:20 Maéga anrasa-rasanna tau makessingngé, iyakiya Puwangnge paleppe'i polé ri iya manenna." 
Psalms34:21 Tette'i tubunna rijagai ri Puwangnge, polé ri bukunna dé' muwi séddi ripolo." 
Psalms34:22 Tau majaé matéi nasaba jana, tau iya céccééngngi tau malempué rihukkungngi matu." 
Psalms34:23 Napassalama'i Puwangnge ata-atan-Na; iya mallinrungngé ri Aléna dé' narihukkung matu. 
Psalms35:1 Mazmurna Daud. Puwang, éwai tau iya méwaékka, musui tau iya musuékka." 
Psalms35:2 Alani kaliyawo-Mu, namutokkong tulukka." 
Psalms35:3 Akkai bessimmu sibawa duru'-Mu untu' méwai tau iya lellungngékka. Powadani lao ri iyya makkedaé Iko pappassalama'ku. 
Psalms35:4 Leppessangngi tau iya maéloé mpunoka ricau sibawa ripakasiri. Leppessanni tau iya sikongkolo'é méwaka soro sibawa malippu. 
Psalms35:5 Leppessangngi mennang rilellung ri malaéka'na Puwangnge, pada-pada awang towa nassiyamporengngé anging." 
Psalms35:6 Leppessangngi mennang rilellung ri malaéka'na Puwangnge ri laleng iya makalemmengngé sibawa malengngo. 
Psalms35:7 Paracuma mennang napasangika siyo iyaré'ga kali kalebbong untu' tikkekka. 
Psalms35:8 Leppessangngi mennang nakenna abinasang sibawa tennasenna-senna. Leppessangngi mennang riyala ri siyona muto nanasempé sibawa binasa. 
Psalms35:9 Naugora-gora nasaba Puwangnge, marennui atikku saba' Napassalama'ka." 
Psalms35:10 Nasibawang ati sukku makkedaka, “ Puwang, dé'gaga bandingem-Mu! Mupaleppe'i malemmaé polé ri mawatangngé, iya kasiyasié sibawa manrasa-rasaé polé ri tenreéngngi.”" 
Psalms35:11 Sabbi-sabbi majaé tokkongngi méwaka, sibawa tenre'ka pogau'i gau'-gau' iya dé'é uwissengngi." 
Psalms35:12 Akessingekku nawale'i mennang sibawa ja; tallemme'ka ri laleng apettupaddenuwangengngé. 
Psalms35:13 Wettunna mennang malasa, messéka sibawa temmanré; massempajakka sibawa pacannunnui ulué," 
Psalms35:14 pada-pada massempajangengngi séddié silessureng iyaré'ga séddié sahaba maréppé. Tunru'ka teringiwi mennang, samanna mabbarataka untu' indo'ku muto." 
Psalms35:15 Iyakiya wettukku masussa, masennangngi mennang, sibawa makkatulung méwaka. Joppai mennang takképpak-képpang untu' pakatunaka." 
Psalms35:16 Matterui mennang méllékéllé'i séddié tau péso, enrengngé mitaka sibawa paccéccé." 
Psalms35:17 Gangka kégi, oh Puwang, gangka kégi banna makkitako bawang? Passalama'ka polé ri paggasana mennang, paleppe'i nyawaku polé ri singa-singaéro." 
Psalms35:18 Nausukkuru matu lao ri Iko ri tengngana umma'-Mu, sibawa pojiwi asem-Mu di laleng addeppungenna mennang." 
Psalms35:19 Aja' taleppessakka riyacculé-culéi ri tau iya musuékka temmakkésaba'. Aja' muleppessakka rigora-gorai ri tau iya céccéékka temmakkéalasang. 
Psalms35:20 Bicaranna mennang dé' namabessa; narancanai mennang pabengnguwangngé lao ri tau iya tuwoé sipammasé-masé. 
Psalms35:21 Gora-gorai mennang lao ri iyya sibawa makkeda, makkedaé purani mennang naita pangkaukekku." 
Psalms35:22 Iyakiya Iko, Puwang, purani muwita; aja' Muwammekko, oh Puwang, aja' tamabéla polé ri aléku." 
Psalms35:23 Tokkonni méwaiwi parakaraku, oh Allataala sibawa Puwak -ku, tulukka!" 
Psalms35:24 Ewaika, saba' adélé'-Ko, oh Puwang Allataalaku, aja' taleppessangngi balié gora-goraika." 
Psalms35:25 Aja' taleppessangngi mennang makkeda ri laleng ati, “Sukkuru'ki, purani ripaccappu nyawana. Ritarimani paréllautta!”" 
Psalms35:26 Leppessangngi tau iya masennangngé mitai anrasa-rasakku mancaji malippu sibawa masiri. Leppessangngi tau iya mattempowangngéngngi aléna lao ri iyya ripakatuna sibawa ripakasiri. 
Psalms35:27 Tennapodo tau iya macinnaé mitaka ripattongengngi gora-gora sibawa marennu. Tennapodo mennang makkolik-kolingngi makkeda, “Maraja tongeng Puwangnge! Nacinnaiwi asalamakenna atan-Na!”" 
Psalms35:28 Nauwabbirittangngi matu adélékem-Mu, sibawa poji-Ko puppu esso." 
Psalms36:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Polé ri Daud, atanna Puwangnge." 
Psalms36:2 Mabbicarai dosaé ri laleng ati marilalenna tau majaé, dé' sises-siseng namétau lao ri Allataala." 
Psalms36:3 Nangga'i aléna héba' senna, angkanna dé' namaingekiwi asalanna, sibawa dé' nacéccéi." 
Psalms36:4 Maja ada-adanna sibawa penno bellé, dé'na napogau'i iya makessingngé sibawa mapanré." 
Psalms36:5 Narancanai majaé ri onrong atinrongngé; dé'gaga makessing pangkaukenna, dé' nasampéyangngi majaé." 
Psalms36:6 Puwang, sittanré langié pammasé-Mu, sibawa atinulurem-Mu lettu ri ellungngé." 
Psalms36:7 Akessingem-Mu maccaloli sittanré bulué, sibawa adélékem-Mu pada liyunna dolangengngé; Mupiyarai tolinoé sibawa olokolo'é, oh Puwang." 
Psalms36:8 Temmaka angke'na pammasé-Mu, oh Allataala, mallinrungngi tolinoé ri laleng accinaungenna panni-Mu." 
Psalms36:9 Messoi sibawa inanré maonaé ri Bola-Mu, sibawa énungeng polé ri salo-Mu iya patakkariyé." 
Psalms36:10 Iko ritu assalenna atuwonna sininna mahlu'é, ri laleng tajam-Mu mitaki tajang." 
Psalms36:11 Tennapodo tette'-Ko mamaséiwi tau iya missengngék-Ko, sibawa pogau'i makessingngé lao ri tau iya malempu atié." 
Psalms36:12 Aja' taleppessakka rigasa ri tau matempoé, iyaré'ga ripaddésu ri tau majaé." 
Psalms36:13 Itani, tau iya pogau'é ja mabélani, tallittai mennang sibawa dé'na naulléni moto'na." 
Psalms37:1 Polé ri Daud. Aja' mumausé nasaba tau majaé. Aja' mumangémpuru ati lao ri tau iya pogau'é asalang. 
Psalms37:2 Saba' masitta'i mennang teddéng pada-pada wellaé, sibawa makelle pada-pada tanet-taneng manyilaé." 
Psalms37:3 Ateppe'no lao ri Puwangnge sibawa pogau'ni iya makessingngé, onrono ri wanuwaéro enrengngé kédono sibawa matinulu." 
Psalms37:4 Sappani asennangemmu ri Puwangnge, Nanasennangiwi matu cinnana atimmu." 
Psalms37:5 Abbéréyangngi atuwommu lao ri Puwangnge, amménasano ri Aléna, Nanatulukko matu." 
Psalms37:6 Napannessai matu atinuluremmu pada-pada tajangngé, sibawa atinuluremmu pada-pada lakessoé." 
Psalms37:7 Tajenni Puwangnge sibawa ati tennang, tajenni sibawa sabbara narapi tinda'. Aja' mumausé nasaba iya maupe'é atuwonna, iyaré'ga iya pogau'é bellé." 
Psalms37:8 Aja' tamacai sibawa tamapella ati, iyaro banna tiwii acilakang." 
Psalms37:9 Saba' tau iya pogau'éngngi majaé ripallennye'i matu, iyakiya iya mamménasaé lao ri Puwangnge namanai matu iyaro tanaé." 
Psalms37:10 Lennye'i matu tau majaé sibawa masitta, rékko risappai, dé'ni gaga." 
Psalms37:11 Tau iya mariyawa atié nappunnangiwi matu iyaro tanaé, sibawa péneddingiwi acommokang iya maonaé." 
Psalms37:12 Tau majaé narancanai majaé lao ri tau makessingngé, nenniya mitai sibawa paccéccé." 
Psalms37:13 Iyakiya Puwangnge cawa-cawaiwi tau majaé, saba' Naissenni macawé'ni accappurenna iyaro tauwé." 
Psalms37:14 Narampui peddanna tau majaé sibawa mannémbakeng pana untu' mpunoi tau kasiyasié sibawa manrasa-rasaé, untu' mpunoi tau iya tuwoé makessing." 
Psalms37:15 Iyakiya tau majaé rigajangngi matu ri peddanna muto, ripoloi matu matana." 
Psalms37:16 Céddé barang nappunnangi tau makessingngé lebbi mangke'i naiya amaonarenna tau majaé. 
Psalms37:17 Saba' akuwasanna tau majaé napoloi matu Puwangnge, iyakiya tau makessingngé Nalinrungiwi." 
Psalms37:18 Najagaiwi Puwangnge atuwonna tau malempué, appunnangeng manana mennang tette'i untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms37:19 Ri wettu aperisengngé dé' matu mennang nanrasa-rasa, ri wettu akkadérengngé dé' matu naakurangeng." 
Psalms37:20 Iyakiya tau majaé binasai matu, teddéngngi matu balinna Puwangnge pada-pada bungaé ri padangngé, lennye'i matu ri laleng rumpué." 
Psalms37:21 Minrengngi tau majaé nadé' napalisui, iyakiya tau makessingngé mabbéréi sibawa makacuwa." 
Psalms37:22 Tau iya ribarakkakiyé ri Puwangnge namanai matu iyaro tanaé, iyakiya tau iya Natanroiyé napaddésu'i matu." 
Psalms37:23 Napimpingngi Puwangnge tauwé ri laleng iya harusu'é naola, Napakkasse'i tau iya atuwonnaé Naéloriwi." 
Psalms37:24 Rékko menrungngi, dé' namalo maladde, saba' Puwangnge makkatenningngi limanna." 
Psalms37:25 Mappammulai maloloku lettu macowa, dé' naengka uwitai tau makessingngé nasalai Puwangnge, iyaré'ga ana' eppona mancaji paréllau sidekka." 
Psalms37:26 Tuli mappainrengngi sibawa mabbéré, sibawa ana'-ana'na mancaji barakka'i lao ri aléna." 
Psalms37:27 Salaiwi majaé, pogau'i makessingngé, na untu' mannennungeng naonroiwi wija-wijammu iyaro tanaé." 
Psalms37:28 Saba' naéloriwi Puwangnge pangkaukeng makessingngé sibawa adélé'é, tau iya matinulué ri Aléna dé' Narileppessang kariya-riya. Nalinrungiwi mennang lettu mannennungeng, iyakiya wija-wijanna tau majaé riyunoi matu." 
Psalms37:29 Tau malempué namanai matu iyaro tanaé, sibawa monroiwi untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms37:30 Tau makessingngé mabbicarai sibawa mapanré, tuli malempui ri laleng warékkadanna." 
Psalms37:31 Hukkunna Allataalana nataroi ri laleng atinna, dé' naléssé polé ri aléna." 
Psalms37:32 Tau makessingngé riinti'i ri tau majaé iya sappaé kasempatang untu' mpunoi. 
Psalms37:33 Iyakiya Puwangnge dé' naleppessangngi sempé ri limanna balié, iyaré'ga rihukkung ri wettunna riadéléki." 
Psalms37:34 Amménasano lao ri Puwangnge sibawa turusiwi parénta-Na, Nanaakkako untu' manai iyaro tanaé; muwitai matu ripallennye tau majaé." 
Psalms37:35 Engka naengka uwita séddi tau maja iya pojiyéngngi mabboro; pada-padai aju iya matakkaé sibawa makkure maliyung. 
Psalms37:36 Wettukku lalo, dé'ni gagana, usappai, iyakiya dé'ni ulolongeng." 
Psalms37:37 Pénessaiwi tau iya makessingngé sibawa malempu atié; tau iya pojiyéngngi assidaméngengngé mappunnaiwi amménasang ri wettu mangoloé. 
Psalms37:38 Iyakiya tau madosaé ripaccappui matu; wija-wijanna mennang ripallennye'i matu. 
Psalms37:39 Napassalama'i Puwangnge tau malempué, sibawa linrungiwi mennang ri wettu aperisengngé." 
Psalms37:40 Natulungngi sibawa napassalama'i mennang, sibawa paleppe'i mennang polé risining tau majaé, saba' mallinrungngi mennang ri Aléna." 
Psalms38:1 Mazmurna Daud wettunna makkasuwiyangeng akkorobangeng papparéngngerang. 
Psalms38:2 Puwang, aja' tahukkukka ri laleng cai-Mu, aja' tasissaka ri laleng cai-Mu." 
Psalms38:3 Pana-Mu nabettui loi tubukku, limam-Mu matane tenre'ka." 
Psalms38:4 Masero lasaku nasaba cai-Mu; dé'gaga madising ri tubukku nasaba dosaku. 
Psalms38:5 Tallemme'ka ri laleng lémpe asalakku, tiwi dosaku matane senna untu' aléku." 
Psalms38:6 Mannana sining loku sibawa mabbau makebbong, nasaba puraka kédo madonggo." 
Psalms38:7 Cannunnuka sibawa mabbukku, puppu esso masara sibawa messé." 
Psalms38:8 Natunui semmeng tubukku, dé'gaga madising ri watakkaléku." 
Psalms38:9 Ancuru'ka sibawa acappureng pakkulléng, maddarékéka nasaba mausé atikku." 
Psalms38:10 Puwang, Muwisseng sininna cinnaku, addarékékku dé' natassubbu ri alé-Mu." 
Psalms38:11 Maddumba-dumba aroku, teddéng pakkullékku, mancaji mautani matakku." 
Psalms38:12 Massala sellao-sellaoku nasaba lasaku, mala sahaba'ku mabélaika." 
Psalms38:13 Tau iya macinnaé mpunoka natangika siyo; iya macinnaé cilakaika mangancangngi maélo mpunoka. 
Psalms38:14 Iyakiya pada-padaka tau mataru-tarué iya dé'é namaréngkalinga, pada-pada tau pépé iya dé'é nabbicara." 
Psalms38:15 Tongeng, pada-padaka tau iya dé'é namaréngkalinga, namakkuwannanaro dé' nabbanta." 
Psalms38:16 Iyakiya mamménasaka ri Iko, oh Puwang, na Iko, Puwang Allataalaku, balika." 
Psalms38:17 Aja' muleppessangngi balikku masennang mitai asussakku, aja' taleppessangngi mennang mabboro rékko goyakka." 
Psalms38:18 Céddé'ka sempé, matteru-teruka mapeddi." 
Psalms38:19 Uwangakuiwi dosa-dosaku; manenneng atikku pikkiri'i asalakku. 
Psalms38:20 Tau iya musuékka maéga sibawa mawatang, nacéccé mennang cara atuwokku." 
Psalms38:21 Tau iya wale'éngngi décéngngé sibawa ja musuka nasaba upogau'i iya makessingngé. 
Psalms38:22 Oh Puwang, aja' tasalaika, aja' mumabéla polé ri aléku, oh Allataala." 
Psalms38:23 Poléni masitta tulukka, oh Puwang pappassalama'ku." 
Psalms39:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmurna Daud. Untu' Yédutun. 
Psalms39:2 Pikkiri'ku, “Maéloka jagaiwi alé kuwammengngi dé' umadosa sibawa lilaku. Dé' umaélo mabbicara ri wettu macawé'na mupa tau majaé.”" 
Psalms39:3 Mammekkoka sisebbu basa, angkanna naparogiwi aléku muto. Na anrasa-rasakku pédé matane'i rasana;" 
Psalms39:4 naekké'ka abata-batang iya maseroé. Pédé ripikkiri, pédé masussa atikku; angkanna makkedaka," 
Psalms39:5 “ Puwang, paissengika uppanna ajjalekku kuwammengngi uwissengngi makkuwamani ponco'na atuwokku.”" 
Psalms39:6 Temmaka ponco'na Mupattentu umuru'ku! Untu' alé-Mu wettu atuwokku dé' bettuwanna. Tongeng, tolinoé padai seppung nappase'é bawang," 
Psalms39:7 labe'i atuwonna pada-pada wajo-wajoé. Sininna alippungenna siya-siyai bawang; nagoppoi waramparangngé, iyakiya dé' naissengngi niga pakéi matu." 
Psalms39:8 Makkekkuwangngé aga utajeng, oh Puwang? Ri Iko ritu amménasakku." 
Psalms39:9 Paleppe'ka polé ri sininna dosaku, aja' taleppessakka mancaji akkéllé-kéllékenna tau madonggoé." 
Psalms39:10 Mammekkoka sibawa dé' natattimpa bawaku, saba' Iko ritu majara'ka." 
Psalms39:11 Alani pahukkungem-Mu polé ri aléku, saba' céddé'ka maté nasaba pakkunru-Mu." 
Psalms39:12 Tolinoé nasaba asalanna; Muhukkungngi sibawa Muajara' pada-pada cecco'é Muancuru'i aga iya mangke'é ri aléna. Tongeng, tolinoé padai seppung nappase'é bawang." 
Psalms39:13 Engkalingai sempajakku oh Puwang, pénessai paréllaukku; aja' Muwonro mammekko rékko terika. Pada-pada sininna néné-nénéku, cinampe bawang mappérumaka ri alé-Mu." 
Psalms39:14 Aja' mugangguka, kuwammengngi umasennang céddé, ri wettu dé'napa ulao nadé'na gagana." 
Psalms40:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmurna Daud. 
Psalms40:2 Nasibawang asabbarakeng utajengngi bantuwanna Puwangnge; nainappa napénessaika sibawa méngkalingai pangobbiku. 
Psalms40:3 Nagettekka polé ri kalebbong iya mabbahayaé, polé ri bungka rawa-rawaé. Nataroka ri tompo'na bulu-bulu batué, angkanna mattinetto jongkaku." 
Psalms40:4 Napagguruka makkélong élong baru, élong pappojiyang untu' Allataalata. Maéga tau mitai sibawa mancaji métau, namateppe lao ri Puwangnge." 
Psalms40:5 Masennangngi tau iya mateppe'é lao ri Puwangnge, iya dé'é naccowé massompa déwata-déwata, iyaré'ga méllau tulung lao ri tau matempoé." 
Psalms40:6 Puwang, pékkugi égana winru-Mu untu' aléta, oh Puwang, Allataalaku, dé'gaga padam-Mu! Maéga rancana-Mu iya mappabengngaé untu' idi, dé' namakkullé ricurita maneng." 
Psalms40:7 Pakkasuwiyang sibawa akkarobangeng ripatala dé' Mupojiwi, akkarobangeng ritunu sibawa akkarobangeng pappaledda dosa dé' Mutuntu'i. Iyakiya puraka Muwéréng daucculing iya mullééngngi méngkalingai saddam-Mu." 
Psalms40:8 Naumakkeda, “Iyya'naé, ri laleng kitta lulungngé tarokii untu' aléku:" 
Psalms40:9 Masennakka pogau'i élo-Mu, oh Allataala, utaroi hukkum-Mu ri laleng ati.”" 
Psalms40:10 Ri laleng addeppungenna umma'-Mu uwabbirittangngi karéba marennué makkedaé pura-Ko passalama'ki. Na dé'gaga appésaunna uwappallebbangeng iyaro gau'é, Muwisseng maneng iyaro, oh Puwang." 
Psalms40:11 Iyaro karéba asalamakengngé dé' utaroi ri laleng ati, pattulung sibawa atinulurem-Mu tuli uwabbirittangngi. Ri yolona addeppu-deppungenna umma'-Mu dé' uwammekko, iyakiya uwappallebbangengngi pammasé sibawa atinulurem-Mu." 
Psalms40:12 Puwang, aja' Muwappésau mamaséika; tuli linrungika sibawa pammasému nenniya atinulurem-Mu." 
Psalms40:13 Nakeppukka abala iya maégaé, dé' nariyullé bilang jumellana. Nalellukka dosa-dosaku angkakku dé' naulléi makkita. Jumellana napakacauri gemme'é ri ulukku, mébbuka pettu paddennuwang." 
Psalms40:14 Oh Puwang, passalama'ka, Apperi-perini Puwang tulukka!" 
Psalms40:15 Leppessangngi tau iya macinnaé mpunoka ricau sibawa lari alippuwang. Leppessangngi tau iya gora-goraiyéngngi acilakakku ripasoro sibawa ripakatuna. 
Psalms40:16 Leppessangngi tau iya cawa-cawaiyékka mancaji tasséleng sibawa masiri. 
Psalms40:17 Tennapodo sininna tau iya sompaék-Ko mariyo-riyo sibawa marennu, sibawa sininna iya méloriyéngngi asalamakeng polé ri Iko matterui makkeda, “Maraja tongengngi Puwangnge!”" 
Psalms40:18 Iyya'é kasiyasika sibawa malemma, iyakiya Puwangnge pénessaika. Iko ritu pattulung sibawa pappassalama'ku, aja' mumatengnge, oh Allataalaku!" 
Psalms41:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmurna Daud. 
Psalms41:2 Masennangngi tau iya jampangiyéngngi tau iya malemmaé; Puwangnge tulungngi matu ri wettu aperisengngé. 
Psalms41:3 Puwangnge linrungiwi matu sibawa piyarai, Nasennangiwi matu ri linoé, sibawa dé' nabbéréyangngi lao ri balinna." 
Psalms41:4 Dé' natulungngi matu Puwangnge ri wettunna malasa, sibawa palisui adisingenna." 
Psalms41:5 Adakku, “Modosaka lao ri Iko, oh Puwang, amaséika sibawa pajjappaka.”" 
Psalms41:6 Napowadai balikku iya majaé passalekku, macinnai mennang kuwammengngi umaté sibawa riyallupai." 
Psalms41:7 Sining tau iya célléngiyékka dé' namalempu. Napaddeppungengngi mennang karéba majaé passalekku, nainappa napatassiya lao kégi-kégi." 
Psalms41:8 Sininna iya céccéékka mabbici-bici; napowadai mennang iya kaminang majaé passalekku. 
Psalms41:9 Adanna mennang, “Maladde senna lasana, dé' nakkullé moto'na.”" 
Psalms41:10 Mala sellao maréppé'na iya kaminang uwatepperiyé, tau iya sisamaékka manré, pura pakatunaka." 
Psalms41:11 Amaséika oh Puwang, pajjappaka, kuwammengngi uwulléi mpale'i jana sining balikku." 
Psalms41:12 Rékko dé' naricauka ri balikku, uwissenni makkedaé Muwélorika." 
Psalms41:13 Mutulukka nasaba alempurekku, sibawa mébbuka tuwo sibawak-Ko untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms41:14 Pojiwi Puwangnge, Allataalana Israél! Pojiwi Aléna makkekkuwangngé sibawa mannennungeng! Jajini makkuwaro. Amin!" 
Psalms42:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Elong pappagguruwang appanna Korah. 
Psalms42:2 Pada-pada jongaé muddaningiwi uwai saloé, makkuwaniro nyawaku muddaningi-Ko, oh Allataala." 
Psalms42:3 Uwuddaningiwi Allataala iya tuwoé, uppanna weddikka lao massompa ri Bola-Na?" 
Psalms42:4 Esso wenni terika, banna uwai mata inanréku. Puppu esso makkutana balikku, “Kégai Allataalamu?”" 
Psalms42:5 Messé atikku rékko méngngerangngi wettu riyolo, wettukku mattuju ri Bolana Puwangnge silaong tau maégaé iya pakangkaé ramé-ramé. Joppaka ri yolona barisi'é nasibawang gora-gora nenniya élong pappojiyang." 
Psalms42:6 Magi namessé atikku sibawa mausé? Mamménasaka lao ri Allataala. Nausukkuru matu paimeng lao ri Aléna, lao ri Allataalaku sibawa pappassalama'ku." 
Psalms42:7 Ri tana appalirengngéwé ancuru atikku, rimakkuwannanaro uwéngngerangngi Puwangnge. Malii nyawaku ri laleng solo'na amesséngngé, nappo'ka lémpe akacaungeng; pada-pada merunna uwai jompina Salo Yordan polé ri Bulu Hérmon sibawa Bulu Mizar." 
Psalms42:8  
Psalms42:9 Tennapodo najjellokengngi Puwangnge pammasé-Na ri lakessoé, kuwammengngi ri wennié weddikka makkélong, sibawa massempajang lao ri Allataala assalenna atuwokku." 
Psalms42:10 Makkedaka lao ri Allataala, pangéwaingekku, “Magi Muwallupaika? Magi naharusu'ka matteru manrasa-rasa, nasaba ritenre risining balikku?”" 
Psalms42:11 Ancuru atikku nasaba pangéllé'na balié. Matterui mennang makkutana, “Kégai Allataalamu?”" 
Psalms42:12 Magi namessé atikku sibawa mausé? Mamménasaka lao ri Allataala. Nausukkuru matu paimeng lao ri Aléna, lao ri Allataalaku sibawa pappassalama'ku." 
Psalms43:1 Wérékka adélékeng, oh Allataala. Ewaiwi ha'ku lao ri bangsa iya madorakaé. Paleppe'ka polé ri tomajaé sibawa pabbellé." 
Psalms43:2 Iko ritu Allataala, pallinrukku; magi Musalaika? Magi naharusu'ka matteru-teru manrasa-rasa nasaba ritenre'ka risining balikku?" 
Psalms43:3 Pannessani atinulurem-Mu untu' tappaka sibawa pimpikka, kuwammengngi ulisu ri Sion, bulu-bulu-Mu iya mapaccingngé sibawa lao ri Bola Appérumam-Mu." 
Psalms43:4 Nauwattuju matu ri mézbana Allataala, mangolo ri Allataala assalenna asennangekku. Makkélokka matu sibawa makkacapi, untu' poji-Ko, oh Allataala, Allataalaku." 
Psalms43:5 Magi namessé atikku sibawa mausé? Mamménasaka lao ri Allataala, nausukkuru matu paimeng lao ri Aléna, nasaba Allataalaku sibawa pappassalama'ku." 
Psalms44:1 Mazmurna appang Korah. Elong pappagguruwang. Untu' pamimping kor. 
Psalms44:2 Oh Allataala, aléta muto pura méngkalingai curita iya nacuritaé toriyolota passalenna winru masero iya Mupogau'é ri wettu riyolo." 
Psalms44:3 Iko muto paddésu'i bangsa-bangsaé kuwammengngi nattette umma'-Mu ri wanuwanna mennang. Mucilakaiwi bangsa-bangsa laingngé, iyakiya umma'-Mu Muleppessangngi mabbija-bija." 
Psalms44:4 Iyaro tanaé dé' nasittaiwi sibawa peddang; dé' nasibawangngi awatangeng riyaléna napakala mennang, iyakiya nasibawang akuwasang sibawa cahaya ahadérékem-Mu, saba' Muwéloriwi umma'-Mu." 
Psalms44:5 Iko ritu Arukku sibawa Allataalaku, iya mabbéré apakalang lao ri umma'-Mu." 
Psalms44:6 Nasibawang akuwasam-Mu ricaui balitta, sibawa patunru'i sining tau iya gasaékki." 
Psalms44:7 Saba' dé' uwattuwangngi panaku, muwi peddakku dé'to napassalama'ka matu." 
Psalms44:8 Iyakiya Iko ritu passalama'ki polé ri balié, sibawa caui sining tau iya céccéékki." 
Psalms44:9 Na idi matu tuli pakaraja-Ko, sibawa matteru-teru sukkuru lao ri Iko." 
Psalms44:10 Iyakiya makkekkuwangngé Musalaiki sibawa leppessakki ricau. Dé'na Mumalluru silaong barisatta. 
Psalms44:11 Muleppessakki lari polé ri balitta, sibawa rampasa'i mennang waramparatta." 
Psalms44:12 Muleppessakki rigérési pada-pada bimbala'é, sibawa Mupassara-sarakki ri yelle'na bangsa-bangsaé." 
Psalms44:13 Mubalu'i umma'-Mu sibawa dé' nasiyaga ellinna, sibawa dé' aga-aga saro nalolongeng." 
Psalms44:14 Mupancajiki akkéllé-kéllékenna sining balibolaé naéllé'-kéllé'ki mennang sibawa nacawa-cawaiki. 
Psalms44:15 Mupancajiki bahang assindirikenna bangsa-bangsaé; napaccilic-ciling mennang ulunna nanapakatuna tokki. 
Psalms44:16 Puppu esso ricellaka, tanggungngi sirié sibawa ateddéngeng tappa," 
Psalms44:17 nasaba méngkalinga pangéllé sibawa pappakatuna polé ri témunna balié sibawa tau maéloé makkabale. 
Psalms44:18 Iya manennaro purani nakenna namuni idi dé' tallupaiko iyaré'ga bali'bellariwi assijancimmu sibawa idi. 
Psalms44:19 Atitta dé' nassakkarekko; paréntamu dé' tajampaléllériwi. 
Psalms44:20 Iyakiya Musalaiki ri laleng pettangngé; dé' pakkullétta ri yelle'na olokolo masekkangngé. 
Psalms44:21 Akkalarapanna dé'na tasompai Allataala, sangadinna massempajang lao ri déwata laingngé," 
Psalms44:22 pasti naisseng matu Allataala, nasaba Nawellungiwi rahasiana atitta." 
Psalms44:23 Nasaba Iko matteruki riyancang ri amaténgngé, sibawa rigaukeng pada-pada bimbala aggérésengngé." 
Psalms44:24 Oto'ni, oh Puwang! Magi Mumatinro? Tokkonni! Aja' tasampéyakki untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms44:25 Magi Mumassubbu, sibawa mallupaiwi anrasa-rasatta enrengngé asussatta?" 
Psalms44:26 Ancuru'ki mabuwang ri tanaé, léwu ri laleng awué nasaba cauki." 
Psalms44:27 Tokkonni sibawa poléni tulukki, passalama'ki nasaba pammasé-Mu." 
Psalms45:1 Mazmurna appang Korah. Elong pammasé. Untu' pamimping kor. Situru lagunna: Bunga bakungngé. 
Psalms45:2 Mpobbo'i ada-ada magelloé polé ri atikku, uwakkasuwiyangengngi élokku lao ri arungngé. Samanna pénana séddié tau macca, sadiyani lilaku powadai warékkadaé." 
Psalms45:3 Iko kaminang magello ri yelle'na tolinoé, ada-adammu pennoi akessingeng, rimakkuwannanaro ribarakkakiko ri Allataala untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms45:4 Tappii peddammu, éh arung baranié, maraja senna'ko sibawa mattappa!" 
Psalms45:5 Alluruno sibawa barani mattuju ri ataromporengngé méwaiwi atongengengngé sibawa adélékeng iya malemmaé; nasibawang awatangemmu sittaiwi apakalang iya battowaé! 
Psalms45:6 Panamu iya macéru'é bettui jantunna balimmu, menrungngi bangsa-bangsaé ri yolomu." 
Psalms45:7 Allataala mpérékko akuwasang untu' mapparénta, mattahangngi akuwasammu untu' mannennungeng; muparéntai sibawa adélé ra'ya'mu." 
Psalms45:8 Muwéloriwi iya tongengngé sibawa mucéccéi majaé; rimakkuwannanaro, Allataala, Allataalamu pura piléko, sibawa pésennangiko napakacauri arung-ngarung laingngé." 
Psalms45:9 Pakéyammu mabbau mur, gaharu sibawa cénrana; pacculé musi'é ri saoraja gadingngé mébbuko marennu." 
Psalms45:10 Ri yelle'na sining pattumani saorajaé engkai ana'-ana' makkunrainna arungngé. Ri ataunna kadéra arajangngé tettongngi bainéna sibawa bélo-bélo ulaweng tuléng. 
Psalms45:11 Eh Putri, éngkalingai ada-adakku, allupaini bangsamu sibawa sellaomu." 
Psalms45:12 Agelloremmu taré'i atinna arungngé, puwammui, tunru'no ri aléna." 
Psalms45:13 Pabbanuwana Tirus tiwi pakkasuwiyang untu' alému; makkuragai tau sugié malai atimmu. 
Psalms45:14 Muttama'i Putri arungngé sibawa penno agelloreng, wajunna risulang ulaweng." 
Psalms45:15 Nasibawang pakéyang madduparupang pecco'na ritinrosiwi lao ri arungngé, riyaccowéri risining parawangngé, silao-silaonna, makkuwatoro mennang untu' arungngé." 
Psalms45:16 Gora-gorai mennang sibawa marennu wettunna riantara muttama ri laleng saorajana arungngé! 
Psalms45:17 Iko, arukku, lolongengngi matu maéga ana' worowané untu' tudangiwi kadéra arajanna néné-nénému. Mupancajiwi matu mennang panguwasa ri tompo'na linoé." 
Psalms45:18 Nasibawang iyaé lagué upakalabbako massossoreng napojiko matu bangsa-bangsaé mannennungeng. 
Psalms46:1 Mazmurna appang Korah. Untu' pamimping kor. Nasibawang lagunna Alamot. 
Psalms46:2 Allataala iyanaritu allinrungeng sibawa awatangetta; tuli sadiyai sibawa paulléi mattulung ri laleng aperisengngé. 
Psalms46:3 Nadé' tamétau, namuni taggottangngi linoé, sibawa sining bulué tallemme ri borina tasi'é;" 
Psalms46:4 muwi majjallo tasi'é sibawa mabbombang, sibawa ténré sining bulu-bulué nasaba pakkunruna." 
Psalms46:5 Engka assolokeng uwai iya parennuiyéngngi Kotana Allataala, onrong naonroiyé Allataala Iya Pommatanré." 
Psalms46:6 Monroi Allataala kuwaro, nadé' naancuru iyaro kotaé; Natulungngi matu wettunna masiya' éléé." 
Psalms46:7 Magguttui Allataala, naancuru tassiya-siya linoé; méma'i bangsa-bangsaé, maruttung sining akkarungengngé." 
Psalms46:8 Puwang Iya Pommakuwasaé sibawakki, Allataalana Yakub linrungiki." 
Psalms46:9 Laono mai, itani aga iya napogau'é Puwangnge; temmaka mappahéranna winru-Na ri linoé!" 
Psalms46:10 Napappajai musué ri sininna linoé, Naancuru'i panaé sibawa bessié, Natunui sining kaliyawo malébué." 
Psalms46:11 Adan-Na, “Appésauno mammusu; issenni, Iyya'naé Allataala, maraja-Ka ri yellle'na bangsa-bangsaé, maraja-Ka ri sininna linoé.”" 
Psalms46:12 Puwang Iya Pommakuwasaé sibawakki, Allataalana Yakub sibawakki." 
Psalms47:1 Mazmurna appang Korah. Untu' pamimping kor. 
Psalms47:2 Appaleppa'no sibawa marennu, éh sininna bangsaé! Pojiwi Allataala sibawa gora-gora!" 
Psalms47:3 Saba' Puwang Iya Pommatanré iyanaritu maseroi, Arung Maraja iya makuwasaiyéngngi sininna linoé." 
Psalms47:4 Nawérékki apakalang lao ri bangsa-bangsaé, napancajiki panguwasa ri yasé'na suku-suku bangsaé." 
Psalms47:5 Napiléngekki tana manata, abangkakenna bangsa iya Namaséiyé." 
Psalms47:6 Naénrékini Allataala kadéra arajan-Na, naccowéri gora-gora sibawa oni sangkakala." 
Psalms47:7 Puwélonni pappojiyangngé untu' Allataala, puwélonni pappojiyang untu' Arutta!" 
Psalms47:8 Allataala iyanaritu Arung ri sininna linoé, pojini Aléna sibawa élong penno agelloreng!" 
Psalms47:9 Tudangngi Allataala ri yasé'na kadéra arajan-Na iya mapaccingngé; Naparéntai bangsa-bangsaé. 
Psalms47:10 Siyempe'i sining pamimpinna bangsa-bangsaé selaku umma'na Allataala nasompaé Abraham. Saba' Allataala iyanaritu Arunna sininna arungngé, maraja senna'i sibawa malebbi." 
Psalms48:1 Mazmurna appang Korah. 
Psalms48:2 Maraja tongeng Puwangnge sibawa ripoji senna ri Kotana Allataalata, ri bulu-bulu iya mapaccingngé." 
Psalms48:3 Sion, Bulu Allataala maccaloli'i magello kotana Arung Marajaé perennuiwi sininna linoé." 
Psalms48:4 Monroi Allataala ri laleng sining bénténna, annessana Aléna muto pallinrun-Na." 
Psalms48:5 Itai, sining arung-ngarungngé maddeppungeng; poléi mennang maélo maggasa." 
Psalms48:6 Iyakiya naitana iyaro bulu-bulué, tassélenni mennang; méma'ni mennang sibawa lari malippu." 
Psalms48:7 Kuwaniro mennang ténré métau sibawa mapeddi, pada-pada makkunrai iya maéloé mémmana," 
Psalms48:8 pada-pada kappala iya ancuru'é ri laleng anginrajaé. 
Psalms48:9 Pada-pada iya riyéngkalingaé, taitani makkekkuwangngé, ri Kotana Puwang Iya Pommakuwasaé. Iyaro kotaé iyanaritu Kotana Allataalata, naéwaiwi untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms48:10 Ri laleng Bola-Mu rinennun-nennungngi pammasé-Mu, oh Allataala." 
Psalms48:11 Tassebbo'i asem-Mu sibawa ripoji ri sininna linoé, mapparénta-Ko sibawa adélé." 
Psalms48:12 Leppessanni ra'ya' Sion sibawa Yéhuda gora marennu, nasaba Muhukkungngi balinna mennang." 
Psalms48:13 Attulilingiwi Sion, accennériwi, sibawa bilangngi manarana." 
Psalms48:14 Pénessaiwi témbo'na, paréssai bénténna, kuwammengngi muwulléi curitai lao ri wija-wijammu:" 
Psalms48:15 “Aléna ritu Allataala, Allataalata untu' mannennungeng, Napimpingngi matu lettu mannennungeng.”" 
Psalms49:1 Mazmurna appang Korah. Untu' pamimping kor. 
Psalms49:2 Engkalingai, éh sininna bangsaé, pattujui daucculimmu, éh pabbanuwana linoé," 
Psalms49:3 muwi tau biyasaé, iyaré'ga tau mariyoloé, muwi tau kasiyasié, iyaré'ga tau sugié." 
Psalms49:4 Maéloka powadai ada-ada mapanré, malamung senna buwa nawa-nawakku." 
Psalms49:5 Maéloka puriyatiwi warékkadaé, sibawa pakatajangngi bettuwanna nanaggetti kacapito." 
Psalms49:6 Dé' umétau ri wettu aperisengngé, wettukku rikeppung ri bali iya majaé." 
Psalms49:7 Nattuwangngi mennanro asugirenna, sibawa mattempowangngi waramparanna." 
Psalms49:8 Sitongenna dé' muwi séddi tau mulléi passalama'i silessurenna, iyaré'ga paleppe'i paccéra'na lao ri Allataala." 
Psalms49:9 Muwi aga nabbéréyang dé'to nagenne matu; masuli senna ellinna paccéra nyawana," 
Psalms49:10 kuwammengngi naleppe polé ri amaténgngé sibawa naulléi tuwo mannennungeng. 
Psalms49:11 Dé', naitai matu makkedaé muwi tau mapanré matéto. Tau madongoé sibawa madonggoé pada-padai binasa, nanasalaiwi waramparanna untu' tau laingngé." 
Psalms49:12 Monroi matu mennang ri kuburu'é mannennungeng; iyanaro onronna mennang untu' matteru, namuni riyolo mappunnai mennang maéga tana." 
Psalms49:13 Tolinoé dé' naulléi tuwo matteru ri laleng asugirengngé; pada-pada olokolo'é, binasa towi matu." 
Psalms49:14 Makkuwaniro totona tau iya mattuwangngéngngi aléna, sibawa wettu mangolona tau iya masennangngénna sibawa ada-adanna." 
Psalms49:15 Pada-pada bimbala'é, ripattentui mennang untu' maté; mancajiwi matu amaténgngé pakkampina mennang. Maélé mennang ricau ri tau malempué; makebbongngi matu masitta tubunna mennang ri linona tau maté, mabéla polé ri onrong iya makessingngé." 
Psalms49:16 Iyakiya Allataala paleppe'ka matu, Napaleppe'ka matu polé ri akuwasanna amaténgngé." 
Psalms49:17 Aja' mumétau rékko séddié tau mancaji sugii, sibawa waramparanna tattamba maéga." 
Psalms49:18 Saba' wettunna maté dé' aga-aga naullé tiwi, dé' matu nanonno waramparanna ri kuburu'é silaong aléna." 
Psalms49:19 Mala rékko séddié tau maupe'i ri laleng atuwonna, sibawa ripoji-poji nasaba pallolongenna," 
Psalms49:20 naccinrolaiwi towi matu néné-nénéna ri onrong iya mapettangngé untu' mannennungeng. 
Psalms49:21 Dé' naulléi tolinoé tuwo matteru ri laleng asugirengngé, pada-padai, binasa towi matu." 
Psalms50:1 Mazmurna Asaf. Puwang, Allataala Iya Pommakuwasaé mabbicara; mangobbii lao ri sininna linoé polé ri alau lettu ri yajang." 
Psalms50:2 Polé ri Sion, kota iya kaminang magelloé. Mallurui Allataala sibawa maccahaya." 
Psalms50:3 Poléi Allataalata sibawa dé' naonro mammekko, ripoddiyoloi ri api iya mallépe-lépe'é, sibawa riyattulilingi ri anginraja iya maseroé." 
Psalms50:4 Naobbii langié sibawa linoé untu' sabbingngi Aléna madélékiwi umma'-Na. 
Psalms50:5 Adan-Na, “Paddeppungengngi sininna umma'-Ku iya puraé siyo assijancing sibawa Iyya, nenniya pakkasse'i sibawa akkarobangeng rigéré.”" 
Psalms50:6 Nabbirittangngi langié makkedaé Allataala madélékiwi umma'-Na, sibawa Alénato hakinna." 
Psalms50:7 “Engkalingai, umma'-Ku, maélo-Ka mabbicara, Israél, maélo-Ka mabbéré asabbing lao ri iko; Iyya'naé Allataala, Allataalamu." 
Psalms50:8 Tenniya nasaba akkarobangemmu na-Uteppuko; akkarobangeng ritunummu tuli engkai ri yolo-Ku. 
Psalms50:9 Dé' Uwapparelluwang saping polé ri wakkému, iyaré'ga bémbé polé ri olokolo makkonrommu;" 
Psalms50:10 saba' sininna olokolo ri ale'é iyanaritu appunnangek-Ku, sibawa olokolo ri massebbué bulu." 
Psalms50:11 Sininna manu'-manu'é ri bulué appunnangek-Ku towi, sibawa sininna mahlu'é ri padang makkale'-ale'é." 
Psalms50:12 Rékko malupu-Ka, dé' naparellu Upowadakko, saba' linoé lollong lise'na iyanaritu appunnangek-Ku." 
Psalms50:13 Dé' uwanré juku saping lai, dé'to uwénung dara bémbé lai." 
Psalms50:14 Akkasuwiyangenni akkarobangeng sukkuru lao ri Allataala, rupaini jancimmu lao ri Iya Pommatanré." 
Psalms50:15 Angobbino ri Iyya ri wettu aperisengngé, Upaleppe'ko matu, namupoji-Ka matu.”" 
Psalms50:16 Iyakiya lao ri tau majaé makkedai Puwangnge, “Dé' muwappunnai ha' powadai hukkuk-Ku, sibawa mabbicara passalenna assijancik-Ku." 
Psalms50:17 Saba' dé' mumaélo tarimai pakkamparek-Ku, sibawa sampéyangngi sining parénta-Ku." 
Psalms50:18 Rékko mitako séddi panga, muwaccowériwi, nenniya siwollompollokko sibawa sining tau iya pojiyéngngi malaweng." 
Psalms50:19 Tuli mupowadai iya majaé, nenniya tuli sadiyako sibawa bellé." 
Psalms50:20 Matteruko pétenna'i silessuremmu, sibawa makkeda-kedaiwi silessuremmu." 
Psalms50:21 Iyanaro mupogau', iyakiya mammekko-Ka bawang, jaji mupikkiri'-Ka pada-pada iko. Iyakiya makkekkuwangngé Ucellako, sibawa sininnaro Upancajiwi manessa ri alému." 
Psalms50:22 Pénessaini, iko mallupaiyéngngi Allataala; jagaiwi aja' narapiko Upabbinasa, na dé'gaga mappassalama." 
Psalms50:23 Tau iya makkasuwiyangengngé sukkuru selaku akkarobangenna, aléna ritu pakalebbi-Ka; sibawa lao ri tau passadiyaé laleng Ujellokengngi matu asalamakeng polé ri Iyya.”" 
Psalms51:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmur nakarangngé Daud 
Psalms51:2 purana riyampareng ri Nabi Natan nasaba malawengngi sibawa Batsyéba. 
Psalms51:3 Amaséika oh Allataala, nasaba tette'-Ko mamasé, leddani dosaku nasaba paressé babuwa-Mu iya battowaé." 
Psalms51:4 Bissaini sininna jaku; pépaccingika polé ri dosaku. 
Psalms51:5 Saba' uwangakuiwi sining asalakku, tuli uwéngngerangngi dosaku." 
Psalms51:6 Lao ri Iko, lao ri Iko bawang madosaka, sibawa upogau'i aga iya Muwangga'é maja. Nasipato Muhukkukka, adélé'i apettum-Mu." 
Psalms51:7 Sitongenna, majaka sipongenna rijajiyang, sibawa nakenna dosa sipongenna ri parémmanangngé." 
Psalms51:8 Mutuntu'i alempureng atié; pennoiwi atikku sibawa Pangissengeng. 
Psalms51:9 Pépaccingika, naumapaccing matu; bissaika, naulebbi maputé matu naiya ape'é." 
Psalms51:10 Leppessakka méngkalingai karéba mariyo-riyoé, kuwammengngi ati iya Mureppo'éwé gora-gorai paimeng." 
Psalms51:11 Pagilinni tappa-Mu polé ri dosa-dosaku, sibawa leddani sininna asalakku." 
Psalms51:12 Pakangkangekka ati iya mapaccingngé ri aléku, oh Allataala, pakabarui batékku sibawa sumange iya sabbara'é." 
Psalms51:13 Aja' tabbéyakka polé ri yolo-Mu, sibawa aja' muwalai roh-Mu iya mapaccingngé polé ri aléku." 
Psalms51:14 Ebbuka marennu paimeng nasaba asalamakeng polé ri alé-Mu, wérékka ati iya macenningngé untu' matinulu ri Iko." 
Psalms51:15 Nauwappagguruwangngi matu parénta-Mu lao ri tau madosaé, kuwammengngi nalisu mennang ri Iko." 
Psalms51:16 Paleppe'ka polé ri amaténgngé, oh Allataala pappassalama'ku, nanasibawang arennuwang uwabbirittangngi matu adélékem-Mu." 
Psalms51:17 Oh Puwang, tulukka mabbicara, naupoji-poji-Ko matu." 
Psalms51:18 Dé' muwéloriwi akkarobangeng rigéréé; ébara'na makkasuwiyakka akkarobangeng ritunu, dé' Mupojiwi." 
Psalms51:19 Akkarobangeng untu' Allataala iyanaritu ati iya ancuru'é, ati iya tunru'é sibawa toba'é dé' Musampéyangngi." 
Psalms51:20 Oh Allataala, ajjellokengngi akessingem-Mu lao ri Sion, patettongngi paimeng témbo'-témbo'na Yérusalém." 
Psalms51:21 Na-Muwéloriwi matu tarimai akkarobangeng iya sitinajaé, akkarobangeng ritunu sibawa akkarobangeng iya makkalépué saping lai riyakkasuwiyangeng matu ri yasé'na mézba-Mu." 
Psalms52:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Elong pappagguruwanna Daud," 
Psalms52:2 wettunna Doég, tau Edongngé, polé paissengiwi Saul makkedaé lettu'ni Daud ri bolana Abimélékh." 
Psalms52:3 Eh tau mawatang, magi muwattempaowangngi jamu lao ri tau iya riyamaséiyé ri Allataala?" 
Psalms52:4 Puppu esso mabbelléko sibawa rancanai majaé; padai piso cukkuru matarengngé lilamu. 
Psalms52:5 Lebbi muwéloriwi jaé naiya makessingngé, lebbi mupojiwi mabbellé naiya makkeda tongengngé." 
Psalms52:6 Nasibawang ada-adammu mabbelléko sibawa peddiriwi atinna tauwé! 
Psalms52:7 Iyakiya ripabbinasako matu ri Allataala untu' mannennungeng; ritikkekko sibawa riyassarénréngeng polé ri bolamu, sibawa ripallennye polé ri linona tau tuwoé." 
Psalms52:8 Naitanaro, métaui matu tau tongengngé, nainappa nacawa-cawaiko sibawa makkeda," 
Psalms52:9 “Iyanaro taunna iya dé'é nallinrung ri Allataala, iyakiya mamménasangngi asugirenna maonaé sibawa sappa atennangeng ri barang rappana.”" 
Psalms52:10 Iyakiya iyya pada-padaka aju zaitun manyilaé ri laleng Bolana Allataala. Mateppe'ka makkedaé tette'i Allataala mamasé untu' mannennungeng. 
Psalms52:11 Tuli maéloka sukkuru lao ri alé-Mu ri yolona umma'-Mu uwabbirittangngi akessingem-Mu. 
Psalms53:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Situru lagunna: Mahalat. Elong pappagguruwanna Daud. 
Psalms53:2 Makkedai tau madongo'é ri laleng ati, “Dé' gaga Allataala.” Pangkaukenna mennang maja sibawa marota; dé' gaga pogau'i makessingngé." 
Psalms53:3 Polé ri surugaé naitai Puwangnge rupatauwé, untu' sappai tau mapanré iya sompaéngngi Aléna." 
Psalms53:4 Iyakiya sininna tauwé lao salani sibawa maja ampé dé'gaga muwi séddi tau pogau'i makessingngé. 
Psalms53:5 Adanna Puwangnge, “Dé'ga namainge sining tau majaéro? Tuwoi mennang sibawa rampasa'i umma'-Ku, sibawa dé' naengka nassempajang lao ri Iyya.”" 
Psalms53:6 Métau senna'i matu tau majaé, padahal dé'gaga papéttauri, saba' Allataala patassiyai buku-bukunna tau iya keppungngékko; risampéyanni mennang ri Allataala, namucaui matu mennang." 
Psalms53:7 Polé ri Bulu-bulu Sion tennapodo poléi asalamakengngé untu' Israélié. Namariyo-riyo matu wija-wijanna Yakub rékko napalisui Puwangnge keadaanna umma'-Na. 
Psalms54:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Naccowéri kacapi. Elong pappagguruwanna Daud," 
Psalms54:2 wettunna tau Zifié polé powadangngi Saul, “Massubbui Daud ri idi.”" 
Psalms54:3 Oh Allataala, passalama'ka nasaba akuwasam-Mu, wérékka adélékeng nasaba awatangem-Mu." 
Psalms54:4 Engkalingai paréllaukku, oh Allataala, tajampangini ada-adakku." 
Psalms54:5 Saba' tokkongngi tau laingngé gasaka, macinnai tau matempoé mpunoka, dé' mennang napaduliwi Allataala." 
Psalms54:6 Iyakiya Allataala iyanaritu pattulukku; Puwangnge iyanaritu pangéwaingekku. 
Psalms54:7 Nahukkungngi matu balikku sibawa jana muto mennang, sibawa paccappui mennang nasaba Aléna matinului lao ri iyya." 
Psalms54:8 Nasibawang cenning ati makkasuwiyakka akkarobangeng untu' alé-Mu, sibawa sukkuru lao ri Iko nasaba makessik-Ko, oh Puwang." 
Psalms54:9 Puraka Mupaleppe polé ri sininna asukkarakengngé, sibawa uwitai ricau balikku." 
Psalms55:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Nasibawang kacapi. Elong pappagguruwanna Daud. 
Psalms55:2 Oh Allataala, éngkalingai sempajakku, aja' tagiling polé ri paréllaukku." 
Psalms55:3 Jampangika sibawa balika, ancuru'ka nasaba asussakku." 
Psalms55:4 Mausé atikku nasaba ancamanna balié sibawa pattenre'na tau majaé. Saba' nasussaiwi mennang atuwokku, erengngé nasibawang cai namusuka." 
Psalms55:5 Mausé senna atikku, aseronna amaténgngé wajo-wajoiwi aléku." 
Psalms55:6 Nasalipurika apelloreng sibawa amétaureng, riyanrekké ri pappénedding makarame'é." 
Psalms55:7 Ebara'na makképannika pada-pada jangang-jangangngé, maéloka luttu sappa onrong iya tennangngé." 
Psalms55:8 Maéloka luttu mabéla senna, sibawa monro ri padang kessi'é." 
Psalms55:9 Maéloka mapperi-peri sappa onrong mallinrung lao ri anginrajaé. 
Psalms55:10 Oh Puwang, pamalingngi sining balikku, pakacaui assipabbicaranna mennang, saba' uwitai ri kotaé ateddekengngé sibawa allagangngé." 
Psalms55:11 Esso wenni mennang mattulili, pogau' ja sibawa paompo akacaungeng." 
Psalms55:12 Kégi-kégi engka ancurukeng appanrasa-rasangngé sibawa pabengnguwangngé kalalla ri pasaé. 
Psalms55:13 Ebara'na bali iya cellaékka, wedding mupa tahang. Ebara'na bali iya pakatunaékka, wedding mupa massubbu polé ri aléna." 
Psalms55:14 Iyakiya mala iko, sellaoku, sahaba'ku, silaong macawé'ku iya bali'bellariyékka." 
Psalms55:15 Riyolo siwollompollokki sibawa mabessa, sibawa biyasa silaong massompa ri Bolana Puwangnge." 
Psalms55:16 Leppessanni balikku maté tennasenna-senna sibawa nonno ri linona tau maté tuwo-tuwo, saba' jaé engkai ri bolana mennang, ri tengnga-tengngana mennang." 
Psalms55:17 Iyakiya mangobbika lao ri Allataala, Puwangnge passalama'ka matu." 
Psalms55:18 Esso wenni maddarékéka sibawa teri, Nanaéngkalingai saddakku." 
Psalms55:19 Napassalama'ka polé ri paggasana balié, iya mallompéngengngé méwaka." 
Psalms55:20 Allataala iya mapparéntaé polé ri mannennungeng méngkalingaka matu sibawa caui mennang. Saba' dé' namaélo mennang toba, sibawa dé'to namétau lao ri Allataala." 
Psalms55:21 Silaokku riyolo gasai sellao-sellaona, nassakkarengngi jancinna." 
Psalms55:22 Ada-adanna alusu mappalécé, iyakiya ri laleng atinna engka paccéccé. Bicaranna malemma, iyakiya mattoddo pada-pada peddang iya macéru'é." 
Psalms55:23 Abbéréyanni abata-batammu lao ri Puwangnge, nanatumpe'ko matu; saba' dé' Naleppessangngi ricau tau malempué." 
Psalms55:24 Iyakiya Iko, oh Allataala, pasempé'i matu mennang ri laleng kalebbong iya kaminang maliyungngé. Sining pabbelléngngé sibawa pappassu daraé dé' matu narapii sitengnga umuru'na mennang. Iyakiya iyya mateppe'ka lao ri Iko." 
Psalms56:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Situru lagunna: Jangang-jangang iya mammekkoé, polé ri daéra iya mabélaé. Mazmurna Daud wettunna tau Filistingngé tikkengngi ri Gat." 
Psalms56:2 Amaséika, oh Allataala, saba' rigasaka, matteru-teruka ritenre risining balikku." 
Psalms56:3 Puppu esso riléjja'-léjja'ka ri balikku. Maéga musuka, oh Allataala Iya Pommatanré." 
Psalms56:4 Wettukku métau, mamménasaka ri alé-Mu." 
Psalms56:5 Upojiwi Allataala nasaba aga iya Najjanciyangngé; mateppe'ka ri Aléna, nadé' umétau, dé' pakkullénna tolinoé lao ri iyya." 
Psalms56:6 Puppu esso balié kacauwi parakaraku, matteru-terui mennang makkuraga cilakaika." 
Psalms56:7 Maddeppu-deppungengngi mennang ri onrong massubbué, jaga-jagaiwi sininna iya upogau'é, sibawa sappa kasempatang untu' mpunoka." 
Psalms56:8 Engkaga asalamakeng untu' jana mennang? Paccappui mennang ri laleng cai-Mu, oh Allataala!" 
Psalms56:9 Mubilangngi esso-esso solléku, sibawa muwisseng jumellana uwai matakku; dé'ga Mubilangngi?" 
Psalms56:10 Ri esso uwangobbirengngé lao ri Iko, ripasoroi matu balié, saba' uwissengngi Allataala rangengekka." 
Psalms56:11 Upojiwi Puwang Allataala, nasaba aga iya Najjanciyangngé." 
Psalms56:12 Mateppe'ka ri Aléna, nadé' umétau, dé' pakkullénna tolinoé lao ri iyya." 
Psalms56:13 Maéloka rupaiwi jancikku lao ri Iko, oh Allataala, sibawa makkasuwiyangeng akkarobangeng sukkuru lao ri Iko." 
Psalms56:14 Saba' Mupaleppe'ka polé ri amaténgngé, Mujagaika kuwammengngi aja' umenrung. Naweddikka tuwo ri laleng allinrungenna Allataala, ri laleng cahaya iya tajangiyéngngi sininna iya tuwoé." 
Psalms57:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Situru lagunna: Aja' tapaccappui. Mazmur polé ri Daud, wettunna lari muttama ri laleng gowaé untu' massalaiwi Saul." 
Psalms57:2 Amaséika, oh Allataala, amaséika, saba' ri alé-Muka mallinrung. Ri laleng accinaungen-Na pannimuka massubbu, narapi mappésau anginraja iya majjallo'é." 
Psalms57:3 Mangobbika lao ri Allataala Iya Pommatanré, lao ri Allataala iya tinda'é untu' aléku." 
Psalms57:4 Polé ri surugaé mappébaliwi sibawa passalama'ka; Nacaui sining tau iya tenre'ékka. Najjellokengngi matu Allataala makkedaé matinului lao ri iyya, sibawa tuli mamaséika." 
Psalms57:5 Rikeppukka ri balié, pada-padai mennang singa pakkanré tauwé. Isinna mennang pada-padai bessié sibawa panaé, lilana mennang pada-padai peddang iya matarengngé." 
Psalms57:6 Oh Allataala, ajjellokengngi arajam-Mu ri langié, sibawa alebbirem-Mu ri sininna linoé." 
Psalms57:7 Napasangika siyo balikku, sibawa poloi sumange'ku. Kaliwi mennang kalebbong ri lalekku, iyakiya aléna muto sempé ri lalenna." 
Psalms57:8 Mateppe'ka mattinetto, oh Allataala, mateppe'ka mattinetto, maéloka makkélong sibawa pojiko." 
Psalms57:9 Eh péseddinno, nyawaku! Eh tokkonno, gambusu'é sibawa kacapié! Maéloka teddui éléé." 
Psalms57:10 Puwang, maéloka sukkuru lao ri Iko ri yelle'na bangsa-bangsaé. Macinnaka makkélongek-Ko pappojiyang ri yelle'na rupa tauwé." 
Psalms57:11 Saba' battowa pammasé-Mu lettu ri langié, sibawa atinulurem-Mu lettu ri ellungngé." 
Psalms57:12 Oh Allataala, ajjellokengngi arajam-Mu ri langié, sibawa alebbirem-Mu ri sininna linoé." 
Psalms58:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Situru lagunna: Aja' tapaccappui. Mazmur polé ri Daud. 
Psalms58:2 Eh sining panguwasaé, adélé'ga apettummu? Malempukoga wettummu madélékiwi tolinoé?" 
Psalms58:3 Dé', murancanai iya majaé, sibawa pogau'i ateddekengngé ri wanuwaéwé." 
Psalms58:4 Pusani tau majaé sipongenna ri parémmanangngé pabengnguwanni mennang sipongenna rijajiyang. 
Psalms58:5 Marracungngi mennang pada-pada ula mamosoé, sibawa lape'i daucculinna pada-pada sikaju kobra mataru-tarué" 
Psalms58:6 iya dé'é naéngkalingai saddanna sanro iya maccaé, iyaré'ga sadda pattiwi pajjappi iya maccaé." 
Psalms58:7 Oh Allataala, poloi isi-isinna mennang, reddu'i suwana singa-singa maloloéro, Puwang." 
Psalms58:8 Leppessangngi mennang lennye pada-pada uwai massauwé, pada-pada ana' pana iya mapungkungngénna." 
Psalms58:9 Leppessanni mennang pada-pada bojo iya bébbéé mancaji jaléngo, pada-pada ana'lolo iya maté ri wettu dé'napa naita tajang." 
Psalms58:10 Ri wettu dé'napa namaingekiwi, cappuni mennang, pada-pada alekale iya manyilaé mupa sibawa dé'pa nabattowa cappu naluttureng anging, samanna iyaro tanet-taneng marakko." 
Psalms58:11 Mitai tau majaé rihukkung, marennui tau malempué, sibawa bissaiwi ajéna ri laleng darana tau madorakaé." 
Psalms58:12 Makkedai matu tauwé, “Mémeng tau makessingngé lolongengngi appalang, tongeng, engka Allataala iya mangadélé'é ri linoé.”" 
Psalms59:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Situru lagunna: Aja' tapaccappui. Mazmur polé ri Daud, wettunna Saul suroi tauwé jagaiwi bolana untu' mpunoi." 
Psalms59:2 Oh Allataalaku, passalama'ka polé risining balikku, linrungika polé ri tau iya gasaékka." 
Psalms59:3 Paleppe'ka polé ri tau iya pogau'éngngi majaé, paleppe'ka polé risining pabbunoé." 
Psalms59:4 Itai, mangadangngi mennang maélo mpunoka, siyempe'i sining tau mabecco'é méwaka; padahal tenniya nasaba puraka pogau' dosa iyaré'ga pogau' pelanggarang, oh Puwang." 
Psalms59:5 Tenniyato nasaba asalakku, mapperi-periwi mennang sibawa sadiya-sadiya." 
Psalms59:6 Tokkonni, Allataala Iya Pommatanré, tulukka. Oh Allataalana Israélié, aléta sabbingngi. Péseddinni sibawa hukkungngi bangsa-bangsaé, aja' tamaséiwi tau maja iya bali'bellaé." 
Psalms59:7 Ri arawéngngé lisui mennang, mowang pada-pada asué nanattulilingi towi kotaé." 
Psalms59:8 Matterui mennang massindiri sibawa mappakatuna; ada-adanna mennang matareng pada-pada peddangngé, nasengngi mennang dé'gaga maréngkalinga." 
Psalms59:9 Iyakiya Mucawa-cawaiwi mennang, oh Puwang, sininna bangsaéro Muéllé'i." 
Psalms59:10 Iko ritu awatangekku, mamménasaka ri alé-Mu, Iko onrong allaringekku, oh Allataala." 
Psalms59:11 Nasaba akessingen-Na laowi Allataalaku ri iyya, Naleppessangngi uwita balikku ricau." 
Psalms59:12 Aja' nariyuno mennang, oh Puwang, kuwammengngi aja' nariyallupai bangsaku. Passara-sarangngi nenniya caui mennang sibawa akuwasam-Mu, oh Puwang pallinrutta." 
Psalms59:13 Saba' madosai mennang sibawa ada-adanna; leppessangngi mennang nala siyo ri laleng atempongenna, nasaba napojiwi mennang patanroi sibawa mabbellé." 
Psalms59:14 Paccappui mennang ri laleng cai-Mu, oh Allataala, pabbinasai mennang gangka cappu. Nanaissengngi tungke tauwé makkedaé Allataala paréntai Israélié, namallebbangngi apparéntan-Na ri sininna linoé." 
Psalms59:15 Ri arawéngngé lisui mennang, mowang pada-pada asué nanattulilingi towi kotaé." 
Psalms59:16 Solléi mennang sappa inanré, sibawa mabbokka rékko dé' namesso." 
Psalms59:17 Iyakiya makkélokka passalenna awatangem-Mu; tungke élé makkélokka sibawa macenno passalenna pammasé sibawa atinulurem-Mu. Saba' Iko ritu onrong allaringekku, onrokku mallinrung ri wettu sussaé." 
Psalms59:18 Oh Allataala, awatangekku, upuwélongekki pappoji-pojiyang Untu'-Mu, saba Iko ritu onrokku mallinrung, oh Allataala, pammaséku." 
Psalms60:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Situru lagunna: Bunga bakung assabbiyangngé. Mazmur pappagguruwang polé ri Daud," 
Psalms60:2 wettunna namusu tau Aram-Mésopotamiaé sibawa tau Aram-Zobaé, sibawa wettunna lisu Yoab caui 12.000 tau Edongngé ri Lompo Pejjé." 
Psalms60:3 Musampéyakki, oh Allataala, sibawa leppessakki ricau. Macai-Ko lao ri idi; makkekkuwangngé passauki." 
Psalms60:4 Mugottangngi linoé angkanna mallesse; pédécéngiwi iya reppa'-reppa'é saba' goyangngi linoé. 
Psalms60:5 Muleppessangngi umma'-Mu péneddingiwi anrasa-rasang matane'é; tassulus-sulukki pada-pada tau mabo'é. 
Psalms60:6 Muwéréngngi papparéngngerang sining tau mateppe'é, kuwammengngi naleppe mennang polé ri pahukkungengngé." 
Psalms60:7 Passalama'ki nasaba akuwasam-Mu, baliwi sempajatta, kuwammengngi Naripassalama sining tau iya Muwamaséiyé." 
Psalms60:8 Polé ri appéruman-Na iya mapaccingngé makkedai Allataala, “Maélo-Ka gora-gora sibawa tawa-tawai tana Sikhem; Uloteréiwi matu Lompo Sukot." 
Psalms60:9 Giléad sibawa Manasyé iyanaritu appunnangek-Ku, Efraim palo-palo baja'-Ku, sibawa Yéhuda tekkeng akkarungek-Ku." 
Psalms60:10 Iyakiya Moab iyanaritu onrong abbissang ajé-Ku; gora-gora pacau-Ka lao ri Filistéa. Lao ri Edom Uwaggenrungeng lapikajé-Ku selaku tanrang makkedaé appunnangek-Kui.” 
Psalms60:11 Niga maélo tiwika lao ri Edom? Niga dulukka lao ri kota mabbénténgngéro? 
Psalms60:12 Oh Allataala, dé'ga Muwaccowé sibawakki? Dé'ga Mumalluru silaongengngi tentarata?" 
Psalms60:13 Tulukki polé ri balié, saba' bantuwanna tolinoé dé' nakkéguna." 
Psalms60:14 Silaong Allataala, baraniki taporé matu, Aléna ritu caui balitta." 
Psalms61:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Nasibawang kacapi. Polé ri Daud. 
Psalms61:2 Engkalingai pangobbiku, oh Allataala, pénessaiwi sempajakku." 
Psalms61:3 Mabéla polé ri bolaé mangobbika lao ri Iko, nasaba pettu paddennuwakka. Muantara'ka matu lao ri onrong allaringeng iya amangngé, onrong iya matanré senna'é untu' aléku;" 
Psalms61:4 saba' Iko ritu pallinrukku, attahangeng iya mawatangngé lao ri balikku." 
Psalms61:5 Leppessakka gangka tuwoku mappéruma ri kéma-Mu, kuwammengngi naamang ri laleng accinaungenna panni-Mu." 
Psalms61:6 Saba' purani Muwéngkalinga jancikku, oh Allataala, sibawa mpérékka appunnangeng manana tau mateppe'é." 
Psalms61:7 Tennapodo malampé sunge'i arungngé, angkanna tuwoi massossoreng." 
Psalms61:8 Tennapodo mapparéntai untu' mannennungeng selaku arung mupilé-Mu, oh Allataala, linrungiwi sibawa pammasé nenniya atinulurem-Mu." 
Psalms61:9 Natuli upuwélongekko matu pappojiyang untu'-Mu, naurupai towi jancikku polé ri essoé lao ri essoé." 
Psalms62:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Situru: Yédutun. Mazmurna Daud. 
Psalms62:2 Nasibawang atennangeng nyawaku tajengngi Allataala, polé ri Aléna bawang asalamakekku." 
Psalms62:3 Banna Aléna linrungika sibawa passalama'ka, Aléna pangéwaingekku, dé' matu ugoyang." 
Psalms62:4 Gangka kégi manekko maélo gasai séddié tau iya pada-padaénna renring iya miringngénna sibawa témbo' iya mawé'énna maruttung? 
Psalms62:5 Banna manniya'ko pasempé'i polé ri tudangenna iya matanré. Mupoji mabbellé; nasibawang témummu mabbarakka'ko, iyakiya ri laleng ati patanroiko." 
Psalms62:6 Nasibawang atennangeng nyawaku tajengngi Allataala, polé ri Aléna bawang asalamakekku." 
Psalms62:7 Banna Aléna linrungika sibawa passalama'ka; Aléna pangéwaingekku, dé' matu ugoyang." 
Psalms62:8 Aléna ritu Allataala iya mpéréngngékka asalamakeng sibawa alebbireng, Aléna ritu pallinrukku sibawa pangéwaingekku iya mawatangngé." 
Psalms62:9 Eh bangsaku, amménasako ri Allataala tungke wettu; loloni lise atimmu ri Aléna, saba' Aléna onrotta mallinrung." 
Psalms62:10 Tolinoé banna siseppung nappase, baiccu battowa pada-padai dé' angke'na. Rékko ritimbangngi, annessana mennang maringengngi, lebbi ringengngi naiya siseppungngé nappase."
