Psalms62:11 Aja' muwaddennuwangiwi wassélé appassangngé, sibawa aja' muwattuwangngi barang rirappaé. Mala rékko tattambai asugiremmu, aja' naddeppé atimmu ri aléna." 
Psalms62:12 Wékkasiyagani uwéngkalinga Allataala makkeda makkedaé akuwasangngé assalennai poléi ri Aléna," 
Psalms62:13 sibawa makkedaé tette'i mamasé. Iko, oh Puwang, mpale'i tungke tau situru pangkaukenna." 
Psalms63:1 Mazmurna Daud, wettunna engkai ri padang kessi Yéhuda." 
Psalms63:2 Oh Allataala, Iko ritu Allataalaku, usappa sibawa uwuddaningi-Ko. Pada-pada tana makabbuttué madekkaiwi uwai, makkuwana'ro madekka lao ri Iko." 
Psalms63:3 Leppessakka mita-Ko ri Bola-Mu, sibawa mitai awatanengem-Mu sibawa arajam-Mu." 
Psalms63:4 Lebbi mangke'i pammasé-Mu naiya atuwongngé, rimakkuwannaro upoji-Ko." 
Psalms63:5 Gangka tuwoku sukkuru'ka lao ri Iko; uwakkai limakku lao ri Iko umassempajatto. 
Psalms63:6 Upoji-Ko sibawa gora-gora marennu, saba' Mupamessoriwi nyawaku pada-pada sibawa inanré malunra'é." 
Psalms63:7 Uwéngngerak-Ko wettu léwuku ri onrong atinrongngé; puppu benni unennun-nennuk-Ko," 
Psalms63:8 saba' Iko ritu pura tulukka; ri laleng accinaungeng panni-Mu makkélokka marennu. 
Psalms63:9 Uwakkatenning mare'-Ko, limam-Mu tula'ka." 
Psalms63:10 Iyakiya sining tau iya maéloé mpunoka nonnoi matu ri linona tau maté. 
Psalms63:11 Matéi matu ri laleng ammusurengngé, sibawa mancaji inanréna olokolo masekkangngé." 
Psalms63:12 Marennui matu arungngé nasaba pattulunna Allataala; tau iya mattanroé nasabbing Allataala mabangka'i matu, iyakiya bawana pabbelléngngé risessangngi matu." 
Psalms64:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmurna Daud. 
Psalms64:2 Oh Allataala, éngkalingai sempajakku ri wettukku masussa, passalama'i nyawaku polé ri bali iya mappakatau-taué." 
Psalms64:3 Linrungika polé ri assikongkolokenna tau madorakaé, polé ri rancana majana sining tau majaé." 
Psalms64:4 Naébbui lilana mennang sittareng peddangngé, sibawa passu ada-ada mapéddara pada-pada panaé." 
Psalms64:5 Polé ri assubbuwanna patassiyai mennang curita bellé, temmétau napétenna'i mennang tau teppasalaé." 
Psalms64:6 Makkatenning masse'i mennang ri niya'na majaé, sibawa barunding maélo pasang siyo-siyo; nasengngi mennang dé' gaga mitai." 
Psalms64:7 Narancanai mennang jaé, sibawa makkeda, “Mébbuki rancana iya macéko-céko senna'é.” Ati sibawa akkalenna tolinoé malamung senna, dé' riyulléi mpellungiwi." 
Psalms64:8 Iyakiya Allataala mattémbakengngi pana-Na lao ri mennang, natennasenna-sennai maloi mennang." 
Psalms64:9 Binasai mennang nasaba ada-adanna muto; sininna iya mitaéngngi mappaccilic-ciling ulu. 
Psalms64:10 Nainappa sininna tauwé métau matu; napikkiri'i mennang pangkaukenna Allataala sibawa mabbirittangngi aga iya puraé napogau'. 
Psalms64:11 Nasininna tau makessingngé marennui matu nasaba aga iya napogau'é Puwangnge. Mallinrungngi matu mennang ri aléna; sininna tau malempué mabangka'i matu. 
Psalms65:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmurna Daud. Elong. 
Psalms65:2 Sipato'ki poji-Ko ri Sion, oh Allataala, sibawa rupaiwi jancitta ri Iko." 
Psalms65:3 Saba' Iko ritu tarimai sempajangngé; sininna tauwé poléi ri Iko nasaba madosani. 
Psalms65:4 Matane senna'i dosa-dosaku untu' alému, iyakiya Muwaddampengiwi." 
Psalms65:5 Masennangngi tau iya Mupilé, sibawa iya Muwobbié untu' monro ri Bola-Mu. Ripasipoléngekki matu sibawa sininna iya makessingngé ri Bola-Mu, onrom-Mu iya mapaccingngé." 
Psalms65:6 Mubaliki sibawa mpérékki apakalang, Mupogau'i gau'-gau' makalallaingngé untu' passalama'ki! Iko ritu paddennuwanna sininna bangsaé lettu ri tasi iya mabélaé." 
Psalms65:7 Nasibawang awatangem-Mu Mupatettongngi sining bulué, untu' majjellokengngi akuwasam-Mu iya poré." 
Psalms65:8 Mupasoroi memmu'na tasi'é sibawa ajjallo'na bombangngé, sibawa Mupattennangngi arukkanna bangsa-bangsaé." 
Psalms65:9 Sininna pabbanuwana linoé métau sibawa mappakalebbi mitai sining pangkaukem-Mu iya maseroé. Sininna linoé polé ricappa'na lao ri cappa'na Muwébbui gora-gora marennu. 
Psalms65:10 Iyaro tanaé Mupiyarai sibawa Muwéréngngi bosi, Mupancajiwi macommo angkanna maona wassélé'na. Sining saloé Mulisekiwi uwai gangka penno, Mupassadiyangengngi mennang gandong, mappakkuwaniro Mupassadiyangengngi." 
Psalms65:11 Mupakkuwaiwi alo rakkalana sibawa Muricakiwi tékké-tékké tanana. Musommokiwi sibawa bosi, sibawa Mutanggungngi tuwo macommo cura'-cura'na." 
Psalms65:12 Nasaba akessingem-Mu, tungke taung Mupassadiyai éngngalangngé; kégi-Ko lao, engka amaonareng." 
Psalms65:13 Padang kessi'é pennoi bémbé bimbala, sininna bulu-buluna marennu." 
Psalms65:14 Sining padang wellaé mapparampa'i bimbala, sining lompo'é pennoi sibawa gandong. Gora maneng nenniya makkélong sibawa marennu." 
Psalms66:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Séuwa élong. Gora-gorano untu' Allataala, éh sininna linoé!" 
Psalms66:2 Akkélonno sibawa pakarajai asen-Na, pakalebbii Aléna sibawa pappoji-pojiyang." 
Psalms66:3 Powadani lao ri Allataala, “Mappabengnga tongeng pangkaukem-Mu! Tunru'i balié ri Iko penno amétaureng, saba' battowa senna akuwasam-Mu." 
Psalms66:4 Sininna linoé suju' sompa-Ko, makkélongngi mennang pojiwi asem-Mu.”" 
Psalms66:5 Poléni sibawa itani pangkaukenna Allataala, mappabengnga tongeng sining winru-Na ri yelle'na tolinoé!" 
Psalms66:6 Napinrai tasi'é mancaji tana rakko, nalléttoiwi toriyolota sibawa mallaleng. Natamarennu nasaba pangkauken-Na." 
Psalms66:7 Mapparéntai sibawa barani untu' mannennungeng. Najagaiwi bangsa-bangsaé, kuwammengngi dé' naulléi matempo tau maronta'é lao ri Aléna." 
Psalms66:8 Pojiwi Allataalata, éh bangsa-bangsa, gorangngi pappojiyammu lao ri Aléna!" 
Psalms66:9 Purani najagai kuwammengngi tette'ki tuwo, sibawa dé' naleppessakki sempé." 
Psalms66:10 Oh Allataala, Iko pura mojiki pada-pada tau patuléngngéngngi péra'é ri laleng apié." 
Psalms66:11 Muleppessakki sempé ri laleng siyo-siyoé, sibawa Muwéréngngi tiwi iya matane senna'é." 
Psalms66:12 Muleppessakki riléjja'-léjja' ri balié; malléttoiki lémpe sibawa api. Iyakiya makkekkuwangngé purani Mutiwi ri onrong iya macommo'é. 
Psalms66:13 Tiwika matu akkarobangeng ritunu ri Bola-Mu sibawa rupaiwi jancikku lao ri Iko," 
Psalms66:14 janci iya upowadaé wettukku ri laleng asussang. 
Psalms66:15 Uwakkasuwiyangengngi ri Iko akkarobangeng ritunué polé ri olokolo ripilé, bémbé bimbala sibawa saping lai, rumpunna mallaso ménré ri langié." 
Psalms66:16 Poléni sibawa éngkalingai, éh sininna tau mateppe'é, ucuritai matu aga napogau' Allataala ri aléku." 
Psalms66:17 Purana gora méllau tulung ri Aléna; makkekkuwangngé upuwélongengngi pappoji-pojiyang untu' Aléna. 
Psalms66:18 Ebara'na masennakka pikkiri'i majaé, pasti dé' namaélo Puwangnge méngkalingai." 
Psalms66:19 Iyakiya Allataala pura méngkalingaka, najampangiwi paréllaukku." 
Psalms66:20 Upojiwi Allataala saba' dé' Nasampéyangngi sempajakku, sibawa dé' nappésau mamaséika." 
Psalms67:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Nasibawang kacapi. Mazmur. 
Psalms67:2 Tennapodo Allataala mamaséiki sibawa barakkakiki, tennapodo naitaki sibawa masémpo ati." 
Psalms67:3 Oh Allataala, tennapodo élomu riissengngi risininna linoé, sibawa asalamakemmu ripannessai ri yelle'na sininna bangsaé." 
Psalms67:4 Tennapodo bangsa-bangsaé pojiko, oh Allataala, tennapodo sininna bangsaé sukkuru'i lao ri iko." 
Psalms67:5 Tennapodo sininna bangsaé gora-gorai marennu, nenniya makkélong sibawa mariyo-riyo. Saba' mapparéntako sibawa adélé sibawa pimpingngi tungke bangsaé ri linoé." 
Psalms67:6 Tennapodo bangsa-bangsaé poji-Ko, oh Puwang tennapodo sininna bangsaé sukkuru'i lao ri Iko." 
Psalms67:7 Purani nabbéréyang wassélé'na tanaé, Allataala, Allataalata pura barakkakiki." 
Psalms67:8 Purani nabarakkakiki Allataala; tennapodo Aléna ripakalebbii ri sininna linoé! 
Psalms68:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmurna Daud. 
Psalms68:2 Tokkongngi Allataala patassiyasiyai balin-Na, tau iya céccééngngi Aléna lariwi polé ri yolo-Na." 
Psalms68:3 Allataala paddésu'i mennang lao, pada-pada rumpu iya riseppungngé nateddéng. Pada-pada lilingngé maccolo ri laleng apié, makkuwaniro tau majaé lennye polé ri yolona Allataala." 
Psalms68:4 Iyakiya tau malempué mariyo-riyoi sibawa marennu, gora-gorai mennang mariyo-riyo ri yolona Allataala." 
Psalms68:5 Akkélonno lao ri Allataala, pojiwi asen-Na, passadiyangengngi watattana untu' aléna iya tonangiyé ellung. Asenna Puwang – assennang-sennanno ri yolona!" 
Psalms68:6 Allataala iya monroé ri Bola-Na iya mapaccingngé iyanaritu ambo'na ana' béué sibawa méwaiyéngngi sining jandaé. 
Psalms68:7 Allataala mpéréngngi onrong naonroi tau iya masino-sinoé; napaleppe'i tau ritahangngé angkanna mennang masennang. Iyakiya sining tau iya méwaéngngi Puwangnge harusu'i monro ri tana iya makarossaé. 
Psalms68:8 Oh Allataala, wettunna Mupimping umma'-Mu joppa molai padang iya marakkoé," 
Psalms68:9 ténré linoé, tattiri bosié ri yolo-Mu, nasaba apolénna Allataalana Sinai, Allataalana Israélié." 
Psalms68:10 Mupateppai bosié sibawa maona, sibawa palisui tana-Mu iya makarossaé." 
Psalms68:11 Nainappa umma'-Mu monro kuwaro; ri laleng akessingem-Mu, oh Allataala, Mupiyarai tau kasiyasié." 
Psalms68:12 Puwangnge mabbéré apettung, nainappa sining makkunraié tiwi karéba:" 
Psalms68:13 “Sining arungngé sibawa pasukanna larini!” Lariwi mennang pada-pada jangang-jangang iya luttué lao. Sining makkunraié ri bolaé tawa-tawai, péra' sibawa ulaweng iya nasalaiyé. Namuni maéga iya dé'é naccowé mammusu, umma'na Allataala lolongenni apakalang." 
Psalms68:14  
Psalms68:15 Wettunna Iya Pommakuwasaé patassiya-siyai arung-ngarungngé kuwaro, nonnoni saljué polé ri Bulu Salmon." 
Psalms68:16 Bulu Basan iyanaritu bulu iya maseroé, bulu iya maccoppo'é maéga." 
Psalms68:17 Magi napolé ri coppo'mu iya maégaéro makkitako sibawa mangémpuru lao ri Bulu Sion iya napilé Allataala untu' onron-Na? Monroi matu Puwangnge kuwaro untu' mannennungeng. 
Psalms68:18 Nasibawang mappulo sebbu karéta mawatang mallurui Allataala ri yelle'na mennang ri laleng arajan-Na. 
Psalms68:19 Ménré'i Puwangnge ri onrong iya matanré; maéga tawangeng natiwi maccowé. Tarimai pakkasuwiyang polé ri yelle'na tolinoé mala polé ri yelle'na bangsa maronta'é; kuwammengngi naonro silaong Puwang Allataala. 
Psalms68:20 Pojiwi Puwangnge, saba' Aléna Allataala iya passalamaékki; polé ri essoé lao ri essoé Naéssangngi tiwita." 
Psalms68:21 Allataala iyanaritu Puwang iya mappassalama'é, Napaleppe'ki polé ri amaténgngé." 
Psalms68:22 Pasti Allataala reppo'i matu ulunna balin-Na, sining tau iya matterué tuwo ri laleng dosaé." 
Psalms68:23 Adanna Puwangnge, “Eh umma'-Ku, Utiwii balimmu polé ri Basan Utiwii mennang lisu polé ri borina tasi'é," 
Psalms68:24 kuwammengngi mubissaiwi ajému sibawa darana mennang, nasining asummu lépe'i gangka cau.”" 
Psalms68:25 Naita manengngi barisi apakalam-Mu, oh Allataala, Allataalaku, Arukku, riyulé lao ri onrong Naonroiyé." 
Psalms68:26 Ri yolo joppai sining pakkélongngé, ri munri sining pakkacapié; ri tengnga sining ana'dara pattetté rabanaé; makkuwaiyé élonna mennang:" 
Psalms68:27 “Pojiwi Allataala ri tengngana addeppungenna umma'-Na, pojiwi Puwangnge, éh sininna wija-wijanna Yakub!”" 
Psalms68:28 Bényamin, suku kaminang baiccu'é, joppa ri yolo, nainappa mattinro-tinroseng sining tomariyolona Yéhuda ri munrinna sining tomariyolona Zébulon sibawa Naftali." 
Psalms68:29 Natuntu'i Allataalamu awatangemmu; oh Allataala, pakkasse'i aga iya puraé Mupogau' untu' idi." 
Psalms68:30 Sining arungngé tiwii pakkasuwiyang lao ri Iko ri Bola-Mu ri Yérusalém. 
Psalms68:31 Gera'i Maséré, iyaro olokolo masekkangngé ri tengngana arasoé. Amparengngi bangsa-bangsaé, iyaro banténg makkonrongngé silaong ana'-ana'na, iya sisullé siléjja' untu' lolongeng péra'. Allataala passara-sarangngi bangsa-bangsa iya pojiyéngngi mammusu." 
Psalms68:32 Sining tomarajana Maséré poléi tiwi tembaga; mapperi-periwi tau Sudangngé tiwi pakkasuwiyang ri Allataala. 
Psalms68:33 Akkélongenni Allataala, éh sininng akkarungengngé, puwélonni pappoji-pojiyangngé untu' Puwangnge," 
Psalms68:34 untu' aléna iya malléttoiyéngngi bitara mariyoloé. Engkalingai! Mabbicarai Puwangnge, maddaremmengngi saddan-Na sibawa masero." 
Psalms68:35 Angakuiwi akuwasan-Na Allataala iya makuwasaiyéngngi Israélié, lettu ri langié akuwasan-Na." 
Psalms68:36 Mappabengnga tongeng Allataalata wettunna massu polé ri onrong Naonroiyé. Mabbéréi akuwasang Allataalana Israélié sibawa awatangeng lao ri umma'-Na. Ripojiwi Allataala! 
Psalms69:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Situru lagunna: Bunga Bakungngé. Polé ri Daud. 
Psalms69:2 Passalama'ka, oh Allataala, saba' ménré'ni uwai lettu ri ellokku." 
Psalms69:3 Tassollaka ri rawa iya maliyungngé, dé'na gaga onrong mattuppu. Tallemme'ka ri uwai iya maliyungngé, rialireng ri bombang pasangngé." 
Psalms69:4 Gora-goraka gangka poso sibawa marakko tigoro'ku. Mapéssé matakku tajengngi bantuwanna Allataalaku. 
Psalms69:5 Tau iya céccéékka temmakkéalasang, lebbi maégai naiya gemme'é ri ulukku. Sining tau mawatangngé maéloi paccappuka; nagasaka mennang sibawa pappétenna. Ripassaka palisui waramparang iya dé' urampasa'i." 
Psalms69:6 Oh Allataala, Muwisseng sining asalakku dé' natassubbu dosaku ri alé-Mu." 
Psalms69:7 Aja' taleppessakka mappapolé siri ri yasé'na sining tau iya mamménasaé ri Iko, oh Puwang, Allataala Iya Pommakuwasaé. Aja' taleppessakka papolé paccella ri yasé'na sining tau iya sompaék-Ko, oh Allataalana Israélié!" 
Psalms69:8 Saba' Iko ritu naripakatunaka, nasaba Iko ritu naricellaka." 
Psalms69:9 Mancajika pada-pada tau laingngé lao ri siyajikku, pada-pada tau saliwengngé lao ri kakaku sibawa anrikku." 
Psalms69:10 Malluwa'i sumange'ku nasaba pangéloreng lao ri Bola-Mu, pangéllé'-éllé'na tau iya pakatunaék-Ko kennai aléku." 
Psalms69:11 Terika sibawa mappuwasa iyakiya napakatunaka mennang. 
Psalms69:12 Pakéka kaing karung tanrang masara, iyakiya nasindiri'ka mennang." 
Psalms69:13 Mancajika buwa tému ri onronna tau maddeppungengngé, sibawa élonna pammabo-pammabo'é iyanaritu passalenna iyya." 
Psalms69:14 Iyakiya massempajakka lao ri Iko, oh Puwang, oh Allataala, balika ri wettu iya makessingngé. Tulukka nasaba pammasému iya battowaé sibawa nasaba atinuluremmu." 
Psalms69:15 Aja' taleppessakka tallemme ri laleng rawaé, passalama'ka polé risining tau iya benciyékka sibawa polé ri uwai iya maliyungngé." 
Psalms69:16 Aja' taleppessakka riyalireng ri bombang pasangngé, sibawa tallemme ri borina tasi'é iyaré'ga rikuburu ri laleng kalebbongngé." 
Psalms69:17 Balika, oh Puwang, saba' makessik-Ko sibawa tette'i mamasé. Gilinno lao ri iyya saba' battowai paressé babuwa-Mu." 
Psalms69:18 Aja' tamassubbu polé ri atam-Mué, saba' masussakka, apperi-perini tulukka." 
Psalms69:19 Poléni passalama'ka, paleppe'ka polé risining balikku." 
Psalms69:20 Muwisseng pékkugika ricella, ripakatuna sibawa riéllé, Muwitai sininna balikku." 
Psalms69:21 Appakatunangngé mébbuka makeccé ati, sibawa pettu paddennuwakka. Usappai paressé babuwaé, iyakiya siya-siyai, usappai passaléwoé, iyakiya dé' ulolongengngi." 
Psalms69:22 Mala riwérékka racung untu' inanré; wettu madekka, riwérékka cukka untu' énungeng." 
Psalms69:23 Leppessangngi perjamuwanna mennang papoléi acilakang, sibawa mancaji siyo-siyo untu' sining topoléna." 
Psalms69:24 Leppessangngi matanna mennang mancaji buta sibawa lekke'na tuli malemmai. 
Psalms69:25 Tuppa'i cai-Mu ri yasé'na mennang, leppessangngi mennang nageppa cai-Mu iya malluwa'-luwa'é." 
Psalms69:26 Leppessangngi akkémanna masino-sino, sibawa kéma-kémana tenriyonroi." 
Psalms69:27 Saba' nacallai mennang tau iya Muhukkungngé, sibawa bicarai sining tau iya Musissaé." 
Psalms69:28 Leppessanni asalanna tattamba maéga; aja' naripattongeng mennang. 
Psalms69:29 Leppessangngi asenna riledda polé ri kitta'na tau tuwoé; sibawa tenriyoki ri daftarna tau malempué. 
Psalms69:30 Iyakiya ritenre'ka sibawa mapeddi, akkaka oh Allataala, sibawa passalama'ka." 
Psalms69:31 Naupojiwi matu Allataala sibawa élong, pakarajai Aléna sibawa élong sukkuru." 
Psalms69:32 Lebbi naéloriwi Puwangnge iyaro naiya akkarobangeng sapingngé, akkarobangeng saping lai iya battowaé." 
Psalms69:33 Naitanaro, marennuni tau ritenre'é, tau iya sompaéngngi Allataala maloppoi atinna." 
Psalms69:34 Saba' Puwangnge méngkalingai tau iya kasiyasié; dé' Najampaléllériwi umma'-Na ri laleng tarungkué. 
Psalms69:35 Pojiwi Allataala, éh langi sibawa linoé, tasi'é sibawa sininna mahlu'é ri lalenna." 
Psalms69:36 Napassalama'i matu Yérusalém sibawa patettongngi paimeng kota-kotana Yéhuda. Monroi matu umma'na Puwangnge kuwaro; iyaro tanaé mancajiwi appunnangenna mennang. 
Psalms69:37 Namanai matu ana' eppona; sining tau iya méloriyéngngi Puwangnge naonroiwi matu. 
Psalms70:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Polé ri Daud, ri wettunna makkasuwiyangeng akkarobangeng papparéngngerang." 
Psalms70:2 Oh Allataala, passalama'ka, Puwang, asitta'ni tulukka!" 
Psalms70:3 Leppessangngi tau iya macinnaé mpunoka ricau sibawa lari alippuwang. Leppessangngi tau iya gora-goraiyéngngi acilakakku ripasoro sibawa ripakatuna. 
Psalms70:4 Leppessangngi tau iya cawa-cawaiyékka mancaji tasséleng sibawa masiri. 
Psalms70:5 Tennapodo sininna tau iya sompaékko mariyo-riyo sibawa marennu; sibawa sininna iya méloriyéngngi asalamakeng polé ri Iko matterui makkeda, “Maraja tongeng ritu Puwangnge!”" 
Psalms70:6 Iyya'é kasiyasika sibawa malemma; poléni masitta, oh Allataala. Iko ritu pattulung sibawa pappassalama'ku, aja' tamatengnge, oh Puwang." 
Psalms71:1 Ri alé-Muka mallinrung, oh Puwang, aja' taleppessakka ripakasiri." 
Psalms71:2 Paleppe'ka, saba' adélé'-Ko, éngkalingai sibawa passalama'ka." 
Psalms71:3 Ancajino ri aléku pada-pada bulu batué onrokku monro, iya magampangngé tuli urapi. Saba' purani Mupettui untu' passalama'ka, Iko ritu onrokku mallinrung sibawa maccinaung." 
Psalms71:4 Oh Allataalaku, paleppe'ka polé ri tau majaé, polé ri akuwasanna sining tau mabecco'é sibawa mapéddaraé." 
Psalms71:5 Saba' Iko ritu addennuwangekku, oh Puwang, Puwang, mateppe'ka ri Iko sipongeng maloloku." 
Psalms71:6 Sipongeng tuwoku sanréka ri Iko; Mulinrungika sipongekku jaji natuli upoji-Ko. 
Psalms71:7 Atuwokku mancaji contoi lao ri tau maégaé, saba' Iko ritu pallinrukku iya mawatangngé." 
Psalms71:8 Tuli upoji-Ko, puppu esso uwabbirittang arajam-Mu." 
Psalms71:9 Aja' Mubuwakka ri wettu macowaku aja' tasalaika rékko cappuni awatangekku," 
Psalms71:10 saba' sining balikku nabicaraka, sining tau iya maéloé mpunoka sikongkolo'i." 
Psalms71:11 Adanna mennang, “Risalaini ri Allataala; laono mai talellungngi sibawa tatikkengngi, saba' dé'gaga passalama'i.”" 
Psalms71:12 Aja' Mumabéla polé ri iyya, oh Allataala, Allataalaku, tulukka masitta." 
Psalms71:13 Leppessangngi tau iya gasaékka ripakasiri sibawa ripallennye. Leppessangngi tau iya maéloé cilakaika alippuwang sibawa risalipuri atunang. 
Psalms71:14 Iyakiya iyya tuli mamménasaka ri Iko, sibawa pédé maéga poji-Ko." 
Psalms71:15 Puppu esso ucuritai matu sining pangkaukem-Mu iya adélé'é, sibawa asalamkeng polé ri Iko iya tenribilangngé." 
Psalms71:16 Upojiwi pangkaukem-Mu iya barani, oh Puwang Allataala, upakalabbai adélékem-Mu, adélékem-Mu bawang." 
Psalms71:17 Oh Allataala, Mupagguruka sipongeng maloloku, lettu makkekkuwangngé ucuritai winru-Mu iya mappabengngaé." 
Psalms71:18 Oh Allataala, aja' tasalaika, lettu macowaka sibawa maubeng, kuwammengngi uwabbirittangngi akuwasammu sibawa abaraningem-Mu lao ri sininna assossoreng mangoloé." 
Psalms71:19 Oh Allataala, sittanré langié adélékem-Mu; battowai sining pangkaukem-Mu; nigana mulléi pada-padai-Ko?" 
Psalms71:20 Muwérékka maéga anrasa-rasang iya matane'é, iyakiya Mupalisui matu awatangekku sibawa paoto'ka polé ri kuburu'é." 
Psalms71:21 Muwébbuka matu lebbi malebbi, sibawa saléworisika." 
Psalms71:22 Maéloka poji-Ko sibawa gambusu, saba' matinulu-Ko, oh Allataalaku. Maéloka makkélongek-Ko pappojiyang sibawa kacapi. Oh Allataalana Israél iya mapaccingngé." 
Psalms71:23 Gora-goraka sibawa penno ariyo-riyong, nanakkélongeng tok-Ko pappojiyang. Tubu nyawaku makkélongngi sibawa marennu, saba' puraka Mupassalama." 
Psalms71:24 Puppu esso uwabbirittangngi matu adélékem-Mu, saba' sining tau iya maéloé cilakaika ricauni sibawa ripakasirini." 
Psalms72:1 Polé ri Salomo. Oh Allataala, appagguruwangngi hukkum-Mu lao ri arungngé, wéréngngi adélékem-Mu lao ri ana' worowanéna arungngé." 
Psalms72:2 Tennapodo naadélékiwi umma'-Mu situru hukkungngé, sibawa gaukengngi tau ritenre'é sibawa adélé." 
Psalms72:3 Memmuwaré wanuwatta macommo'i sibawa saléwangeng, sibawa engka adélékeng untu' sininna bangsaé." 
Psalms72:4 Tennapodo arungngé nabélai ha'na ra'ya' mariyawaé, tulungngi sining tau kasiyasié sibawa paccappui sining tenre'éngngi mennang." 
Psalms72:5 Tennapodo tette'i mattahang massossoreng ri wettu engkana mupa mata esso sibawa kéteng. 
Psalms72:6 Tennapodo padai bosi iya teppaé ri padangngé, pada-pada bosi raja iya malle'éngngi sining dare'é." 
Psalms72:7 Tennapodo mallebbangngi adélékengngé mannennungeng, sibawa maonai adécéngengngé ri wettu engkana mupa kéteng." 
Psalms72:8 Malowangngi matu akkarungenna polé ri tasi'é lao ri tasi'é, mallebbangngi polé ri alau lettu ri yajang." 
Psalms72:9 Tunru'i matu ri aléna pabbanuwana padang kessi'é sibawa suju'i balié ri yolona ajéna. 
Psalms72:10 Arung-ngarunna Tarsis sibawa pulo-puloé tiwii matu pakkasuwiyang ri aléna. Arung-ngarung Arab-é sibawa Etiopia poléi tiwi pakkasuwiyang. 
Psalms72:11 Sininna arungngé suju'i matu ri yolona, sininna bangsaé mancajiwi ata-atanna." 
Psalms72:12 Saba' naleppessangngi tau dé'é pakkullénna ritenre, sibawa tau kasiyasi iya mangobbié ri aléna." 
Psalms72:13 Namaséiwi tau kasiyasié sibawa ra'ya' mariyawaé, sibawa passalama'i atuwonna tau iya maperi senna'é." 
Psalms72:14 Napaleppe'i mennang polé ri patenre'é sibawa ateddekengngé, saba' atuwonna mennang mangke senna'i ri aléna." 
Psalms72:15 Tuwoi datu arungngé! Tennapodo lao ri aléna riyakkasuwiyangengngi ulaweng polé ri Arab. Tennapodo riyassempajangengngi tungke wettu sibawa tuli ribarakkakiwi. 
Psalms72:16 Tennapodo maonai gandongngé ri sininna wanuwaé, sibawa sining bulu-buluna pennoi wassélé. Tennapodo macommo'i tanana pada-pada Buluna Libanon, sibawa pabbanuwana kotana tattambai pada-pada wellaé ri padangngé." 
Psalms72:17 Tennapodo asenna arungngé risénge'i mannennungeng, sibawa ataromporenna tattambai ri wettu engkana mupa mata esso. Tennapodo bangsa-bangsaé méllauwi ribarakkaki pada-pada aléna, sibawa sininna tauwé teppui masennang." 
Psalms72:18 Ripojiwi Puwangnge, Allataalana Israélié! Banna Aléna pogau'i gau'-gau' iya mappabengngaé." 
Psalms72:19 Ripojiwi asen-Na iya marajaé mannennungeng; tennapodo sininna linoé pennoi sibawa alebbirem-Mu! Jajini makkuwaro. Aming! 
Psalms72:20 Sikumiro sempajanna Daud, ana' Isai." 
Psalms73:1 Mazmurna Asaf. Makessing tongengngi Allataala lao ri umma'-Na, lao ri tau iya mapaccingngé atinna." 
Psalms73:2 Iyakiya iyya bata-batana, céddé'ni teddéng atepperekku," 
Psalms73:3 saba' mangémpuruka lao ri tau matempoé, wettunna uwita amaupekenna tau majaé." 
Psalms73:4 Saba' dé' mennang namanrasa-rasa mapeddi, watakkaléna mennang mawatangngi namadising." 
Psalms73:5 Dé' mennang natanggung asussang, dé' nakennai abala pada-pada tau laingngé." 
Psalms73:6 Rimakkuwannanaro kédo matempoi mennang, sibawa tuli tinda'i sibawa ateddekeng." 
Psalms73:7 Polé ri atinna mennang tattuppa'i jaé; malippui mennang sibawa rancana-rancana maja. 
Psalms73:8 Mangéllé'i mennang sibawa makkeda-kedai, nanasibawang atempong mangancangngi maélo patenre." 
Psalms73:9 Nacurupiyangiwi mennang Allataala ri surugaé, sibawa mabboro lao risining tauwé ri linoé," 
Psalms73:10 angkanna muwi umma'na Allataala balé' towi lao ri mennang, sibawa mateppe lao ri bicaranna mennang." 
Psalms73:11 Adanna mennang, “Dé' naissengngi Allataala, Iya Pommatanré dé' najeppuiwi.”" 
Psalms73:12 Makkuwaniro keadaanna tau majaé; tuwono sibawa tennang, tattambai matteru waramparanna." 
Psalms73:13 Paracuma bawang ujagai mapaccing atikku; dé'na gaga akkégunaku mabélaiwi dosaé. 
Psalms73:14 Saba' puppu esso nakennaka abala; tungke élé risissaka. 
Psalms73:15 Akkalarapanna makkeda makkuwaka'ro, ubali'bellariwi assossorenna ana'-ana'mu." 
Psalms73:16 Iyakiya wettukku makkuraga untu' majeppuiwi, iyaro gau'é mawatang senna untu' aléku." 
Psalms73:17 Angkanna muttama'ka ri Bolana Puwangnge, nainappa uwajeppui accappurenna tau majaé." 
Psalms73:18 Mutaroi mennang ri laleng iya malengngoé, sibawa Muleppesangngi mennang menrung binasa." 
Psalms73:19 Ri laleng sikédé mata ancuru'i mennang, masero senna accappurenna." 
Psalms73:20 Pada-pada nippi iya teddéngngé ri éléé; wettum-Mu tokkong, oh Puwang, lennye toni mennang." 
Psalms73:21 Wettukku massessekalé sibawa atikku pada-pada ritoddo'é," 
Psalms73:22 madonggoka sibawa dé' uwajeppuiwi, pada-padaka olokolo'é ri yolo-Mu." 
Psalms73:23 Iyakiya tette'ka ri seddé-Mu, Muwakkatenningngi lima ataukku." 
Psalms73:24 Mupimpikka sibawa pangaja, sibawa Mutarimaka matti sibawa alebbireng." 
Psalms73:25 Niga uwappunnai ri surugaé sangadinna Iko? Ri lainnaé Iko dé'na gaga iya uwacinnaiyé ri linoé. 
Psalms73:26 Namuni tubu nyawaku mancaji malemmai, Iko ritu awatangekku, oh Allataala; Iko ritu sininna iya uwappunnaiyé untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms73:27 Tau iya salaiyék-Ko macilakai matu, Mupabbinasai tau iya dé'é namatinulu lao ri Iko." 
Psalms73:28 Iyakiya untu' aléku makessing tongeng engka ri seddéna Allataala, Puwang Allataala upancaji onrong allinrungekku, kuwammengngi uwulléi mabbirittangngi sininna pangkauken-Na." 
Psalms74:1 Elong pappagguruwanna Asaf. Oh Allataala, untu' mannennungegga Musalaiki? Magi Mumatteru macai lao ri umma'-Mu muto?" 
Psalms74:2 Engngerangngi umma'-Mu iya Mupilé sipongenna riyolo, bangsa iya Mupaleppe'é kuwammengngi nancaji appunnangem-Mu. Engngerangngi matu Bulu Sion, iya Mupancajiyé onrong Muwonroiyé." 
Psalms74:3 Jalajja'ni onrong iya mancajiyénna ruttungeng; sininna engkaé ri Bola-Mu purani naancuru balié. 
Psalms74:4 Gora-gorai sining balim-Mu ri Bola-Mu, sibawa patettongngi bandéra apakalanna kuwaro." 
Psalms74:5 Padai mennang pattubbang aju iya mabbettangngéngngi waséna, untu' tubbangngi aju-kajungngé ri ale'é." 
Psalms74:6 Sininna sobbi ajué naancuru'i mennang sibawa waséna nenniya palu-palunna. 
Psalms74:7 Natunui mennang Bola-Mu gangka cappu; sibawa panajisi'i onrom-Mu risompa. 
Psalms74:8 Maéloi mennang patunru sisekki, sibawa tunui gangka cappu sininna onrong assompangngé ri wanuwaéwé." 
Psalms74:9 Nabi-nabié sibawa tanra-tanrang makalallaingngé dé' napaitana, sibawa dé' muwi séddi tau missengngi gangka kégi matteru makkuwaé." 
Psalms74:10 Gangka kégi oh Allataala, naéllé'-Ko balié balié? Lettu mannennungegga napakatunai mennang asem-Mu?" 
Psalms74:11 Magi nadé'na Mutulukki? Magi mupaleppe'i limam-Mu polé ri idi? 
Psalms74:12 Ri pammulanna mupa Iko ritu arukku, oh Allataala, Iko ritu passalama'ki." 
Psalms74:13 Nasibawang awatangeng iya maseroé Mupuwé'i tasi'é, sibawa reppa'i ulunna naga tasi'é." 
Psalms74:14 Mureppo'i sining ulunna Léwiatan sibawa pancajiwi inanréna monroiyéngngi padang kessi'é. 
Psalms74:15 Mupassolo'i mata uwai sibawa saloé; salo iya battowaé Mupancajiwi marakko. 
Psalms74:16 Iko ritu pancajiwi essoé sibawa wennié, enrengngé pattentui onronna mata essoé sibawa kétengngé." 
Psalms74:17 Mupattette'i pakkasésénna linoé, mébbui wettu timoé sibawa wettu bosié." 
Psalms74:18 Engngerangngi pékkugi balié pakatuna-Ko, oh Puwang, bangsa iya dé'é naissek-Ko curupiyangiwi asem-Mu." 
Psalms74:19 Aja' Muwabbéréyangngi umma'-Mu iya dé'é pakkullénna lao ri limanna bali iya mabecco'é. Aja' na untu' mannennungeng mallupaiwi totona umma'-Mu iya macilakaé. 
Psalms74:20 Engngerangngi assijancingeng iya Muwébbué sibawa idi, saba' napogau'i tauwé ateddekengngé ri tungke onrong makalemmengngé ri wanuwaéwé." 
Psalms74:21 Aja' muleppessangngi tau ritenre'é ripakasiri, tennapodo tau manrasa-rasaé sibawa kasiyasié poji-Ko." 
Psalms74:22 Tokkonni oh Allataala, éwaini parakara-Mu! Saba' puppu esso ripakatuna-Ko risining tau iya dé'é natepperi-Ko." 
Psalms74:23 Aja' Muwallupaiwi kelli'na sining balim-Mu, arukkanna sining balim-Mu iya pédé maladde'é!" 
Psalms75:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Manuru lagunna: Aja' tapaccappui. Mazmurna Asaf. Elong. 
Psalms75:2 Idi sompa-Ko, oh Allataala, sukkuru'ki lao ri Iko sibawa mabbirittangngi winru-Mu iya mappabengngaé." 
Psalms75:3 Makkedai Allataala, “Ri wettu iya Upattentué, Maélo-Ka madélékiwi sibawa adélé." 
Psalms75:4 Rékko taggottangngi linoé sibawa sininna pabbnuwana Iyya ritu pakkasse'i alliri-allirinna.” 
Psalms75:5 Lao ri tau iya pojiyéngngi mabboro, makkeda-Ka, kuwammengngi aja'na nabboro." 
Psalms75:6 Sibawa lao ri tau majaé, kuwammengngi aja'na nakédo matempo. Aja' napojiwi aléna iyaré'ga nabbicara sibawa matempo." 
Psalms75:7 Saba' angadélékengngé dé' napolé ri alau iyaré'ga yajang dé'to napolé ri manorang iyaré'ga yattang. 
Psalms75:8 Iyakiya Allataala muto ritu mangadéléki, Napakariyawai séddié sibawa napakatanréi iya laingngé." 
Psalms75:9 Caina Puwangnge pada-padai kacaé ri liman-Na, iyaro kacaé mallise'i uwai anggoro iya maserié. Natiri'i Allataala lise'na, sininna tomajaé ri linoé harusu'i ménungngi gangka cappu." 
Psalms75:10 Iyakiya tette'ka matu mabbirittangngi Allataalana Yakub, makkélongengngi pappoji-pojiyang untu' Aléna." 
Psalms75:11 Napoloi matu awatangenna tau majaé, na tau makessingngé tattamba mawatangngi." 
Psalms76:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Nasibawang kacapi. Mazmurna Asaf. Elong. 
Psalms76:2 Tarompoi Allataala ri Yéhuda; kalabbai asen-Na ri Israél. 
Psalms76:3 Yérusalém iyanaritu onrong Naonroiyé; Bulu Sion onrong Naonroiyé. 
Psalms76:4 Kuwaro Naancuru'i sininna paréwa musué, sininna pana lala'-lala'é, kaliyawoé sibawa peddangngé." 
Psalms76:5 Maraja tongek-Ko, sibawa mattappa, napakacauri sining bulué riyolo." 
Psalms76:6 Sining tau baranié purani narampasa; matinroi mennang sibawa dé'na matu naoto'na. Prajuri-prajuri iya poré teddénni awatangenna. 
Psalms76:7 Sininna anyaranna sibawa tonangiyéngngi sempé'ni maté nasaba paggera'-Mu, oh Allataalana Yakub!" 
Psalms76:8 Masero tongek-Ko! Rékko macai-Ko, niga mulléi mattahang?" 
Psalms76:9 Polé ri langié Mupannessai apettum-Mu; métau linoé sibawa mammek-Ko. 
Psalms76:10 Wettum-Mu tokkong maélo mangadéléki untu' passalama'i tau ritenre'é ri linoé. 
Psalms76:11 Muwi sining tau kaminang masekkangngé poji tok-Ko, sibawa iya macaié mupa pakéi kaing karung tanrang mabbarata." 
Psalms76:12 Rupaiwi jancimmu lao ri Puwang Allataalamu. Sitinajai sininna bangsa iya monroé macawé tiwii pakkasuwiyang untu' Allataala iya naétauriyé. 
Psalms76:13 Napoloi sumange'na sining panguwasaé; métaui arung-ngarungngé lao ri Aléna. 
Psalms77:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Situru: Yédutun. Mazmurna Asaf. 
Psalms77:2 Mangobbika sibawa macenno lao ri Allataala; mangobbika sibawa macenno, nanaéngkalingaka." 
Psalms77:3 Ri wettu aperisengngé massempajakka lao ri Puwangnge; puppu benni uwakkai limakku lao ri Aléna dé' ucau, iyakiya atikku dé' namaélo risaléwori." 
Psalms77:4 Rékko uwéngngerangngi Allataala, maddarékéka, rékko unennungngi, pédé malemmai atikku." 
Psalms77:5 Naébbuka Puwangnge dé' naweddikka matinro ri wennié, mauséka angkakku dé' uwulléi mabbicara." 
Psalms77:6 Upikkiri'i esso-esso iya labe'é, uwéngngerangngi sibawa unennungngi taut-taung iya labe'é." 
Psalms77:7 Ri wennié upikkiri'-pikkiri'i, sibawa makkutana ri laleng ati," 
Psalms77:8 “Untu' mannennungegga Puwangnge massampéyang sibawa dé' namaélona? 
Psalms77:9 Mappésauniga mamaséiki? Dé'ga Narupaiwi jancin-Na paimeng? 
Psalms77:10 Nallupainiga Allataala untu' mamasé? Macayiiga, angkanna dé' namaressé babuwana?”" 
Psalms77:11 Naumakkeda, “Iyanaé peddiriwi atikku, makkedaé Iya Pommatanré dé'na namakuwasana.”" 
Psalms77:12 Maéloka méngngerangngi sining pangkaukem-Mu Puwang, makkatenningngi sining anu makalallaim-Mu wettu riyolo." 
Psalms77:13 Maéloka nennungngi sininna iya Mupogau'é, sibawa pikkiri'i sining winru-Mu iya maseroé." 
Psalms77:14 Oh Allataala, mapaccing maneng pangkaukem-Mu, nigana silloppo Allataalata?" 
Psalms77:15 Iko ritu Allataala iya pogau'é anu makalallaing, purani Mupannessa akuwasam-Mu ri yelle'na bangsa-bangsaé." 
Psalms77:16 Nasibawang awatangem-Mu Mupaleppe'i umma'-Mu, wija-wijanna Yakub sibawa Yusuf." 
Psalms77:17 Naita-Mu, oh Allataala, métaui uwai, ténré towi borina tasi'é." 
Psalms77:18 Tiri'i bosi ellungngé, maddalenrung guttué; siyanré-anré letté ri sininna sulapa'é." 
Psalms77:19 Maddalenrung guttué, reppe billa'é, taggottang linoé sibawa ténré." 
Psalms77:20 Joppa-Ko molai bombangngé, léttoi tasi'é, iyakiya dé' napaita batéla-Mu." 
Psalms77:21 Pada-pada-Ko pakkampié dulungngi umma'-Mu, naolai Musa sibawa Harun." 
Psalms78:1 Elong pappagguruwanna Asaf. Nasibawang pappagguruwakku, éh bangsaku, pénessaiwi ada-adakku." 
Psalms78:2 Maéloka powada warékkada sibawa pakkalarapangeng, sibawa pakatajangngi patteppungngé wettu riyolo," 
Psalms78:3 gau'-gau' iya riyéngkalingaé sibawa ritarimaé, iya nacuritaé néné-nénéta." 
Psalms78:4 Dé' tamaélo rahasiyakangngi lao ri ana'-ana'ta; maéloki mabbirittangngi lao ri abbatireng ri monrié passalenna akuwasanna Puwangnge sibawa sining winru-Na iya battowaé, enrengngé sining pangkauken-Na iya makalallaingngé." 
Psalms78:5 Lao ri bangsa Israélié Nabbéréyangngi hukkun-Na, sibawa lao ri wija-wijanna Yakub parénta-Na. Nasuroi néné-nénéta mappagguruwangngi lao ri ana'-ana'na mennang," 
Psalms78:6 kuwammengngi abbatireng rappina naissengngi, nainappa patterui lao ri ana'-ana'na mennang." 
Psalms78:7 Nanallalengi towi mennang nataroi matu paddennuwanna ri Allataala, sibawa dé' nallupaiwi pangkauken-Na, iyakiya tuli tunru'i ri parénta-Na," 
Psalms78:8 kuwammengngi mennang dé' napada néné-nénéna iya pojiyéngngi maronta sibawa madoraka; abbatireng iya kaléwa'-léwa'é teppe'na, sibawa dé' namatinulu lao ri Allataala." 
Psalms78:9 Suku Efraim iya massenjataé pana, lariwi ri wettunna mammusu." 
Psalms78:10 Najjalékkaiwi mennang assijancin-Na sibawa Allataala, sibawa dé' namaélo tunru lao ri hukkun-Na." 
Psalms78:11 Nallupaiwi mennang sining pangkauken-Na, sibawa sining anu makalallaing iya Nappaitangngé lao ri mennang." 
Psalms78:12 Ri yolona toriyolona, mébbui Allataala anu makalallaing ri wanuwa Maséré, ri tanéténa Zoan." 
Psalms78:13 Napuwé'i tasi'é, nainappa mallétto mennang; Napatettongngi uwai pada-pada téppo'é." 
Psalms78:14 Nadulungngi mennang sibawa ellung ri essoé enrengngé nasibawang tajanna apié puppu benni. 
Psalms78:15 Napuwé'i bulu batué ri padang kessi'é, nenniya paénungngi mennang sibawa maona." 
Psalms78:16 Nasuroi passu uwai bulu-bulu batué, namassolo'na uwai pada-pada saloé." 
Psalms78:17 Iyakiya matterui mennang madosa lao ri Allataala, maronta'i mennang ri padang kessi'é lao ri Iya Pommatanré." 
Psalms78:18 Nattungkai mennang cobaiwi Allataala, ri laleng tuntu'i inanré iya nacinnaiyé mennang." 
Psalms78:19 Naéwai mennang Allataala sibawa makkeda, “Naulléga Allataala mpérékki inanré ri padang kessi'é?" 
Psalms78:20 Mémeng Naunrui bulu batu iya matedde'é, angkanna massolo uwai sibawa maraja. Iyakiya Naullétoga passadiya roti sibawa mabbéré juku lao ri umma'-Na?”" 
Psalms78:21 Naéngkalinganaro, macaini Allataala nanagasai umma'-Na sibawa api; cai-Na lao ri mennang pédé mancajiwi," 
Psalms78:22 saba' dé' mennang namateppe lao ri Allataala, ri akuwasan-Na iya mullééngngi passalama'i mennang." 
Psalms78:23 Namuni makkuwaro Naparéntangngi langié untu' timpa'i sining tange'na. 
Psalms78:24 Napanonnoi gandongngé polé ri surugaé, manna untu' inanréna mennang." 
Psalms78:25 Nawéréngngi mennang inanré maona; manréi mennang roti malaéka'. 
Psalms78:26 Nasuro towi anging alaué mangiri; nasaba akuwasan-Na namangiri anging yattangngé. 
Psalms78:27 Napanonnoi manu'-manu'é untu' umma'-Na, jumellana padai kessi'é tenribilang." 
Psalms78:28 Napasempéi iyaro sining manu'-manu'é ri akkémangngé ri mattulilinna onrong naonroiyé mennang. 
Psalms78:29 Namanréna mennang gangka messo, saba' Allataala pura mpéréngngi mennang aga iya nacinnaiyé." 
Psalms78:30 Iyakiya napessunna mennang dé'topa nacau; jaji wettunna mennang manré mupi," 
Psalms78:31 macaini Allataala Nanaéwai mennang; Naunoi sining tau Israél iya maloloé sibawa baranié. 
Psalms78:32 Namuni makkuwaro tette'i umma'-Na madosa, sining anu makalallain-Na dé' naébbui mennang mateppe." 
Psalms78:33 Nanapaccappa'ni Allataala atuwonna mennang pada-pada nappase'é, cappui taut-taunna mennang ri laleng taué." 
Psalms78:34 Sises-siseng nauno Allataala siyagangngaré ri yelle'na mennang, iya laingngé massessekaléi sibawa lisu ri Aléna." 
Psalms78:35 Naéngngerangngi mennang makkedaé Allataala pallinrunna mennang, sibawa Iya Pommatanré pappassalama'na mennang." 
Psalms78:36 Iyakiya ribelléi Aléna ri mennang, ada-adanna mennang bellé simata." 
Psalms78:37 Dé' mennang namatinulu lao ri Aléna sibawa dé' nakkatenning ri assijancin-Na. 
Psalms78:38 Iyakiya Allataala mamaséiwi sibawa maddampengengngi umma'-Na, sibawa dé' napaccappui mennang. Makkolik-kolinni natahang cai-Na, sibawa dé' napallessui cai-Na." 
Psalms78:39 Engngerangngi makkedaé mennang banna mahlu' iya dé'é namannennungeng, pada-pada anging labe'é nadé'na nalisu." 
Psalms78:40 Temmaka léwe'nana mennang maronta lao ri Aléna, sibawa peddiriwi atin-Na wettunna ri padang kessi'é." 
Psalms78:41 Makkolik-kolinni mennang cobaiwi Allataala, sussaiwi Iya Mapaccingngé, Allataalana Israélié." 
Psalms78:42 Dé' mennang naéngngerangngi matu akuwasan-Na, ri esso Napaleppe'na mennang polé ri balié," 
Psalms78:43 wettunna mébbu sining anu dé'é padanna ri Maséré, sibawa sining anu makalallaingngé ri padang Zoan." 
Psalms78:44 Napinrai sining salona mennang mancaji dara, angkanna dé' naulléi mennang ménungngi uwaina." 
Psalms78:45 Nasissai mennang sibawa lale iya maégaé, sibawa leppessangngi tanana mennang risolangi ri cuppangngé." 
Psalms78:46 Papoléi ule sibawa incalé, iya paccappuéngngi éngngalangngé sibawa wassélé dare'é." 
Psalms78:47 Nasolangiwi pong anggoro'na mennang sibawa bosi batu, nenniya sining pong arana mennang sibawa cinoddo mattékké." 
Psalms78:48 Naleppessangngi bosi ése'é kennai olokolo'na mennang, sibawa letté kennai olokolo'na mennang." 
Psalms78:49 Napallessui cai-Na iya malluwa'-luwa'é ri laleng nasurona sipasukang malaéka' amaténgngé iya mébbuéngngi mennang pettu paddennuwang. 
Psalms78:50 Dé' natahangngi cai-Na iyaré'ga nacarinnaiwi atuwonna mennang, iyakiya napaccappui mennang sibawa sai." 
Psalms78:51 Naunoi ana' worowané macowaé ri laleng tungke kaluwargana tau Maséré'é. 
Psalms78:52 Nainappa napimping umma'-Na pada-pada bimbala makkonrongngé, sibawa dulungngi mennang molai padang kessi'é." 
Psalms78:53 Ri laleng pappimpin-Na amangngi mennang sibawa dé' namétau, na balinna mennang tallemme'i ri laleng tasi'é." 
Psalms78:54 Nainappa natiwi umma'-Na ri tana-Na iya mapaccingngé, ri bulué iya Aléna muto sittaiwi." 
Psalms78:55 Ri yolona umma'-Na Napaddésu'i pabbanuwaé kuwaro Nainappa nattawa-tawang iyaro wanuwaé lao ri sininna suku bangsa Israélié, umma'-Na, angkanna naulléi mennang monroiwi kéma-kémana balié." 
Psalms78:56 Iyakiya maronta'i mennang sibawa mojiwi Allataala Iya Pommatanré, parénta-parénta-Na dé' mennang naturusiwi." 
Psalms78:57 Bali'bellai mennang pada-pada toriyolona, sibawa dé' nawedding riyatepperi pada-pada uso mabbéngko'é." 
Psalms78:58 Naéwai mennang Allataala sibawa onrong assompang barahalana mennang, nenniya mébbui mennang mangémpuru sibawa dato'-dato'na mennang." 
Psalms78:59 Naitanaro, macai senna'ni Allataala, sibawa sampéyangngi mennang." 
Psalms78:60 Nasalaiwi kéma-Na mennang ri Silo, onrong Naonroiyé ri yelle'na tolinoé." 
Psalms78:61 Naleppessangngi Petti Assijancin-Na ritawang; lambang alebbiren-Na nasittaiwi balié. 
Psalms78:62 Macayii lao ri umma'-Na, appunnangeng mana-Na, sibawa leppessangngi mennang riyuno sibawa peddang." 
Psalms78:63 Kallolo-kallolona mennang nanréi api; dé'na gaga kawingiwi ana'-ana'darana mennang. 
Psalms78:64 Imang-ngimanna mennang riyunoi sibawa peddang, janda-jandana mennang dé' naulléi mpating." 
Psalms78:65 Moto'i Puwangnge pada-pada tau péseddingngé, pada-pada tau mawatangngé purana ménung anggoro." 
Psalms78:66 Napasoroi balin-Na, sibawa caui mennang untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms78:67 Iyakiya Nasampéyangngi wija-wijanna Yusuf sibawa dé' napiléi suku Efraim. 
Psalms78:68 Iya Napilé iyanaritu suku Yéhuda, sibawa Bulu Sion iya Napojiyé." 
Psalms78:69 Napatettongngi Bola-Na pada-pada Naonroiyé ri surugaé, sibawa pada-pada linoé, masse untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms78:70 Napiléi Daud atan-Na, sibawa malai polé ri olokolo makkonronna," 
Psalms78:71 polé ri onron-Na mappiyara indo' bimbala, untu' mampii Israélié umma'-Na." 
Psalms78:72 Daud piyarai mennang sibawa macenning atinna, nenniya pimpingngi mennang sibawa macca." 
Psalms79:1 Mazmurna Asaf. Oh Allataala, bangsa iya dé'é naissek-Ko natudangini tana mana-Mu. Napanajisii mennang Bola-Mu, napancajiwi Yérusalém ruttungeng." 
Psalms79:2 Nasalaiwi mennang ujuna ata-atam-Mu mancaji inanréna manu'-manu'é ri yelle'é. Ujuna sining Muwamaséiyé naleppessangngi mennang mancaji inanréna olokolo liyaé. 
Psalms79:3 Ri sininna kota Yérusalém tattuppa'i darana mennang pada-pada uwai; dé'gaga kuburu'i mennang. 
Psalms79:4 Mancajiki akkéllé-kéllékenna bangsa-bangsa sideppéta, nacawa-cawaiki mennang sibawa nabuwé'ki." 
Psalms79:5 Oh Puwang, untu' mannennungegga macai-Ko, sibawa angémpurum-Mu malluwa pada-pada apié?" 
Psalms79:6 Tuppa'i cai-Mu ri yasé'na bangsa-bangsaé iya dé'é naissek-Ko, sibawa ri yasé'na akkarungeng-akkarungengngé iya dé'é nassompa lao ri Iko." 
Psalms79:7 Saba' purani mennang napaccappu umma'-Mu, sibawa mancuru'i onrong naonroiyé mennang." 
Psalms79:8 Aja' tahukkukki nasaba dosana toriyolota. Amaséini masitta, saba' pettu paddennuwanni." 
Psalms79:9 Tulukki oh Allataala, Pappassalama'ta, addampengengngi dosa-dosata sibawa paleppe'ki nasaba alebbirem-Mu muto." 
Psalms79:10 Aja' taleppessangngi bangsa laingngé makkutana passaletta, “Kégai Allataalana mennang?” Leppessakki mitai pakkabale'é lao ri bangsa-bangsa iya mpunoéngngi ata-atam-Mu." 
Psalms79:11 Engkalingai addarékénna sining tahanangngé; tennapodo sining tau iya ripattentué untu' maté rileppessang tuwo nasaba akuwasam-Mu. 
Psalms79:12 Oh Puwang, wale'i bangsa-bangsaéro leppi wékkapitu nasaba sininna pappakatunana mennang lao ri Iko." 
Psalms79:13 Na idi umma'-Mu, bimbala Muampié, sukkuru matu lao ri Iko untu' mannennungeng, sibawa poji-Ko massossoreng." 
Psalms80:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Situru lagunna: Bunga Bakungngé. Mazmur asabbiyanna Asaf. 
Psalms80:2 Oh Pakkampina Israélié, éngkalingai, Iko pimpingngéngngi wija-wijanna Yusuf selaku makkonrongeng. Iko iya makkarungngé ri yasé'na kérub-é, alluruno sibawa mattappa" 
Psalms80:3 ri yolona Efraim, Bényamin sibawa Manasyé. Ajjellokenni akuwasam-Mu lao ri idi, sibawa poléno passalama'ki." 
Psalms80:4 Oh Allataala, pajjappaki; itaki sibawa ati masémpo, natasalama matu." 
Psalms80:5 Oh Puwang Allataala Iya Pommakuwasaé, gangka kégi-Ko macai, namuni madosai umma'-Mu?" 
Psalms80:6 Muwérékki teri untu' inanré, uwai mata maona untu' énungeng." 
Psalms80:7 Muleppessangngi bangsa-bangsa sideppéta, massasa passalenna tanata macawai masennang sining balitta." 
Psalms80:8 Oh Allataala Iya Pommakuwasaé, palisuki; itaki sibawa masémpo ati, natasalama." 
Psalms80:9 Umma'-Mu padai pong anggoro'é iya Mupalétté'é polé ri Maséré. Mupaddésu'i bangsa-bangsa laingngé, nainappa Mutaneng iyaro ajué ri wanuwanna mennang." 
Psalms80:10 Mupassadiyangengngi tana aléna; namakkure maliyung sibawa mallebbang ri sininna wanuwaé. 
Psalms80:11 Nacinaungiwi sining bulu-bulué, enrengngé nasibawang takké-takkéna natongkoi ajukajung aras battowaé." 
Psalms80:12 Lorong takkéna lettu ri Tasi Tengngaé, colli'-colli'na lettu ri Salo Efrat." 
Psalms80:13 Oh Allataala magi Muruttungngi sappona, angkanna tungke tau laloé naulléi céppui buwana?" 
Psalms80:14 Nakanyumpéi bawi ale'é angkanna masolang, sibawa olokolo ri padangngé manréi." 
Psalms80:15 Oh Allataala Iya Pommakuwasaé, poléni paimeng, itani polé ri surugaé sibawa jampangiwi umma'-Mu." 
Psalms80:16 Passalama'i umma iya padaé pong anggoro alé-Mu pura tanengngi, sibawa cura' anggoro iya Mupancajiyé mawatang." 
Psalms80:17 Balié pura tubbangngi sibawa tunui; leppessanni mennang ripaccappu ri cai-Mu. 
Psalms80:18 Linrungiwi tau iya puraé Mupilé, ana'na tolinoé iya Mupéwatangiyé untu' alé-Mu." 
Psalms80:19 Nadé'na taléssé polé ri alé-Mu; jagaiwi atuwotta, natapoji-Ko matu." 
Psalms80:20 Oh Puwang Allataala Iya Pommakuwasaé, pajjappaki, itaki sibawa masémpo ati, kuwammengngi natasalama." 
Psalms81:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Situru lagunna: Gitit. Polé ri Asaf. 
Psalms81:2 Puwélonni pappoji-pojiyangngé untu' Allataala, awatangetta, gorano sibawa marennu untu' Allataalana Yakub." 
Psalms81:3 Paonini rabanaé, akkani élongngé, getti'i gambusu'é nenniya kacapié sibawa macenno." 
Psalms81:4 Seppungngi tarompé'é ri esso marajata, ri pésta uleng barué sibawa uleng léburengngé." 
Psalms81:5 Saba' iyaro gau'é séuwai peraturang ri Israélié, séuwai parénta polé ri Allataalana Yakub." 
Psalms81:6 Napancajiwi séuwa attettekeng untu' bangsa Israélié, wettunna malluru méwai Maséré. Uwéngkalingai basa iya dé'é uwissengngi," 
Psalms81:7 “Purani uwakka tiwi polé ri salangkammu, sibawa leppessangngi baka lémparengngé polé ri limammu." 
Psalms81:8 Ri laleng asussammu mangobbiko, Naupassalama'ko. Ubaliko polé ri guttu onrok-Ku massubbu, Upojiko ri mata uwai Mériba." 
Psalms81:9 Engkalingai papparéngngerak-Ku, éh umma'-Ku, Israél, akkalarapanna maéloko méngkalinga-Ka!" 
Psalms81:10 Aja' naengka déwata laing ri yelle'mu, aja' musompa déwata laing." 
Psalms81:11 Iyya ritu Puwang Allataalamu, iya dulungngékko massu polé ri Maséré. Wettummu malupu riwérékko inanré." 
Psalms81:12 Iyakiya umma'-Ku dé' namaélo méngkalinga-Ka, dé' namaélo mapato Israélié lao ri Iyya." 
Psalms81:13 Rimakkuwannanaro Uleppessangngi mennang matedde ati; leppessangngi mennang naccowéri élona muto. 
Psalms81:14 Ah, akkalarapanna umma'-Ku maéloi méngkalinga-Ka, akkalarapanna maéloi mapato lao ri Iyya," 
Psalms81:15 masitta'-Ka patunru'i balinna mennang, sibawa caui sininna balinna mennang." 
Psalms81:16 Tau iya céccéék-Ka Upatunru'i matu, rihukkungngi matu mennang untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms81:17 Iyakiya umma'-Ku Upanréi matu gandong ripilé, sibawa Upamessori sibawa cani ale.”" 
Psalms82:1 Mazmurna Asaf. Allataala pimpingngi pengadilang ilahié ri surugaé, nainappa nabbéréyang apettun-Na:" 
Psalms82:2 “Aja'na tamangadélé sibawa macéko-céko, sibawa aja' muwaccowé lao ri tau majaé." 
Psalms82:3 Ewaiwi ana' béué sibawa tau malemmaé, wéréngngi adélékeng tau kasiyasié sibawa manrasa-rasaé." 
Psalms82:4 Paleppe'i tau iya malemmaé sibawa dé'é pakkullénna, paleppe'i mennang polé ri limanna tau majaé." 
Psalms82:5 Dé' aga-aga muwisseng, madonggo sibawa pusa, nasaba iko, natassiya-siya atorenna masaraka'é." 
Psalms82:6 Upowadai makkedaé ilahiko iko maneng ana'-ana'na Allataala Iya Pommatanré. 
Psalms82:7 Iyakiya matéko matu pada-pada tolinoé, pada-pada tungke tomarajaé, maté tokko matu.”" 
Psalms82:8 Poléni oh Allataala, adélékini linoé, saba' sininna bangsaé iyanaritu appunnangem-Mu." 
Psalms83:1 Mazmurna Asaf: séuwa élong. 
Psalms83:2 Oh Allataala, aja' Muwammekko, aja' tappalo-palo cikku sibawa monro mammekko." 
Psalms83:3 Itani, balim-Mu maroca, maronta'i sining tau iya benciyék-Ko." 
Psalms83:4 Mébbui mennang rancana maja untu' méwai umma'-Mu; sibawa barunding méwai sining tau iya Mulinrungiyé. 
Psalms83:5 Adanna mennang, “Laono mai taancuru'i bangsa Israélié, kuwammengngi dé' nariyéngngeranna asenna mennang.”" 
Psalms83:6 Purani siyempe bangsa-bangsaé, sibawa masséddi méwa-Ko:" 
Psalms83:7 bangsa Edom sibawa Ismaél, sining tau Moab-é sibawa Hagar;" 
Psalms83:8 bangsa Gébal, Amon sibawa Amalé', bangsa Filistéa enrengngé pabbanuwana Tirus." 
Psalms83:9 Makkuwatoro Asyur masséddini sibawa mennang, mancaji ana' buwana wija-wijanna Lot." 
Psalms83:10 Gaukengngi mennang pada-pada tau Midiangngé, pada-pada Siséra sibawa Yabin ri Salo Kisyon," 
Psalms83:11 iya puraé ripaccappu ri Endor, sibawa mancaji pappakacommo untu' tanaé." 
Psalms83:12 Gaukengngi pamimpinna mennang pada-pada Oréb sibawa Zeeb, patunru'i pangakuwasana mennang pada-pada Zébah sibawa Salmuna," 
Psalms83:13 nasaba purai mennang makkeda, “Laono mai tatudangiwi tana naonroiyé Allataala.”" 
Psalms83:14 Oh Allataala, assiyamporengngi mennang pada-pada awué, pada-pada daramé iya nairié anging." 
Psalms83:15 Pada-pada api iya tunuéngngi ale'é, luwa api iya mangurengngéngngi sining bulué." 
Psalms83:16 Lellungngi mennang sibawa anginraja-Mu, sélengiwi mennang sibawa talippuru-Mu." 
Psalms83:17 Oh Puwang, leppessangngi mennang ripakatuna, kuwammengngi nangakuiwi mennang akuwasam-Mu." 
Psalms83:18 Leppessangngi mennang tuli ripakasiri sibawa métau, leppessangngi mennang maté ri laleng atunangngé." 
Psalms83:19 Tennapodo naissengngi mennang banna Iko ritu Iya Pommatanré, Puwang, iya makuwasaéngngi sininna linoé." 
Psalms84:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Situru lagunna: Gitit. Mazmurna appang Korah. 
Psalms84:2 Temmaka pasennanginna onrong Muwonroiyé, oh Allataala Iya Pommakuwasaé!" 
Psalms84:3 Nauddaningi senna'i atikku Bola-Mu, tubu nyawaku gora-gorai untu' Allataala iya tuwoé." 
Psalms84:4 Mala dongié lolongeng bola sibawa lajang-lajangngé séddi bola, onronna mennang taroi ana'na ri seddéna mézba-Mu, oh Puwang Iya Pommakuwasaé, Arukku sibawa Allataalaku." 
Psalms84:5 Masennang tongeng tau iya monroé ri Bola-Mu, sibawa tuli makkélong pappojiyang untu' alé-Mu." 
Psalms84:6 Masennangngi tau iya lolongengngé awatangeng polé ri Iko, sibawa iya macinnaé massiyara ri Bulu Sion." 
Psalms84:7 Namattengngang mennang joppa molai lompo Baka, iyaro onrongngé napinrai mennang macaji mata uwai, bosi mammulangngé tabbollongngi sibawa barakka." 
Psalms84:8 Awatangenna mennang pédé tattambai, wettunna joppa lao ri Sion, lao ri onronna Allataalana sininna déwataé mappaitangngi alé." 
Psalms84:9 Engkalingai sempajakku, oh Puwang Allataala Iya Pommakuwasaé, éngkalingai, oh Allataalana Yakub." 
Psalms84:10 Barakkakiwi arutta, oh Allataala, linrungiwi tau iya puraé Mupilé." 
Psalms84:11 Lebbi kessing muwi siesso ri Bola-Mu naiya sisebbu esso ri onrong laingngé. Upiléi mancaji panganrowang sumpang ri Bolana Allataalaku naiya monro ri bolana tau majaé. 
Psalms84:12 Saba' Puwang Allataala pallinrutta sibawa arung iya marajaé, iya mpéréngngékki pammasé sibawa alebbireng. Dé' naengka nasampéyangngi muwi aga iya makessingngé lao ri tau iya atuwonnaé dé' cellana." 
Psalms84:13 Oh Puwang Iya Pommakuwasaé, masennangngi tau iya mateppe'é ri Aléna." 
Psalms85:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmurna appang Korah. 
Psalms85:2 Muwéloriwi tana-Mu, oh Puwang, keadaanna Israélié purani Mupalisu." 
Psalms85:3 Purani Muwaddampengeng dosa-dosana umma'-Mu; Muwaddampengenni sininna asalanna. 
Psalms85:4 Dé'na Muwacairi mennang; cai-Mu iya maseroé Mugettengngi lisu. 
Psalms85:5 Pajjappaki, oh Allataala pappassalama'ta, aja' Mumacai paimeng lao ri idi." 
Psalms85:6 Untu' mannennungegga Muwacairiki, sibawa tette macai massossoreng?" 
Psalms85:7 Péwatangiki paimeng kuwammengngi tamarennu idi umma'-Mu nasaba pattulum-Mu. 
Psalms85:8 Ajjellokenni makkedaé tette'-Ko mamasé, oh Puwang, wérékki asalamakeng polé ri alé-Mu." 
Psalms85:9 Maéloka méngkalingai ada-adanna Puwang Allataala; Najjanciyangngi asaléwangengngé lao ri idi, umma'-Na, assaleng dé' talisu pogau' dosa." 
Psalms85:10 Tongeng, sadiyai passalama'i tau iya mateppe'é, Allataala iya marajaé monroi matu ri wanuwatta." 
Psalms85:11 Pammasé sibawa atinulureng siruntu'i matu, adélékeng sibawa adaméngengngé sikaddao-kaddaowi matu." 
Psalms85:12 Atinulurenna tolinoé tuwoi matu polé ri linoé, sibawa adélékenna Allataala célléngngi polé ri langié." 
Psalms85:13 Puwangnge mabbéréyangngi iya makessingngé, na tanata mabbéréi matu wassélé." 
Psalms85:14 Adélékengngé poddiyoloiwi matu Puwangnge, sibawa passadiyai lalengngé untu' Aléna." 
Psalms86:1 Sempajanna Daud. Engkalingai sempajakku, oh Puwang, sibawa balika, saba' kasiyasika sibawa malemma." 
Psalms86:2 Jagaiwi atuwokku, saba' Muwamaséika, passalama'i atam-Mu iya mateppe'é lao ri Iko." 
Psalms86:3 Iko ritu Allataalaku, amaséika oh Puwang, saba' puppu essoka massempajang lao ri Iko." 
Psalms86:4 Puwang, pérennuiwi atinna atam-Mu, saba' lao ri Iko upattuju atikku." 
Psalms86:5 Makessikko, oh Puwang, sibawa mupoji maddampeng, tau iya massempajangngé lao ri Iko tette'i Muwamaséi sibawa pammasé iya maonaé." 
Psalms86:6 Jampangiwi sempajakku, oh Puwang, éngkalingai pangobbiku méllau pattulung." 
Psalms86:7 Ri wettu aperisengngé massempajakka lao ri Iko, saba' Mubalika." 
Psalms86:8 Oh Puwang, dé'gaga puwang pada-padam-Mu, dé'gaga pogau'i aga iya Mupogau'é." 
Psalms86:9 Sininna bangsa iya Mupancajiyé poléi matu, oh Puwang, untu' sompa-Ko sibawa pojiwi arajam-Mu." 
Psalms86:10 Saba' poré-Ko sibawa pogau'i sining anu makalallaingngé, banna Iko ritu Allataala." 
Psalms86:11 Appagguruwanni élo-Mu lao ri iyya, oh Puwang, kuwammengngi uwaccowériwi sibawa matinulu; pancajika mateppe sibawa ati mallébu." 
Psalms86:12 Sukkuru'ka lao ri Iko sibawa sukku atikku, oh Puwang Allataalaku; maéloka pojiwi abattowangem-Mu mannennungeng." 
Psalms86:13 Saba' tette'-Ko mamaséika sibawa pammasé iya battowaé; purani Mupaleppe nyawaku polé ri kalebbonna kuburu'é. 
Psalms86:14 Oh Allataala, tokkongngi tau matempoé gasaka, sigarembolang tau mabecco maélo mpunoka; dé' mennang napaduli-Ko." 
Psalms86:15 Iyakiya Iko, oh Puwang, Allataala mamasé sibawa pasayangngé, sabbara, penno pammasé sibawa matinulu." 
Psalms86:16 Jampangika sibawa amaséika, péwatangika sibawa passalama'ka, saba' pada-pada indo'ku, massompa tokka lao ri Iko." 
Psalms86:17 Wérékka tanrang akessingem-Mu, oh Puwang, kuwammengngi tau iya céccéékka namasiri, rékko naita-Ko mennang mattulung sibawa saléworika."

Psalms87:3 Engkalingai, éh kotana Allataala, gau'-gau' iya mappabengngaé Napowadai passalenna iko:" 
Psalms87:4 “Maséré sibawa Babél Uputtama'i matu ri laleng daftarna bangsa-bangsa iya mapatoé lao ri Iyya. Mala Filistéa, Tirus sibawa Sudan muttama'i ribilang pabbanuwana Yérusalém.”" 
Psalms87:5 Lao ri Sion makkedai matu tauwé, makkedaé sininna bangsaé muttama'ni wargana, sibawa Iya Pommatanré pakkasse'i matu." 
Psalms87:6 Naputtama'i matu Puwangnge bangsa-bangsaé ri laleng daftarna pabbanuwana Yérusalém. 
Psalms87:7 Séré-séréi matu mennang sibawa makkélong, “Sion iyanaritu onrong assalekku!”" 
Psalms88:1 Elong. Mazmurna appang Korah. Untu' pamimping kor. Situru lagunna: Mahalat Léanot. Elong pappagguruwanna Héman, tau Ezrahié." 
Psalms88:1 Elong. Mazmurna appang Korah. Untu' pamimping kor. Situru lagunna: Mahalat Léanot. Elong pappagguruwanna Héman, tau Ezrahié." 
Psalms88:2 Oh Puwang, Allataala iya passalama'ékka, ri essoé mangobbika lao ri Iko, ri wennié mangoloka ri Iko." 
Psalms88:3 Tennapodo sempajakku lettu'i ri Iko, éngkalingai pangobbiku." 
Psalms88:4 Nakennaka maéga asussang; engkani amaténgngé ri sumpangngé. 
Psalms88:5 Pada-padaka tau iya maéloé nonno ri kalebbong amaténgngé, tau iya acappurengngé awatangeng." 
Psalms88:6 Risalaika ri yelle'na tau maté, pada-pada tau riyunoé, léwu ri laleng kuburu'é, pada-pada tau iya Muwallupai sisengngénna, tau iya dé'énna Mutulungngi paimeng." 
Psalms88:7 Muwaggenrungekka ri kalebbong iya maliyungngé, ri kalebbong kuburu iya maliyungngé sibawa mapettangngé." 
Psalms88:8 Natenre'ka cai-Mu sibawa matane, ancuru'ka ritenre ri cai-Mu." 
Psalms88:9 Mupabélaiwi sining sissekku polé ri aléku, sibawa Muwébbuka mappakaciddi-ciddi lao ri mennang. Riurukka nadé'na wedding massu," 
Psalms88:10 mappido-pido matakku nasaba anrasa-rasang. Esso-essoka mangobbi lao ri Iko, Puwang, nenniya massempajang sibawa lima ritanréyang." 
Psalms88:11 Mébbu-Koga anu makalallaing untu' tau maté? Moto'ga mennang sibawa poji-Ko? 
Psalms88:12 Riyabbirittagga pammasé-Mu ri laleng kuburu'é, sibawa atinulurem-Mu ri onrong abinasangngé?" 
Psalms88:13 Engkaga missengngi anu makalallaim-Mu ri laleng pettangngé, iyaré'ga akessingem-Mu ri wanuwa onronna tau riyallupaiyé?" 
Psalms88:14 Iyakiya uwéllauwi pattulum-Mu, oh Puwang, tungke élé mappaénré'ka sempajang ri Iko." 
Psalms88:15 Oh Puwang, magi Musampéyakka? Magi Mupagilingngi rupam-Mu polé ri aléku?" 
Psalms88:16 Mappammulai baiccu'ku manrasa-rasaka sibawa naincé amaténg, posoka tanggungngi pahukkungem-Mu." 
Psalms88:17 Cai-Mu iya maseroé mancuru'ka; paggasa-Mu iya maseroé pabbinasaka. 
Psalms88:18 Puppu esso cai-Mu pada-padai lémpe'é mattulilingika, keppukka polé ri sininna sulapa'é." 
Psalms88:19 Sellao-sellaoku iya maréppé'é Mupabélaiwi polé ri aléku, pettangngé monro silaongekka." 
Psalms89:1 Elong pappagguruwanna Etan, tau Ezrahié." 
Psalms89:1 Elong pappagguruwanna Etan, tau Ezrahié." 
Psalms89:2 Paressé babuwa-Mu, Puwang, maélo upuwélong mannennungeng, atinulurem-Mu uwabbirittang matu massossoreng." 
Psalms89:3 Saba' uwisseng pammasé-Mu mannennungengngi, atinulurem-Mu mattinettoi pada-pada langié." 
Psalms89:4 Makkedako, “Purana mébbu assijancing sibawa tau ripilé-Ku; pura-Ka mattanro lao ri Daud, atak-Ku:" 
Psalms89:5 ‘Uwattahangengngi kadéra arajam-Mu untu' mannennungeng, massossorengngi natudangi matu ana' eppomu.’ ”" 
Psalms89:6 Addeppungeng surugaé pojiwi sining pangkaukem-Mu iya makalallaingngé, sibawa makkélongengngi atinulurem-Mu, Puwang." 
Psalms89:7 Ri langié dé' gaga pappadai-Ko, oh Puwang, dé' gaga mahlu' suruga iya pappadaiyék-Ko." 
Psalms89:8 Ripakalebbi-Ko ri yelle'na sining mapaccingngé, riyétauri lebbi naiya sininna ri mattulilim-Mu." 
Psalms89:9 Puwang, Allataala Iya Pommakuwasaé, nigana pada-pada watam-Mu? Matinuluko ri laleng sini-sininnaé oh Puwang." 
Psalms89:10 Mukuwasaiwi tasi iya mabbombangngé, sibawa pasoroi bombanna iya maseroé." 
Psalms89:11 Rahab, naga tasi'é, Mureppo'i sibawa Muwunoi, nasibawang lima mawatangngé Mucaui sining balim-Mu." 
Psalms89:12 Langi sibawa linoé iyanaritu appunnangem-Mu, linoé sibawa sininna lise'na winru-Mu." 
Psalms89:13 Iko ritu pancajiwi manorang sibawa yattang, Bulu Tabor sibawa Bulu Hérmon gora-gorai untu' alé-Mu." 
Psalms89:14 Temmaka battowana akuwasam-Mu, sibawa pékkugi serona awatangem-Mu!" 
Psalms89:15 Adélékengngé sibawa hukkungngé iyanaritu tettongenna akkarungem-Mu, pammasé sibawa atinuluremmu manessai ri laleng sininna tindakam-Mu." 
Psalms89:16 Masennangngi bangsa iya massompaé sibawa marennu, iya tuwoé ri laleng cahaya ahadérékem-Mu, Puwang." 
Psalms89:17 Puppu esso mariyo-riyo mennang sibawa tette masse, nasaba akessingemmu." 
Psalms89:18 Muwérékki apakalang iya makessing senna'é, nasaba akessingem-Mu ritu natapakala." 
Psalms89:19 Saba' pallinrutta iyanaritu tau Mupilé, oh Puwang; arutta iyanaritu appunnangenna Allataalana Israél Iya Mapaccingngé." 
Psalms89:20 Riyolo ri laleng séuwa pakkitang, makkeda-Ko lao ri atam-Mu iya matinulué, “Purani utulung séddié pabbarani, séddi tau iya Upilé polé ri ra'ya'é purani Upakatanré." 
Psalms89:21 Purani Ulolongeng Daud, atak-Ku, sibawa Ulanti sibawa minnya upacara." 
Psalms89:22 Awatangek-Ku tuli linrungiwi matu, akuwasak-Ku péwatangiwi matu." 
Psalms89:23 Dé' naricau matu ri balié, sibawa dé' naritenre ri tau majaé." 
Psalms89:24 Sininna balinna Upaccappui matu, Uwunoi niga-niga céccééngngi." 
Psalms89:25 Tette'ka matu mamaséiwi sibawa matinulu lao ri aléna, sibawa mébbui pédé makuwasa." 
Psalms89:26 Ulowangiwi matu akkarungenna, polé ri Tasi Tengngaé lettu ri Salo Efrat." 
Psalms89:27 Makkedai matu lao ri Iyya, ‘Iko ritu Ambo'ku, Allataalaku, pallinrukku sibawa pappassalama'ku.’" 
Psalms89:28 Upancajiwi matu ana' worowané-Ku macowaé, iya kaminang marajaé riyelle'na sininna arungngé." 
Psalms89:29 Tette'i matu Uwamaséi lettu mannennungeng, assijancik-Ku sibawa aléna tette'i masse." 
Psalms89:30 Kadéra akkarungenna Uwattahangengngi ri wettu engkana mupa langié ri yasé'na linoé, massossorengngi natudangi matu ana' eppona." 
Psalms89:31 Iyakiya rékko wija-wijanna najjalékkaiwi hukkuk-Ku, sibawa dé' natuwo situru parénta-Ku," 
Psalms89:32 rékko mennang dé' nabati-batiwi Upattette'é sibawa dé' najampangiwi peraturak-Ku," 
Psalms89:33 Uhukkungngi mennang sibawa cambu nasaba pelanggaranna, sibawa Upateppai abalaé nasaba dosa-dosana." 
Psalms89:34 Iyakiya tette'-Ka matu mamaséiwi Daud, sibawa dé' matu Uwassakkarengngi atinulurek-Ku." 
Psalms89:35 Assijancik-Ku sibawa aléna dé' matu tek-Kupajajiwi, polé ri jancik-Ku dé' muwi séddi Ugetteng paimeng." 
Psalms89:36 Siseng untu' mannennungeng mattanro-Ka nasaba asek-Ku iya mapaccingngé; dé' matu Uwabbellé lao ri Daud. 
Psalms89:37 Mattahangngi matu kadéra akkarungenna ri wettu engkana mupa mata esso, massossorengngi ana' eppona tudangiwi matu." 
Psalms89:38 Akkarungenna tette'i engka pada-pada kétengngé, sabbi matinulué ri ellungngé.”" 
Psalms89:39 Iyakiya makkekkuwangngé macai-Ko lao ri arungngé, Muwabbéyangngi sibawa sampéyangngi tau Mupilé." 
Psalms89:40 Dé' Mupajajiwi assijancim-Mu sibawa atam-Mu, Muwaggenrungengngi passigera'na ri laleng bungkaé." 
Psalms89:41 Muruttungngi témbo'-témbo' kotana, sining bénténna Mupancajiwi ruttungeng." 
Psalms89:42 Sininna tau iya laloé narampasa'i appunnangenna, mancajiwi akkéllékéllékeng lao ri balibolana." 
Psalms89:43 Muwéréngngi apakalang risining balinna, sibawa mébbui sininna balinna marennu." 
Psalms89:44 Mala senjatana Mupancajiwi dé' nakkéguna, dé' Mutulungngi ri laleng musué." 
Psalms89:45 Mupaccappa'i akuwasanna iya malebbié, kadéra akkarungenna Muwaggeppuwangngi ri tanaé." 
Psalms89:46 Muponcokiwi wettu malolona, enrengngé tongkoi sibawa siri." 
Psalms89:47 Gangka kégi-Ko massubbu, oh Puwang? Gangka kégi cai-Mu malluwa pada-pada apié?" 
Psalms89:48 Engngerakka temmaka ponco'na atuwokkué, Mupancajiwi tolinoé selaku mahlu' dé'é namannennungeng." 
Psalms89:49 Nigana mulléi tuwo matteru sibawa dé' namaté? Nigana mulléi leppe polé ri kuburu'é? 
Psalms89:50 Oh Puwang, kégani tanrang pammasé-Mu iya mammulangngé, iya Muwajjanciyangngé lao ri Daud nasaba atinulurem-Mu?" 
Psalms89:51 Engngerangngi oh Puwang, pékkugi atam-Mué ricella, utanggungngi pappakatunana maéga bangsa." 
Psalms89:52 Sining balim-Mu napakatunai arung Mupilé, oh Puwang, méllé-kéllé'i kégi-kégi lao." 
Psalms89:53 Pojiwi Puwangnge untu' mannennungeng. Jajini makkuwaro! Aming! 
Psalms90:1 Sempajanna Musa, atanna Allataala. Oh Puwang, Iko ritu onrotta mallinrung massossoreng." 
Psalms90:2 Ri wettu dé'napa naripancaji sining bulué, ri wettu dé'napa Mutappai linoé, Iko ritu Allataala iya mannennungengngé, dé' pammulanna sibawa dé' paccappurenna." 
Psalms90:3 Musuroi tolinoé lisu ri assalenna, mancaji awu pada-pada pammulanna." 
Psalms90:4 Untu' alému sisebbu taung padai siessoé, esso iwenni iya labe'énna; pada-pada léléng jagangngé ri wennié." 
Psalms90:5 Muwalirekki; pada-padaki nippié, pada-pada wella iya cura'é;" 
Psalms90:6 ri éléé tuwoi sibawa mabbunga, iyakiya makelle'i ri arawéngngé." 
Psalms90:7 Tassélekki nasaba cai-Mu, sibawa cappu binasa nasaba cai-Mu." 
Psalms90:8 Mutaroi asalatta ri yolo-Mu, dosata iya tassubbué Muwitai." 
Psalms90:9 Maponco'i atuwotta nasaba cai-Mu, cappui taut-tautta pada-pada seppung nappase'é." 
Psalms90:10 Wettu atuwotta banna pituppulo taung, rékko mawatakki, aruwa pulona taung. Iyakiya banna asukkarakeng sibawa anrasa-rasang iya talolongengngé; purana atuwong iya maponco'é, lennye'ni." 
Psalms90:11 Nigana missengngi aseronna cai-Mu, iyaré'ga maingekiwi matu addimonrinna cai-Mu?" 
Psalms90:12 Pamaingekiki matu ponco'na atuwottaé kuwammengngi tamancaji tau iya engkaé akkalenna. 
Psalms90:13 Oh Puwang, gangka kégi-Ko macai? Lisuno sibawa amaséiwi ata-atam-Mu." 
Psalms90:14 Patabbolloi pammasé-Mu lao ri idi tungke élé, kuwammengngi tamarennu sibawa makkélong gangka tuwota." 
Psalms90:15 Wérékki asennangeng sittimbang sibawa anrasa-rasangngé iya ritanggungngé ri laleng taut-taung anrasa-rasangngé. 
Psalms90:16 Ajjellokengngi winru-Mu lao ri ata-atam-Mu, sibawa akuwasam-Mu iya battowaé lao ri wijatta." 
Psalms90:17 Oh Puwang Allataalata, barakkakiki, kuwammengngi nasininna jama-jamatta mawwassélé'i." 
Psalms91:1 Tau iya mallinrungngé ri Iya Pommatanré, sibawa monro ri laleng accinaungenna Iya Pommakuwasaé," 
Psalms91:2 wedding makkeda lao ri Puwangnge, “Iko ritu pangéwaingekku sibawa pallinrukku, Allataalaku, ri alé-Mu ritu mateppe'ka.”" 
Psalms91:3 Napaleppe'ko matu polé ri abala tassubbué, sibawa polé ri lasa tiwié amaténg." 
Psalms91:4 Nacinaungiko matu sibawa panni-Na, angkammu amang ri laleng accinaungen-Na; atinuluren-Na padai kaliyawo iya linrungiyékko." 
Psalms91:5 Dé' naparelluko métau lao ri bahayaé ri wennié, iyaré'ga paggasa tennasenna-sennaé ri essoé;" 
Psalms91:6 lao ri abala iya polé ri wettu mapettangngé, iyaré'ga ancurukeng iya pageppaé ri tangassoé." 
Psalms91:7 Muwi sisebbu tau maté ri seddému, sibawa seppulo sebbu ri seddé ataummu, iyakiya alému dé' namalo matu." 
Psalms91:8 Rékko makkitako ri mattulilimmu, muwitai tau majaé nakenna pamale." 
Psalms91:9 Saba' mupancajiwi Puwangnge pangéwaimmu, Iya Pommatanré mupancaji pallinrummu." 
Psalms91:10 Nadé' nakennako matu abala, bolamu dé' matu nakennai abala." 
Psalms91:11 Allataala suroi malaéka'-Na jagaiko, untu' linrungiko kégi-kégiko lao." 
Psalms91:12 Naakkako matu ri pale' liman-Na, kuwammengngi aja' natabbuttu ajému ri batué." 
Psalms91:13 Muwajjalékkaiwi matu ulaé sibawa singaé, muléjja'i singa loloé sibawa ula mamosoé." 
Psalms91:14 Adanna Puwangnge, “Tau iya pojiyékko Upassalama'i matu, iya mangakuiyék-Ka Ulinrungiwi matu." 
Psalms91:15 Rékko mangobbii lao ri Iyya, Ubaliwi matu. Ri wettu aperisengngé, Utulungngi matu; Upaleppe'i matu sibawa Uwéréng alebbireng." 
Psalms91:16 Upésennangiwi matu sibawa umuru malampé, sibawa Upassamala'i.”" 
Psalms92:1 Elong untu' esso Saba'é. 
Psalms92:2 Makessing tongeng sukkuru lao ri alé-Mu, oh Puwang, sibawa poji-Ko, Allataala Iya Pommatanré;" 
Psalms92:3 mabbirittangngi pammasé-Mu ri éléé, sibawa atinulure-Mu ri wennié," 
Psalms92:4 nanagetti towi gitar seppuloé tuluna, naccowéri gambusu sibawa kacapi." 
Psalms92:5 Saba' pangkaukem-Mu pésennangiwi atikku, makkélokka marennu nasaba winru-Mu." 
Psalms92:6 Temmaka loppona sining pangkaukem-Mu, oh Puwang, temmaka lamunna nawa-nawam-Mu!" 
Psalms92:7 Dé' naulléi majeppuiwi tau madonggoé, dé' nawedding napahang tau madongo'é." 
Psalms92:8 Weddissa jaji tau madorakaé tuwo macommo pada wellaé, sibawa tau majaé tattamba sugi sibawa madécéng; iyakiya ripaccappu sisengngi matu mennang," 
Psalms92:9 saba' Iko, Puwang, makuwasa mannennungeng." 
Psalms92:10 Taissengngi ripaccappui matu balim-Mu, oh Puwang, sininna tau majaé ripassara-sarangngi matu." 
Psalms92:11 Muwébbuka pada watanna banténg liyaé, nenniya barakkakika sibawa asennangeng." 
Psalms92:12 Uwitai akalanna sining balikku, sining tau iya tokkongngénna méwaka, uwéngkalingani rancana-rancana majana mennang." 
Psalms92:13 Tau malempué cura'i pada-pada pong karomaé, sibawa tuwo macommo pada-pada pong camaraé ri Libanon." 
Psalms92:14 Padai mennang aju iya ritanengngé ri Bolana Puwangnge, sibawa mabbija ri Bolana Allataalata," 
Psalms92:15 aju iya mabbuwaé mupa ri wettu macowana, tette'i manyila matakka." 
Psalms92:16 Iyanaro buttinna makkedaé adélé'i Puwangnge; aléna pangéwaingek-Ku, dé'gaga acéko-cékong ri Aléna." 
Psalms93:1 Puwangnge iyanaritu Arung; mappaké arajangngi sibawa awatangeng. Tettong masse'i linoé dé' naulléi kédo. 
Psalms93:2 Ri pammulanna mupa namasse kadéra akkarungem-Mu, engka-Ko polé ri mannennung." 
Psalms93:3 Napakatanréi saddanna bori tasi'é, oh Puwang, napakatanréi memmu'na bombang dolangengngé." 
Psalms93:4 Iyakiya Puwang iya makuwasaé ri surugaé, lebbi maseroi naiya bombanna dolangengngé, lebbi mawatangngi naiya ajjallo'na bombangngé." 
Psalms93:5 Puwang, mannennungengngi hukkum-Mu, mapaccingngi Bola-Mu sillampé wettué." 
Psalms94:1 Oh Allataala, Iko ritu Allataala iya makkabale'é, ajjellokenni pakkabale'-Mu, oh Puwang." 
Psalms94:2 Tokkonni, oh Hakinna sininna linoé, hukkungngi tau matempoé situru pangkaukenna mennang." 
Psalms94:3 Oh Puwang, gangka kégi tau majaé marennu? Gangka kégi, oh Puwang?" 
Psalms94:4 Passui mennang ada-ada iya makassara'é, sibawa mattempowangngi jana mennang." 
Psalms94:5 Natenre'i mennang umma'-Mu, oh Puwang, sibawa reppo'i sining tau Mupilé." 
Psalms94:6 Naunoi mennang jandaé sibawa ana' béué enrengngé tau laing iya monroé ri wanuwaéwé. 
Psalms94:7 Adanna mennang, “Dé' narita ri Puwangnge, dé' narijampangi ri Allataalana Yakub.”" 
Psalms94:8 Eh bangsa, aja' mumadonggo makkuwaro, agguruno pakéi akkalemmu!" 
Psalms94:9 Allataala mébbui daucculingngé, dé'ga Namaréngkalinga? Aléna mébbu mata, dé'ga Namakkita?" 
Psalms94:10 Aléna paggurui bangsa-bangsaé, dé'ga Napahukkung? Aléna mancaji gurunna sininna tauwé, dé'ga Nappunnai pangissengeng?" 
Psalms94:11 Nawellungi Puwangnge pikkiranna tolinoé, naisseng manengngi siya-siyai simata." 
Psalms94:12 Masennangngi tau iya Mupaggurué, oh Puwang, tau iya Mupaggurué hukkung-hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms94:13 Mupattennangngi ri esso-esso abalaé, angkanna rikali kalebbongngé untu' tikkengngi tau majaé." 
Psalms94:14 Saba' dé' nasalaiwi Puwangnge umma'-Na; dé' najampaléllériwi matu appunnangeng mana-Na. 
Psalms94:15 Naripatettong matu paimeng hukkungngé ri pengadilangngé, sininna tau malempué nasokongngi matu." 
Psalms94:16 Niga méwaika lao ri tau madorakaé? Niga maccowérika méwai tau iya pogau'éngngi majaé? 
Psalms94:17 Ebara'na Puwangnge dé' natulukka, céddé'ka lélé ri linona tau maté." 
Psalms94:18 Wettukku mappikkiri makkedaé sempé'ka matu, pammasé-Mu, Puwang, mébbuka tettong masse." 
Psalms94:19 Rékko manennengngi atikku sibawa mausé, massaléwoko sibawa pasennangika." 
Psalms94:20 Dé' musiyempe sibawa haking-haking majaé, iya rancangngéngngi jaé situru hukkungngé." 
Psalms94:21 Sikongkolo'i mennang méwai tau malempué, sibawa hukkung matéi tau iya dé'é napasala." 
Psalms94:22 Iyakiya Puwangnge iyanaritu pangéwaingekku, Allataalaku mancaji pallinrukku." 
Psalms94:23 Nahukkungngi tau majaé situru jana, sibawa mammekkoi mennang nasaba dosana. Puwang Allataalata pammekkoi matu mennang." 
Psalms95:1 Laono mai tamakkélong untu' Puwangnge, gora-gora untu' pappassalama'ta!" 
Psalms95:2 Laono mai tamangolo ri Aléna sibawa élong sukkuru, gora-gora untu' Aléna sibawa élong pappojiyang." 
Psalms95:3 Saba' Puwangnge iyanaritu Allataala iya marajaé. Arung poré iya cauéngngi sininna déwataé. 
Psalms95:4 Nakuwasaiwi bagiyab-bagiyang kaminang maliyung polé ri linoé, muwi coppo-coppo bulué appunnangennato." 
Psalms95:5 Nakuwasaiwi tasi'é, saba' Aléna mébbuéi, muwi pottanangngé ébbu liman-Nato." 
Psalms95:6 Laono mai tasuju' sompai Aléna, makkaluttu ri yolona Puwangnge, pappancajitta." 
Psalms95:7 Saba' Aléna Allataalata, idi umma iya Napiyaraé, pada-pada bimbala Naampié. Iyaé essoé éngkalingai saddan-Na:" 
Psalms95:8 “Aja' tamatedde ati pada-pada toriyolomu ri Mériba, pada-pada wettunna mennang ri Masa, ri padang kessi'é." 
Psalms95:9 Kuwaniro mennang cobai-Ka, namuni purani naita pangkaukek-Ku." 
Psalms95:10 Patappulo taung ittana maja péneddik-Ku mitai mennang; adak-Ku: Tongeng, iyaro bangsaé dé' namatinulu! Dé' mennang najampangiwi parénta-parénta-Ku." 
Psalms95:11 Namattanro-Ka ri laleng cai-Ku, dé' mennang nauttama matu ri wanuwaéro untu' lolongeng appésaungeng silaong Iyya.”" 
Psalms96:1 Puwélonno élong baru untu' Puwangnge! Akkélonno untu' Puwangnge, éh sininna linoé!" 
Psalms96:2 Akkélonno untu' Puwangnge sibawa pojiwi Aléna; abbirittanni esso-esso karéba marennué makkedaé puraki napassalama. 
Psalms96:3 Curitai arajan-Na lao ri bangsa-bangsaé, sibawa sining pangkauken-Na iya poré lao ri rupa tauwé." 
Psalms96:4 Saba' battowai Puwangnge, sibawa ripoji senna, harusu'i riyétauri lebbi naiya seninna déwataé." 
Psalms96:5 Déwata-déwatana bangsa laingngé banna dato'-dato' barahala, iyakiya Puwangnge iyanaritu pancajiwi bitara malowangngé." 
Psalms96:6 Risalipuriwi ri arajan-Na sibawa alebbiren-Na, Bola-Na pennoi akuwasang sibawa agelloreng." 
Psalms96:7 Pojiwi Puwangnge, éh rupa tauwé, pojiwi arajan-Na sibawa awatangen-Na!" 
Psalms96:8 Pojiwi asen-Na iya malebbié, sibawa tiwino akkarobangeng ri laleng Bola-Na." 
Psalms96:9 Sompai Puwangnge sibawa mappaké pakéyang assompang! Ténréno ri yolo-Na, éh sininna linoé!" 
Psalms96:10 Abbirittangngi lao ri bangsa-bangsaé, “ Puwangnge ritu Arung! Masse'i linoé tenrigoyang; Naadélékiwi matu bangsa-bangsaé sibawa adélé.”" 
Psalms96:11 Akkérennuno, éh langi sibawa linoé! Memmu'no éh tasi sibawa sininna lise'na!" 
Psalms96:12 Ariyo-riyono, éh dato'-dato' sibawa sininna tanet-tanenna! Ajukajung ri ale'é gora-gorai matu." 
Psalms96:13 Saba' poléi Puwangnge mapparénta ri linoé, Naadélékiwi matu bangsa-bangsaé sibawa adélé nenniya malempu." 
Psalms97:1 Puwangnge iyanaritu Arung! Sitinajai marennu linoé, sibawa pulo-puloé mariyo-riyo." 
Psalms97:2 Riyattulilingiwi ellung sibawa pettang; adélékengngé sibawa hukkungngé iyanaritu tettongenna apparéntan-Na. 
Psalms97:3 Makkalolo apié ri yolo-Na, mangurengngi balié ri mattulilin-Na." 
Psalms97:4 Billa'na tajangiwi linoé, ténré linoé mitai." 
Psalms97:5 Maccolo sining bulué pada-pada lilingngé ri yolona Puwangnge, ri yolona Puwangnge, makuwasaéngngi sininna linoé." 
Psalms97:6 Nabbirittangngi langié adéléken-Na, sibawa sininna bangsaé mitai alebbiren-Na." 
Psalms97:7 Sininna tau iya sompaéngngi barahalaé ripakasirii matu, iya mabbangkakengngéngngi barab-barang dé'é nakkéguna; sinininna déwataé suju'i matu ri yolona Puwangnge." 
Psalms97:8 Masennangngi pabbanuwana Sion sibawa kota-kotana Yéhuda wettunna naéngkalinga apettunna Puwangnge. 
Psalms97:9 Saba' Iko, oh Puwang, panguwasana sininna linoé; maraja-Ko nacau sininna déwataé." 
Psalms97:10 Eh iko iya pojiyéngngi Puwangnge, céccéi jaé! Saba' Puwangnge linrungiwi atuwonna umma'-Na, Napaleppe'i mennang polé ri akuwasan-Na tau madorakaé." 
Psalms97:11 Momponi tajangngé untu' tau iya malempué atinna, sibawa ariyo-riyong untu' tau iya malempué." 
Psalms97:12 Akkérennuno, éh sining tau iya malempu atié nasaba aga iya puraé napogau' Puwangnge, sibawa sukkuru'no lao ri Allataala iya mapaccingngé." 
Psalms98:1 Mazmur. Elongengngi élong baru Puwangnge, nasaba sining pangkaukenna iya mappabengngaé! Nasibawang akuwasang sibawa awatangenna muto purani lolongeng apakalang." 
Psalms98:2 Puwangnge mabbirittangngi apakalan-Na; Napannessai adéléken-Na lao ri bangsa-bangsaé. 
Psalms98:3 Naéngngerangngi pammasé sibawa atinuluren-Na lao ri Israélié, umma'-Na. Sininna bangsaé ri sininna linoé purani naita apakalanna Allataala." 
Psalms98:4 Gora-gorano untu' Puwangnge, éh sininna linoé! Pojiwi Puwangnge sibawa élong nenniya gora-gora marennu." 
Psalms98:5 Puwélonno pappojiyang untu' Puwangnge, sibawa maggetti kacapi." 
Psalms98:6 Seppunni tarompé'é sibawa sangkakalaé, gora-gorano untu' Puwangnge, Arutta." 
Psalms98:7 Memmu'no éh tasi sibawa sininna lise'na linoé sibawa sininna iya monroiyéngngi. 
Psalms98:8 Leppessangngi sining saloé mappaleppa, sibawa sining bulu-bulué gora-gora ri yolona Puwangnge." 
Psalms98:9 Saba' poléi untu' madélékiwi linoé; Naadélékiwi matu bangsa-bangsaé sibawa adélé enrengngé tongeng. 
Psalms99:1 Puwangnge iyanaritu Arung; ténréi bangsa-bangsaé. Makkarungngi ri yasé'na kérub-é, taggottang linoé." 
Psalms99:2 Makuwasa senna'i Puwangnge ri Sion; marajai ri yasé'na sininna bangsaé. 
Psalms99:3 Leppessanni mennang pojiwi asen-Na iya malempué namalebbi. Mapaccingngi Aléna! 
Psalms99:4 Untu' alé-Mu akuwasangngé, Arung iya pojiyéngngi hukkungngé; purani Mupatettong atongengengngé; Mupajoppai hukkungngé sibawa adélékengngé ri Israél." 
Psalms99:5 Pakalebbii Puwang Allataalata, suju'no ri yolona kadéra arajan-Na, Mapaccingngi Aléna!" 
Psalms99:6 Musa sibawa Harun muttama'ni imang-ngiman-Na, Samuél sala séddinna iya massempajangngé ri Aléna. Mangobbii mennang lao ri Puwangnge, sibawa mabbéréi pappébali." 
Psalms99:7 Polé ri alliri ellungngé mabbicarai lao ri mennang, mapatoi mennang lao ri sininna hukkun-Na sibawa parénta-Na." 
Psalms99:8 Oh Puwang Allataalata, Mubaliwi umma'-Mu; untu' mennang Iko Allataala iya pojiyéngngi maddampeng, namuni Muhukkungngi mennang nasaba asalanna." 
Psalms99:9 Pakalebbii Puwang Allataalata, sibawa sompai Aléna ri Bulu-buluna iya mapaccingngé, saba' mapaccingngi Puwang Allataalata." 
Psalms100:1 Mazmur untu' akkarobangeng sukkuru. Gora-gorano untu' Puwangnge, éh sininna linoé!" 
Psalms100:2 Assompano lao ri Puwangnge sibawa marennu, poléno ri yolona sibawa élok-kélong marennu!" 
Psalms100:3 Engngerangngi makkedaé Puwangnge ritu Allataala. Aléna pancajiki sibawa appunnangenna-Ki; idi umma'-Na, bangsa iya napiyaraé." 
Psalms100:4 Uttama'no lalo ri gerban-Na sibawa élong sukkuru, ri laleng seddé bola-Na sibawa pappoji-pojiyang. Sukkuru'no lao ri Aléna sibawa pojiwi Aléna!" 
Psalms100:5 Saba' makessingngi Puwangnge; pammasé-Na untu' mannennungengngi, sibawa atinuluren-Na massossorengngi." 
Psalms101:1 Mazmurna Daud. Maéloka makkélong passalenna atinulurengngé sibawa adélékengngé, untu' alé-Mu, oh Puwang, élong pappojiyakku!" 
Psalms101:2 Maéloka puriatiwi atuwo-tuwong iya dé'é cellana. Uppanna polé-Ko ri iyya? Maéloka tuwo mapaccing ri bolaku," 
Psalms101:3 dé' matu uleppessangngi jaé. Ucéccé pangkaukenna tau massakkaé, sibawa dé' umaélo makkéurusang sibawa mennang." 
Psalms101:4 Dé' umaélo kédo macéko-céko sibawa dé' umaccowé ri laleng jaé. 
Psalms101:5 Tau mappétenna'é sibawa mammekko-mekko upabbinasai matu. Tau matempoé sibawa matanré atié dé' matu uleppessangngi. 
Psalms101:6 Upoji tau iya matinulué lao ri Allataala; weddingngi mennang monro ri bolaku. Tau iya tuwoé temmakkécella wedding tumanika. 
Psalms101:7 Topabbengnguwangngé dé' nawedding monro ri bolaku; pabbelléngngé dé' matu natahang ri yoloku. 
Psalms101:8 Polé ri essoé lao ri essoé maéloka paccappui sining tau majaé ri wanuwaéwé. Sininna tau iya pogau'é ja upallennye'i matu ri Kotana Puwangnge. 
Psalms102:1 Sempajanna tau manrasa-rasaé iya engkaé ri laleng keadaang malemmaé maddarékéi lao ri Puwangnge. 
Psalms102:2 Oh Puwang, éngkalingai sempajakku, leppessanni pangobbiku lettu ri iko." 
Psalms102:3 Aja' tagiling polé ri iyya rékko ri laleng asussakka. Engkalingai rékko mangobbika, sibawa balika masitta." 
Psalms102:4 Teddengngi atuwokku pada-pada rumpué; mabbara buku-bukukku pada-pada apié. 
Psalms102:5 Malemmaka pada-pada wella rakkoé, sibawa ateddéngeng napessu manré." 
Psalms102:6 Maddarékéka sibawa macenno; watakkaléku oli mani nadoko buku. 
Psalms102:7 Pada-padaka manu'-manu' undangngé ri padang kessi'é, pada-pada kacoci'é ri bola taja masino-sinoé." 
Psalms102:8 Dé' naweddikka matinro, pada-pada manu'-manu' masino-sinoé ri pabbingeng bolaé." 
Psalms102:9 Puppu esso napakatunaka balié; napancaji tanroi asekku tau iya macaié lao ri iyya. 
Psalms102:10 Manréka awu pada-pada rotié, énungekku sicampuru'i uwai mata," 
Psalms102:11 saba' purani Muwakkaka sibawa maggenrungekka ri laleng cai-Mu iya malluwa'-luwa'é. 
Psalms102:12 Labe'i atuwokku pada-pada wajo-wajoé ri arawéngngé; makelle'ka pada-pada wellaé. 
Psalms102:13 Iyakiya Iko, oh Puwang, Arung untu' mannennungeng, tette'i riyéngngerang massossoreng." 
Psalms102:14 Tokkok-Ko matu sibawa mamaséiwi Sion, narapini wettunna untu' mamasé lao ri aléna." 
Psalms102:15 Saba' ata-atam-Mu napojiwi, namuni mancajini ruttungeng. Marasa kasiyangngi mennang lao ri aléna, namuni mancaji awuni." 
Psalms102:16 Naétauriwi matu bangsa-bangsaé akuwasanna Puwangnge; sibawa arajan-Na naétauri sininna arungngé," 
Psalms102:17 rékko napatettongngi Puwangnge Sion paimeng, sibawa malluru ri laleng arajan-Na." 
Psalms102:18 Naéngkalingai matu sempajanna umma'-Na iya kasiyasié, sibawa dé' nasampéyangngi paréllaunna mennang." 
Psalms102:19 Okii sininna pangkaukenna Puwangnge untu' abbatireng iya mangoloé, kuwammengngi bangsa iya dé'éppa narijajiyang naulléi pojiwi Aléna." 
Psalms102:20 Makkitai Puwangnge polé ri onron-Na iya matanré, polé ri surugaé makkitai lao ri linoé" 
Psalms102:21 untu' méngkalingai addarékénna tau ritahangngé sibawa paleppe'i tau iya rihukkung maté. 
Psalms102:22 Nariyabbirittang asen-Na ri Sion, Naripoji-pojiwi matu ri Yérusalém," 
Psalms102:23 wettunna maddeppungeng bangsa-bangsaé sibawa sining akkarungengngé untu' massompa lao ri Puwangnge. 
Psalms102:24 Napoloi Puwangnge awatangekku ri wettu malolo-Ku mupa, sibawa naponcokiwi umuru'ku." 
Psalms102:25 Nainappa makkedaka, “Oh Allataala aja' talai nyawaku ri pattengngang atuwokku.” Puwang, tuwo-Ko mannennungeng,"
