Psalms102:26 riyolo Mupancajiwi linoé; muwi langié winru limam-Muto. 
Psalms102:27 Iya manennaro lennye'i matu, iyakiya Iko tette'i engka; iya manennaro malaungngi matu pada-pada pakéyangngé. Muwabbéyangngi matu pada-pada waju cowaé, naancuru maneng matu." 
Psalms102:28 Iyakiya Iko tette'ko pada, dé' naccappa matu atuwom-Mu." 
Psalms102:29 Tuwoi matu ana' eppota sibawa tennang, sibawa tuli amang ri laleng allinrungem-Mu." 
Psalms103:1 Polé ri Daud. Pojiwi Puwangnge, éh nyawaku, sininna batékku, pojiwi asen-Na iya mapaccingngé." 
Psalms103:2 Pojiwi Puwangnge, éh nyawaku, aja' muwallupaiwi sininna akessingen-Na!" 
Psalms103:3 Aléna iya maddampengengngéngngi sininna dosamu, iya pajjappaéngngi sininna lasamu." 
Psalms103:4 Aléna iya paleppe'éngngi nyawamu polé ri kuburu'é, iya bolloiyékko sibawa pammasé nenniya paressé babuwa." 
Psalms103:5 Aléna iya sennangiyéngngi atuwommu sibawa iya makessingngé, angkanna tette'ko malolo pada-pada kuwajangngé." 
Psalms103:6 Puwangnge pajoppai hukkungngé sibawa adélékengngé untu' sininna tau iya ritenre'é. 
Psalms103:7 Napannessai rancana-Na lao ri Musa sibawa sining pangkauken-Na lao ri bangsa Israélié. 
Psalms103:8 Saba' mamaséi Puwangnge sibawa makacuwai, malampé sabbara'i sibawa tabbolloi pammasé-Na." 
Psalms103:9 Dé' namatteru-teru maggera', sibawa dé' namacai untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms103:10 Dé' nahukkukki situru dosata, iyaré'ga nawale'ki situru asalatta." 
Psalms103:11 Iyakiya sittanré langié polé ri linoé, silloppo iyaro pammasé-Na untu' tau mateppe'é." 
Psalms103:12 Sibbéla alau polé ri yajang, sibbéla iyaro Nabbéyangngi dosa-dosata." 
Psalms103:13 Pada-pada séddié ambo' mamaséiwi ana'-ana'na, makkuwaniro Puwangnge mamaséiwi tau iya mateppe'é." 
Psalms103:14 Saba' naisseng Puwangnge riyébbuki polé ri agaé, Naéngngerakki banna awumi." 
Psalms103:15 Atuwonna tolinoé maponco'mi pada wellaé; tabbakkai pada-pada bungaé ri dare'é; 
Psalms103:16 rékko nairii anging, lennye'ni, mala onronna dé'na nirissenna paimeng." 
Psalms103:17 Iyakiya Puwangnge tette'i namaséi tau mateppe'é, akessingen-Na matterui massossoreng" 
Psalms103:18 lao ri tau iya makkatenningngé ri assijancin-Na, sibawa matinulué pogau'i parénta-Na." 
Psalms103:19 Mapparéntai Puwangnge ri surugaé, Aléna arung iya makuwasaé ri yasé'na sini-sininnaé." 
Psalms103:20 Pojiwi Puwangnge, éh sining malaéka'-Na iya poré, iya méngkalingaéngngi sibawa pogau'i parénta-Na." 
Psalms103:21 Pojiwi Puwangnge, éh sininna mahlu'é ri surugaé, sininna atan-Na iya pogau'éngngi élo-Na." 
Psalms103:22 Pojiwi Puwangnge, éh sininna ripancajiyé ri sininna daéra akuwasan-Na. Pojiwi Puwangnge, éh nyawaku!" 
Psalms104:1 Pojiwi Puwangnge, éh nyawaku! Temmaka raja-Mu, oh Puwang Allataaku! Mappakéko agelloreng sibawa alebbireng," 
Psalms104:2 sibawa tassampo cahaya. Mupallebba'i langié pada-pada kémaé," 
Psalms104:3 sibawa patettongngi bolamu ri tompo'na uwai ri langié. Ellungngé Mupancaji karéta-Mu, Mutonangiwi pannina angingngé." 
Psalms104:4 Angingngé Mupancaji suro-Mu, sibawa billa'é pattumanim-Mu." 
Psalms104:5 Masse'i linoé mupasang ri pallanggana, angkanna dé' nakédo untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms104:6 Musampoi sibawa dolangeng malowangngé, uwaina nalle'i coppo-coppo bulué." 
Psalms104:7 Wettunna Mugera', massolo'i iyaro uwai, massolo'i sibawa masolo' nasaba memmu'i saddam-Mu." 
Psalms104:8 Massolo'i naolai sining bulué lao ri laleng lompo'é, lao ri onrong iya Mupassadiyangengngéngngi." 
Psalms104:9 Mupattentungengngi sining pakkaséséng iya dé'é nawedding naola, kuwammengngi aja' nalisu malle'i linoé." 
Psalms104:10 Mupacumpai mata uwai risining lompo'é, massolo'i ana' saloé ri yelle'na sining bulu-bulué," 
Psalms104:11 untu' painungngi sininna olokolo'é ri dare'é, sibawa passauwi dekkana sining kaleddé ale'é." 
Psalms104:12 Ri seddéna mébbui sarang manu'-manu'é; moniwi mennang ri yelle'na daud-daungngé. 
Psalms104:13 Mupateppai bosié ri bulué polé ri langié, pennoi linoé sibawa wassélé ébbu-Mu." 
Psalms104:14 Mupatuwoi wellaé untu' olokolo'é, sibawa untu' tolinoé sakke rupa tanet-taneng. Naweddingngi mallaonruma," 
Psalms104:15 sibawa powassélé uwai anggoro iya pasennangiyé. Makkuwatoro minnya zaitun iya mébbuéngngi rupanna maccahaya, sibawa inanré iya mpéréngngéngngi awatangeng." 
Psalms104:16 Ajukajunna Puwangnge lolongengngi bosi maona aju camara Libanon iya Alénaé tanengngi. 
Psalms104:17 Kuwaro massaranni manu'-manu'é, massarangngi coko'é ri coppo'na." 
Psalms104:18 Sining bulu matanré mancajiwi onronna bémbé ale'é; palando'é massubbui ri batu karangngé. 
Psalms104:19 Muwébbui kétengngé mancaji pattanrang wettu, naisseng mata essoé wettu labuna." 
Psalms104:20 Rékko Mupateppai pettangngé, mancaji wennini essoé, namallamparenna sininna olokolo ale'é." 
Psalms104:21 Mangngaungngi singa-singa loloé sappa inanré, méllau inanré iya napassadiyaé Allataala." 
Psalms104:22 Rékko mompoi mata essoé, massalai mennang sibawa léwu ri onrong assubbuwanna." 
Psalms104:23 Nainappa massu tolinoé untu' jamai jamanna, sibawa matteru mappallaung narapi arawéng." 
Psalms104:24 Temmaka égana winru-Mu, Puwang, iya manenna Mupancajiwi sibawa mapanré; pennoi linoé sibawa iya Mupancajiyé." 
Psalms104:25 Itai tasi'é iya malowangngé mallebbang, silaong mahlu' baiccu battowaé tenribilang." 
Psalms104:26 Kuwaniro sompe sining kappala'é, sibawa Léwiatan, naga tasi Mupancajiyé, macculé-culé." 
Psalms104:27 Iya manenna mennang mamménasai-Ko, untu' lolongeng inanré ri wettunna." 
Psalms104:28 Mabbéré-Ko, na mennang paddeppungengngi, Mupassadiyai, na mennang manréi gangka cau." 
Psalms104:29 Rékko gilik-Ko, métaui mennang; rékko Muwalai nappase'na, cappuni mennang, sibawa lisu mancaji awu pada-pada pammulanna." 
Psalms104:30 Iyakiya rékko Muwéréngngi mennang nappase, ripancajiwi mennang; Muwéréngngi atuwong mabaru linoé." 
Psalms104:31 Tennapodo arajan-Na Puwangnge tette'i mannennungeng! Tennapodo marennui sibawa sininna Napancajiyé! 
Psalms104:32 Naitai linoé sibawa naébbui ténré, Nagéssai sining bulué Namassu rumpunna." 
Psalms104:33 Maéloka makkélong untu' Puwangnge gangka tuwoku, makkélong pappojiyang untu' Allataalaku ri wettu engkaku mupa." 
Psalms104:34 Tennapodo Natarimai élokku, saba' Aléna mébbui atikku marennu." 
Psalms104:35 Leppessanni lennye tau madosaé ri tompo'na linoé, leppessanni tau majaé cappu binasa. Pojiwi Puwangnge, éh nyawaku! Pojiwi Puwangnge!" 
Psalms105:1 Sukkuru'no lao ri Puwangnge, abbirittangngi arajan-Na, curitai pangkauken-Na lao ri bangsa-bangsaé." 
Psalms105:2 Puwélonni pappojiyangngé untu' Puwangnge, abbirittanni sininna ébbuno iya mappabengngaé." 
Psalms105:3 Aléna Puwang Iya Pommakuwasaé; ariyo-riyono saba' appunnangennaki, sininna iya massompaé sitinajai marennu." 
Psalms105:4 Ellauno awatangeng polé ri Aléna, tuli sompai Aléna." 
Psalms105:5 Eh wijanna Abraham, atan-Na, sibawa wijanna Yakub, tau napilé-Na, éngngerangngi sininna anu makalallaing iya Napogau'é, aja' muwallupaiwi sining apettun-Na." 
Psalms105:6  
Psalms105:7 Puwangnge iyanaritu Allataalata, apettun-Na takkennai ri sininna linoé." 
Psalms105:8 Tuli naéngngerangngi matu assijancin-Na, mannennungeng jancin-Na." 
Psalms105:9 Iyaro assijancingngé Naébbui sibawa Abraham, nainappa sibawa Ishak;" 
Psalms105:10 nainappa napakkasse sibawa Yakub, mancaji assijancing iya mannennungengngé untu' umma Israélié." 
Psalms105:11 Adanna, “Uwabbéréyangngi matu tana Kanaan lao ri iko, mancaji appunnangeng manamu.”" 
Psalms105:12 Riyolo tuwoi umma'na Allataala selaku tau laing kuwaro jumellana mennang céddé bawang. 
Psalms105:13 Solléi mennang polé ri bangsaé lao ri bangsaé, létté polé ri wanuwaé lao ri wanuwa laingngé." 
Psalms105:14 Iyakiya dé' naleppessangngi Puwangnge muwi niga tenre'i mennang; nasaba mennang, Naparéngngerangiwi arung-ngarungngé," 
Psalms105:15 “Aja' muganggui sining tau Upilé, aja' mupogau'i majaé lao ri nabi-nabik-Ku!”" 
Psalms105:16 Napapoléi Puwangnge akkadérengngé ri wanuwaéro, sibawa malai sininna pappassadiyaang inanréna." 
Psalms105:17 Iyakiya Nasuroi séddié tau poddiyoloi mennang, Yusuf, iya puraé ribalu selaku ata." 
Psalms105:18 Risiyoi ajéna sibawa pabbalenggu, ripaggénoiwi ellonna ranté bessi." 
Psalms105:19 Angkanna kajajiyanni iya nabotoé, ripattongengngi ri ada-adanna Puwangnge." 
Psalms105:20 Nainappa arung Maséré, panguwasana bangsa-bangsaé, paleppe'i polé ri tarungkué." 
Psalms105:21 Riwéréngngi jamang murusu'i saorajaé, sibawa riwéréng akuwasang ri yasé'na sininna waramparanna;" 
Psalms105:22 makkuwatoro akuwasang untu' matoro'i sining pegawénna arungngé, sibawa pimpingngi sining tomacowa-cowaé." 
Psalms105:23 Nainappa lao Yakub ri Maséré sibawa mattette kuwaro selaku tau laing. 
Psalms105:24 Puwangnge mébbui umma'-Na tattamba maéga, angkanna lebbi mawatang mennang naiya balinna." 
Psalms105:25 Napinrai atinna tau Maséré'é angkanna nacéccé umma'-Na sibawa gaukengngi ata-atan-Na sibawa macéko-céko. 
Psalms105:26 Nainappa nasuro Musa atan-Na sibawa Harun tau Napiléna. 
Psalms105:27 Ri Maséré napogau'i anu makalallaingngé, pangkaukeng-pangkaukeng battowa polé ri Puwangnge," 
Psalms105:28 namapato mennang lao ri parénta-Na. Nainappa napancaji Puwangnge iyaro wanuwaé mapettang kape. 
Psalms105:29 Napinrai salona mennang mancaji dara, angkanna cappu sininna baléna." 
Psalms105:30 Makkaluppe-lupperengngi cuppangngé ri wanuwanna mennang, mala muttama ri laleng saorajana arungngé." 
Psalms105:31 Nasaba paréntana Allataala poléni sining lale'é, sibawa sining namo'é makkatulung ri sininna wanuwaé." 
Psalms105:32 Natiri'i ése'é passulléna bosié, sibawa papolé billa siyanré-anré," 
Psalms105:33 Naléttungngi pong anggoro'é sibawa pong araé, sibawa natubbang manengngi sininna ajukajunna mennang." 
Psalms105:34 Nasaba parénta-Na napoléna incalé, maéga senna jumellana, tenribilang." 
Psalms105:35 Naanré manengngi sininna tanet-tanengngé ri dare'é, sibawa manréi gangka cappu sininna wassélé tanaé." 
Psalms105:36 Nainappa Nauno ana' worowané macowaé ri laleng tungke kaluwarga tau Maséré'é. 
Psalms105:37 Nainappa Naantara bangsa Israélié massu, tiwii mennang ulaweng sibawa péra'; iya manenna madisingngi sibawa mawatang." 
Psalms105:38 Nakennani tau Maséré'é pappénedding métau sibawa mappakatau-tau, jaji masennanni mennang wettunna lao tau Israélié." 
Psalms105:39 Ripallebbakengngi ellung ri Allataala untu' cinaungiwi umma'-Na, sibawa api untu' tajangiwi ri wennié." 
Psalms105:40 Méllauwi mennang, naripapoléngen-Na uro, Nariwérénni mennang roti polé ri surugaé gangka messo." 
Psalms105:41 Napuwé'i bulu batué, nacumpana uwai iya massolo'é pada-pada saloé ri padang kessi'é." 
Psalms105:42 Saba' naéngngerangngi Puwangnge jancin-Na lao ri Abraham, atan-Na." 
Psalms105:43 Nanaantara'ni atan-Na sibawa marennu, sining tau napilé-Na sibawa gora-gora." 
Psalms105:44 Nabbéréyangngi lao ri mennang tanana bangsa-bangsaé, sining dare'na mennang napancajiwi appunnangenna umma'-Na," 
Psalms105:45 kuwammengngi namapato umma'-Na lao ri hukkung-hukkun-Na sibawa turusiwi parénta-parénta-Na. Pojiwi Puwangnge! 
Psalms106:1 Pojiwi Puwangnge! Sukkuru'no lao ri Puwangnge, nasaba makessingngi; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na." 
Psalms106:2 Niga mulléi mabbirittangngi aporénna Puwangnge, sibawa mabbéré pappojiyang iya sitinajaé untu' Aléna?" 
Psalms106:3 Masennangngi tau iya turusiyéngngi sining parénta-Na, sibawa tuli tongeng ri laleng tindakanna." 
Psalms106:4 Engngerakka, oh Puwang, untu' akessingem-Mu lao ri umma'-Mu, tulung tokka rékko Mupassalama'i mennang." 
Psalms106:5 Tennapodo uwitai adécéngenna sining tau Mupilé sibawa mariyo-riyo silaong umma'-Mu. Tennapodo mabangka'ka sibawa marennu silaong sining tau iya mancajiyé appunnangem-Mu. 
Psalms106:6 Purani madosa pada-pada toriyolota; purani pogau'i majaé sibawa madoraka. 
Psalms106:7 Wettunna ri Maséré dé' napahangngi néné-nénéta; winru-Mu iya mappabengngaé dé' mennang napahangngi. Nallupaiwi matu mennang pammasé-Mu iya maonaé, sibawa ri seddéna Tasi Gelagah maronta'i mennang lao ri Iya Pommatanré." 
Psalms106:8 Iyakiya Puwangnge passalama'i mennang nasaba Aléna muto, kuwammengngi namanessa aporén-Na." 
Psalms106:9 Nasaba parénta-Na namancaji marakko Tasi Gelagah, Natiwii umma'-Na mallaleng molai tasi'é, pada-pada molai padang kessi'é." 
Psalms106:10 Nanallalengiwi Naripassalama'i mennang polé ri limanna balié, Naripaleppe'i mennang polé ri akuwasanna balié." 
Psalms106:11 Iyakiya balinna mennang ripatallemme'i ri uwai; dé' muwi séddi tau nasésé. 
Psalms106:12 Nainappa umma'-Na mateppe lao ri jancin-Na sibawa makkélong pappojiyang untu' Aléna. 
Psalms106:13 Iyakiya masitta'i mallupaiwi pangkaukenna Puwangnge sibawa tinda temméllauwi pangaja-Na. 
Psalms106:14 Ri padang kessi'é ménré'i napessunna mennang, nanacobai Allataala." 
Psalms106:15 Riwéréngngi aga naéllau mennang, iyakiya lasa saito iya kennaéngngi mennang." 
Psalms106:16 Ri padang kessi'éro mangémpurui mennang lao ri Musa sibawa lao ri Harun atan-Na iya mapaccingngé. 
Psalms106:17 Namapuwé tanaé memme'i Datan, tongkoi Abiram sibawa kaluwargana." 
Psalms106:18 Nonnoi apié manréi kalompo'na mennang, mangureng manengngi iya puraé madoraka." 
Psalms106:19 Ri Bulu Sinai mébbui mennang ana' saping ulaweng, sibawa sompai dato'-dato' ricuwangngéro." 
Psalms106:20 Naséléi mennang Allataala iya marajaé sibawa dato'-dato' saping pakkanré wella. 
Psalms106:21 Nallupaiwi mennang Allataala pappassalama'na iya puraé pogau' gau'-gau' iya battowaé ri Maséré. 
Psalms106:22 Masero tongeng sining pangkauken-Na ri wanuwaéro, mappabengnga tindakan-Na ri Tasi Gelagah." 
Psalms106:23 Namanniya'na Allataala paccappui mennang, iyakiya ripésangkaiwi ri Musa, tau napilé-Na. Mancajini Musa pappallalanna mennang, angkanna soro cai-Na Allataala." 
Psalms106:24 Nainappa mennang nasampéyang wanuwa iya magelloéro nasaba dé' namateppe lao ri jancinna Allataala. 
Psalms106:25 Mannoko'-noko'ni mennang ri laleng kémana sibawa dé' namaélo méngkalingai saddanna Puwangnge. 
Psalms106:26 Namajjanci-Na sibawa mattanro maélo mpunoi mennang ri padang kessi'é. 
Psalms106:27 Nabbéyangngi matu wija-wijanna mennang ri yelle'na bangsa-bangsaé sibawa passara-sarangngi ri wanuwa-wanuwa laingngé. 
Psalms106:28 Nainappa ri Péor nasompai mennang Baal, sibawa nanréi pakkasuwiyang untu' déwata-déwataé." 
Psalms106:29 Iyaro pangkaukengngé napaompoi caina Puwangnge, angkanna rigasa mennang ri sai iya mappakatau-taué." 
Psalms106:30 Iyakiya tokkongngi Pinéhas hukkungngi iya pasalaé, namappésauna iyaro saié." 
Psalms106:31 Iyaro pangkaukengngé naangga'i selaku jasana, sibawa risénge untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms106:32 Ri sining bujungngé ri Mériba naébbui mennang macai Puwangnge, sibawa sussaiwi Musa sibawa pangkaukenna mennang." 
Psalms106:33 Naébbui mennang massesse ati, angkanna mabbicara tennapikkiri." 
Psalms106:34 Bangsa-bangsa laingngé dé' mennang napaccappui, pada-pada iya napparéntangngé Puwangnge." 
Psalms106:35 Mala mennang sikoréi sibawa bangsa-bangsaéro, sibawa turui cara-carana tau iya dé'é naissenggni Allataala." 
Psalms106:36 Nainappa mennang massompa barahala-barahala, na iyanaro mancaji saba' aruttungenna mennang." 
Psalms106:37 Nakkarobangengngi mennang ana'-ana'na lao ri barahala-barahala Kanaan. 
Psalms106:38 Napassui mennang darana tau dé'é napasala, darana ana'-ana'na muto mennang, untu' nakkarobangeng lao ri barahala-barahalaé; angkanna iyaro wanuwaé nacarépai mennang." 
Psalms106:39 Nasaba sining pangkaukengngéro namancaji najisi'na mennang, sibawa dé' namatinulu lao ri Allataala." 
Psalms106:40 Namalluwa'na caina Puwangnge lao ri mennang, maciddi'ni sibawa appunnangeng riyaléna." 
Psalms106:41 Nanabbéréyanni mennang lao ri bangsa-bangsaé, Naleppessangngi mennang rikuwasai ri balié." 
Psalms106:42 Naritenre'na mennang risining balinna, sibawa ripatunru ri yawa akuwasanna mennang." 
Psalms106:43 Makkolik-koling Puwangnge paleppe'i mennang, iyakiya lebbi napojiwi mennang maronta, angkanna mennang binasa ri laleng dosa-dosana." 
Psalms106:44 Iyakiya naéngkalingai Puwangnge gorana mennang, Najampangiwi asussanna mennang." 
Psalms106:45 Nasaba mennang Naéngngerangngi matu assijancin-Na sibawa napojiwi mennang nasaba pammasé-Na iya battowaé. 
Psalms106:46 Naébbui mennang riyamaséi ri sininna tau iya tawangngéngngi mennang. 
Psalms106:47 Passalama'ki, oh Puwang Allataalata, paddeppungekki polé ri yelle'na bangsa-bangsaé, kuwammengngi weddikki sukkuru sibawa pojiwi asem-Mu iya mapaccingngé." 
Psalms106:48 Pojiwi Puwangnge, Allataalana Israélié, makkekkuwangngé sibawa mannennungeng. Leppessanni sininna tauwé makkeda, “Aming!” Pojiwi Puwangnge!" 
Psalms107:1 “Sukkuru'no lao ri Puwangnge saba' makessingngi, pammasé-Na mannennungengngi.”" 
Psalms107:2 Powadani iyaro makkolik-koling, éh iko iya puraé ripassalama polé ri asussangngé." 
Psalms107:3 Purano ripaddeppungeng polé ri wanuwa-wanuwa laingngé, polé ri alau sibawa yajang, manorang sibawa yattang." 
Psalms107:4 Engka sollé ri padang makkale-ale'é, sibawa dé' naissengngi laleng laowé ri onrong riyonroiyé ri kotaé." 
Psalms107:5 Alupurengngi mennang sibawa adekkang sibawa ateddéngeng sininna amménasanna. 
Psalms107:6 Ri laleng asussang mangobbii mennang lao ri Puwangnge, sibawa paleppe'i mennang polé ri aperisengngé." 
Psalms107:7 Napimpingngi mennang molai laleng malempué lao ri onrong riyonroiyé ri kotaé. 
Psalms107:8 Sitinajai mennang sukkuru lao ri Puwangnge nasaba pammasé-Na, nasaba sining ébbu-Na iya mappabengngaé untu' tolinoé." 
Psalms107:9 Saba' Napassauwi tau iya madekkaé, sibawa bolloiwi tau malupué sibawa sininna iya makessingngé." 
Psalms107:10 Engka tappangkung ri laleng pettangngé, tau ritahang iya manrasa-rasaé ri laleng balenggu bessié," 
Psalms107:11 saba' purai mennang maronta lao ri Allataala sibawa dé' najampangiwi paréntana Iya Pommatanré. 
Psalms107:12 Nareppo'i atinna mennang sibawa jamang marejjing; sempé'i mennang na dé'gaga mattulung. 
Psalms107:13 Ri laleng asussang mangobbii mennang lao ri Puwangnge, sibawa paleppe'i mennang polé ri aperisengngé." 
Psalms107:14 Natiwii mennang massu polé ri pettangngé, sibawa poloi balenggunna mennang." 
Psalms107:15 Sitinajai mennang sukkuru lao ri Puwangnge nasaba pammasé-Na, nasaba sining ébbu-Na iya mappabengngaé untu' tolinoé." 
Psalms107:16 Saba' Naruttungngi sining tange tembagaé, sibawa reppo'i sining paccala bessié." 
Psalms107:17 Engka madongo sibawa manrasa-rasa nasaba dosa-dosana mennang, enrengngé risissa nasaba asalanna mennang." 
Psalms107:18 Maciddi'i mennang lao ri sininna inanré, macawé'ni ajjalenna mennang." 
Psalms107:19 Ri laleng asussang mangobbii mennang lao ri Puwangnge, nanapaleppe'i mennang polé ri aperisengngé." 
Psalms107:20 Napajjappai mennang sibawa parénta-Na, sibawa paleppe'i mennang polé ri kalebbonna kuburu'é." 
Psalms107:21 Sitinajai mennang sukkuru lao ri Puwangnge nasaba pammasé-Na, nasaba sining ébbu-Na iya mappabengngaé untu' tolinoé." 
Psalms107:22 Leppessanni mennang sukkuru sibawa tiwi pakkasuwiyang, sibawa mabbirittangngi pangkauken-Na sibawa élok-kélong marennu." 
Psalms107:23 Engkato sompekiwi tasi'é sibawa kappala, untu' sappa dallé ri tasi malowangngé." 
Psalms107:24 Naitai mennang sining pangkaukenna Puwangnge, winru-Na iya makalallaingngé ri tasi'é." 
Psalms107:25 Nasaba parénta-Na mangirii anginrajaé sibawa pasiyappo'-appo'éngngi bombangngé. 
Psalms107:26 Tarakka matanré sining kappala'é ri yelle'é, nainappa naggeppuwang ri borina dolangengngé. Teddéng abaraningenna sining tauwé moloiwi abala maloppo makkuwaéro." 
Psalms107:27 Malingngi mennang sibawa tassulus-sulung pada-pada tau mabo'é sibawa ateddéngeng akkaleng. 
Psalms107:28 Ri laleng asussang mangobbii mennang lao ri Puwangnge, sibawa paleppe'i mennang polé ri aperisengngé." 
Psalms107:29 Anginraja iya majjallo'é Nasuroi mammekko, mancaji tennang toni sining bombangngé." 
Psalms107:30 Masennanni mennang saba' labe'ni anginrajaé; Natiwini mennang ri pelabuhang iya nattujuiyé. 
Psalms107:31 Sitinajai mennang sukkuru lao ri Puwangnge nasaba pammasé-Na, nasaba sining ébbu-Na iya mappabengngaé untu' tolinoé." 
Psalms107:32 Napakalabbai mennang arajanna Puwangnge ri tengngana umma'-Na, sibawa pojiwi Aléna ri laleng addeppu-deppungenna tomacowa-cowaé." 
Psalms107:33 Napinrai sining saloé mancaji padang kessi mancajiwi mata uwai tana iya makarossaé. 
Psalms107:34 Tana commo'é Napancajiwi padang pejjé, nasaba jana sining tau iya monroiyéngngi." 
Psalms107:35 Padang kessi'é Napinrai mancaji kullang uwai, tana rakkoé mancaji mata uwai." 
Psalms107:36 Nataroi sining tau malupué kuwaro; patettongngi mennang kota untu' naonroi mennang. 
Psalms107:37 Naamporiwi mennang sining dare'na sibawa mattaneng anggoro, nainappa paddeppungeng wassélé iya maonaé." 
Psalms107:38 Puwangnge mpéréngngi mennang maéga ana', sibawa matterui mabbija-bija olokolo'na." 
Psalms107:39 Iyakiya ricaui mennang nacéddé mani monro nasaba anrasa-rasang sibawa attenrekeng iya mabecco'é. 
Psalms107:40 Puwangnge pakariyawai sining panguwasana, sibawa suroi mennang sollé ri padang makkale-ale iya dé'é gaga lalenna." 
Psalms107:41 Iyakiya tau kasiyasié Napaleppe'i polé ri asussanna mennang, tattambai kaluwargana pada-pada bimbala makkonrongngé." 
Psalms107:42 Riitai ri tau malempué sibawa marennu, iyakiya tau majaé ri pammekkoi." 
Psalms107:43 Tennapodo tau mapanré pikkiri'i sininna gau'éro sibawa mangakuiwi makkedaé tette'i Puwangnge mamaséiwi. 
Psalms108:1 Elong. Mazmurna Daud. 
Psalms108:2 Masse'ka mateppe, oh Allataala, maéloka makkélong sibawa pojiko. Eh tokkonno, nyawaku!" 
Psalms108:3 Eh tokkonno, gambusu sibawa kacapi! Maéloka teddui éléé." 
Psalms108:4 Puwang, maéloka sukkuru lao ri Iko ri yelle'na bangsa-bangsaé. Macinnaka makkélong pappojiyang untu' alé-Mu ri yelle'na rupa tauwé." 
Psalms108:5 Saba' maloppoi pammasé-Mu lettu ri langié sibawa atinulurem-Mu lettu'i ri ellungngé. 
Psalms108:6 Oh Allataala, ajjellokengngi arajam-Mu ri langié, sibawa alebbirem-Mu ri sininna linoé." 
Psalms108:7 Passalama'ki sibawa akuwasam-Mu, baliwi sempajatta, kuwammengngi naripassalama sining tau iya Muwamaséiyé." 
Psalms108:8 Polé ri onron-Na iya mapaccingngé makkedai Allataala, “Maéloka gora-gora sibawa tawa-tawai tana Sikhem, Lompo Sukot Uloteréiwi matu." 
Psalms108:9 Giléad sibawa Manasyé iyanaritu appunnangek-Ku, Efraim palo-palo baja'-Ku, sibawa Yéhuda tekkeng akkarungek-Ku." 
Psalms108:10 Iyakiya Moab iyanaritu onrong abbissang ajé-Ku; gora-gora pacau-Ka lao ri Filistéa. Lao ri Edom Uwaggenrungengngi lapikajé-Ku, selaku tanrang makkedaé appunnangek-Kui.”" 
Psalms108:11 Niga tiwika matu ri Edom? Niga dulukka lao ri kota mabbénténgngéro? 
Psalms108:12 Oh Allataala, dé'ga Muwaccowé silaongekki? Dé'ga Mumaju silaong tentarata?" 
Psalms108:13 Tulukki polé ri balié, saba' bantuwanna tolinoé dé' nakkéguna." 
Psalms108:14 Silaong Allataala, baraniki taporé matu; Aléna ritu caui balitta." 
Psalms109:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmurna Daud. Oh Allataala iya tuli upojiyé, aja' tamammekko." 
Psalms109:2 Saba' nagasaka tomajaé sibawa topabengnguwangngé iya massiyamporengngé curita-curita bellé passalekku. 
Psalms109:3 Nagasaka mennang sibawa ada-ada penno paccéccé, sibawa musuka temmakkéalasang." 
Psalms109:4 Nateppuka mennang, namuni uwamaséiwi mennang, sibawa pura massempajangengngi mennang." 
Psalms109:5 Nawale'i mennang akessingekku sibawa ja, nenniya pammaséku sibawa paccéccé." 
Psalms109:6 Akkano séddi tau maja untu' madélékiwi, leppessanni ritenre ri balinna." 
Psalms109:7 Leppessanni riadéléki sibawa ripannessa sala, sibawa leppessanni sempajanna riangga dosa." 
Psalms109:8 Leppessangngi atuwonna masitta maccappa, sibawa jabatanna nalai tau laingngé." 
Psalms109:9 Leppessanni ana'-ana'na mancaji béu, sibawa bainéna mancaji janda." 
Psalms109:10 Leppessanni ana'-ana'na mancaji paréllau-éllau iya solléé, sibawa rirukka polé ri ruttungeng bolana." 
Psalms109:11 Leppessanni sininna appunnangenna ribésella ri passinge inrengngé, sibawa wassélé turuppuse'na narampasa tauwé." 
Psalms109:12 Aja' naengka makessing ati lao ri aléna, iyaré'ga carinnaiwi ana'-ana' iya nasalaiyé." 
Psalms109:13 Leppessangngi sininna wija-wijanna ripaccappu, sibawa asenna riyallupai ri abbatireng ri munrié." 
Psalms109:14 Leppessangngi jana toriyolona tette naéngngerang Puwangnge, sibawa dosana indo'na dé' nariledda." 
Psalms109:15 Leppessanni dosana mennang tuli naéngngerang Puwangnge, sibawa dé'gaga méngngerangngi mennang ri linoé." 
Psalms109:16 Saba' iyaro tauwé dé' naengka naéngngerangngi untu' mappaitang paressé babuwa. Nacallai tau kasiyasié sibawa manrasa-rasaé, sibawa naunoi tau iya malemmaé." 
Psalms109:17 Napojiwi patanroi; leppessanni aléna nakenna tanro! Dé' napojiwi mabbéré barakka, leppessanni dé'gaga barakka untu' aléna!" 
Psalms109:18 Untu' aléna iyaro patanroié pangkaukeng biyasa, pada-pada muwa pasangngi pakéyanna. Leppessanni iyaro tanroé mabbarébé pada-pada uwai ri watakkaléna, sibawa pada-pada minnya'é ri laleng buku-bukunna." 
Psalms109:19 Leppessangngi iyaro tanroé tongkoi pada-pada pakéyangngé, sibawa tuli malilii pada-pada babbangngé." 
Psalms109:20 Puwang, pateppai pahukkungengngéro ri yasé'na teppuékka, ri yasé'na tau iya mabbicara majaé passalekku." 
Psalms109:21 Iyakiya tulukka situru sibawa jancim-Mu, oh Puwang Allataalaku, passalama'ka nasaba akessingemmu sibawa pammasé-Mu." 
Psalms109:22 Saba' kasiyasika sibawa manrasa-rasa, sibawa maloi atikku lettu marilaleng." 
Psalms109:23 Céddé'ka teddéng pada-pada wajo-wajoé ri arawéngngé, riyaggeppuwakka pada-pada incalé." 
Psalms109:24 Ténré uttuku nasaba mappuwasa, watakkaléku mancaji marakkoi namakojo." 
Psalms109:25 Sining tau iya mitaékka napakatunaka nanapaccilic-ciling towi ulunna. 
Psalms109:26 Tulukka, oh Puwang Allataalaku, passalama'ka situru sibawa pammasé-Mu." 
Psalms109:27 Nanaissengngi matu balikku makkedaé iyaro pangkaukem-Mu, makkedaé Iko Puwang, iya pogau'éngngi." 
Psalms109:28 Namuni mennang natanroika, tennapodo Iko barakkakika. Muwi tokkongngi mennang, ripakasirii matu mennang; iyakiya tennapodo iyya, atam-Mu, ripakarennui." 
Psalms109:29 Leppessangngi sining tau iya tenre'ékka ripennoi atunang, sibawa pappénedding masiri tongkoi mennang pada-pada jumbaé." 
Psalms109:30 Maéloka pojiwi Puwangnge sibawa sadda macenno, pakalabbai Aléna ri tengngana addeppungenna umma'é." 
Psalms109:31 Saba' Aléna méwaiwi sibawa passalama'i tau kasiyasié polé ri mennang iya pateppaéngngi pahukkung maté ri yasé'na. 
Psalms110:1 Mazmurna Daud. Makkedai Puwangnge lao ri puwakku, “Tudanno ri seddé atauk-Ku, narapi sining balimmu Upatunrukekko.”" 
Psalms110:2 Polé ri Sion nalowangiwi matu Puwangnge akkarungemmu; akuwasaini sining balimmu! 
Psalms110:3 Ri esso apolémmu sibawa akuwasang, ri bulu-bulu iya mapaccingngé, mallurui ra'ya'mu sibawa cenning ati. Pada-pada cinoddoé ri éléé, sining kalloloé poléi ri iko." 
Psalms110:4 Purai majjanci Puwangnge sibawa tanro, dé' nagettengngi matu paimeng, “Iko ritu imang untu' mannennungeng, pada-pada Malkisédék.”" 
Psalms110:5 Engkai Puwangnge ri seddé ataummu, rékko macayii, Nacaui sining arungngé." 
Psalms110:6 Nahukkungngi matu bangsa-bangsaé, angkanna tassiya-siya sining ujué. Napaccappui matu sining panguwasaé ri sininna linoé." 
Psalms110:7 Ménungngi matu arungngé polé ri saloé ri wiring lalengngé, puranana ricau, pacaui matu." 
Psalms111:1 Pojiwi Puwangnge! Sukkuru'ka lao ri Puwangnge sibawa sukku atikku ri tengngana addeppungenna umma'-Na. 
Psalms111:2 Makalallaing tongeng sining pangkaukenna Puwangnge, sitinajai risalidiki risining tau iya pojiyéngngi." 
Psalms111:3 Jama-jamanna Puwangnge marajai sibawa ripojiwi, adéléken-Na mannennungengngi." 
Psalms111:4 Iyaro Puwangnge mamaséi sibawa pacarinnai, Napogau'i sining pangkaukeng iya mappabengngaé, kuwammengngi natette'ki méngngerangngi." 
Psalms111:5 Nawéréngngi dallé tau iya mateppe'é, sibawa tuli naéngngerangngi matu assijancin-Na." 
Psalms111:6 Purani nappaitang akuwasan-Na lao ri umma'-Na, ri laleng nawérén-Na mennang tana manana bangsa-bangsaé." 
Psalms111:7 Adélé'i Puwangnge sibawa matinului ri laleng sininna tindakan-Na, sininna parénta-Na weddingngi riyattuwang." 
Psalms111:8 Mattahangngi hukkun-Na sillampé wettué, nabbéréyangngi ri laleng atongengeng sibawa adélékeng." 
Psalms111:9 Napaleppe'i umma'-Na, sibawa pakangka assijancing mannennungengngé sibawa mennang. Aléna ritu Puwang iya mapaccingngé sibawa poré!" 
Psalms111:10 Nigi-nigi macinna mancaji mapanré harusu'i pakalebbii Puwangnge, mabbéréi pappahang lao ri sininna tau iya mapatoé. Ripojiwi Puwangnge sillampé wettué!" 
Psalms112:1 Pojiwi Puwangnge! Masennangngi tau mateppe'é, iya pojiyéngngi sining paréntana Puwangnge." 
Psalms112:2 Makuwasai matu ana'-ana'na ri wanuwaéwé, ribarakkakiwi matu wijanna tau makessingngé." 
Psalms112:3 Sugii matu kaluwargana sibawa madécéng, sibawa saléwangengngi matu mannennungeng." 
Psalms112:4 Mattappai matu tajangngé ri laleng pettangngé untu' tau malempué, untu' tau adélé'é, mamaséi sibawa pacarinnai." 
Psalms112:5 Masennangngi tau iya makacuwaé sibawa napoji mappainreng enrengngé malempu risininna urusangngé. 
Psalms112:6 Dé' namakkullé natemmallolongeng tau makessingngé; riyéngngerangngi matu mannennungeng. 
Psalms112:7 Dé' namétau tarima karéba maja, masse'i atinna nasaba mateppe'i lao ri Puwangnge." 
Psalms112:8 Dé' namanenneng iyaré'ga métau, nasaba mateppe'i ricaui matu balinna." 
Psalms112:9 Natawa-tawai waramparanna, sibawa mabbéréi sidekka lao ri tau kasiyasié; tuli napogau'i iya makessingngé, rimakkuwannanaro makuwasai sibawa ripakalebbi." 
Psalms112:10 Riitai ri tau majaé namancaji macaina; naggarettakengngi mennang isinna nasaba nacéccéi. Nainappa binasa mennang; teddénni amménasanna mennang untu' mannennungeng. 
Psalms113:1 Pojiwi Puwangnge! Eh ata-atanna Puwangnge, pojiwi asenna Puwangnge!" 
Psalms113:2 Ripakalabbai matu asen-Na, makkekkuwangngé sibawa sillampé wettué." 
Psalms113:3 Polé ri alau lettu ri yajang harusu'i ripoji asenna Puwangnge. 
Psalms113:4 Makuwasai Puwangnge ri sininna bangsaé, arajan-Na naliwengngi langié." 
Psalms113:5 Nigana pada Puwang Allataalata? makkarungngi Aléna ri onrong iya matanré. 
Psalms113:6 Iyakiya napabbukku'i Aléna untu' mitai langié sibawa linoé. 
Psalms113:7 Naakkai tau kasiyasié polé ri awué, sibawa tau maperi senna'é polé ri awué." 
Psalms113:8 Napatudangngi mennang silaong sining panguwasaé, silaong sining arung polé ri umma'-Na." 
Psalms113:9 Mabbéréi ana'-ana' lao ri bainé iya manangngé, pancajiwi indo' iya masennangngé sibawa malebbi ri bolana. Pojiwi Puwangnge!" 
Psalms114:1 Wettunna bangsa Israélié massu polé ri Maséré, wettunna wija-wijanna Yakub salaiwi wanuwa laingngé," 
Psalms114:2 napancajiwi Puwangnge Yéhuda onrong mapaccin-Na, Israél napancaji daéra akuwasan-Na." 
Psalms114:3 Naitani Tasi Gelagah nainappa lari, Salo Yordan mappésau massolo." 
Psalms114:4 Luppe-luppe sining bulué pada-pada bémbé'é, kanja-kanja sining bulu-bulué pada-pada ana' bimbala'é." 
Psalms114:5 Engka aga, éh tasi, angkammu lari, sibawa Salo Yordan mappésau massolo?" 
Psalms114:6 Aga saba'na muluppe-luppe éh sining bulu, sibawa kanja-kanjako éh sining bulu-bulu?" 
Psalms114:7 Eh linoé, ténréno ri yolona Puwangnge, ri yolona Allataalana Yakub," 
Psalms114:8 iya pinraéngngi batu karangngé mancaji kolang uwai, sibawa bulu batué mancaji mata uwai." 
Psalms115:1 Tenniya idi, oh Puwang, tenniya idi, iyakiya Iko bawang harusu ripoji, saba' matinulu-Ko sibawa tette mamasé." 
Psalms115:2 Magi bangsa-bangsaé naharusu makkeda, “Kégani Allataalana mennang?”" 
Psalms115:3 Allataalata engkai ri surugaé, napogau'i aga iya Naéloriyé." 
Psalms115:4 Barahalana mennang poléi ri ulawengngé sibawa péra'é, ébbu lima tolino." 
Psalms115:5 Mappunnaiwi mennang tému, iyakiya dé' naulléi mabbicara, mappunnaiwi mata, iyakiya dé' naulléi makkita." 
Psalms115:6 Mappunnaiwi mennang daucculing, iyakiya dé' naulléi mennang maréngkalinga, mappunnaiwi inge, iyakiya dé' naulléi marémmau." 
Psalms115:7 Mappunnaiwi mennang lima, iyakiya dé' naulléi makkarawa, mappunnaiwi ajé, iyakiya dé' naulléi joppa, sibawa dé'gaga sadda massu polé ri tigero'na." 
Psalms115:8 Tennapodo makkuwairo totona sining tau iya mébbuéngngi, sibawa sininna tau iya mateppe'é lao ri aléna." 
Psalms115:9 Eh Israélié, amménasano lao ri Puwangnge, Aléna ritu mattulung sibawa linrungiko." 
Psalms115:10 Eh sining imangngé, amménasano lao ri Puwangnge, Aléna ritu mattulung sibawa linrungiko." 
Psalms115:11 Eh sininna tau mateppe'é, amménasano lao ri Puwangnge, Aléna ritu mattulung sibawa linrungiko." 
Psalms115:12 Naéngngerakki Puwangnge sibawa nabarakkakiki matu, Nabarakkakiwi matu umma Israélié sibawa sininna imang wija-wijanna Harun." 
Psalms115:13 Nabarakkakiwi matu sining tau mateppe'é, muwi baiccu'é iyaré'ga battowaé." 
Psalms115:14 Tennapodo nawérékko Puwangnge maéga ana', lao ri iko sibawa wija-wijammu." 
Psalms115:15 Tennapodo nabarakkakiko Puwangnge, pancajiyéngngi langié sibawa linoé!" 
Psalms115:16 Langié iyanaritu appunnangenna Puwangnge bawang, iyakiya linoé Nawéréngngi tolinoé." 
Psalms115:17 Dé' naripoji Puwangnge ri tau maté, tau iya nonnoénna ri onrong iya masino-sinoé." 
Psalms115:18 Iyakiya idi iya tuwoé sukkuru'ki lao ri Aléna, makkekkuwangngé sibawa lettu mannennungeng. Pojiwi Puwangnge!" 
Psalms116:1 Uwéloriwi Puwangnge, saba' Naéngkalingaka sibawa jampangiwi paréllaukku." 
Psalms116:2 Naéngkalingaka, sises-siseng mangobbika lao ri Aléna." 
Psalms116:3 Naancakka bahaya amaténg; appakatau-taurenna amaténgngé luruika, naébbuka mausé sibawa métau." 
Psalms116:4 Naumangobbi lao ri Puwangnge, “Oh Puwang, uwéllauwi, passalama'ka!”" 
Psalms116:5 Iyaro Puwangnge mamaséi sibawa adélé'i; Allataalata pennoi paressé babuwa. 
Psalms116:6 Napiyarai Puwangnge sining tau biyasaé; wettukku teppaullé napassalama'ka. 
Psalms116:7 Upattennangngi atikku, saba' makessingngi Puwangnge lao ri iyya." 
Psalms116:8 Puraka napaleppe Puwangnge polé ri amaténgngé; Nasaléworika sibawa dé' Naleppessakka sempé. 
Psalms116:9 Naweddikka péneddingiwi atuwongngé ri linoéwé, ri laleng allinrungenna Puwangnge." 
Psalms116:10 Tette'ka mateppe, namuni makkedaka, “Ritenre senna'ka.”" 
Psalms116:11 Ri laleng amalingekku makkedaka, “Dé' muwi séddi tau wedding riyatepperi.”" 
Psalms116:12 Aga uwabbéréyang matu lao ri Puwangnge untu' mpale'i akessingen-Na lao ri aléku? 
Psalms116:13 Tiwika matu pakkasuwiyang anggoro untu' Puwangnge untu' sukkurukiwi pattulun-Na. 
Psalms116:14 Upennoiwi matu jancikku lao ri Aléna ri yolona sininna umma'-Na. 
Psalms116:15 Naénnajai senna'i Puwangnge amaténna séddié tau iya Namaséiyé. 
Psalms116:16 Iyya'é atam-Mu, oh Puwang, pada-pada indo'ku, massompa tokka lao ri Iko puraka Mupaleppe polé ri tahanangngé." 
Psalms116:17 Tiwika matu akkarobangeng sukkuru lao ri Iko, naupaénré towi sempajakku lao ri Iko." 
Psalms116:18 Upennoiwi matu jancikku lao ri Puwangnge, ri yolona sininna umma'-Na" 
Psalms116:19 iya maddeppungengngé ri seddé Bolana Puwangnge, ri tengngana kota Yérusalém! Pojiwi Puwangnge!" 
Psalms117:1 Pojiwi Puwangnge, éh sininna bangsaé, pakarajai Aléna, éh sininna suku bangsaé!" 
Psalms117:2 Saba' battowai pammaséna Puwangnge lao ri idi atinuluren-Na tette'i mannennungeng. Pojiwi Puwangnge! 
Psalms118:1 Sukkuru'no lao ri Puwangnge saba' makessingngi, mannennungengngi pammasé-Na." 
Psalms118:2 Sitinajai makkeda tau Israélié, “Mannennungengngi pammasé-Na.”" 
Psalms118:3 Sitinajai makkeda sining imangngé, “Mannennungengngi pammasé-Na.”" 
Psalms118:4 Sitinajai makkeda sining tau mateppe'é, “Mannennungengngi pammasé-Na.”" 
Psalms118:5 Ri laleng aperisekku mangobbika lao ri Puwangnge; namappébali sibawa paleppe'ka. 
Psalms118:6 Dé' umétau saba' nasibawakka Puwangnge, dé' pakkullénna tolinoé lao ri iyya." 
Psalms118:7 Nasibawakka Puwangnge untu' tulukka, uwitai matu balikku ricau." 
Psalms118:8 Lebbi kessing muwi mallinrung ri Puwangnge, naiya mattuwangngi tolinoé." 
Psalms118:9 Lebbi kessing muwi mallinrung ri Puwangnge, naiya maddennuwangiyéngngi bangsa-bangsaé." 
Psalms118:10 Maéga bali mattulilingika; nasibawang akuwasanna Puwangnge, ucaui mennang." 
Psalms118:11 Nakeppukka polé ri sininna sulapa'é; nasibawang akuwasanna Puwangnge, ucaui mennang." 
Psalms118:12 Nakatulukka mennang pada-pada wanié; nasibawang akuwasanna Puwangnge, ucaui mennang. Ri laleng sikédé ripeddéiwi mennang pada-pada api iya tunuéngngi ale-kale maddorié." 
Psalms118:13 Rigasaka sibawa masero nacéddé'ka sempé, iyakiya Puwangnge tulukka." 
Psalms118:14 Puwangnge iyanaritu awatangekku sibawa usompaé, puraka napassalama." 
Psalms118:15 Engkalingai gora-gora apakalangngé ri akkéma-kémanna umma'-Na, “Napogau'i Puwangnge pangkaukeng poré!" 
Psalms118:16 Akuwasanna Puwangnge mpérékki apakalang! Napogau'i Puwangnge pangkaukeng poré.” 
Psalms118:17 Dé' umaté matu, iyakiya tette tuwo untu' mabbirittangngi ébbuna Puwangnge." 
Psalms118:18 Puraka nasissa Puwangnge sibawa maladde, iyakiya dé' nabbéréyakka lao ri amaténgngé." 
Psalms118:19 Timpakekka pintu gerbang Bolana Puwangnge, kuwammengngi umuttama sibawa sukkuru lao ri Aléna." 
Psalms118:20 Iyanaé pintu gerbang Puwangnge, banna tau malempué wedding molai." 
Psalms118:21 Upoji-Ko, saba' Mutarimai sempajakku; puraka Muwéréng apakalang." 
Psalms118:22 Batu iya nabuwangngé panré bolaé, mancajini batu passunna." 
Psalms118:23 Iyanaro pangkaukenna Puwangnge, napabengnga tongekki." 
Psalms118:24 Iyanaé esso iya napattentué Puwangnge; laono mai taramé-raméiwi sibawa marennu. 
Psalms118:25 Méllauki, Puwang, passalama'ki, oh Puwang, wérékki apakalang!" 
Psalms118:26 Ribarakkakiwi iya polé ri laleng asenna Puwangnge. Ribarakkakiko polé ri Bolana Puwangnge. 
Psalms118:27 Puwangnge iyanaritu Allataala, makacuwai lao ri idi. Alluruno mabbarisi sibawa takké-takké ri limaé, sibawa attulilingiwi mézbana Puwangnge." 
Psalms118:28 Iko Allataalaku, sukkuru'ka lao ri Iko, Allataalaku, upakaraja-Ko." 
Psalms118:29 Sukkuru'no lao ri Puwangnge saba' makessingngi, mannennungengngi pammasé-Na." 
Psalms119:1 Masennangngi tau iya atuwonnaé dé' cellana sibawa turusiwi hukkung-hukkunna Puwangnge. 
Psalms119:2 Masennangngi tau iya maccowériyéngngi parénta-Na, sibawa sukkui atinna makkuraga missengngi Puwangnge." 
Psalms119:3 Masennangngi tau iya tuwoé situru élona Puwangnge, sibawa dé' napogau'i jaé." 
Psalms119:4 Muwérékki hukkum-Mu, oh Puwang, kuwammengngi naripogau' sibawa matinulu." 
Psalms119:5 Tennapodoka nasibawang ati mattinetto maccowériwi sining peraturam-Mu. 
Psalms119:6 Rékko upuriyatiwi sininna parénta-Mu, dé' naripakasirika matu." 
Psalms119:7 Rékko uwagguruiwi apettum-Mu iya adélé'é, upoji-Ko sibawa macenning atikku." 
Psalms119:8 Maéloka turusiwi hukkum-Mu, aja' sises-siseng tasalaika." 
Psalms119:9 Naulléi kalloloé jagaiwi atuwonna temmakkécella rékko tuwoi situru parénta-Mu. 
Psalms119:10 Sukku atikku makkuraga missek-Ko, aja' taleppessakka léssé polé ri parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:11 Pappagguruwam-Mu utaroi ri laleng atikku, kuwammengngi aja' umadosa lao ri Iko." 
Psalms119:12 Upoji-Ko, oh Puwang, pagguruka attettekem-Mu." 
Psalms119:13 Uwappallebbangengngi sibawa macenno sininna hukkung iya Muwabbéréyangngé. 
Psalms119:14 Marénnuka maccowériwi sining parénta-Mu, pada-pada mappunnaiwi sininna rupanna waramparangngé." 
Psalms119:15 Maéloka magguruiwi sining apettum-Mu, sibawa puriyatiwi sining panunju'-Mu." 
Psalms119:16 Naébbuka masennang attettekem-Mu; dé' uwallupaiwi matu pappagguruwam-Mu. 
Psalms119:17 Tennapodo makacuwa-Ko lao ri atammué, kuwammengngi utette tuwo sibawa turusiwi pappagguruwam-Mu." 
Psalms119:18 Timpa'i matakku kuwammengngi uwitai pappagguruwang iya mappabengngaé ri laleng hukkum-Mu. 
Psalms119:19 Untu' cinampe bawang monroka ri linoé, aja' tasubbui hukkum-Mu polé ri aléku." 
Psalms119:20 Mapeddi atikku nataro uddani, macinnaka missengngi hukkum-Mu tungke wettu." 
Psalms119:21 Muwamparengngi tau iya matempoé, sibawa tanroiwi tau iya lésséé polé ri parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:22 Paleppe'ka polé ri pappakatunana sibawa paccellana mennang, saba' upogau'i peraturam-Mu." 
Psalms119:23 Namuni siyempe'i sining panguwasaé méwaka, nanennungngi matu atam-Mué Mupattentué." 
Psalms119:24 Sining peraturam-Mu mancajiwi pappangajaku iya pésennangiyéngngi atikku. 
Psalms119:25 Léwuka ri laleng awué; palisuni atuwokku situru jancim-Mu. 
Psalms119:26 Uwangakuiwi pangkaukekku, na-Mubalika; pagguruka attettekem-Mu." 
Psalms119:27 Tulukka pahangngi hukkung-hukkum-Mu, unennungngi matu pappagguruwam-Mu iya mappabengngaé." 
Psalms119:28 Ancuru'i nyawaku nakenna asussang, péwatangika situru sibawa jancim-Mu." 
Psalms119:29 Pabélaika polé ri laleng pusaé, nasaba akessingem-Mu, pagguruka hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:30 Purani upilé untu' mapato, tuli uwéngngerangngi parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:31 Purani uwaccowéri sining peraturam-Mu, oh Puwang, aja' taleppessakka masiri." 
Psalms119:32 Maéloka mapatoiwi parénta-Mu sibawa masennang, saba' Muwébbuka lebbi pahangngi." 
Psalms119:33 Puwang, pagguruka bettuwanna sining attettekem-Mu, kuwammengngi uwaccowériwi lettu paccappurenna." 
Psalms119:34 Ebbuka pahangngi hukkum-Mu kuwammengngi uturusiwi, sibawa upogau'i sibawa sukku ati." 
Psalms119:35 Tennapodo makkatenning masse'ka ri parénta-Mu, nasaba iyanaro upojiyé." 
Psalms119:36 Wérékka pangéloreng untu' turusiwi peraturam-Mu, pakacauriwi cinnaé mancaji sugi." 
Psalms119:37 Jagaika kuwammengngi aja' ulellungngi iya siya-siyaé, wérékka atuwong situru élo-Mu." 
Psalms119:38 Pakkasse'ni jancim-Mu lao ri atam-Mué, iya Muwéréngngéngngi tau iya mapatoé lao ri Iko." 
Psalms119:39 Pabélaiwi pappakatuna iya uwétauriyé, nasaba makessing tongeng hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:40 Wérékka atuwong mabaru, saba' adélé'-Ko, mamménasaka turusiwi sining apettum-Mu." 
Psalms119:41 Oh Puwang, appaitanni pékkugi-Ko mamaséika, passalama'ka situru sibawa jancim-Mu." 
Psalms119:42 Naweddikka baliwi tau iya pakatunaékka, saba' uwattuwangngi ada-adam-Mu." 
Psalms119:43 Tulukka untu' tuli powadai iya tongengngé, saba' mamménasaka ri apettum-Mu." 
Psalms119:44 Maéloka makkatenning ri hukkum-Mu, untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms119:45 Nautuwo matu sibawa laluwasa, nasaba makkuragaka mapatoiwi pappagguruwam-Mu." 
Psalms119:46 Uwabbirittangngi matu peraturam-Mu lao risining arungngé, nadé' matu umasiri." 
Psalms119:47 Asennangekku iyanaritu pogau'i parénta-Mu, saba' upojiko." 
Psalms119:48 Upakalebbii sibawa upojiwi paréntamu, unennungngi matu attettekemmu." 
Psalms119:49 Engngerangngi jancim-Mu lao ri atam-Mué, janci iya mabbéré paddennuwang lao ri iyya." 
Psalms119:50 Iyanaé saléworika ri laleng anrasa-rasakku, makkedaé iyaro jancim-Mu nawérékka atuwong." 
Psalms119:51 Napakatuna senna'ka tau matempoé, iyakiya dé' uléssé polé ri hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:52 Maréngngerakka lao ri hukkum-Mu iya engkaé riyolopa nariyolo, natassaléwona atikku, oh Puwang." 
Psalms119:53 Macai senna'ka lao ri tau majaé, nasaba nasalaiwi hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:54 Ri laleng atuwokku iya cina'é ri linoé, attettekem-Mu upancajiwi élok-kélong pappojiyang." 
Psalms119:55 Ri wennié uwéngngerak-Ko, oh Puwang, tette'i uwakkatenning hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:56 Lolongekka asennangeng ri laleng turusiwi sining parénta-Mu. 
Psalms119:57 Iko bawang uwacinnai, oh Puwang, majjancika maélo pogau'i pappagguruwam-Mu." 
Psalms119:58 Uwéllauwi sibawa sukku atikku paressé babuwa-Mu, amaséika situru sibawa jancim-Mu." 
Psalms119:59 Purani upikkiri ampé-ampéku, sibawa majjanci maélo turusiwi peraturam-Mu." 
Psalms119:60 Mapperi-perika sibawa dé' umattajeng untu' pajoppai parénta-Mu. 
Psalms119:61 Natangika siyo tau majaé, iyakiya dé' uwallupaiwi hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:62 Moto'ka ri tengnga bennié maélo poji-Ko, nasaba sining apettum-Mu iya adélé'é." 
Psalms119:63 Massellaoka sibawa sininna tau mateppe'é, sininna tau iya pogau'éngngi parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:64 Pennoi linoé sibawa pammasé-Mu, oh Puwang, pagguruka sining attettekem-Mu." 
Psalms119:65 Purani mupennoi jancim-Mu, oh Puwang, sibawa pogau'i makessingngé lao ri atam-Mu." 
Psalms119:66 Wérékka apanréng sibawa pangissengeng, saba' mateppe'ka lao ri parénta-parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:67 Ri wettu dé'napa narihukkung, lésséka, makkekkuwangngé makkatennikka ri parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:68 Saba' makessik-Ko sibawa pogau'i makessingngé, pagguruka sining attettekem-Mu." 
Psalms119:69 Napétenna'ka tau matempoé, iyakiya uturusiwi apettum-Mu sibawa sukku ati." 
Psalms119:70 Iyaro sining tauwé dé' napahangngi, iyakiya untu' aléku hukkum-Mu napésennangiwi atié." 
Psalms119:71 Mémeng makessingngi Muhukkukka, kuwammengngi uwissengngi sining attettekem-Mu." 
Psalms119:72 Untu' aléku hukkum-Mu lebbi mangke'i naiya sininna ulawengngé sibawa péra'é ri linoé. 
Psalms119:73 Iko ritu pancajika sibawa tappaka, wérékka pappahang untu' magguruiwi sining parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:74 Masennangngi tau mateppe'é rékko naitaka, saba' maddennuwakka ri jancim-Mu." 
Psalms119:75 Uwisseng makkedaé adélé'i apettum-Mu oh Puwang, puraka Muhukkung nasaba atinulurem-Mu." 
Psalms119:76 Tennapodo pammasé-Mu mancajiwi passaléwoku, situru sibawa jancim-Mu lao ri atam-Mu." 
Psalms119:77 Amaséika, nautette tuwo, nasaba hukkum-Mu napésennangiwi atikku." 
Psalms119:78 Leppessangngi tau matempoé mancaji masiri nasaba purai napétenna'ka, iyakiya unennun-nennungngi matu sining parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:79 Tennapodo tau mateppe'é laowi ri iyya, sininna iya missengngéngngi sining peraturam-Mu." 
Psalms119:80 Tennapodo atikku dé' naléssé polé ri attettekem-Mu, kuwammengngi dé' umasiri." 
Psalms119:81 Muddani senna'i atikku lao ri asalamakeng polé ri alé-Mu; uwamménasaiwi jancim-Mu. 
Psalms119:82 Matekko matakku tajek-Ko rupaiwi jancim-Mu, makkedaka, “Uppannapa Musaléworika matu?”" 
Psalms119:83 Makkapuru oliku pada-pada popang anggoro iya malaungngé, iyakiya attettekem-Mu dé' uwallupaiwi." 
Psalms119:84 Gangka kégi atam-Mu harusu sabbara? Uppannapa Muhukkungngi sining tau iya lellungngékka? 
Psalms119:85 Tau iya dé'é naturusiwi hukkum-Mu, purani kali kalebbong untu' palaika." 
Psalms119:86 Sininna hukkum-Mu weddingngi riyattuwang, tulukka, saba' rilellukka temmakkéalasang." 
Psalms119:87 Céddé'i mennang naulléi mpunoka, iyakiya dé' utettangngi parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:88 Passalama'ka saba' tette'-Ko mamasé, kuwammengngi uwulléi turusiwi hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:89 Puwang, masse'i ada-adam-Mu mannennungeng, mannennungengngi ri surugaé." 
Psalms119:90 Atinulurem-Mu mattahangngi sillampé wettué, Mupatettongngi linoé angkanna tette engka." 
Psalms119:91 Sininna iya engkaé makkekkuwangngé, engkai nasaba parénta-Mu, saba' ata-atam-Mu maneng mennang." 
Psalms119:92 Akkalarapanna hukkum-Mu tenniya assalenna arennukku, pasti maténa ri laleng anrasa-rasakku." 
Psalms119:93 Tuli dé' matu utettangngi parénta-Mu, saba' nasibawang iyaro Mupatuwoka." 
Psalms119:94 Passalama'ka, saba' iyya'é appunnangem-Mu, purana makkuraga turusiwi apettum-Mu." 
Psalms119:95 Mattajengngi tau majaé maélo mpunoka, iyakiya maéloka puriyatiwi hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:96 Uwitai makkedaé muwi iya sukkué engkato paggangkanna, banna parénta-Mu iya sukkué." 
Psalms119:97 Temmaka upojinna hukkum-Mu; unennungngi puppu esso. 
Psalms119:98 Tuli uwéngngerangngi parénta-Mu, iya mébbuékka lebbi mapanré naiya sining balikku." 
Psalms119:99 Pappahakku napakacauriwi pappahanna sining gurukku, nasaba unennun-nennungngi sining parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:100 Lebbi upahangngi naiya sining tomatowaé, saba' uwakkatenningngi sining apettum-Mu." 
Psalms119:101 Uniniriwi sininna kédo-kédo majaé, kuwammengngi uturusiwi pappagguruwam-Mu." 
Psalms119:102 Dé' utettangngi hukkum-Mu, saba' Iko ritu pagguruka." 
Psalms119:103 Temmaka cenninna ada-adam-Mu, lebbi macenningngi rasana naiya cani'é!" 
Psalms119:104 Nawérékka pappahang hukkung-hukkum-Mu, angkanna ucéccé kédo-kédo iya macéko-cékoé." 
Psalms119:105 Ada-adam-Mu iyanaritu pajjennangeng untu' jongkaku, cahaya untu' tajangiwi lalekku." 
Psalms119:106 Iya uwajjanciyangngé sibawa tanro urupaiwi matu, untu' makkatenning ri apettum-Mu iya adélé'é." 
Psalms119:107 Manrasa-rasa senna'ka, oh Puwang, jagaiwi atuwokku situru sibawa jancim-Mu." 
Psalms119:108 Tarimai sempajang sukkuru'ku, oh Puwang, sibawa pagguruwanna hukkung-hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:109 Tuli uwappésonangngi nyawaku, iyakiya iyya dé' uwallupaiwi hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:110 Napasangika siyo tau majaé, iyakiya dé' uléssé polé ri apettum-Mu." 
Psalms119:111 Parénta-Mu iyanaritu manaku untu' mannennungeng, iya mébbuéngngi atikku marennu." 
Psalms119:112 Mamménasaka turusiwi attettekem-Mu lettu ri cappa'na atuwokku. 
Psalms119:113 Upojiwi hukkung-hukkum-Mu, ucéccé tau iya dé'é nasukku matinulu lao ri Iko." 
Psalms119:114 Iko ritu pangéwaingekku sibawa pallinrukku, mamménasaka ri jancim-Mu." 
Psalms119:115 Eh tau majaé, abélano polé ri iyya! Maéloka turusiwi paréntana Allataalaku." 
Psalms119:116 Péwatangika situru sibawa jancim-Mu kuwammengngi utuwo, aja' taleppessakka ripakacélé ri laleng amménasakku." 
Psalms119:117 Tumpe'ka kuwammengngi usalama, sibawa tuli puriyatiwi parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:118 Musampéyangngi tau iya lésséé polé ri attettekem-Mu, siya-siya bawang belléna mennang." 
Psalms119:119 Sininna tau majaé Muwangga'i selaku warowo, rimakkuwannanaro upojiwi sining peraturam-Mu." 
Psalms119:120 Ténréka nasaba métauka lao ri Iko, métau atikku lao ri apettum-Mu." 
Psalms119:121 Purani upogau' iya adélé'é sibawa tongengngé, aja' tabbéréyakka lao ri limanna balié." 
Psalms119:122 Ajjancino makkedaé maélo-Ko tulukka, aja' taleppessakka ritenre risining tau matempoé." 
Psalms119:123 Mapessé matakku tajengngi bantuwam-Mu iya mappassalama'é, utajengngi pappaleppe iya Muwajjanciyangngé." 
Psalms119:124 Gaukekka situru sibawa pammasé-Mu, sibawa pagguruka attettekem-Mu." 
Psalms119:125 Iyya atam-Mu, ébbuka majeppuiwi, kuwammengngi upahangngi parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:126 Puwang, narapini wettunna tinda'-Ko, saba' najjalékkaini sining tauwé hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:127 Uwéloriwi sining parénta-Mu lebbi naiya ulawengngé, naiya ulaweng tuléngngé." 
Psalms119:128 Rimakkuwannanaro tuwoka situru sibawa sininna panunju'-Mu; ucéccé kédo-kédo iya majaé. 
Psalms119:129 Mappabengnga tongeng sining peraturam-Mu, nauturusiwi sibawa sukku ati." 
Psalms119:130 Rékko ripakanessai, mabbéréi tajang pappagguruwam-Mu, mabbéréi pappéjeppu lao ri tau biyasaé." 
Psalms119:131 Tapposo-poso nappase'ku, nasaba muddaningiwi parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:132 Gilinno lao ri iyya sibawa amaséika, pada-pada Muwamaséinna tau iya pojiyék-Ko." 
Psalms119:133 Pakkasse'i jongkaku situru sibawa jancim-Mu, aja' taleppessakka nakuwasai jaé." 
Psalms119:134 Paleppe'ka polé risining tau iya tenre'ékka, kuwammengngi uwulléi turusiwi peraturam-Mu." 
Psalms119:135 Barakkakika sibawa ahadérékem-Mu, sibawa pagguruka attettekem-Mu." 
Psalms119:136 Massolo'i uwai matakku pada-pada saloé, nasaba dé' nariturusi hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:137 Adélé'-Ko, oh Puwang, coco'i sininna hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:138 Parénta-parénta iya Muwabbéréyangngé adélé'i sibawa wedding riyattuwang. 
Psalms119:139 Mabbarai caiku ri laleng aléku nasaba balikku nallupaiwi pappagguruwam-Mu. 
Psalms119:140 Masse'i jancim-Mu sibawa wedding riyatepperi, upoji senna'i." 
Psalms119:141 Iyya'é baiccu'ka sibawa matuna, iyakiya dé' utettangngi pappagguruwam-Mu." 
Psalms119:142 Mattahangngi mannennungeng adélékem-Mu, sibawa hukkum-Mu tuli tongengngi." 
Psalms119:143 Nakennaka aperiseng sibawa asussang, iyakiya iya Mupattette'é napérennuiwi atikku." 
Psalms119:144 Tuli adélé'i peraturam-Mu; wérékka pappéjeppu kuwammengngi utuwo. 
Psalms119:145 Mangobbika sibawa sukku atikku lao ri Iko; balika oh Puwang, maéloka turusiwi parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:146 Mangobbika lao ri Iko; passalama'ka, maéloka makkatenning ri peraturam-Mu." 
Psalms119:147 Maéléka moto sibawa mangobbi méllau tulung; mamménasaka lao ri jancim-Mu. 
Psalms119:148 Puppu bennika maddoja, untu' nennungngi pappagguruwam-Mu." 
Psalms119:149 Engkalingaka nasaba pammasé-Mu, oh Puwang, jagaiwi atuwokku nasaba adélékem-Mu." 
Psalms119:150 Tau iya lellungngékka macawé'ni, makkatta majai mennang sibawa dé' najampangiwi hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:151 Iyakiya macawé'-Ko, oh Puwang, sininna parénta-Mu tongengngi." 
Psalms119:152 Riyolopa nauwissengngi polé ri pappagguruwam-Mu, makkedaé Mupattentui untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms119:153 Itai anrasa-rasakku sibawa passalama'ka, saba' dé' utettangngi hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:154 Ewaiwi parakaraku sibawa paleppe'ka; passalama'ka situru sibawa jancim-Mu. 
Psalms119:155 Dé' naripassalama matu tau majaé, nasaba dé' naturusiwi attettekem-Mu." 
Psalms119:156 Battowa tongeng paressé babuwa-Mu, oh Puwang, passalama'ka situru sibawa adélé'-Mu." 
Psalms119:157 Maéga tau musuka sibawa lellukka, iyakiya dé' utettangngi peraturam-Mu." 
Psalms119:158 Ucéccé mitai iyaro sining tobali'bellaé, saba' dé' mennang naccowériwi pappagguruwam-Mu." 
Psalms119:159 Itani temmaka upojinna parénta-Mu, oh Puwang, passalama'ka nasaba pammasé-Mu." 
Psalms119:160 Tongeng maneng ada-adam-Mu, sininna hukkum-Mu iya adélé'é tette'i mannennungeng." 
Psalms119:161 Nalellukka sining tau makuwasaé temmakkéalasang, iyakiya banna hukkum-Mu iya uwétauriyé." 
Psalms119:162 Naébbuka marennu jancim-Mu, pada-pada séddié tau iya runtu'é waramparang." 
Psalms119:163 Ucéccé maneng bellé, iyakiya hukkum-Mu upojiwi." 
Psalms119:164 Matteru-teruka sukkuru lao ri iko, nasaba hukkum-Mu iya adélé'é." 
Psalms119:165 Tau iya pojiyéngngi hukkum-Mu amangngi sibawa tennang, dé'gaga mulléi lawa-lawaiwi mennang." 
Psalms119:166 Mattajekka asalamakeng polé ri Iko, Puwang, upogau'i sining parénta-Mu." 
Psalms119:167 Uturusiwi sining peraturam-Mu, nenniya pojiwi sibawa sukku ati." 
Psalms119:168 Upatoiwi paréntamu sibawa panunju'-Mu, saba' Muwitai sininna pangkaukekku." 
Psalms119:169 Tennapodo pangobbiku lettu'i ri Iko, oh Puwang, wérékka pappéjeppu, situru sibawa jancim-Mu." 
Psalms119:170 Leppessanni paréllaukku lettu ri Iko, passalama'ka situru sibawa jancim-Mu." 
Psalms119:171 Tuli maéloka poji-Ko, saba' Mupagguruka Mupattette'é." 
Psalms119:172 Macinnaka makkélong passalenna jancim-Mu, saba' sininna parénta-Mu adélé'i." 
Psalms119:173 Tennapodo tuli macennik-Ko tulukka, saba' upiléi untu' maccowériwi peraturam-Mu." 
Psalms119:174 Nauddaningiwi atikku asalamakeng polé ri Iko, napérennui atikku hukkum-Mu." 
Psalms119:175 Leppessakka tuwo, kuwammengngi upoji-Ko, tennapodo sining attettekem-Mu natulukka." 
Psalms119:176 Pusaka pada-pada bimbala iya teddéngngé, poléni, sibawa sappai atam-Mué, saba' dé' utettangngi sining parénta-Mu." 
Psalms120:1 Elong ziyara. Ri laleng asussakku mangobbika lao ri Puwangnge, na-Nabalika." 
Psalms120:2 Oh Puwang, passalama'ka, polé ri pabbelléngngé sibawa pabengnguwangngé." 
Psalms120:3 Eh pabengnguwang, aga napogau' matu Allataala lao ri iko? Nasibawang aga Nahukkukko matu?" 
Psalms120:4 Nasibawang pana macéru'na séddié pajuwang, nasibawang bara iya malluwa-luwa'é!" 
Psalms120:5 Cilakaka nasaba harusu'ka tuwo sibawakko; dé'gaga sisalana monroé ri Mésékh, iyaré'ga ri yelle'na tau Kédar-é." 
Psalms120:6 Genne'ni ittana monroka silaong sining tau iya dé'é napojiwi damé. 
Psalms120:7 Rékko mabbicaraka passalenna adaméngengngé, nacinnaiwi mennang musué." 
Psalms121:1 Elong ziyara. Makkitaka lao risining bulué, polé kégi pattulungngé untu' aléku?" 
Psalms121:2 Pattulukku poléi ri Puwangnge iya pancajiyéngngi langié sibawa linoé. 
Psalms121:3 Dé' naleppessakko matu menrung, tuli jagai pallinrummu." 
Psalms121:4 Sitongenna, pallinrunna iyaro Israélié dé' naengka nacakkaruddu iyaré'ga matinro." 
Psalms121:5 Puwangnge jagaiko matu, engkai ri benrémmu untu' linrungiko." 
Psalms121:6 Dé' Mumalasa matu nasaba mata essoé ri essoé, iyaré'ga nasaba kétengngé ri wennié." 
Psalms121:7 Nalinrungiko matu Puwangnge polé ri abalaé, Najagaiko kuwammengngi nasalama atuwommu." 
Psalms121:8 Nalinrungiko wettummu polé sibawa lao, makkekkuwangngé sibawa mannennungeng." 
Psalms122:1 Elong ziyarana Daud. Marennuka wettunna makkeda tauwé lao ri iyya, “Laono mai talao ri Bolana Puwangnge!”" 
Psalms122:2 Lettu'ni makkekkuwangngé ri gerbanna kota Yérusalém. 
Psalms122:3 Yérusalém iya ripatettongngé selaku kota tassusung mareppi sibawa magello. 
Psalms122:4 Kuwaniyé lao sining suku bangsaé, suku-suku bangsa napilé Puwangnge, untu' sukkuru lao ri Aléna situru sibawa paréntana." 
Psalms122:5 Kuwaniyé lao sining arung wijanna Daud madélékiwi ra'ya'na. 
Psalms122:6 Assempajanno untu' asaléwangenna Yérusalém: “Tennapodo sininna tau iya pojiyékko saléwangengngi. 
Psalms122:7 Tennapodo engka adaméngeng ri daéramu, sibawa atennangeng ri laleng sining béntémmu.”" 
Psalms122:8 Nasaba sellao sibawa sahaba'ku makkedaka, “Tennapodo saléwangekko!”" 
Psalms122:9 Nasaba Bolana Puwangnge, Allataalata, massempajakka kuwammengngi mumasennang." 
Psalms123:1 Elong ziyara. Congaka lao ri Iko oh Puwang iya mapparéntaé ri surugaé. 
Psalms123:2 Pada-pada séddié ata taggattung lao ri puwanna, sibawa séddié ata makkunrai lao ri puwanna makkunraié, makkuwaniro idi tajek-Ko, oh Puwang, Allataalata, narapi Muwamaséiki." 
Psalms123:3 Amaséiki, oh Puwang, amaséiki, saba' maléwe' senna'ni ripakatuna." 
Psalms123:4 Genne'ni riyéllé-kéllé ri tau sugié, sibawa ribuwé' risining tau iya matempoé." 
Psalms124:1 Elong ziyarana Daud. Pékkugi akkalarapanna Puwangnge dé' naccowériki? Eh Israélié, baliwi makkuwaéwé:" 
Psalms124:2 “Akkalarapanna Puwangnge dé' nasibawakki wettutta nagasa balié," 
Psalms124:3 purani naemme tuwo-tuwo, nasaba caina mennang iya maseroé." 
Psalms124:4 Purani naalireng lémpe, sibawa nalle uwai;" 
Psalms124:5 namaténi tallemme ri laleng sulilina uwai makarame'é.” 
Psalms124:6 Laono mai tasukkuru lao ri Puwangnge, saba' dé' naleppessakki ripaccappu ri balié." 
Psalms124:7 Pada-padaki manu'-manu' iya leppe'é polé ri siyona paddengngengngé, pettuni iyaro siyoé, na idi leppe toni!" 
Psalms124:8 Pattulutta poléi ri Puwangnge iya pancajiyéngngi langié sibawa linoé. 
Psalms125:1 Elong ziyara. Tau iya mateppe'é lao ri Puwangnge, iyanaritu pada-padai Bulu Sion iya masse'é tenripakédo, sibawa mattahang mannennungeng." 
Psalms125:2 Pada-pada sining bulué linrungiwi Yérusalém, makkuwaniro Puwangnge linrungiwi umma'-Na makkekkuwangngé sibawa mannennungeng." 
Psalms125:3 Tau majaé dé' namatteru makuwasa ri tana manana tau malempué, kuwammengngi tau makessingngé dé' naccowé pogau'i majaé." 
Psalms125:4 Oh Puwang, pogau'ni makessingngé lao ri tau makessingngé, lao ri tau iya malempu atié." 
Psalms125:5 Iyakiya tau iya pogau'é macéko-céko memmuwaré rihukkungngi ri Puwangnge silaong tau majaé. Tennapodo saléwangengngi umma'-Mu! 
Psalms126:1 Elong ziyara. Wettunna Puwangnge napalisui keadaanna Yérusalém, pada-padaki mannippié!" 
Psalms126:2 Matteruki macawa sibawa makkélong marennu angkanna bangsa-bangsa laingngé makkeda, “ Puwangnge pura pogau' gau'-gau' iya maseroé untu' mennang!”" 
Psalms126:3 Mémeng Puwangnge pura pogau' gau'-gau' iya maseroé untu' idi! Rimakkuwannanaro tamariyo-riyo! 
Psalms126:4 Oh Puwang, palisui keadaatta, pada-pada salo rakkoé makkuwai paimeng ri wettu bosié." 
Psalms126:5 Tennapodo tau iya mampoé naterito, méngngalai sibawa gora-gora." 
Psalms126:6 Laowi tauwé mampo biné ri dare'na, namabbarébé towi uwai matanna. Lisui sibawa makkélong marennu tiwii wessé-wessé éngngalanna." 
Psalms127:1 Elonna Salomo. Rékko tenniya Puwangnge patettongngi bolaé, siya-siyai majjama sining tukanna. Rékko tenniya Puwangnge linrungiki, siya-siyai sining pengawal-é jaga." 
Psalms127:2 Paracuma bawang marejjing majjama sappa dallé, maélé moto sibawa matinro malalempenni; saba' napassadiyai Puwangnge untu' mennang iya Namaséiyé, wettunna mennang matinro." 
Psalms127:3 Ana'-ana'é iyanaritu pabbéréna Allataala, sitongenna, pabbéréi mennang ritu." 
Psalms127:4 Ana'-ana' worowané iya rilolongengngé ri wettu malolo padai ana' pana ri limanna pabbaranié. 
Psalms127:5 Masennangngi tau iya mappunnaiyé pappassadiyaang pana-pana iya makkuwaéro! Dé' matu naricau, wettunna moloi bali ri pengadilangngé." 
Psalms128:1 Elong ziyara. Masennangngi tau iya mateppe'é sibawa tuwo situru paréntana Allataala. 
Psalms128:2 Muwanréi matu wassélé jama-jamammu, tuwo madécéng sibawa saléwangeng." 
Psalms128:3 Bainému padai pong anggoro iya macommo'é ri laleng bolamu. Ana'-ana'mu padai cura' pong zaitungngé ri mattulilinna méjammu. 
Psalms128:4 Makkuwaniro Puwangnge barakkakiwi tau iya mateppe'é. 
Psalms128:5 Tennapodo polé ri Sion nabarakkakiko Puwangnge. Tennapodo muwitai adécéngenna Yérusalém sillampé atuwommu! 
Psalms128:6 Tennapodo malampé sunge'ko, sibawa mitai ana' eppomu! Tennapodo saléwangengngi umma'-Mu!" 
Psalms129:1 Elong ziyara. Israélié, powadani pékkugiko ricalla ri balié mappammulai wettu malolomu." 
Psalms129:2 “Nacallaka balié mappammulai wettu maloloku, iyakiya dé' naulléi mennang cauka;" 
Psalms129:3 mébbui mennang sining lo maliyung ri lekke'ku, pada-pada paddakkalaé mébbu alo-alo malampé ri dare'é." 
Psalms129:4 Iyakiya Puwang iya adélé'é pura paleppe'ka polé ri angatangengngé.” 
Psalms129:5 Leppessanni tungke tau iya céccééngngi Sion ricau sibawa ripasoro. 
Psalms129:6 Leppessanni mennang pada-pada wellaé ri pabbingengngé iya marakkoé ri wettu dé'napa naulléi tuwo; 
Psalms129:7 dé'gaga sangkiwi, iyaré'ga siyoi ri laleng kalonjéngngé." 
Psalms129:8 Dé' nakkeda matu sining tau laloé, “Tennapodo ribarakkakiko ri Puwangnge, idi barakkakiko ri laleng asenna Puwangnge.”" 
Psalms130:1 Elong ziyara. Polé ri pepping asussangngé mangobbika lao ri Iko, oh Puwang." 
Psalms130:2 Puwang, éngkalingai pangobbiku, pénessaiwi paréllaukku." 
Psalms130:3 Rékko matteru-Ko méngngerangngi dosata, oh Puwang, nigana mulléi tahang?" 
Psalms130:4 Iyakiya Mupoji maddampeng, kuwammengngi namancaji mateppe tauwé." 
Psalms130:5 Utajengngi bantuwanna Puwangnge, uwamménasaiwi jancin-Na." 
Psalms130:6 Uwuddaningiwi Puwangnge, lebbi naiya séddié paronda muddaningiwi éléé." 
Psalms130:7 Addennuwakko lao ri Puwangnge, éh umma'-Na, saba' tette'i mamasé, sibawa tuli sadiya mappassalama." 
Psalms130:8 Napaleppe'ki matu polé ri sininna asussatta. 
Psalms131:1 Elong ziyarana Daud. Puwang, dé' umabangka, sibawa dé' umatempo. Dé' ulellungngi gau'-gau' iya battowa senna'é iyaré'ga iya mawatang senna'é untu' aléku." 
Psalms131:2 Sitongenna, tennang sibawa amang atikku; pada-pada ana'lolo puraé susu, léwu tennang ri wakkanna indo'na." 
Psalms131:3 Addennuwanno lao ri Puwangnge, éh umma'-Na, makkekkuwangngé sibawa mannennungeng." 
Psalms132:1 Elong ziyara. Oh Puwang, aréngngerakki lao ri Daud, sibawa sininna anrasa-rasanna." 
Psalms132:2 Aja' tallupaiwi assompanna lao ri Iko Puwang, jancinna lao ri Iko Iya Pommawatangngé, Allataalana Yakub." 
Psalms132:3 Adanna, “Dé' umaélo mappésau ri bolaku iyaré'ga matinro ri onrong atinrokku," 
Psalms132:4  
Psalms132:5 ri wettu dé'na upassadiya bola untu' Allataalana Yakub, onrong naonroi untu' Puwang Iya Pommawatangngé.”" 
Psalms132:6 Ri Bétléhém taéngkalingai passalenna Petti Assijancingngé, nainappa riruntu ri padang Yaar." 
Psalms132:7 Laono mai talao ri onrong naonroiyé Puwangnge, sibawa sompai ri yolo-Na kadéra akkarungen-Na." 
Psalms132:8 Poléni sibawa monro ri Bola-Mu, oh Puwang, silaong Petti Assijancingngé, lambanna akuwasam-Mu." 
Psalms132:9 Tennapodo umma'-Mu gora marennu, sibawa sining imam-Mu tuli tuwoi situru élo-Mu." 
Psalms132:10 Nasaba Daud, atam-Mu, aja' tasampéyangngi arung Mupilé." 
Psalms132:11 Purai mattanro Puwangnge lao ri Daud; dé' namaélo massakkarengngi jancin-Na. Adan-Na, “Séddi ana'mu Upancaji matu arung untu' mapparénta sulléiko." 
Psalms132:12 Rékko matinului ana'-ana'mu lao ri assijancik-Ku, sibawa turusiwi parénta-parénta-Ku, na untu' mannennungeng wijanna mennang sulléiko selaku arung.”" 
Psalms132:13 Saba' purai napilé Puwangnge Sion; nacinnaiwi untu' mancaji onrong Naonroiyé. 
Psalms132:14 Adan-Na, “Kuwanié onrok-Ku untu' mannennungeng, macinnaka mapparénta ri onrongngéwé." 
Psalms132:15 Sininna apparelluwanna Upennoiwi matu sibawa maona, sining taunna iya kasiyasié Uwéréngngi inanré gangka messo." 
Psalms132:16 Imang-ngimanna nappaitangngi asalamakeng polé ri Iyya; makkélongngi matu umma'na sibawa gora marennu. 
Psalms132:17 Kuwaé séddi wijanna Daud Upancaji arung; apparéntanna Upakkasse'i matu. 
Psalms132:18 Akkarungenna tuli saléwangengngi matu, iyakiya sining balinna ripakasirii matu.”" 
Psalms133:1 Elong ziyarana Daud. Temmaka kessinna sibawa sennanna, rékko umma'-Na Allataala tuwoi sipammasé-masé!" 
Psalms133:2 Iyaro padai minnya wangi mangke'é iya ritiri'é ri tompo ulunna Harun, nainappa nonno ri ellong wajunna." 
Psalms133:3 Iyaré'ga padai cinoddoé ri Bulu Hérmon, iya nonnoé ri Bulu Sion. Kuwaniro napanonno Puwangnge barakka'-Na, atuwong untu' mannennungeng." 
Psalms134:1 Elong ziyara. Laono mai, pojiwi Puwangnge, éh sininna atanna Puwangnge, sininna iya massompaé ri Bola-Na ri wennié." 
Psalms134:2 Akkai limammu lao ri onrong mapaccingngé, sibawa pojiwi Puwangnge!" 
Psalms134:3 Tennapodo polé ri Sion ribarakkakiko ri Puwangnge, Pancajiyéngngi langié sibawa linoé!" 
Psalms135:1 Pojiwi Puwangnge! Pojiwi asenna Puwangnge, éh iko ata-atan-Na" 
Psalms135:2 iya massompaé ri Bolana Puwangnge ri onronna Allataalata. 
Psalms135:3 Pojiwi Puwangnge, saba' makessingngi, pojiwi asen-Na, masémpo atiwi. saba' makacuwai." 
Psalms135:4 Napiléi Yakub untu' Aléna, umma Israélié napancajiwi appunnangen-Na." 
Psalms135:5 Saba' uwissengngi battowa tongengngi Puwangnge, marajai napakacauriwi sininna déwataé." 
Psalms135:6 Napogau'i aga iya Naéloriyé, ri langié sibawa ri linoé, ri tasi'é sibawa ri dolangeng iya maliyungngé." 
Psalms135:7 Polé ri cappa linoé papoléi ellung, Naébbui billa'é untu' bosié. Nainappa Naparéntang angingngé kuwammengngi nassu polé ri onrong attaron-Na." 
Psalms135:8 Ri Maséré Naunoi sininna ana' macowaé polé ri tolinoé iyaré'ga olokolo'é. 
Psalms135:9 Naébbui kuwaro maéga anu makalallaing sibawa tanrang untu' hukkungngi arungngé sibawa sininna pegawénna. 
Psalms135:10 Napaccappui maéga bangsa, sibawa mpunoi arung-ngarung poré:" 
Psalms135:11 Sihon arunna Amori sibawa Og arunna Basan, enrengngé sininna arungngé ri Kanaan." 
Psalms135:12 Nainappa Nabbéréyang wanuwanna mennang mancaji appunnangenna Israélié, umma'-Na." 
Psalms135:13 Oh Puwang, tette'-Ko matu riyabbirittang, sibawa asem-Mu riyéngngerangngi ri sininna assossorengngé," 
Psalms135:14 saba' mabbéré-Ko adélékeng lao ri umma'-Mu, sibawa mamaséiwi ata-atam-Mu." 
Psalms135:15 Barahalana mennang poléi ri ulawengngé sibawa péra'é, ébbu lima tolino." 
Psalms135:16 Mappunnaiwi mennang bawa, iyakiya dé' naulléi mabbicara, mappunnaiwi mata, iyakiya dé' naulléi makkita." 
Psalms135:17 Mappunnaiwi mennang daucculing, iyakiya dé' naulléi maréngkalinga, polé ri bawana dé' nassu nappase'é." 
Psalms135:18 Tennapodo makkuwairo totona sining tau iya mébbuéngngi, sibawa mateppe'é lao ri aléna." 
Psalms135:19 Pojiwi Puwangnge, éh umma Israélié, pojiwi Aléna, éh imang-ngimanna Allataala!" 
Psalms135:20 Pojiwi Puwangnge, éh sining tau Léwié, pojiwi Aléna, iko maneng iya mateppe'é." 
Psalms135:21 Pojiwi Puwangnge ri Sion, ri Yérusalém onrong Naonroiyé. Pojiwi Puwangnge!" 
Psalms136:1 Sukkuru'no lao ri Puwangnge nasaba makessingngi; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:2 Sukkuru'no lao ri Allataala Iya Posséuwaé; mannennungengngi pammaséna. 
Psalms136:3 Sukkuru'no lao ri Puwang Iya Pommatanré; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:4 Aléna bawang mébbu sining anu makalallaing battowaé; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:5 Nasibawang apanrén-Na Napancajiwi langié; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:6 Napallebba'i linoé ri tompo'na uwai; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:7 Mébbui anu patajangiyé ri langié; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na; 
Psalms136:8 mata essoé untu' makuwasaiwi essoé; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na; 
Psalms136:9 kéteng sibawa wéttowing untu' makuwasaiwi wennié; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:10 Naunoi ana'-ana' macowaé ri Maséré; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:11 Nasilaongengngi Israélié massu polé ri Maséré; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na; 
Psalms136:12 nasibawang lima mawatang sibawa poré; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:13 Napuwé'i Tasi Gelagah; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na; 
Psalms136:14 Natiwii umma Israélié ri liweng; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:15 Iyakiya arung Maséré sibawa tentarana Napatallemme'i; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:16 Napimpingngi umma'-Na lalo ri padang kessi'é; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:17 Nacaui sining arung poré; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na; 
Psalms136:18 naunoi sining arung tarompoé; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na; 
Psalms136:19 Sihon, arunna Amori; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na;" 
Psalms136:20 sibawa Og, arung Basan; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na." 
Psalms136:21 Nabbéréyangngi wanuwanna mennang lao ri umma'-Na; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na; 
Psalms136:22 mancaji appunnangenna Israélié atan-Na; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:23 Dé' nallupaiki wettutta ricau; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:24 Napaleppe'ki polé ri limanna balié; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:25 Tungke anu tuwoé Nawéréngngi inanré; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms136:26 Sukkuru'no lao ri Allataala panguwasana langié; mannennungengngi pammasé-Na. 
Psalms137:1 Ri wirinna salo-salo Babél tudakki sibawa teri rékko riyéngngerangngi Sion. 
Psalms137:2 Ri pop-pong gandarusaé ri wanuwaéro rigattungngi kacapitta. 
Psalms137:3 Sining tau iya tawangngékki suroki makkélong untu' mennang. Sining tau iya tenre'ékki suroki puwélongngi élok-kélong marennué, “Elongekki élok-kélong polé ri Sion!”" 
Psalms137:4 Weddigga ri wanuwa laingngé makkélokki untu' Puwangnge? 
Psalms137:5 Leppessakka dé' naweddinna makkélong rékko uwallupaiko, Yérusalém!" 
Psalms137:6 Leppessakka dé' naweddinna makkélong rékko uwallupaiko sibawa dé' upancajiko upojiyé! 
Psalms137:7 Oh Puwang, éngngerangngi pangkaukenna tau Edongngé wettunna riyancuru Yérusalém. Makkedai mennang, “Ruttungngi, ruttungngi lettu ri pallangga-pallanggana!”" 
Psalms137:8 Eh Babél, ripaccappuko matu! Masennangngi tau iya wale'ékko ja iya mupogau'é lao ri idi." 
Psalms137:9 Masennangngi tau iya malaéngngi ana'-ana'lolomu nanaggeppuwangngi ri bulu-bulu batué! 
Psalms138:1 Polé ri Daud. Oh Puwang, maéloka sukkuru lao ri Iko, sibawa sukku atikku. Ri yolona sininna déwataé upuwélongngi pappojiyangngé untu' alé-Mu." 
Psalms138:2 Suju'ka mattuju ri Bola-Mu iya mapaccingngé naupoji towi asem-Mu, saba' matinulu-Ko sibawa tuli mamasé. Lebbi Mupentingkangngi jancim-Mu naiya pallolongenna tauwé passalenna alé-Mu." 
Psalms138:3 Wettukku mangobbi lao ri Iko, mappébali-Ko, Mupéwatangiwi atikku angkakku mancaji barani." 
Psalms138:4 Sininna arungngé ri linoé napoji-Ko matu, oh Puwang, saba' purani mennang naéngkalinga jancim-Mu." 
Psalms138:5 Makkélongngi matu mennang passalenna pangkaukem-Mu sibawa passalenna arajam-Mu iya battowaé. 
Psalms138:6 Malempu senna'-Ko, iyakiya Mujampangi towi iya matunaé, dé' naulléi massubbu tau matempoé polé ri Iko." 
Psalms138:7 Wettukku nakenna asussang, Muwattahangengngi atuwokku. Muéwai balikku iya mattengngangngé majjallo sibawa passalama'ka sibawa akuwasam-Mu." 
Psalms138:8 Mupennoiwi matu jancim-Mu lao ri iyya; aja' muwappésau tinda untu' umma'-Mu. 
Psalms139:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmurna Daud. Oh Puwang, Muwellungika sibawa missekka." 
Psalms139:2 Muwisseng sininna pangkaukekku; Mupahangngi pikkirakku polé mabéla. 
Psalms139:3 Muwitaka, muwi mappallaukka iyaré'ga mappésau, Muwissengngi sininna iya upogau'é." 
Psalms139:4 Mala ri wettu dé'napa umabbicara, Muwisseng aga iya maéloé upowada." 
Psalms139:5 Muwattulilingika polé ri sininna sulapa'é, nenniya Mulinrungika sibawa akuwasam-Mu." 
Psalms139:6 Iyaro pangissengem-Mu malamung senna untu' aléku, dé' narapii pikkirakku." 
Psalms139:7 Kégaka wedding lao kuwammengngi leppe'i polé ri akuwasam-Mu? Kégaka wedding lari mabéla polé ri yolo-Mu? 
Psalms139:8 Rékko ménré'ka ri langié, engka-Ko kuwaro, rékko matinroka ri linona amaténgngé, engka tokko kuwaro." 
Psalms139:9 Rékko luttuka lalo ri pong bétaraé ri alau iyaré'ga monro ri cappa yajang iya kaminang mabélaé," 
Psalms139:10 kuwatoro Mutulukka; kuwatoro Napimpikka limam-Mu. 
Psalms139:11 Rékko uwéllauwi kuwammengngi nasalipurika pettangngé, sibawa tajangngé ri mattulilikku mancaji wenniwi," 
Psalms139:12 na iyaro pettangngé dé'to namapettang untu' alé-Mu; iyaro wennié matajangngi pada-pada essoé, sibawa iyaro pettangngé pada-padai tajangngé." 
Psalms139:13 Mupancajiwi tungke bagiyanna watakkaléku, sibawa tappaka ri laleng parémmananna indo'ku." 
Psalms139:14 Upoji-Ko saba' dé'gaga padakku! Sininna pangkaukem-Mu makalallaingngi sibawa mappabengnga, tonget-tongengngi umaingeki." 
Psalms139:15 Wettunna buku-bukukku ripancaji, sibawa ripasisambus-sambung sibawa matutu ri laleng parémmananna indo'ku, nautuwo kuwaro secara rahasiya, dé' utassubbu ri alé-Mu." 
Psalms139:16 Muwitaka wettukku ri laleng parémmanang; taroki manengngi ri laleng kitta'-Mu; pura ripattentuni esso-essona ri wettu dé'napa muwi séddi ripammulai. 
Psalms139:17 Temmaka watanna pikkiram-Mu untu' aléku, oh Allataala, sibawa temmaka égana jumellana!" 
Psalms139:18 Rékko ubilangngi, lebbi maégai naiya kessi'é; rékko moto'ka, Iko mupa upikkiri." 
Psalms139:19 Tennapodo Mupaccappui tau majaé, oh Allataala, pabélaiwi sining pappassu daraé polé ri iyya!" 
Psalms139:20 Napowadai mennang majaé passalenna Iko, sibawa mattanro bellé-belléi nasabbing kota-kota-Mu." 
Psalms139:21 Oh Puwang, ucéccé tau iya céccéék-Ko, massesse atikku lao ri tau iya méwaék-Ko!" 
Psalms139:22 Ucéccé senna mennang, sibawa uwangga selaku bali." 
Psalms139:23 Salidikika oh Allataala, wellungiwi atikku, ojika sibawa issengngi pikkirakku." 
Psalms139:24 Itai ajakké engka ja ri laleng aléku, sibawa pimpikka ri laleng iya mannennungengngé." 
Psalms140:1 Untu' pamimping kor. Mazmurna Daud. 
Psalms140:2 Paleppe'ka polé ri tau majaé, oh Puwang, jagaika polé ri tau iya pogau'é ateddekeng." 
Psalms140:3 Narancanai mennang jaé ri laleng ati, sibawa esso-esso paompo assasang." 
Psalms140:4 Lilana mennang padai ula mamosoé, ada-adanna mennang padai racunna ula séndo'é." 
Psalms140:5 Oh Puwang, linrungika polé ri akuwasanna tau majaé, jagaika polé ri tau iya pogau'é ateddekeng iya makkattaé untu' pasempé'ka." 
Psalms140:6 Mammekko-mekkoi tau matempoé tangika siyo, sibawa pallebba jala untu' tikkekka. Puppu laleng mennang mattang jebba untu' jebba'ka." 
Psalms140:7 Oh Puwang, makkedaka: Iko ritu Allataalaku, jampangiwi sempajang paréllaukku." 
Psalms140:8 Puwang, Allataalaku, pappassalama'ku iya mawatangngé, puraka Mulinrungi ri laleng ammusureng." 
Psalms140:9 Aja' Mutarimai paréllaunna tau majaé, oh Puwang, aja' taleppessangngi papolé wassélé rancanana mennang." 
Psalms140:10 Aja' taleppessangngi balikku pacau; leppessanni ada-ada maja iya napowadaé mennang kennai aléna mennang iya pétenna'ékka. 
Psalms140:11 Leppessanni mennang nabosingi bara api, sibawa ribuwang ri laleng kalebbonna amaténgngé, angkanna dé'na naulléi massuna." 
Psalms140:12 Leppessanni tau iya pogau'é ateddekeng nakenna abala, aja' taleppessangngi pappétenna'é monroiwi linoé." 
Psalms140:13 Uwisseng Muwéréngngi adélékeng tau ri tenre'é, sibawa méwaiwi parakarana tau kasiyasié." 
Psalms140:14 Napoji-Ko matu tau malempué; monroi matu mennang silaongek-Ko. 
Psalms141:1 Mazmurna Daud. Mangobbika lao ri Iko, oh Puwang, tulukka masitta! Engkalingaka rékko mangobbika lao ri Iko." 
Psalms141:2 Tarimai sempajakku selaku pakkasuwiyang dupa, sibawa limakku iya maddeppa-reppaé selaku akkarobangeng wenni." 
Psalms141:3 Oh Puwang, jagaiwi témukku sibawa jagaiwi iwéku." 
Psalms141:4 Pabélaika polé ri pangéloreng pogau'éngngi majaé. Aja' taleppessakka masséddi sibawa tau madorakaé sibawa maccowé manré ri laleng péstana mennang. 
Psalms141:5 Rékko séddié tau makessing mamparekka, nenniya naajara'ka sibawa malempu, iyaro pada-padai minnya iya kaminang makessingngé untu' aléku. Tennapodo dé' usampéyangngi, saba' matteruka massempajang méwai jana mennang." 
Psalms141:6 Rékko sining panguwasana mennang ribuwangngi polé ri peppip-pepping batué, nangakuiwi matu mennang makkedaé tongengngi ada-adakku." 
Psalms141:7 Nassiyamporengngi matu buku-bukutta ri wirinna kuburu'é pada-pada séddié batu riyancuru ri tanaé. 
Psalms141:8 Iyakiya tette'ka maddennuwang lao ri Iko, oh Puwang Allataalaku, aja' taleppessakka maté, saba' mallinrukka ri Iko." 
Psalms141:9 Linrungika polé ri siyo iya ritangiyékka, polé ri jebba'na sining tomajaéro." 
Psalms141:10 Leppessangngi mennang sempé ri laleng siyona muto, iyakiya iyya tennapodo salama'ka." 
Psalms142:1 Elong pappagguruwanna Daud, wettunna engkai ri laleng gowaé." 
Psalms142:2 Mangobbika lao ri Puwangnge sibawa macenno; sibawa sadda maloppo uwéllauwi bantuwan-Na. 
Psalms142:3 Maddarékéka ri yolo-Na; upaissengiwi sininna asussak-Ku. 
Psalms142:4 Wettukku céddé pettu paddennuwang, Muwisseng aga harusu upogau'. Ri laleng iya harusu'é uwola, mammekko-mekkoi balié tangika siyo." 
Psalms142:5 Wettukku makkita libenréng, uwitai dé'gaga bantuwang untu' aléku. Dé'gaga linrungika, iyaré'ga jampangiyéngngi aléku." 
Psalms142:6 Mangobbika lao ri Iko, oh Puwang, Iko ritu onrong allinrungekku, Iko bawang uwapparelluwang ri laleng atuwongngéwé." 
Psalms142:7 Pénessaiwi pangobbiku, saba' manrasa-rasa senna'ka. Passalama'ka polé risining balikku, saba' mawatang senna'i mennang untu' aléku." 
Psalms142:8 Paleppe'ka polé ri tarungkué, na ri tengngana addeppungenna umma'-Mu upojiwi matu asem-Mu, saba' purani Mupogau' makessingngé lao ri aléku." 
Psalms143:1 Mazmurna Daud. Oh Puwang, éngkalingai sempajakku, pénessaiwi paréllaukku. Balika nasaba atinulurem-Mu, tarimai sempajakku nasaba adélékem-Mu." 
Psalms143:2 Iyya'é atam-Mu, aja' taadélékika, saba' dé'gaga tau temmakkésalang ri yolo-Mu." 
Psalms143:3 Purana nalellung balikku sibawa nacauka, sibawa naputtama'ka ri laleng tarungku iya makalemmengngé; mancajika pada-pada tau iya maittaénna maté." 
Psalms143:4 Poloni sumange'ku, malippu senna'ni atikku." 
Psalms143:5 Uwéngngerangngi esso-esso iya labe'é; upikkiri'i sininna pangkaukem-Mu, unennungngi sininna winru-Mu." 
Psalms143:6 Massempajakka lao ri Iko sibawa lima mappale; pada-pada tana marakkoé, nauddaningi-Ko nyawaku." 
Psalms143:7 Balika masitta, oh Puwang, saba' pettu paddennuwakka. Aja' tamassubbu polé ri aléku, kuwammengngi aja' upada-pada tau iya nonnoénna ri linona amaténgngé." 
Psalms143:8 Paréngngerangika élé-élé pammasé-Mu, saba' ri alé-Muka mamménasa. Jellokekka laleng iya harusu'é uwola, saba' ri alé-Muka massempajang." 
Psalms143:9 Poléka maélo mallinrung ri alé-Mu, oh Puwang, paleppe'ka polé risining balikku." 
Psalms143:10 Pagguruka pogau'i élo-Mu, saba' Iko ritu Allataalaku. Makessing ati-Ko, sibawa mupimpikka matu ri laleng iya malappaé." 
Psalms143:11 Passalama'ka situru sibawa jancim-Mu, oh Puwang, nasaba akessingem-Mu, paleppe'ka polé ri aperisengngé." 
Psalms143:12 Nasaba pammasé-Mu paccappui sininna balikku, paccappui sininna tenre'ékka, saba' iyya atam-Mu." 
Psalms144:1 Polé ri Daud. Pojiwi Puwangnge pallinrukku! Nalatika mammusu, sibawa pagguruka mammusu." 
Psalms144:2 Aléna pattulung sibawa pangéwaingekku, pappassalama'ku onrokku maccinaung. Aléna pallinrukku, onrokku manyingkiri, Napatunru'i bangsa-bangsaé lao ri iyya." 
Psalms144:3 Puwang, aga tolinoé angkanna Mujampangiwi? Niga aléna angkanna Mubati-batiwi?" 
Psalms144:4 Iyaro tolinoé padai siseppungngé anging, pada-pada wajo-wajo labe'é, makkuwaniro atuwonna." 
Psalms144:5 Oh Puwang, timpa'i langi-Mu namupanonnoi, géssai sining bulué kuwammengngi namaddumpu." 
Psalms144:6 Aggenrungengngi billa'-Mu kuwammengngi naripassara-sarang balié, leppessangngi pana-Mu kuwammengngi namétau mennang." 
Psalms144:7 Loro'i limam-Mu polé ri surugaé, sibawa paleppe'ka polé ri lémpe'é. Passalama'ka polé ri akuwasanna tau laingngé" 
Psalms144:8 iya pojiyéngngi mabbellé sibawa pabengnguwang, sibawa mattanro bellé-bellé." 
Psalms144:9 Uwakkélongek-Ko matu élong baru, oh Allataala, sibawa getti kacapi namakkélotto." 
Psalms144:10 Muwéréngngi apakalang arung-ngarungngé, sibawa paleppe'i Daud atam-Mu." 
Psalms144:11 Paleppe'ka polé ri peddanna tau mabecco'é; passalama'ka polé ri akuwasanna tau laingngé iya pojiyéngngi mabbellé sibawa pabengnguwang, sibawa mattanro bellé-bellé." 
Psalms144:12 Tennapodo ana'-ana' worowanéta ri wettu malolona pada-pada tanet-taneng iya mancaji battowaé. Tennapodo ana'-ana' makkunraitta padai alliri magelloé, iya bélo-béloiyéngngi sining sunna saorajaé."
